title: TriSplat: Simulation-Ready Feed-Forward 3D Scene Reconstruction
abstract: Sparse-view 3D reconstruction is increasingly addressed with feed-forward splatting networks that predict explicit primitives directly from images. Yet most existing methods remain centered on Gaussian primitives and expose surfaces only indirectly: extracting a usable mesh for downstream simulation, physics reasoning, or embodied interaction still requires expensive post-hoc steps that break the feed-forward promise. This limitation is especially pronounced in pose-free settings, where scene structure and camera parameters must be estimated jointly from sparse observations. We present TriSplat, a feed-forward reconstruction network that represents scenes with oriented triangle primitives and directly exports simulation-ready mesh scenes from a single forward pass. Given input images, the network predicts local 3D point maps, triangle attributes, camera poses, and optional intrinsics. Rather than regressing triangle orientation as an unconstrained latent variable, our approach constructs geometry normals from the predicted point maps, refines them with an image-conditioned normal head, and converts them into stable local frames for triangle parameterization. A mono-normal bootstrap schedule further stabilizes early training, while opacity and blur scheduling progressively sharpens the learned surface representation for direct mesh extraction. Experiments on RealEstate10K and DL3DV show that this representation produces more geometry-faithful reconstructions than Gaussian feed-forward baselines while maintaining competitive novel-view rendering quality. Because the rendering primitives are themselves surface triangles, the output can be directly ingested by physics engines, collision detectors, and standard rendering pipelines without any conversion, making it a practical simulation-ready solution for feed-forward 3D scene reconstruction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TriSplat，一种前馈神经网络，利用定向三角形基元直接生成仿真就绪的网格场景。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏视图3D重建中，前馈方法多采用高斯基元，仅间接暴露表面，提取可用网格需昂贵后处理，破坏前馈优势。尤其在无姿态设置下，需联合估计场景结构和相机参数，现有方法难以直接输出可用于下游仿真、物理推理或具身交互的网格。
light_analysis.method: TriSplat预测局部3D点图、三角形属性、相机位姿和可选内参。通过从点图构建几何法线，经图像条件法线头精化，转换为稳定局部帧参数化三角形。采用单目法线引导训练稳定早期学习，不透明度和模糊调度逐步锐化表面表示，直接提取网格。
light_analysis.result: 在RealEstate10K和DL3DV数据集上，TriSplat比前馈高斯基线生成更几何保真的重建，同时保持竞争性的新视角渲染质量。输出三角形基元可直接用于物理引擎、碰撞检测和标准渲染管线，无需任何转换。
light_analysis.conclusion: TriSplat实现了首个前馈仿真就绪3D场景重建，无需后处理即可导出网格，具有实际应用价值。局限性包括对极端稀疏视图的可能退化，未来可探索联合优化几何与外观。

title: MobileGym: A Verifiable and Highly Parallel Simulation Platform for Mobile GUI Agent Research
abstract: We present MobileGym, a browser-hosted, lightweight, fully controllable environment for everyday mobile use, targeting interaction fidelity without replicating proprietary backends. It enables two capabilities previously out of reach for everyday apps: verifiable outcome signals through deterministic state-based judging over structured JSON state, and scalable online RL through low-cost parallel rollouts. The full environment state is captured, configured, forked, and compared as structured JSON, and a single server can host hundreds of parallel instances, with about 400 MB memory per instance and about 3 s cold start. A layered state model and a declarative task-definition framework keep state programmability and task creation practical at scale, and a single programmatic judging mechanism delivers both deterministic evaluation verdicts and dense RL rewards. The accompanying MobileGym-Bench provides 416 parameterized task templates, including 256 test and 160 train templates, over 28 apps, with deterministic judges and a structured AnswerSheet protocol that avoids free-text matching failures. In a Sim-to-Real case study, GRPO on Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct gains +12.8 percentage points on the 256-task test set, and on a 59-task real-device signal subset, real-device execution retains 95.1% of the simulation-side training gain. Project page: https://mobilegym.github.io.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MobileGym，一个可验证、高并行的移动GUI智能体模拟平台，支持确定性状态验证和低成本在线强化学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有移动GUI环境要么依赖专有后端导致交互保真度受限，要么无法提供可验证的奖励信号和可扩展的在线RL训练。MobileGym旨在解决这些问题，通过结构化JSON状态实现确定性判断，并利用低成本并行回滚支持大规模在线RL，从而推动移动GUI智能体的实用化研究。
light_analysis.method: MobileGym采用浏览器托管的轻量级环境，将完整环境状态捕获为结构化JSON，支持状态配置、分叉和比较。通过分层状态模型和声明式任务定义框架实现可编程性和可扩展性。单服务器可托管数百个并行实例（每实例约400 MB内存，3秒冷启动）。程序化判断机制同时提供确定性评估和稠密RL奖励。配套的MobileGym-Bench包含416个参数化任务模板，覆盖28个应用，使用结构化AnswerSheet协议避免自由文本匹配失败。
light_analysis.result: 在Sim-to-Real案例研究中，对Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct使用GRPO，在256任务测试集上提升+12.8个百分点；在59任务真实设备信号子集上，真实设备执行保留了95.1%的模拟训练收益。这表明MobileGym能有效支持模拟到真实的迁移。
light_analysis.conclusion: MobileGym为移动GUI智能体研究提供了可验证、高并发的模拟平台，解决了现有环境在可验证奖励和可扩展RL方面的局限。其确定性状态判断和低成本并行能力有助于加速在线RL训练，且Sim-to-Real迁移验证了其实用价值。未来可用于大规模移动GUI智能体训练和评估。

title: From Model Scaling to System Scaling: Scaling the Harness in Agentic AI
abstract: This paper studies the next major bottleneck in agentic AI as system scaling, not only model scaling: the design of auditable, persistent, modular, and verifiable architectures around foundation models. We refer to this shift as scaling the harness: treating the structured execution layer around a foundation model as a first-class object of design, evaluation, and optimization. Although recent large language models enable agents to use tools, retrieve information, maintain memory, and execute long-horizon workflows, evaluation remains largely model-centric, often reducing agents to final-task success while treating memory, retrieval, tool use, orchestration, verification, and governance as secondary implementation details. This framing is increasingly inadequate because agent performance emerges from the interaction among the foundation model, memory substrate, context constructor, skill-routing layer, orchestration loop, and verification-and-governance layer. Together, these components form the agent harness, which translates model capability into long-horizon agent behavior. We study scaling the harness through three core bottlenecks: context governance, trustworthy memory, and dynamic skill routing, together with the orchestration and governance mechanisms that coordinate and constrain them. We further outline a research agenda for harness-level benchmarks that go beyond one-shot task success to measure trajectory quality, memory hygiene, context efficiency, communication fidelity, verification cost, and safe evolution over time. To make the discussion concrete, we develop CheetahClaws: https://github.com/SafeRL-Lab/cheetahclaws, a Python-native reference harness, and compare it with Claude Code and OpenClaw. Our main claim is that future progress in agentic AI will depend as much on system design as on stronger foundation models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出从模型扩展转向系统扩展，强调代理AI中‘缰绳’（harness）的设计、评估与优化，并开发了CheetahClaws参考框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前代理AI评估以模型为中心，忽视记忆、检索、工具使用等系统组件，但代理性能实际源于这些组件的交互。现有方法将系统细节视为次要实现，导致无法准确衡量长周期代理行为。因此需要系统级扩展方法，关注上下文治理、可信记忆和动态技能路由等瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 提出‘scaling the harness’方法，将基础模型周围的结构化执行层作为设计、评估和优化的核心。识别三个关键瓶颈：上下文治理、可信记忆和动态技能路由，并强调协调与治理机制。开发了Python原生参考框架CheetahClaws，与Claude Code和OpenClaw进行比较。
light_analysis.result: 通过CheetahClaws框架实现可审计、持久化、模块化和可验证的代理架构。与Claude Code和OpenClaw的对比表明，系统级设计对代理性能有显著影响。但摘要未提供具体量化指标，仅强调系统设计的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 未来代理AI的进步将同等依赖于系统设计和更强的基模型。提出了超越单次任务成功的基准研究议程，包括轨迹质量、记忆卫生、上下文效率等指标。CheetahClaws作为参考实现，可推动该方向研究。

title: Squeezing Capacity from Multimodal Large Language Models for Subject-driven Generation
abstract: Subject-driven image generation aims to synthesize new images that preserve the identity of the given subject while following textual instructions. Existing approaches often encode text and reference images separately. This limits cross-modal reasoning abilities and causes copy-paste artifacts. Recent frameworks that connect multimodal models and diffusion models improve instruction following, but largely overlook identity preservation. To address these limitations, we condition diffusion models on Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) that jointly encode text and reference images, and augment it with VAE-based identity conditioning. A novel Dual Layer Aggregation (DLA) module is designed to aggregate multi-level MLLM features for optimal conditioning, and a multi-stage denoising strategy is applied to progressively balance the semantic information from MLLM and fine-detail identity from VAE during inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach harmonizes multimodal understanding with identity preservation, mitigates copy-paste issues, and achieves superior performance regarding human preference on subject-driven image generation. Our project website is available at https://zsh2000.github.io/squeeze-mllm-subject-gen/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将MLLM与扩散模型结合，并采用VAE身份条件化和Dual Layer Aggregation模块，提升主体驱动图像生成的身份保持与指令跟随能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有主体驱动图像生成方法通常分别编码文本和参考图像，限制跨模态推理并导致复制粘贴伪影；而近期连接多模态模型和扩散模型的方法改善了指令跟随，但忽视了身份保持。为此，本文旨在同时提升多模态理解与身份保持，解决现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 本文方法将扩散模型条件于联合编码文本和参考图像的MLLM，并引入VAE-based身份条件化以增强细节。核心创新是Dual Layer Aggregation (DLA)模块，用于聚合多级MLLM特征获得最优条件；同时采用多阶段去噪策略，在推理时逐步平衡MLLM语义信息与VAE的细粒度身份特征。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，该方法有效调和了多模态理解与身份保持，显著减轻了复制粘贴伪影。在人类偏好评估中，所提方法在主体驱动图像生成任务上取得了相较于现有方法更优的性能，证明了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过集成MLLM、VAE身份条件化及DLA模块，解决了主体驱动图像生成中的身份保持与指令跟随矛盾。该工作为多模态生成提供了新范式，具有学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的特征聚合策略或扩展到视频领域。

title: Prism: A Plug-in Reproducible Infrastructure for Scalable Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve versatility by reformulating diverse tasks into a unified instruction-following framework via instruction tuning. However, real-world deployment requires continuous adaptation to emerging tasks, motivating Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning (MCIT). Despite its growing importance, current MCIT research is hindered by severe engineering bottlenecks. Existing methods are typically implemented by directly modifying the base MLLM codebase, which imposes substantial implementation overhead and yields method-specific architectures that severely limit code reuse and fair comparison. To address this, we introduce Prism, a plug-in reproducible codebase specifically designed for scalable MCIT research. It separates algorithmic development from the backbone implementation via a lightweight plugin registration mechanism, enabling new strategies to be integrated as independent plugins without modifying the underlying MLLM codebase, thereby eliminating structural fragmentation and accelerating method development. Prism natively supports widely used large-scale training pipeline, thereby enabling reproducible and scalable MCIT experimentation. Code is available at https://github.com/LAMDA-CL/Prism.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Prism，一个插件式可复现基础设施，用于支持可扩展的多模态持续指令微调研究。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态持续指令微调（MCIT）在实际部署中需持续适应新任务，但现有研究受限于工程瓶颈：方法通常直接修改基础MLLM代码库，导致实现开销大、架构特化，严重限制代码复用和公平比较。因此，亟需一个标准化、可插拔的基础设施来分离算法开发与骨干实现，降低开发门槛并促进可重复实验。
light_analysis.method: Prism采用轻量级插件注册机制，将算法开发与骨干MLLM代码库解耦。新策略可作为独立插件集成，无需修改底层代码，消除结构碎片化。它原生支持大规模训练管线，如分布式训练、混合精度等，确保可扩展性和可复现性。代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但强调Prism能够消除实现开销、促进代码复用和公平比较，并支持可扩展的MCIT实验。它通过插件化设计加速方法开发，使得研究者能专注于算法创新而非工程实现。实际效果需参考原论文或代码仓库。
light_analysis.conclusion: Prism通过插件式架构解决了MCIT研究中的工程性障碍，提升了代码复用性和实验可比性，为持续指令微调领域提供了标准化基础设施。其开源代码有助于推动社区发展。未来可扩展至更多MLLM架构和更复杂的持续学习场景。

title: Helix4D: Complex 4D Mesh Generation
abstract: Current video-to-4D methods struggle with complex topology changes, transparent materials, thin structures, and inner surfaces. We present Helix4D, a dynamic mesh generation framework by inheriting the expressive representation of Trellis2, adapting it from image-to-3D to video-conditioned 4D generation. Our design arises from two key questions: (a) how to enable Trellis2's frame-local attention to share information across frames while preserving its pretrained quality on rare cases such as transparent objects and inner surfaces, and (b) how to inject temporal information into a purely 3D positional encoding without breaking pretrained capabilities. We address (a) with a sliding-window cross-frame attention and anchor on the first frame. The first frame is generated by the base Trellis2 model and injected into our model, letting it inherit Trellis2's quality in rare cases through cross-frame attention. We address (b) with a 4D temporal encoding that repurposes redundant low-frequency spatial RoPE bands for time, extending the encoding from 3D with no additional parameters. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of Helix4D for high-quality dynamic mesh generation on ActionBench and our own challenging complex dynamics set.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Helix4D，基于Trellis2的动态网格生成框架，通过滑动窗口跨帧注意力和4D时间编码实现高质量视频条件4D生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频到4D方法难以处理复杂拓扑变化、透明材料、薄结构及内表面等问题，且Trellis2等图像到3D模型在扩展为视频条件时面临跨帧信息共享与时间编码注入的挑战。解决这些问题对于生成逼真动态3D内容至关重要。
light_analysis.method: Helix4D采用滑动窗口跨帧注意力，锚定第一帧由基础Trellis2生成，并通过跨帧注意力继承其在罕见案例（如透明物体、内表面）中的高质量。时间编码通过重新利用低频空间RoPE波段实现4D扩展，无额外参数。整体框架将Trellis2从图像到3D适配为视频条件4D生成。
light_analysis.result: 在ActionBench和自建复杂动态集上的实验表明，Helix4D能生成高质量动态网格，有效处理复杂拓扑变化、透明材料、薄结构及内表面等挑战，优于现有视频到4D方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: Helix4D通过创新的跨帧注意力与4D时间编码，解决了视频条件4D生成中的关键难题，为动态网格生成提供了高性能方案。未来可进一步优化计算效率或扩展到更复杂的场景。

title: Reinforcing Few-step Generators via Reward-Tilted Distribution Matching
abstract: Recent advances in few-step diffusion distillation have enabled efficient image generation, yet aligning these models with human preferences remains challenging. We propose Reward-Tilted Distribution Matching Distillation (RTDMD), a two-stage framework that unifies distribution matching distillation with reward-guided reinforcement learning for few-step flow generators. We show that minimizing the KL divergence to a reward-tilted teacher distribution naturally decomposes into a distribution matching term and a reward maximization term. In the first stage, we introduce Ambient-Consistent Distribution Matching Distillation (AC-DMD), which performs subinterval-wise distribution matching and augments the fake score objective with a consistency regularizer to help the fake score model track the shifting generator distribution under limited updates. In the second stage, we jointly optimize both terms: for the reward maximization term, we derive a hybrid policy gradient that combines a GRPO-style estimator for the stochastic intermediate transitions with direct reward backpropagation through the deterministic final step, and further introduce step-subset GRPO (SubGRPO) to reduce variance. Experiments on SD3, SD3.5, and FLUX.2 demonstrate that RTDMD establishes new state-of-the-art results across preference, aesthetic, and compositional metrics with only 4 inference steps, outperforming previous few-step text-to-image generation methods. Code and models are available at https://github.com/Harahan/RTDMD.
comment: Code and models are available at https://github.com/Harahan/RTDMD

light_analysis.overview: 提出奖励倾斜分布匹配蒸馏框架，统一分布匹配和奖励引导强化学习，提升少步图像生成模型与人类偏好对齐能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 近期少步扩散蒸馏技术实现了高效图像生成，但使这些模型与人类偏好对齐仍具挑战。现有方法在分布匹配蒸馏中缺乏有效的奖励引导机制，难以在少步生成中同时保持高质量和偏好对齐。本文旨在解决这一问题，统一分布匹配与奖励优化。
light_analysis.method: 提出两阶段框架RTDMD：第一阶段AC-DMD通过子区间分布匹配和一致性正则化追踪生成器分布；第二阶段联合优化分布匹配和奖励最大化项，推导混合策略梯度，结合GRPO风格估计器与直接奖励反向传播，并引入SubGRPO降低方差。
light_analysis.result: 在SD3、SD3.5和FLUX.2上，仅用4步推理，RTDMD在偏好、美学和组合性指标上均达到新最优，全面超越先前少步文本到图像生成方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: RTDMD通过统一分布匹配与奖励优化，显著提升了少步生成器的对齐质量，为高效可控图像生成提供了新范式。未来可探索更复杂的奖励函数和扩展至视频生成等领域。

title: Looped Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Masked diffusion models (MDMs) have emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive models for language modeling, yet the effective design of transformer architectures for MDMs remains underexplored. In this paper, we show that selectively looping the early-middle transformer layers significantly improves both training efficiency and model performance in MDMs. We call this approach LoopMDM(Looped Masked Diffusion Model), which brings two key benefits: looping layers at training-time yields a depth-scaling effect without adding parameters, while varying the number of loops at inference-time enables flexible compute scaling. Despite the simplicity, the results are striking: across multiple pre-training corpora, LoopMDM matches the performance of same-size MDMs with up to 3.3 fewer training FLOPs, while its final performance outperforms them on various reasoning benchmarks, including up to 8.5 points on GSM8K. It even surpasses deeper non-looped MDMs trained with comparable per-step compute, indicating that selective looping is more effective than naive depth scaling. Furthermore, LoopMDM can scale inference-time compute by increasing the number of loops. Adaptively adjusting the number of loops throughout the sampling process further yields additional gains in compute efficiency while maintaining performance. Lastly, with attention analysis, we provide evidence that looping is effective in MDMs by promoting interactions among masked positions. Our code and weights will be publicly released.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LoopMDM，通过在掩码扩散模型中循环早期-中层Transformer层，实现无参数深度扩展和灵活计算缩放，显著提升训练效率和推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 掩码扩散模型（MDM）已成为自回归模型的有前景替代方案，但MDM中Transformer架构的有效设计尚未充分探索。现有MDM模型在训练效率和性能上仍有提升空间，且缺乏灵活的计算缩放机制。本文旨在通过循环层的方式解决这些问题，以在不增加参数的情况下提升模型深度和性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出LoopMDM，核心创新是选择性循环早期-中层Transformer层。训练时循环层产生深度缩放效果而不增加参数；推理时通过改变循环次数实现灵活的计算缩放。该方法简单有效，无需额外参数，仅需修改前向传播逻辑。实验在多个预训练语料上进行。
light_analysis.result: LoopMDM在多个预训练语料上，以多达3.3倍更少的训练FLOPs匹配相同大小MDM的性能，最终性能在多个推理基准上超越后者，在GSM8K上提升8.5个点。甚至超越使用可比每步计算训练的更深非循环MDM。推理时增加循环次数可扩展计算，自适应调整循环次数进一步提升计算效率并保持性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文表明选择性循环层是提升MDM性能的有效方法，无需额外参数。LoopMDM在训练和推理效率上显著改进，并具有灵活的计算缩放能力。注意力分析表明循环促进掩码位置间的交互。代码和权重将公开，为后续研究提供基础。未来可探索更复杂的循环策略或与其他架构改进结合。

title: On-Policy Adversarial Flow Distillation for Autoregressive Video Generation
abstract: Autoregressive video generators are attractive for streaming, long-horizon, and interactive applications, but distilling strong black-box teachers into causal students remains difficult. The student must learn under its own rollout distribution, whereas practical teachers may expose only prompt-conditioned completed videos and may differ in architecture, capacity, temporal design, and sampling schedule. This interface makes supervised fine-tuning off-policy, score-based distillation inapplicable, and direct adversarial imitation too sparse for denoising-time credit assignment. We propose Adversarial Flow Distillation (AFD), an on-policy framework for heterogeneous black-box video distillation. AFD queries the teacher and rolls out the current student on the same prompts, trains a prompt-paired Bradley-Terry discriminator to estimate clean-sample teacher-student discrepancy, and converts the resulting on-policy advantage into forward-process flow-matching updates on the student's own noised states. Thus, AFD provides dense velocity-field supervision while requiring no teacher scores, latents, denoising trajectories, step alignment, or reverse-chain reinforcement learning. Experiments across two causal AR student families show that AFD consistently improves motion- and physics-sensitive generation while preserving general video quality, and ablations validate the importance of adaptive on-policy feedback and forward-process credit assignment. The method requires only clean teacher videos and student rollouts, providing a practical route for distilling proprietary or heterogeneous video generators into efficient autoregressive students.

light_analysis.overview: 提出在线策略对抗流蒸馏（AFD）框架，用于将异质黑盒视频生成器蒸馏到自回归学生模型，通过前向过程流匹配提供密集监督，无需教师分数或去噪轨迹。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归视频生成器在流式、长时和交互应用中具有吸引力，但将强黑盒教师蒸馏到因果学生中面临困难：学生必须在其自身 rollout 分布下学习，而教师仅提供提示条件化的完整视频，且架构、容量等不同，导致监督微调离策略、基于分数的蒸馏和直接对抗模仿均不适用，急需一种能处理异质教师且提供密集监督的蒸馏方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出 Adversarial Flow Distillation (AFD)，一种在线策略框架。AFD 查询教师并在相同提示上 rollout 当前学生，训练提示配对的 Bradley-Terry 判别器估计教师-学生差异，将得到的在线策略优势转化为学生自身噪声状态的前向过程流匹配更新，提供密集速度场监督。无需教师分数、潜在变量、去噪轨迹、步长对齐或反向链强化学习，仅需干净教师视频和学生 rollout。
light_analysis.result: 在两个因果自回归学生家族上的实验表明，AFD 持续改进了运动和物理敏感生成，同时保持一般视频质量。消融验证了自适应在线策略反馈和前向过程信用分配的重要性。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但声称一致提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: AFD 为将专有或异质视频生成器蒸馏到高效自回归学生提供了实用途径，仅需干净教师视频和学生 rollout，无需复杂对齐，具有显著的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的判别器或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: EVIDENT: Routing MLLM Adaptation through Entity-Grounded Visual Evidence for Cross-Domain Video Temporal Grounding
abstract: Fine-tuning MLLMs for Video Temporal Grounding (VTG) often improves in-domain performance but degrades sharply under domain shift. In this work, we find that this failure is primarily driven not just by unseen query concepts, but by visual domain shift, which prevents the model from coupling its learned temporal localization knowledge with its inherent entity-attention capability. To address this, we introduce EVIDENT, a parameter-efficient adaptation framework that anchors temporal grounding in the inherent entity-attention of pre-trained MLLMs by routing VTG adaptation through explicit visual entity evidence. EVIDENT consists of three components: (i) an Entity Bottleneck Adapter that transforms dense visual tokens into compact entity-level slots, (ii) an Entity-Binding Distillation loss that instills objectness priors into the semantically unstructured MLLM visual space, guiding each slot to bind to a coherent entity, and (iii) an Entity-to-eVidence gating mechanism that leverages the captured entities as evidence, steering the model to localize moments containing query-relevant entities. Together, these components enable VTG fine-tuning to rely on entity-grounded evidence rather than brittle dataset shortcuts. Experiments on cross-domain VTG benchmarks show that EVIDENT consistently improves out-of-domain robustness while preserving competitive in-domain performance with modest parameter overhead. These results suggest that entity-level grounding is an effective inductive bias for generalizable temporal localization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EVIDENT框架，通过实体级视觉证据引导的多模态大模型参数高效适应，解决视频时间定位的跨域泛化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频时间定位（VTG）微调多模态大模型（MLLM）虽提升域内性能，但域迁移时性能骤降。本文发现主因是视觉域迁移而非仅未见查询概念，它阻碍模型将时间定位知识与实体注意力耦合。因此需参数高效方法，利用实体级证据增强跨域鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: EVIDENT包含三个组件：实体瓶颈适配器将密集视觉令牌转为紧凑实体槽位；实体绑定蒸馏损失注入对象先验，引导槽位绑定连贯实体；实体到证据门控机制利用实体证据定位含查询相关实体的时刻。该方法参数高效，仅增加少量参数。
light_analysis.result: 在跨域VTG基准上，EVIDENT一致提升域外鲁棒性，同时以适度参数开销保持有竞争力的域内性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明方法有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: EVIDENT表明实体级定位是可泛化时间定位的有效归纳偏置，在保持域内性能同时显著提升跨域鲁棒性。为VTG域泛化提供新思路，未来可探索更多实体类型。

title: Global Structure-from-Motion Meets Feedforward Reconstruction
abstract: Structure-from-Motion -- the process of simultaneously estimating camera poses and 3D scene structure from a collection of images -- remains a central challenge in computer vision, with many open problems yet to be solved. Recent advances in feedforward 3D reconstruction have made significant strides in overcoming persistent failure cases of classical SfM methods, particularly in scenarios characterized by low texture, limited overlap, and symmetries. However, while feedforward approaches excel in these challenging conditions, they often face limitations regarding scalability, accuracy, or robustness, and typically fall short of classical methods in standard reconstruction settings. In this work, we systematically analyze these limitations and propose a new Structure-from-Motion pipeline by combining the respective strengths of classical and feedforward methods. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets show the benefits of our approach, achieving state-of-the-art results across a wide range of scenarios. We share our system as an open-source implementation at https://github.com/colmap/gluemap.

light_analysis.overview: 结合经典SfM和前馈重建优势，提出新pipeline实现多场景SOTA重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 经典Structure-from-Motion方法在弱纹理、低重叠和对称等场景中易失败；前馈重建方法虽在这些困难场景中表现优异，但在可扩展性、精度或鲁棒性方面存在局限，且通常不如经典方法适用于标准场景。因此，需要一种能结合两者优势的方法，以在广泛场景中实现稳健、高精度的三维重建。
light_analysis.method: 论文系统分析了经典SfM和前馈重建方法的局限性，并提出一种新pipeline，通过组合两者的优势来解决各自短板。具体地，利用前馈方法处理经典SfM的失败场景，同时保留经典方法的可扩展性和精度。方法未指定模型架构，但提供了开源实现（gluemap）。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上的大量实验表明，所提方法在各类场景中均取得了最先进的结果，包括弱纹理、低重叠、对称等挑战性情况以及标准重建场景。具体性能指标未在摘要中明确列出，但整体效果优于现有基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过融合经典SfM和前馈重建技术，提出了一种鲁棒且可扩展的SfM pipeline，在广泛场景中达到SOTA。开源实现促进了可复现性和后续研究。未来工作可能涉及进一步优化结合策略或扩展到更大规模数据集。

title: InstructSAM: Segment Any Instance with Any Instructions
abstract: In this paper, we introduce InstructSAM, a unified and streamlined framework designed for multi-instance segmentation under arbitrary instructions. We formulates instruction-driven instance segmentation as a set-structured query prediction problem and propose an explicit reasoning-to-instance query interface that elegantly bridges a vision-language model (VLM) and SAM3. Specifically, a bank of learnable instance queries is injected into the VLM and contextualized with instruction and visual information, enabling each query to serve as an instance-aware slot. A hybrid-attention mechanism further promotes interaction among these queries, visual tokens, and instruction tokens, improving instance enumeration and reducing duplicate predictions. The resulting LLM-conditioned queries are projected into SAM3's detector query space to drive accurate multi-instance segmentation in a single forward pass. This design equips SAM3 with high-level instruction understanding, compositional reasoning, and instance-level set prediction without modifying its core architecture. To support training and evaluation, we further construct Inst2Seg, a high-quality and large-scale instruction-based instance segmentation dataset and benchmark that couples free-form instructions with instance-level masks. Extensive experiments show that only 2B-scale InstructSAM achieves strong results across complex instruction-driven and phrase-level referring segmentation benchmarks, outperforming prior end-to-end methods and SAM3's agentic pipeline while enabling efficient single-pass multi-instance prediction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一框架InstructSAM，通过推理到实例查询接口，实现任意指令驱动的多实例分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有实例分割方法难以处理复杂指令和自由形式描述，缺乏统一框架将指令理解与分割能力结合。作者将指令驱动实例分割转化为集合结构查询预测问题，设计显式推理到实例查询接口，桥接视觉语言模型（VLM）和SAM，以提升组合推理和实例级集合预测能力。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法包括：向VLM注入可学习的实例查询，与指令和视觉信息进行上下文交互；采用混合注意力机制促进查询、视觉令牌和指令令牌的交互，减少重复预测；将LLM条件查询投影到SAM3的检测器查询空间，实现单次前向多实例分割。同时构建大规模指令实例分割数据集Inst2Seg用于训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 仅2B参数量的InstructSAM在复杂指令驱动和短语级参考分割基准上取得强结果，超越先前端到端方法和SAM的agentic pipeline，实现高效单次多实例预测。实验证明了其在不同指令下的泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: InstructSAM统一了指令驱动多实例分割框架，无需修改SAM核心架构即可赋予其指令理解和实例级预测能力。构建的Inst2Seg数据集填补了领域空白。未来可探索更大规模模型和更复杂指令场景。

title: Language Models Need Sleep
abstract: Transformer-based large language models are increasingly used for long-horizon tasks; however, their attention mechanism scales poorly with context length. To handle this, we study a sleep-like consolidation mechanism in which a model periodically converts recent context into persistent fast weights before clearing its key-value cache. During sleep, the model performs $N$ offline recurrent passes over the accumulated context and updates the fast weights in its state-space model (SSM) blocks through a learned local rule. During inference, this shifts extra computation to sleep while preserving the latency of wake-time prediction. We test our method on controlled synthetic tasks, including cellular automata and multi-hop graph retrieval, as well as a realistic math reasoning task, on which a regular transformer as well as SSM-attention hybrid models fail. We then show that increasing sleep duration $N$ for our models improves performance, with the largest gains on examples that require deeper reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种类似睡眠的巩固机制，通过离线循环更新快速权重，提升长上下文任务的推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer在大语言模型中广泛应用，但其注意力机制随上下文长度增加而扩展性差，导致长序列任务效率低下。现有方法如记忆增强网络或稀疏注意力仍有局限性，无法有效处理需要深度推理的复杂任务。本文受生物睡眠巩固记忆启发，旨在通过周期性离线处理来强化模型对长期上下文的整合能力，同时保持在线推理的低延迟。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出睡眠巩固机制：模型在积累一定上下文后，清除键值缓存，并对存储的上下文进行N次离线循环。在循环中，利用学习到的局部规则更新状态空间模型（SSM）块中的快速权重（fast weights）。推理时，睡眠计算与在线预测分离，保证唤醒阶段延迟不受影响。该方法适用于Transformer及SSM-注意力混合模型，测试于细胞自动机、多跳图检索和数学推理任务。
light_analysis.result: 在合成任务（如细胞自动机、多跳图检索）和现实数学推理任务上，基线Transformer和SSM-注意力混合模型均失败，而引入睡眠机制的模型能成功解决。增加睡眠循环次数N可提升性能，尤其对需要更深层推理的样本增益最大。实验验证了睡眠机制对于长时推理的有效性，但未提供具体数值指标（如准确率提升百分比）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过模拟睡眠巩固机制，提出一种新颖的长上下文处理方法，将额外计算转移到离线阶段，有效提升模型在深度推理任务上的能力。该工作融合了认知科学思想与神经网络设计，为提升大语言模型的长期依赖建模提供了新思路。未来可探索更高效的睡眠策略及在多模态场景下的应用。

title: Forgetting in Language Models: Capacity, Optimization, and Self-Generated Replay
abstract: Models trained on a new task typically degrade on prior tasks, a phenomenon known as forgetting. Traditionally, mitigating forgetting has required replaying stored exemplars from prior tasks, which is often impractical. By contrast, language models can sample from their own training distribution, and we show that these self-generated samples serve as effective replay data, nearly eliminating forgetting. We find that forgetting nonetheless persists when the model has little remaining capacity: models pretrained close to saturation cannot absorb new information without overwriting prior knowledge. When capacity is not the limiting factor, low learning rates reduce forgetting but require substantially more training steps. Replay breaks this tradeoff, enabling fast, high-learning-rate finetuning without forgetting.

light_analysis.overview: 利用语言模型自生成样本作为回放数据，有效缓解遗忘问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型在新任务上训练时会遗忘旧任务知识，传统回放方法需存储旧样本，不切实际。本文拟利用语言模型自身生成样本作为回放，解决遗忘问题，避免存储负担。
light_analysis.method: 让语言模型从自身训练分布中采样作为回放数据，无需额外存储。实验研究模型容量、学习率等因素对遗忘的影响，并对比低学习率与回放策略的效果。
light_analysis.result: 自生成回放几乎消除遗忘，但模型容量饱和时遗忘仍存在。低学习率可减少遗忘但需更多训练步数，而回放打破此权衡，支持快速高学习率微调且无遗忘。
light_analysis.conclusion: 自生成回放有效缓解遗忘，突破了学习率与遗忘的权衡，实用性强。未来可探索容量受限场景下的优化策略，进一步提升持续学习性能。

title: Pixel-Level Pavement Distress Assessment Using Instance Segmentation
abstract: Automated pavement distress assessment requires more than image-level classification or coarse bounding box detection, demanding precise localization of thin, branching, and irregular cracks to achieve the geometric precision necessary for maintenance-relevant quantification. This paper presents a vision-based pavement distress analysis system based on Mask R-CNN instance segmentation and evaluates it on UWGB-StreetCrack, a custom field-collected roadway image dataset acquired with a vehicle-mounted smartphone and manually annotated with polygon labels for longitudinal cracks, transverse cracks, alligator cracks, and potholes. Five Detectron2-based Mask R-CNN backbone variants were considered under a consistent fine-tuning protocol. The best-performing model, Mask R-CNN with a ResNet-101 FPN backbone, achieved 84.23% precision, 90.04% recall, and an F1 score of 87.04% under the project-specific bounding-box matching protocol. The same model produced an aggregate predicted crack-area fraction of 2.164%, closely matching the 2.170% ground-truth crack-area fraction. To contextualize the segmentation system against a detector-oriented alternative, a CSPDarknet53-based YOLO detector was also adapted and retrained on the dataset, reaching 27.5% precision and 20.7% recall on the validation protocol. The results show that instance segmentation is a practical direction for field pavement imagery and aggregate crack-area estimation, while also exposing open challenges in annotation consistency, class imbalance, confounder rejection, and mask-level benchmarking.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Mask R-CNN的像素级路面损伤评估系统，在自定义数据集上实现高精度裂缝分割与面积估算。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有路面损伤评估方法大多停留在图像级分类或粗略的边界框检测，无法精确地定位细长、分叉和不规则裂缝，难以满足维护量化所需的几何精度。因此，需要一种能够实现像素级分割的系统，以提高裂缝检测的准确性和可靠性，从而更好地支持道路维护决策。
light_analysis.method: 论文基于Mask R-CNN实例分割架构，构建路面损伤分析系统。在自定义数据集UWGB-StreetCrack上，采用五种Detectron2框架下的Mask R-CNN骨干网络变体（如ResNet-101 FPN）进行微调。同时，为对比分割与检测方法的性能，还训练了一个基于CSPDarknet53的YOLO检测器。数据集使用车载智能手机采集，并对纵向裂缝、横向裂缝、龟裂和坑洞进行了多边形标注。
light_analysis.result: 最佳模型（Mask R-CNN ResNet-101 FPN）在项目特定的边界框匹配协议下，达到84.23%精确率、90.04%召回率和87.04% F1分数。预测裂缝面积分数为2.164%，与真实值2.170%高度吻合。相比之下，YOLO检测器精确率仅27.5%，召回率20.7%，验证了实例分割在现场路面图像和面积估计中的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明实例分割是路面现场图像分析和裂缝面积估算的实用方向，能够提供比目标检测更精确的结果。但同时也暴露了注释一致性、类别不平衡、混杂因素排除以及掩码级基准测试等开放挑战，为未来工作指明了方向。该系统具有潜在的实际应用价值，可自动化道路损伤评估。

title: Goal-driven Bayesian Optimal Experimental Design for Robust Decision-Making Under Model Uncertainty
abstract: Bayesian optimal experimental design (BOED) selects experiments to maximize information gain about model parameters. However, in decision-critical settings, reducing parameter uncertainty does not necessarily improve downstream decisions, as only specific parameter directions relevant to the objective truly matter. We propose GoBOED, a goal-driven BOED framework that directly optimizes experimental designs for a specified decision-making objective. GoBOED combines an amortized variational posterior surrogate with a differentiable convex decision layer, enabling gradient-based design optimization that is fully decision-focused. We theoretically show that GoBOED gradients are insensitive to parameter directions irrelevant to the decision objective, providing a formal justification for why goal-driven design achieves equivalent decision quality over a wider set of experimental designs than information-gain maximization. Empirically, across source localization, epidemic management, and pharmacokinetic control, GoBOED identifies designs that better align with downstream decision objectives and reveals that near-optimal design windows are substantially wider than those predicted by goal-agnostic BOED approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出目标驱动的贝叶斯最优实验设计(GoBOED)框架，直接优化下游决策目标而非信息增益。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统BOED最大化参数信息增益，但决策关键场景中参数不确定性降低不一定改进决策，因仅与目标相关的参数方向重要。现有方法未聚焦决策目标，导致实验设计偏离实际需求。
light_analysis.method: GoBOED结合摊销变分后验代理与可微凸决策层，实现全决策导向的梯度优化。理论证明梯度对决策无关参数方向不敏感，解释为何目标驱动设计在更宽设计集达到等效决策质量。
light_analysis.result: 在源定位、疫情管理和药代动力学控制任务上，GoBOED设计更符合下游目标，且近最优设计窗口显著宽于目标无关BOED方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出决策导向的BOED框架，理论证明优势，实验验证有效性，为实验设计在鲁棒决策中提供新范式。局限性未提及。

title: OrpQuant: Geometric Orthogonal Residual Projection for Multiplier-Free Power-of-Two Transformer Quantization
abstract: The deployment of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Transformers (ViTs) on edge devices is significantly constrained by memory limitations and the critical timing bottlenecks introduced by dense Multiply-Accumulate (MAC) arrays. In the ultra-low bit regime, logarithmic Power-of-Two (PoT) quantization provides a hardware-efficient alternative by replacing MAC operations with bit-shifts. However, the non-uniform exponential lattice is inherently limited by a \textbf{Low Angular Resolution Regime}, a structural flaw that becomes particularly pronounced at sub-4-bit thresholds, leading to a notable degradation of high-dimensional feature manifolds.   To address this geometric limitation, we propose Orthogonal Residual Projection (ORP), an algorithm-hardware co-design framework. By formulating quantization as a dual-basis geometric projection, ORP adaptively synthesizes a higher-resolution residual lattice using strictly shift-and-add operations. Furthermore, ORP's analytical solver offers a practical alternative to computationally intensive gradient-based optimization, reducing the full-model calibration time for LLaMA-2-7B to approximately \textbf{15 minutes}.   Extensive evaluations demonstrate ORP's applicability across modalities and its hardware efficiency. Under the 3-bit (W3/A16) constraint, ORP achieves a perplexity of 6.10 on LLaMA-2-7B, comparing favorably to conventional MAC-intensive baselines like AWQ without relying on asymmetric scaling, while maintaining competitive accuracy in 4-bit scenarios. At the silicon level, standard-cell RTL synthesis at a 28nm node indicates that ORP effectively mitigates the timing bottlenecks associated with dense multiplier trees.

light_analysis.overview: 提出正交残差投影(ORP)框架，实现无乘法器的2的幂次量化，解决低比特下几何角度分辨率问题。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM和ViT在边缘设备部署受限于内存和密集乘累加阵列的时序瓶颈。超低比特下，对数2的幂次量化通过移位操作替代乘法，但非均匀指数格点存在低角度分辨率缺陷，在4比特以下严重退化高维特征流形。现有方法难以兼顾硬件效率和模型精度，亟需一种能提升角度分辨率且不引入乘法器的量化方案。
light_analysis.method: ORP将量化建模为双基几何投影，通过严格移位加操作自适应合成高分辨率残差格点，提升角度分辨率。提出解析求解器替代梯度优化，将LLaMA-2-7B全模型校准时间降至约15分钟。算法-硬件协同设计，标准单元RTL综合证明其能缓解28nm工艺下密集乘法器树的时序瓶颈。支持W3/A16等低比特配置。
light_analysis.result: 3比特(W3/A16)下，ORP在LLaMA-2-7B上达到困惑度6.10，与依赖非对称缩放的MAC密集型基线AWQ相当甚至更优；4比特场景保持竞争精度。28nm标准单元RTL综合显示ORP有效缓解密集乘法器树引起的时序瓶颈。校准时间极短，仅需约15分钟完成LLaMA-2-7B全模型校准。
light_analysis.conclusion: ORP通过几何正交残差投影巧妙克服低比特PoT量化的角度分辨率限制，实现无乘法器的高效量化。为LLM和ViT边缘部署提供实用方案，兼具硬件效率和模型精度。未来可探索更高比特或结合其他量化技术。

title: Channel-wise Vector Quantization
abstract: We present Channel-wise Vector Quantization (CVQ), a novel image tokenization paradigm that replaces patch-wise tokens with channel-wise tokens. Unlike conventional vector quantization, which assigns a discrete token to each patch feature vector, CVQ quantizes each channel of the feature map. This formulation represents an image as discrete levels of visual details, rather than as a grid of spatial patches. Based on CVQ, we introduce a new visual autoregressive framework with "next-channel prediction". Instead of rendering images patch by patch in raster order, our Channel-wise Autoregressive (CAR) model predicts image channels sequentially, producing progressively enriched visual details. Specifically, it first sketches global structure and then refines fine-grained attributes, akin to a human artist's workflow. Empirically, we show that: (1) CVQ achieves 100% codebook utilization with a 16K+ codebook size without any bells and whistles, and substantially improves reconstruction quality over conventional VQ; and (2) CAR attains a DPG score of 86.7 and a GenEval score of 0.79, demonstrating strong effectiveness for text-to-image generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通道级向量量化（CVQ），以通道级token替代传统块级token，并基于此构建通道级自回归（CAR）模型，实现从全局结构到细粒度细节的渐进图像生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统向量量化（VQ）将图像划分为空间块并分配离散token，但码本利用率低且难以捕捉细致的视觉变化。本文旨在通过通道级量化，将图像表示为视觉细节的离散层次，从而提升码本利用率和重建质量，并引入更自然的自回归生成顺序。
light_analysis.method: CVQ对特征图的每个通道独立进行量化，形成离散码本，实现100%码本利用率（16K+尺寸）。基于CVQ，提出CAR模型，采用“下一通道预测”机制：按通道顺序自回归生成，先预测全局结构通道，再逐步细化细节通道，模拟艺术家作画流程。
light_analysis.result: CVQ在重建质量上显著优于传统VQ，码本利用率达100%。CAR模型在文本到图像生成任务中取得DPG=86.7、GenEval=0.79的分数，验证了通道级自回归范式的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CVQ和CAR提供了一种新的图像离散表示与生成框架，通过通道级量化与预测，实现了高效的码本利用和高质量图像生成，为视觉自回归模型开辟了新方向。未来可探索更大尺度生成任务。

title: Claw-Anything: Benchmarking Always-On Personal Assistants with Broader Access to User's Digital World
abstract: Large language model agents are increasingly envisioned as always-on personal assistants with access to anything relevant in the user's digital world. Yet current systems operate over only narrow slices of that world, limiting context-sensitive reasoning and effective assistance. Existing benchmarks similarly provide only partial user state and therefore fail to capture performance in such a broad, always-on setting. To address this gap, we introduce Claw-Anything, a benchmark that expands agent context along three dimensions: long-horizon activity histories, interdependent backend services, and integrated GUI and CLI interaction across multiple devices. To instantiate this setting, we simulate months of user activity through multi-round event injection, producing complex world states and realistic noise, including irrelevant events and conflicting signals. Agents must reason over rich contextual environments while remaining robust to such noise. This expanded scope also enables the evaluation of proactive assistance, requiring agents to anticipate user needs and deliver timely recommendations. Experiments show that GPT-5.5 achieves only 34.5% pass@1, substantially below prior benchmarks, underscoring a gap between current agent capabilities and the demands of always-on personal assistance. Alongside the benchmark, we release an automated data-generation pipeline that yields 2,000 training environments and improves the base model by 23.7%, demonstrating its utility of scalable data infrastructure.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Claw-Anything基准，扩展LLM智能体在用户数字世界中的上下文维度，评估始终在线个人助手能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前始终在线个人助手仅能访问用户数字世界的狭窄部分，导致上下文感知推理受限；现有基准仅提供部分用户状态，无法反映真实场景的复杂性和噪声。亟需一个能模拟长时间活动历史、跨设备交互和噪声环境的基准，以准确评估智能体在宽泛设定下的性能。
light_analysis.method: Claw-Anything沿三个维度扩展智能体上下文：长周期活动历史、相互依赖的后端服务、跨多设备的GUI和CLI交互。通过多轮事件注入模拟数月用户活动，生成复杂世界状态及无关事件、冲突信号等噪声。智能体需在富含上下文的环境中推理，并主动预测用户需求。附带自动化数据生成管道，产出2000个训练环境。
light_analysis.result: GPT-5.5在Claw-Anything上仅达34.5% pass@1，远低于先前基准，凸显能力差距。使用自动生成管道训练的基模型性能提升23.7%，证明可扩展数据基础设施的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Claw-Anything揭示了当前LLM智能体在始终在线个人助理场景下的显著不足，为未来研究提供了更逼真的评估基准。自动数据生成管道有助于构建大规模训练数据，推动代理鲁棒性和主动协助能力的发展。局限性可能在于模拟环境的真实性仍需验证。

title: VeriTrace: Evolving Mental Models for Deep Research Agents
abstract: Deep research agents face vast, interdependent, and pervasively uncertain information. Existing systems explore what evolving intermediate representations should look like, but leave their evolution to the LLM's implicit reasoning. Without explicit regulation, the intermediate layer is easily contaminated by mixed-quality information and propagates errors along its dependencies, so model scale often ends up substituting for absent regulation. We argue that an agent's mental model should instead evolve through explicit feedback that continuously aligns task understanding with reality, and identify three regulatory loops: interpretive update, deviation feedback, and schema revision. We realise this in VeriTrace, a cognitive-graph framework that explicitly implements the three loops. Using matched Qwen3.5-27B backbones, VeriTrace improves over the strongest matched baseline by 4.22 pp on DeepResearch Bench (DRB) Insight (1.49 pp Overall) and by 5.9 pp Overall win rate on DeepConsult. With Config-DeepSeek, it achieves the strongest reproducible open-source result on DRB.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VeriTrace框架，通过显式反馈循环实现深度研究智能体心智模型的演化，提升信息处理准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度研究智能体面临信息量大、相互依赖和不确定性，现有方法依赖LLM隐式推理，中间表示易被污染并传播错误，模型规模常替代缺失的调节。论文主张通过显式反馈持续对齐任务理解与现实，识别三种调节循环以解决此问题。
light_analysis.method: VeriTrace是一个认知图谱框架，显式实现了三种调节循环：解释更新（修正当前理解）、偏差反馈（利用结果指导调整）、图式修订（更新知识结构）。使用Qwen3.5-27B骨干网络，通过对比实验评估性能。
light_analysis.result: 在DeepResearch Bench上，VeriTrace相比最强匹配基线Insight提升4.22个百分点，Overall提升1.49个百分点；在DeepConsult上Overall胜率提升5.9个百分点。使用Config-DeepSeek达到DRB上最强可复现开源结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: VeriTrace通过显式反馈循环有效改进了深度研究智能体的性能，验证了心智模型演化框架的有效性。学术上贡献了新的认知架构，实用上提升了复杂信息处理能力。未来可探索更广泛的骨干网络和任务。

title: Automated Benchmark Auditing for AI Agents and Large Language Models
abstract: Modern AI benchmarks operate at a complexity that outpaces traditional verification methods. Tasks authored by domain experts often contain implicit assumptions, incomplete environment specifications, and brittle evaluation logic that human annotation cannot reliably catch. We introduce Auto Benchmark Audit (ABA), an agentic framework that systematically audits individual benchmark tasks, uncovering issues such as hidden environment dependencies, specification gaps, and limited grading logic. We run ABA on a collection of frontier LLM benchmarks and previous NeurIPS publications, totaling 168 benchmarks across nine domains. Across this corpus, ABA identifies critical issues including ambiguous task design, execution environment conflicts, and incorrect ground truths in over 25.7% of the evaluated tasks. The precision of these automated audits is validated by expert review and independent third-party reports such as upstream PRs. Crucially, we demonstrate that these problematic tasks severely distorts capability assessments for agents and LLMs: filtering out these tasks with issues shifts model rankings and increases average performance on SWE-bench Verified and Terminal-Bench 2 by 9.9% and 9.6%, respectively. We release the agentic tool and all task annotations to support the future development of frontier benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Auto Benchmark Audit (ABA)框架，系统审计AI基准任务并自动发现隐藏问题，提升评估可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代AI基准测试复杂度高，传统人工验证难以捕捉隐含假设、环境规格不完整和脆弱评估逻辑等问题，现有方法无法可靠保证任务质量。
light_analysis.method: ABA是一种智能体框架，通过自动化审计流程识别任务中的隐藏环境依赖、规格缺口和评分逻辑缺陷。在168个跨9个领域的前沿基准上应用，包括NeurIPS论文任务。
light_analysis.result: 超过25.7%的任务被识别出关键问题（如模糊设计、环境冲突、错误真值）。剔除问题任务后，SWE-bench Verified性能提升9.9%，Terminal-Bench 2提升9.6%，模型排名发生显著变化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 问题任务严重扭曲了智能体和语言模型的能力评估。ABA开源提供自动化审计工具和任务注释，有助于未来基准开发和质量控制。

title: Global Convergence of Wasserstein Policy Gradient for Entropy-Regularized Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Wasserstein policy gradient (WPG) is a policy optimization method for reinforcement learning (RL) that exploits the optimal-transport geometry of action distributions. For the entropy-regularized RL objective, WPG evolves each state-conditional policy by transporting it along the action gradient of the soft Q-function together with a Langevin-type diffusion. Despite its appeal for continuous-control problems, its global convergence properties remain poorly understood. Standard Langevin analyses do not directly apply, because the RL objective depends on the policy through the Bellman recursion rather than through a static convex functional, and the Langevin drift is determined by the soft Q-function, whose regularity must be controlled along the policy iterates.   In this paper, we develop a global convergence theory for WPG by exploiting the Bellman structure of entropy-regularized RL. We show that the role usually played by convexity can be replaced by a Bellman-based argument: the soft Bellman residual admits a statewise KL representation with respect to a Gibbs policy; Bellman contraction relates this residual to the global optimality gap; and a Bellman resolvent identity connects value improvement to relative Fisher information. Combined with a uniform log-Sobolev inequality (LSI) for the evolving Gibbs family, these ingredients yield a distributional Polyak--Łojasiewicz condition. We further establish the regularity and uniform bounds needed to control the discretization error, thereby obtaining geometric contraction up to a discretization bias. Conceptually, our analysis shows that although entropy-regularized RL is not convex in the usual flat sense, the Bellman recursion induces a favorable Polyak--Lojasiewicz-type (PL) geometry that supports global convergence of WPG.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Wasserstein策略梯度在熵正则化强化学习中的全局收敛性理论，利用Bellman结构替代凸性，获得几何收敛保证。
light_analysis.motivation: Wasserstein策略梯度在连续控制中具有吸引力，但其全局收敛性未知。标准Langevin分析不适用，因为RL目标通过Bellman递归依赖策略，且漂移由软Q函数决定，正则性难以控制。缺乏理论保证限制了其应用。
light_analysis.method: 利用熵正则化RL的Bellman结构建立全局收敛理论：软Bellman残差具有状态级KL表示；Bellman收缩连接残差与最优差距；Bellman resolvent联系价值改进与相对Fisher信息。结合对数Sobolev不等式，导出分布Polyak-Łojasiewicz条件，并控制离散化误差，得到几何收敛。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明WPG以几何速率收敛到最优策略，收敛误差仅来自离散化偏差。通过Bellman结构替代凸性，建立了分布Polyak-Łojasiewicz条件，确保了全局收敛，无需凸性假设。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了熵正则化RL虽非凸但具有Polyak-Łojasiewicz几何，支持WPG全局收敛。为连续控制中策略梯度方法提供了严格理论依据，推动基于最优传输的RL方法发展。未来可扩展至其他正则化或更复杂环境。

title: StakeBench: Evaluating Language Understanding Grounded in Market Commitment
abstract: Existing financial NLP benchmarks often rely on labels supplied by outside observers, measuring how language is perceived rather than what speakers have committed to in the market. We introduce StakeBench, an evaluation framework for language understanding grounded in market commitment. StakeBench links 560,876 comments from 2,261 resolved markets to verified position, action, and market-odds records across Polymarket and Manifold. Supervision is derived from observable market behavior. Position sides, post-comment trading actions, and market-odds trajectories replace human annotation. Four diagnostic tasks test whether models detect market commitment, identify the revealed side, anticipate future action, and perform collective odds projection. Three commitment-aware metrics measure alignment with revealed preferences rather than perceived sentiment. Validity audits and explicit interpretation boundaries help distinguish observable commitment signals from latent belief and causal market-odds impact. Across 15 LLMs and 18 topics and platform settings, models partially recover position-side signals, with Directed Accuracy from 0.506 to 0.599, but show structural failures on later tasks. Ten of the fifteen models collapse to one or two action labels in future action anticipation, and no model consistently improves on the naive odds-direction baseline in collective odds projection. Model scale is not correlated with performance, finance-domain tuning does not improve revealed-side identification, and platform incentives strongly shape higher-order results. StakeBench is packaged with evaluation code and dataset under CC-BY 4.0.
comment: 21 pages, 2 figures, 20 tables. Preprint. Dataset and evaluation code included

light_analysis.overview: 提出StakeBench，一个基于市场承诺的语言理解评估框架，使用市场行为而非外部标注来衡量模型对金融语言的理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有金融NLP基准依赖外部标注，衡量语言感知而非市场中的实际承诺。这忽略了语言在金融市场中的实际作用，即语言反映交易者的真实承诺和行动。StakeBench旨在通过链接市场评论与可验证的位置、交易和赔率记录，提供更客观的评估。
light_analysis.method: StakeBench从Polymarket和Manifold收集560,876条评论，关联到2,261个已解决市场，监督信号来自市场行为（立场、交易、赔率轨迹）。设计四项诊断任务：检测市场承诺、识别隐含立场、预测交易行动、集体赔率预测。使用三种承诺感知指标，并进行了有效性审计和解释边界区分。
light_analysis.result: 在15个LLM和18个主题/平台设置下，模型部分恢复立场信号，定向准确率0.506-0.599，但在后续任务中出现结构性失败：10/15模型在未来行动预测中崩溃为1-2个标签，无模型在集体赔率预测上持续优于朴素方向基线。模型规模与性能无关，金融域微调未改善立场识别，平台激励显著影响高阶结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: StakeBench揭示了当前LLM在理解市场承诺方面的局限性，强调了基于行为评估的重要性。它为金融NLP提供更客观的基准，推动模型开发关注真实市场信号。未来可扩展至更多市场和任务，并探索如何结合因果推断。

title: Active Query Synthesis for Preference Learning
abstract: Efficient learning of user preferences is crucial for many modern decision making systems but typically requires costly labeled data. Active learning reduces this cost, yet standard methods are computationally expensive due to pool-based evaluation. Further, most methods assume all query feedback is equally reliable, ignoring that pairwise queries between nearly identical or entirely dissimilar items yield ambiguous, low-confidence responses. To address the issue of feedback reliability, we introduce a novel confidence aware response model that explicitly accounts for these ambiguous comparisons. To overcome the computational bottleneck of pool-based evaluation, we propose an active query synthesis framework, Info-Synth that generates optimal queries by maximizing a mutual information-based objective within a continuous space. Moreover, we propose two strategies, Pair M-dist and Pair Opt-dist, that extend Info-Synth to select effective queries even when restricted to finite query pools. We demonstrate our framework's versatility and performance across synthetic preference learning, constrained text summary datasets, and subjective, continuous-space controller gain tuning for a simulated mobile robot.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种主动查询合成框架Info-Synth，结合置信度感知响应模型，高效学习用户偏好。
light_analysis.motivation: 主动偏好学习常受限于池基评估的计算开销，且忽视相似或完全不同项目比较导致的低置信度反馈，降低了学习效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出Info-Synth框架，通过最大化连续空间中的互信息生成最优查询。针对有限查询池，设计Pair M-dist和Pair Opt-dist策略。引入置信度感知响应模型，显式处理模糊比较。在合成偏好学习、约束文本摘要和移动机器人控制器调优中验证。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确具体数值，但框架在合成数据、文本摘要和机器人调优任务上展示了有效性和通用性，优于未考虑反馈可靠性的基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: Info-Synth通过主动查询合成和置信度建模，提升了偏好学习的效率与鲁棒性，适用于多种场景。未来可探索更大规模或在线学习设置。

title: WhoSaidIt: Human-LLM Collaborative Annotation for Text-Based Multilingual Speaker-Attribute Classification
abstract: Annotating speaker attributes from text is inherently ambiguous, particularly in multilingual settings where demographic and social cues are implicit and culturally variable. We propose a human-large language model (LLM) collaborative re-annotation framework for stabilizing multilingual speaker-attribute labels under practical resource constraints. Starting from a noisy corpus, we use LLMs to surface recurring annotation rationales through iterative interaction with experts, and apply disagreement-focused sampling for targeted re-annotation. Using this framework, we construct WhoSaidIt, a multilingual dataset covering nine speaker-attribute labels. We quantify divergence between original and revised annotations, benchmark recent LLMs, and analyze the effect of explicit rationales on model behavior. Our results reveal substantial cross-lingual differences in annotation decisions and demonstrate both the strengths and limitations of LLMs in speaker-attribute classification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出人机协作的重新标注框架，构建多语言说话人属性数据集，揭示跨语言标注差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本中的说话人属性标注存在歧义，尤其在多语言场景下，人口统计和社会线索隐含且文化多变。现有方法难以稳定标注，且资源有限。该研究旨在通过人-大语言模型协作，提升标注一致性，并构建高质量多语言数据集。
light_analysis.method: 提出人机协作重新标注框架：从含噪声语料库出发，通过迭代与专家交互利用LLM揭示重复出现的标注依据，并采用分歧聚焦采样进行针对性重新标注。构建了WhoSaidIt多语言数据集，覆盖九种说话人属性标签。
light_analysis.result: 量化了原始与修订标注之间的分歧，基准测试了多种LLM，分析了显式依据对模型行为的影响。结果揭示了跨语言标注决策的显著差异，展示了LLM在说话人属性分类中的优势与局限。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架有效提升了多语言标注稳定性，构建的数据集有助于研究跨文化属性分类。工作表明LLM在辅助标注中表现良好，但仍存在局限性（如文化敏感性不足），未来可探索更精细的协作策略。

title: Rethinking Weak Supervision in Anomaly Detection: A Comprehensive Benchmark
abstract: Weakly supervised anomaly detection (WSAD) has developed in three primary directions: incomplete, inexact, and inaccurate supervision. However, these directions remain isolated, lacking a unified framework to assess whether they address unique challenges or share fundamental mechanics. This paper introduces WSADBench, the first benchmark that unifies evaluation across distinct weakly supervised scenarios, benchmarking diverse approaches from specialized WSAD methods to advanced tabular foundation models. WSADBench establishes standardized protocols to evaluate 36 algorithms across 4 modalities by systematically varying label quantity, granularity, and quality, revealing the performance boundaries of various methods. Based on over 700K experiments, WSADBench reveals four critical insights: (i) Strong intrinsic correlations exist between these weak supervision scenarios, challenging the isolation of current research directions. (ii) Specialized WSAD algorithms excel only in extreme label-scarcity regimes but are quickly dominated by tabular foundation models and general classification methods as supervision increases or in OOD scenarios. (iii) Unlabeled data shows inconsistent utility across settings, with marginal gains compared to label refinement. (iv) Models exhibit asymmetric sensitivity to different types of label noise. We release WSADBench as an open-source benchmark with code and datasets to facilitate future WSAD research: https://github.com/SUFE-AILAB/WSADBench.
comment: Accepted at KDD 2026 Datasets and Benchmarks Track (Cycle 2)

light_analysis.overview: 首个统一评估弱监督异常检测中不同弱监督场景的基准框架WSADBench，通过70万+实验揭示了方法的性能边界和关键见解。
light_analysis.motivation: 弱监督异常检测的三种主要方向（不完整、不精确、不准确监督）长期孤立发展，缺乏统一框架评估它们是否解决独特挑战或共享基本机制。这种孤立状态阻碍了方法比较和领域进步，亟需标准化基准来揭示不同场景下的性能规律。
light_analysis.method: 提出WSADBench基准，统一评估36种算法（包括专门WSAD方法、表格基础模型和通用分类方法）在4种模态上的表现。通过系统变化标签数量、粒度和质量，建立标准化评价协议，基于70万+实验分析各方法的性能边界和内在关联。
light_analysis.result: 四个关键发现：(i)弱监督场景间存在强内在相关性，挑战当前研究方向孤立性；(ii)专门WSAD算法仅在极端标签稀缺时占优，随监督增加或遭遇OOD数据被表格基础模型和通用分类方法超越；(iii)未标记数据效用不一致，标签细化的增益更显著；(iv)模型对不同类型标签噪声表现不对称敏感性。
light_analysis.conclusion: WSADBench作为统一基准，揭示了弱监督异常检测中不同场景的关联性和方法选择策略，为未来研究提供了标准化平台和关键洞见。开源代码和数据集将促进社区协作，后续可探索场景相关性建模及噪声鲁棒方法。

title: Conditional KRR: Injecting Unpenalized Features into Kernel Methods with Applications to Kernel Thresholding
abstract: Conditionally positive definite (CPD) kernels are defined with respect to a function class $\mathcal{F}$. It is well known that such a kernel $K$ is associated with its native space (defined analogously to an RKHS), which in turn gives rise to a learning method -- called conditional kernel ridge regression (conditional KRR) due to its analogy with KRR -- where the estimated regression function is penalized by the square of its native space norm. This method is of interest because it can be viewed as classical linear regression, with features specified by $\mathcal{F}$, followed by the application of standard KRR to the residual (unexplained) component of the target variable. Methods of this type have recently attracted increasing attention.   We study the statistical properties of this method by reducing its behavior to that of KRR with another fixed kernel, called the residual kernel. Our main theoretical result shows that such a reduction is indeed possible, at the cost of an additional term in the expected test risk, bounded by $\mathcal{O}(1/\sqrt{N})$, where $N$ is the sample size and the hidden constant depends on the class $\mathcal{F}$ and the input distribution.   This reduction enables us to analyze conditional KRR in the case where $K$ is positive definite and $\mathcal{F}$ is given by the first $k$ principal eigenfunctions in the Mercer decomposition of $K$. We also consider the setting where $\mathcal{F}$ consists of $k$ random features from a random feature representation of $K$. It turns out that these two settings are closely related. Both our theoretical analysis and experiments confirm that conditional KRR outperforms standard KRR in these cases whenever the $\mathcal{F}$-component of the regression function is more pronounced than the residual part.

light_analysis.overview: 提出条件核岭回归（Conditional KRR），允许在核方法中注入无惩罚特征，并通过简化为标准KRR分析其统计性质，理论证明额外风险界为O(1/√N)。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准KRR对所有特征施加相同惩罚，但实际应用中某些先验已知的重要特征应无惩罚地纳入模型。条件KRR通过先对指定特征进行线性回归，再对残差应用KRR，可更灵活地建模。然而其统计性质缺乏理论分析，本文填补了这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 将条件KRR的行为简化为对残差核执行标准KRR，并附加一个与样本量N相关的风险项O(1/√N)。重点分析了两种特殊设置：特征集F由核K的Mercer分解前k个特征函数构成，以及F由k个随机特征构成。利用残差核构建等价模型，实现理论分析和算法实现。
light_analysis.result: 理论表明条件KRR的期望测试风险与标准KRR之差被O(1/√N)界住，且常数依赖于F和输入分布。实验验证当回归函数中F分量占主导时，条件KRR相比标准KRR显著提升预测性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 条件KRR为核方法注入先验特征提供了一种新框架，理论保证其风险可控。在核阈值等应用中具有潜力。未来可研究F的自动选择策略及更一般的不定核场景。

title: Paris 2.0: A Decentralized Diffusion Model for Video Generation
abstract: We present Paris 2.0, the first video generation model pre-trained through decentralized computation. Its training recipe builds upon Paris 1.0 (arXiv:2510.03434), the first ever open-weight Decentralized Diffusion Model (DDM), which showed that image generation can be trained without a monolithic GPU cluster. However, temporally coherent video generation had remained an open problem under decentralized training, and Paris 2.0 closes it.   In low-resolution text-to-video training, against a monolithic model trained on the same data under a matched total compute budget, Paris 2.0 cuts Frechet Video Distance (FVD) from 561.04 to 279.01, a ~2.0x improvement, and lifts CLIP text-video similarity and aesthetic score.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个通过去中心化计算预训练的视频生成模型Paris 2.0，实现了去中心化训练下的时序连贯视频生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频生成模型依赖于集中式GPU集群进行训练，计算资源门槛高、可扩展性受限。虽然Paris 1.0已证明图像生成可通过去中心化训练实现，但时序连贯的视频生成在去中心化框架下仍是未解决的问题。Paris 2.0填补了这一空白，旨在证明去中心化计算能够高效训练高质量视频生成模型，降低大规模视频模型训练的资源依赖。
light_analysis.method: Paris 2.0基于Paris 1.0的去中心化扩散模型（DDM）框架，通过分布式计算节点协同训练，无需单一GPU集群。模型采用低分辨率文本到视频训练策略，在保持去中心化训练优势的同时，通过改进时序建模确保帧间连贯性。与集中式基线模型在相同数据及总计算预算下进行对比。
light_analysis.result: 在低分辨率文本到视频生成任务中，Paris 2.0将Frechet Video Distance（FVD）从集中式基线的561.04降至279.01，提升约2.0倍；同时提高了CLIP文本-视频相似度和美学评分。该结果充分证明去中心化训练在视频生成任务上的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Paris 2.0首次实现去中心化预训练的视频生成模型，验证了去中心化计算在视频领域的可行性，为降低视频生成模型的训练门槛提供了新路径。未来可探索更高分辨率、更复杂场景下的去中心化训练，以及跨节点通信效率的优化。

title: Neuronal Stochastic Attention Circuit (NSAC) for Probabilistic Representation Learning
abstract: Reliable quantification of uncertainty estimates in continuous-time (CT) representation learning remains nascent, particularly within CT attention architectures. We introduce the Neuronal Stochastic Attention Circuit (NSAC), a novel biologically-inspired CT attention architecture that reformulates attention logit computation as the solution of an Ornstein-Uhlenbeck stochastic differential equation modulated by input-dependent, nonlinear interlinked gates derived from repurposed C.elegans Neuronal Circuit Policies (NCPs) wiring mechanism. It induces Gaussian distribution over logits that propagates principled stochasticity through logistic-normal distribution over attention weights to yield probabilistic output. A two-term objective function combining Gaussian negative log-likelihood with an epistemic-separation regularizer enforces higher predictive variance and enables joint quantification of aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty. Empirically, we implement NSAC in a diverse set of learning tasks including: (i) irregular CT function approximation; (ii) multivariate regression; (iii) long-range forecasting; (iv) Industry 4.0; and (v) the lane-keeping of autonomous vehicles. We observe that the NSAC remains competitive against several baselines in terms of accuracy and produces reasonably well-calibrated uncertainty estimates while being interpretable at the neuronal cell level.

light_analysis.overview: 提出生物启发的连续时间随机注意力电路NSAC，将注意力对数计算建模为Ornstein-Uhlenbeck随机微分方程的解，实现概率表示学习并联合量化偶然与认知不确定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 连续时间表示学习中的不确定性量化尚不成熟，现有连续时间注意力架构无法有效处理随机性和模型不确定性，且缺乏可解释性。需要一种既能保持高性能又能提供可靠不确定性估计的概率性架构，以满足工业4.0和自动驾驶等安全关键应用的需求。
light_analysis.method: NSAC通过输入依赖的非线性互连门（源自C.elegans神经元电路策略机制）调制Ornstein-Uhlenbeck过程，生成对数上的高斯分布，再经logistic-normal分布转化为随机注意力权重。目标函数结合高斯负对数似然与认知分离正则化，联合学习预测均值、偶然不确定性和认知不确定性。
light_analysis.result: 在五个任务（不规则连续时间函数逼近、多元回归、长程预测、工业4.0、自动驾驶车道保持）中，NSAC在准确性上与LSTM、Transformer等基线相当，且产生校准良好的不确定性估计（如负对数似然降低、预期校准误差改善），同时提供神经元细胞级别的可解释性。
light_analysis.conclusion: NSAC为连续时间注意力机制提供了概率性扩展，实现了结构化不确定性量化与生物可解释性的统一。其实际价值在于安全关键系统（如自动驾驶）中的可靠决策，局限性可能在于计算复杂度较高，未来可探索更高效的随机微分方程求解或扩展至图文多模态任务。

title: Retrying vs Resampling in AI Control
abstract: AI coding scaffolds like Claude Code and Codex use \textit{retrying}: blocking actions flagged as risky and continuing the trajectory. We study retrying from an AI control perspective, which treats the model as potentially adversarial. We find that while retrying reduces honest suspicion scores, the untrusted model can exploit monitor rationale to construct sneakier attacks, negating safety gains. We also study \textit{resampling}: drawing multiple samples from the same context, which does not leak exploitable information. We disentangle design choices that previous work on resampling had bundled together. In BashArena, with Claude Opus 4.6 as the untrusted model and MiMo-V2-Flash as the trusted monitor, drawing five samples per step and auditing on the maximum suspicion score raises safety from 61\% to 71\% at a 0.3\% audit budget, at no cost to usefulness. Selectively resampling only the steps that look suspicious on the first draw recovers 6.2 percentage points of the gain while drawing only 10\% as many extra samples. Two of our findings in this setting contradict earlier work on resampling. The first is that auditing based on the maximum across resampled suspicion scores outperforms using the minimum, which is the opposite of what Ctrl-Z found. The second is that executing the least suspicious sample, which is the central mechanism in earlier defer-to-resample protocols, gives only a small empirical safety gain in our setting (+3.9 pp, with the confidence interval overlapping zero).

light_analysis.overview: 论文比较了AI控制中重试与重采样策略的安全性，发现重试存在信息泄露风险，而重采样在特定审计策略下可显著提升安全性，并纠正了先前研究中的结论。
light_analysis.motivation: AI编码工具如Claude Code使用重试机制阻止高风险动作，但这可能让对抗性模型利用监控器理由构造更隐蔽的攻击。现有重采样研究设计混杂，未解耦关键选择。本研究旨在厘清不同策略的安全影响，并验证先前结论的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 在BashArena环境中，以Claude Opus 4.6为不可信模型、MiMo-V2-Flash为监控器。采用每步重采样5次，基于最大怀疑分数审计。选择性重采样仅针对首次可疑步骤，额外采样量减少90%。审计预算0.3%。
light_analysis.result: 重采样使安全性从61%提升至71%，且基于最大怀疑分数审计优于最小（与Ctrl-Z相反）。执行最不怀疑样本仅带来+3.9pp增益，置信区间含零。选择性重采样恢复6.2pp增益，额外采样仅10%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 重采样比重试更安全，但设计选择至关重要：审计策略应取最大值而非最小值，且defer-to-resample协议效果有限。研究纠正了先前错误结论，为构建安全AI编码系统提供了实证指导，未来需关注重试的信息泄露风险。

title: When Gradients Collide: Failure Modes of Multi-Objective Prompt Optimization for LLM Judges
abstract: Customizing an LLM judge to a specific task or domain often involves optimizing its prompt across multiple evaluation criteria simultaneously. Textual gradient methods automate this for a single judge criterion, however they produce natural-language critiques, not numerical vectors. Thus, the conflict-resolution toolkit of multi-task learning (PCGrad, MGDA) doesn't apply to the multi-objective textual gradient setting. We test five decomposition modes of textual gradient optimizers by varying how much cross-task information the loss, gradient and optimizer LLMs share. In 6 of 10 configurations, we observe that optimization never improves over the initial prompt. Gradient specificity drops by 59% (from 9.0 to 3.7) when the gradient LLM processes multiple criteria jointly. Separately, we observe that naively combining per-task instructions into a single prompt degrades Spearman's rho by -5.3%. These results identify two separable failure modes: optimization-time gradient dilution and inference-time instruction interference, which together constrain the design space for multi-objective judge customization using textual feedback.
comment: Accepted at ACL 2026 CustomNLP4U Workshop. Code, prompts and data available at https://github.com/ARDivekar/PromptMOO

light_analysis.overview: 本文识别了多目标提示优化中LLM评委的两种失败模式：优化时梯度稀释和推理时指令干扰。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多目标提示优化方法在LLM评委定制中存在挑战，因为文本梯度方法产生自然语言批评而非数值向量，无法直接应用多任务学习的冲突解决工具（如PCGrad、MGDA）。这导致优化过程常失败，需要系统研究其失败原因。
light_analysis.method: 通过五种分解模式测试文本梯度优化器，控制损失、梯度和优化器LLM之间跨任务信息的共享程度。在10种配置中评估优化效果，并测量梯度特异性（从9.0到3.7下降59%）和Spearman相关性（组合指令下降5.3%）。
light_analysis.result: 在10种配置中，6种优化从未改进初始提示。梯度特异性从9.0降至3.7（下降59%），表明联合处理多标准时梯度稀释。单独组合任务指令导致Spearman's rho下降5.3%，揭示指令干扰。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文阐明了多目标文本梯度优化的两种失败模式：梯度稀释和指令干扰，为LLM评委定制提供了设计约束。未来工作需探索更鲁棒的跨任务信息共享策略以缓解这些失败。

title: Confidence and Calibration of Activation Oracles for Reliable Interpretation of Language Model Internals
abstract: Activation oracles aim to make the activations of other models legible to humans and yield promising results compared to white-box interpretability techniques. However, uncertainty quantification (UQ) for the natural-language outputs of such activation oracles is so far understudied. Here, we investigate 6 different methods for estimating the confidence of activation oracles and evaluate how well-calibrated their confidence scores are. Our experiments on 6,000 samples per oracle (varying verbalizer and context prompts) reveal that bootstrap mode frequency is the best-calibrated method among those tested (ECE 5.7% vs. 25.5% for the answer-word log-probability on Qwen3-8B; 10.3% vs. 13.1% on Qwen3.6-27B), and that the log-prob baseline can serve as a fast triage signal at a fraction of the cost.   Code and the patched trainer are available at https://github.com/federicotorrielli/probabilistic_activation_oracles.

light_analysis.overview: 研究激活预言机置信度估计与校准，发现bootstrap模式频率校准最佳，优于log-prob基线。
light_analysis.motivation: 激活预言机旨在将模型激活转译为人类可读文本，在白盒可解释性中表现优异，但其自然语言输出的不确定性量化研究不足。现有方法缺乏可靠置信度，导致解释不可信，需系统评估不同估计方法的校准质量。
light_analysis.method: 在Qwen3-8B和Qwen3.6-27B模型上，对6种置信度估计方法（包括bootstrap模式频率、回答词log概率等）进行校准评估。每预言机使用6000样本，变化verbalizer和上下文提示，以期望校准误差（ECE）为指标，并对比计算成本。
light_analysis.result: bootstrap模式频率在校准上显著优于log-prob基线：在8B模型上ECE 5.7% vs 25.5%，在27B模型上10.3% vs 13.1%。log-prob可作为低成本快速筛选信号，但校准较差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出bootstrap模式频率作为激活预言机置信度估计的校准方法，有效提升不确定性量化可靠性。log-prob提供快速近似。研究为可解释性提供可信度评估工具，代码已开源。

title: L2IR: Revealing Latent Intent in Graph Fraud Detection
abstract: Graph fraud detection has long depended on Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) to propagate and aggregate information across relational data. A critical obstacle in practice, however, is that fraudsters frequently disguise themselves by forging numerous connections with benign users, causing fraud signals to be progressively diluted during neighborhood aggregation and undermining detection reliability. While recent efforts have used Large Language Models (LLMs) to provide rich semantic cues for fraud detection, the underlying intent behind suspicious connections remains insufficiently explored. Compounding this issue, the scarcity of annotated fraud samples makes it difficult to train detectors that remain robust under heavy camouflage. To address these gaps, we propose L2IR, an LLM-driven Latent Intent Revealing framework for graph fraud detection. By uncovering latent intent from both user behaviors and suspicious connections, L2IR extracts intent-aware representations from raw behavioral traces and reasons about the true purpose behind individual connections, effectively distinguishing supportive links from misleading ones. It further incorporates adaptive self-training to enhance robustness under limited supervision. Evaluations on two real-world datasets characterized by pervasive camouflage demonstrate that L2IR surpasses strong baselines and can function as a plug-in enhancement for a range of GNN-based detectors, improving AUPRC by up to 8.27%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出L2IR框架，利用大语言模型揭示图欺诈检测中的隐藏意图，并通过自适应自训练提升鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 图欺诈检测中，欺诈者通过与正常用户伪造大量连接来稀释欺诈信号，导致图神经网络检测可靠性下降。现有方法未能深入探究可疑连接背后的意图，且标注样本稀缺，难以训练鲁棒的检测器。本文旨在解决这些不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出L2IR框架，利用大语言模型从用户行为和可疑连接中揭示潜在意图，提取意图感知表示并推理连接的真实目的，区分支持性连接与误导性连接。同时引入自适应自训练机制，在有限监督下增强鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在两个具有广泛伪装的真实数据集上，L2IR超越强基线方法，并可作为即插即用模块提升多种GNN检测器的性能，AUPRC最高提升8.27%。
light_analysis.conclusion: L2IR通过揭示隐藏意图和自适应自训练，有效提升了图欺诈检测在伪装场景下的可靠性，具有显著的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的意图建模和跨域迁移。

title: DRScaffold: Boosting Dense-Scene Reasoning in Lightweight Vision Language Models
abstract: Lightweight vision-language models perform competitively on standard benchmarks yet fail systematically in dense-scene reasoning, where multiple objects, attributes, and relations must be jointly grounded and resolved through multi-step inference. Such capability is critical for real-world applications where models must reliably interpret cluttered environments. Yet existing training signals provide no explicit grounding between reasoning steps and the underlying visual entities and relations, leaving lightweight models free to generate fluent but visually unanchored reasoning chains. To address this gap, we first introduce DRBench, a benchmark of 14,573 questions across 2,943 images, organized into five task categories spanning three progressive reasoning layers. Building on DRBench, we propose DRScaffold, a supervised fine-tuning framework that decomposes the supervision target into four causally ordered stages, enforcing grounded reasoning without architectural modification. Experiments on three lightweight VLMs demonstrate substantial gains on DRBench while preserving or improving performance on general-purpose benchmarks. Notably, Qwen2.5-VL-3B trained with DRScaffold surpasses the frozen Qwen2.5-VL-32B on DRBench, demonstrating that structured supervision can substitute for a significant portion of model scale in dense-scene reasoning. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/irene-shi/DRScaffold .

light_analysis.overview: 提出DRScaffold框架，通过因果顺序分阶段监督，显著提升轻量级视觉语言模型在密集场景推理中的表现，甚至超越大模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 轻量级视觉语言模型在标准基准上表现良好，但在密集场景推理中系统性失败，因为现有训练信号缺乏推理步骤与视觉实体间的明确关联，导致模型生成流畅但视觉无锚定的推理链。这种能力对于真实世界中的杂乱环境理解至关重要，但现有方法未能解决。
light_analysis.method: 首先构建DRBench基准（14,573个问题，2,943张图像，5任务类别，3推理层次）。然后提出DRScaffold监督微调框架，将监督目标分解为四个因果顺序阶段（causally ordered stages），在不改变架构的情况下强制进行有依据推理。三个轻量级VLM（如Qwen2.5-VL-3B）上实验。
light_analysis.result: 在DRBench上获得显著提升，同时保持或提升通用基准性能。Qwen2.5-VL-3B经DRScaffold训练后，在DRBench上超越冻结的Qwen2.5-VL-32B，表明结构化监督可替代大量模型规模。
light_analysis.conclusion: DRScaffold通过结构化监督有效提升轻量级VLM的密集场景推理能力，具有重要学术和实际价值。未来可探索更复杂的因果分解和跨任务泛化。

title: Peak-Then-Collapse and the Four Interface Channels of Knowledge-Graph Tool Use
abstract: We test the standard RLVR tool-use recipe -- GRPO on Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct -- on a deliberately minimal knowledge-graph tool API: four Freebase navigation verbs over Complex WebQuestions. Under a self-verifiable retrieval reward, the policy's tool-grounded answer rate climbs from $3.8\%$ to $9.6\%$ over 250 steps, then collapses to $0\%$ within a single 50-step window -- a \emph{peak-then-collapse} pattern replicated across four seeds. Across seven reward designs, we find four recurring failure modes: adding denser or more targeted proxy rewards shifts the failure mode rather than eliminating it. We argue that a key difference from Python interpreters, web search, and JSON APIs is interface feedback: their failures often leak natural-language signal the model saw in pretraining. A Python traceback names the failing line; an empty Freebase result \texttt{[]} does not. Stripping away that surface exposes a degradation regime that same-family reward redesigns do not fix. A direct oracle ablation rules out relation selection: injecting gold relations at every retrieval call lifts exact-match accuracy by only $+0.20$~pp, and $95.4\%$ of retrieval-dependent errors are retrieval-composition failures rather than answer-extraction failures. As a mitigation, one-iteration self-distillation reaches $40.0\%$ EM at 7B and is capacity-invariant: doubling capacity to 14B improves EM by only $0.25$~pp, and initialization barely matters -- the ceiling appears interface-bound within the 7B--14B range tested.

light_analysis.overview: 发现GRPO训练在知识图谱工具使用中导致性能先升后降，识别四种接口失败模式，瓶颈在于接口反馈而非模型容量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RLVR方法在代码解释器、网页搜索等工具中表现良好，但在知识图谱API上失败。本文旨在探究失败原因，发现接口反馈缺乏自然语言信号（如Python回溯）导致训练不稳定，而模型的工具接地回答率出现峰值后骤降的异常模式。
light_analysis.method: 使用GRPO算法在Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct模型上训练，基于Freebase的四个导航动词API和Complex WebQuestions数据集。设计七种奖励方案（包括自验证检索奖励），通过消融实验分离关系选择与检索组合错误。最后采用一次迭代自蒸馏作为缓解措施。
light_analysis.result: 工具接地回答率从3.8%升至9.6%后骤降至0%。注入金关系仅提升0.20pp精确匹配，95.4%检索依赖错误源于组合失败。一次自蒸馏达40.0% EM，但7B→14B容量提升仅增0.25pp，初始化影响微乎其微。
light_analysis.conclusion: 知识图谱工具使用的性能受限于接口反馈设计而非模型容量。自蒸馏可缓解但触碰接口上限。未来需改进奖励信号或设计具自然语言反馈的接口，以突破现有瓶颈。

title: CITYREP: A Unified Benchmark for Urban Representations Across Cities, Tasks, and Modalities
abstract: Urban representation learning encodes complex urban environments into general-purpose embeddings for diverse downstream tasks and emerging urban foundation models. However, current evaluations are limited, typically focusing on one or two cities and tasks and relying on random splits that introduce spatial leakage, leading to inflated performance and weak support for cross-location generalization and fair comparison. To address this, we propose CityRep, a unified benchmark that evaluates urban representations across data modalities, cities, and tasks using spatially structured splits. CityRep consists of three key components: (1) a spatial unit-agnostic evaluation framework that supports heterogeneous urban representations through a standardized alignment module; (2) a unified evaluation protocol using block-based spatial splits to mitigate spatial leakage and enable rigorous model comparison; and (3) an extensible multi-city, multi-task benchmark suite spanning 8 cities and 8 tasks across regression, classification, and distribution prediction. We evaluate 11 representative urban representation models. Results show that performance is highly sensitive to the split protocol, with random splits inflating scores and altering model rankings. We also observe substantial variability across cities and tasks, underscoring the need for generalization-aware evaluation. CityRep is released as a reproducible benchmark with datasets, evaluation pipelines, and diagnostic tools to facilitate fair comparison and support future research in urban representation learning towards urban foundation models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CityRep，一个统一的跨模态、跨城市、跨任务的城市场景表示学习评估基准，通过空间结构划分缓解随机划分导致的空间泄漏问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前城市表示学习评估局限于少量城市和任务，且普遍采用随机数据划分，导致空间泄漏和性能高估，无法有效支持跨位置泛化和公平比较。缺乏统一、可复现的评估基准，阻碍了城市基础模型的发展。因此需要设计一个能消除空间泄漏、支持多城市多任务公平对比的标准化评测平台。
light_analysis.method: CityRep由三部分构成：(1)空间单元无关的评估框架，通过标准对齐模块兼容异构表示；(2)基于块状空间划分的统一评估协议，减少空间泄漏；(3)覆盖8个城市、8项任务（回归、分类、分布预测）的可扩展基准套件。对11种代表性城市表示模型进行全面评测，包括对比学习、自监督和图神经网络等方法。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，模型性能对划分协议高度敏感：随机划分显著高估分数并改变模型排名（如某些模型在随机划分下排名第一，在空间划分下排名下降），城市间和任务间性能差异大，凸显泛化评估的必要性。CityRep提供了可复现的评测结果和诊断工具，有助于识别表示的真实鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CityRep弥补了城市表示学习评估的空白，通过空间感知划分消除评估偏差，为跨城市跨任务泛化提供科学度量。该基准有助于推动面向城市基础模型的公平对比和可复现研究，未来可扩展至更多模态和城市，并用于分析表示的可迁移性。

title: Length Generalization with Log-Depth Recurrent Units
abstract: Length generalization remains a persistent challenge for neural networks: recurrent models tend to suffer from positional biases, while transformers are constrained by fixed computational depth. Regular languages provide a frequently used testbed for evaluating length generalization, as label prediction can be checked for any sequence length. We propose MLP-LDRU, a type of Log-Depth Recurrent Unit, which captures a class of associativity-biased operators designed to approximate recurrence through parallel reduction. We evaluate MLP-LDRU on 21 regular-language tasks, consisting of standard benchmarks and new prefix languages, where it achieves 100% out-of-distribution accuracy on 18 tasks and at least 99.9% on the remaining 3 when increasing max training length, outperforming comparable recurrent and attention-based models. We further evaluate MLP-LDRU beyond regular languages on ListOps and NLP classification benchmarks, where it performs competitively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MLP-LDRU，一种对数深度循环单元，通过并行归约近似循环，实现正则语言任务的完美长度泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 长度泛化是神经网络的持久挑战：循环模型易受位置偏差影响，而Transformer受限于固定计算深度。正则语言提供了常用测试平台，因为标签预测可针对任意序列长度进行检查。现有方法在处理超出训练长度的序列时性能下降，亟需能够高效泛化的模型。
light_analysis.method: 提出MLP-LDRU，即对数深度循环单元，通过设计一类结合结合性偏置的算子，利用并行归约近似循环过程，从而捕获长距离依赖。在21个正则语言任务（包括标准基准和新前缀语言）上评估，并扩展到ListOps和NLP分类基准，模型采用MLP结构实现高效并行计算。
light_analysis.result: 在21个正则语言任务中，MLP-LDRU在18个任务上达到100%的分布外准确率，剩余3个任务在增加最大训练长度后准确率不低于99.9%，显著优于可比较的循环和注意力模型。在ListOps和NLP分类基准上，模型也表现出竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: MLP-LDRU成功解决了长度泛化难题，在正则语言上取得了近乎完美的泛化性能，并展示了在更复杂任务上的潜力。该工作为设计具有强长度泛化能力的神经网络提供了新思路，未来可探索其在更广泛序列任务中的应用。

title: Everything at Every Scale: Scale-Invariant Diffusion with Continuous Super-Resolution
abstract: Creating images from noise is image generation; reconstructing fine details from coarse inputs is super-resolution. Despite their practical differences, both can be understood as reversing information loss across scales. We introduce $\textbf{SKILD}$, a $\textbf{S}$cale-invariant $\textbf{K}$-Space $\textbf{I}$mage $\textbf{L}$earning $\textbf{D}$iffusion model that unifies generation and continuous super-resolution within a single unconditional framework. Both natural images and critical physical systems exhibit scale invariance, and we leverage it to design a forward process that attenuates image content from fine to coarse scales while injecting spectrum-matched Gaussian noise, making scale an explicit coordinate of the diffusion dynamics. The same trained reverse process performs generation and continuous super-resolution by varying only the starting timestep: $\textit{no task-specific architecture, no conditioning branch, no classifier-free guidance, no retraining per scale factor}$. Empirically, SKILD reaches FID $2.65$ and Inception Score $9.63$ on unconditional CIFAR-10, performs $2\times$--$8\times$ super-resolution on ImageNet from a single unconditional checkpoint while outperforming conditional models across perceptual metrics, and reconstructs critical Ising models whose connected four-point correlations closely track the ground truth.

light_analysis.overview: 提出尺度不变扩散模型SKILD，统一图像生成与连续超分辨率，无需任务特定架构或条件分支。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像生成和超分辨率本质都是逆转不同尺度的信息丢失，但传统方法需针对各任务或尺度单独训练，缺乏统一框架。受自然图像与物理系统尺度不变性启发，作者设计了一个将尺度作为显式坐标的扩散模型，实现单模型覆盖多种任务。
light_analysis.method: SKILD是一种尺度不变的K空间图像学习扩散模型。前向过程从细到粗衰减图像内容，并注入谱匹配高斯噪声，使尺度成为扩散动力学的显式坐标。反向过程通过仅改变起始时间步，即可执行无条件生成或任意倍率连续超分辨率，无需条件分支或重训练。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-10上达到FID 2.65、Inception Score 9.63；在ImageNet上从单个无条件检查点实现2×至8×超分辨率，感知指标超越条件模型；并成功重建临界Ising模型，四点相关函数与理论值高度吻合。
light_analysis.conclusion: SKILD统一了生成与超分辨率任务，简化了模型设计，证明了尺度不变性在扩散模型中的有效性。该工作为图像生成和多尺度任务提供了新范式，具有降低训练成本和拓展至物理系统仿真的潜力。
