title: CausaLab: A Scalable Environment for Interactive Causal Discovery Toward AI Scientists
abstract: We introduce CausaLab, a scalable environment for evaluating interactive causal discovery by LLM agents. Unlike prior evaluations, CausaLab evaluates both whether an agent can solve a problem using causal evidence and whether its answer is supported by a correct hypothesis about the underlying causal mechanism. Each episode places an agent in a synthetic laboratory: it receives prior measurement records, intervenes on a manipulator crystal, and predicts the resonance frequency of a held-out reactor crystal governed by the same mechanism. The hidden data-generating process is a randomly sampled structural causal model (SCM), so success requires recovering both a causal graph and structural equations rather than recalling prior knowledge. CausaLab also includes a domain-specific language that records the agent's evolving SCM hypothesis, making trajectories inspectable and comparable with ground truth. Experiments show a persistent gap between prediction and mechanism recovery: in the purely observational 6-node setting, GPT-5.2-high reaches 92% task accuracy but only 0.471 all-edge $F_1$. This observation further motivates our exploration of different interaction strategies: Mixed observation--intervention strategies improve structural fidelity: in the mixed 6-node setting, GPT-5.2-high achieves 80% on both task accuracy and all-edge $F_1$. Yet even strong agents struggle to design informative interventions, as pure intervention strategies perform poorly on both task accuracy and all-edge $F_1$. We identify premature stopping as a major weakness of agents, and show that asking the model to verify the consistency between its hypothesis and past data can help mitigate this issue. CausaLab therefore separates predictive success from causal understanding and exposes current LLM agents' limits as experimental causal reasoners.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CausaLab环境，评估LLM代理在交互式因果发现中预测与机制恢复的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有因果发现评估主要关注预测准确性，忽略了对潜在因果机制的正确理解。本研究旨在区分代理是否真正理解因果结构，而不仅仅是利用相关性进行预测，从而暴露当前LLM在因果推理方面的局限性。
light_analysis.method: CausaLab将每个任务构建为合成实验室：代理接收观测数据，可对操纵器晶体进行干预，预测受同一机制控制的不同晶体的共振频率。隐藏过程为随机采样的结构因果模型，代理需同时恢复因果图和结构方程。环境包含领域特定语言记录假设轨迹，便于与真实机制对比。
light_analysis.result: 纯观测6节点设置中，GPT-5.2-high任务准确率达92%但全边F1仅0.471；混合观测-干预策略将两者提升至80%。纯干预策略表现差，表明代理难以设计有效干预。提前停止是主要弱点，验证假设与数据一致性可缓解该问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: CausaLab成功将预测成功与因果理解分离，暴露当前LLM代理在实验因果推理中的局限：虽能预测但机制恢复差。该环境为开发具有真正因果推理能力的AI科学家提供基准，未来方向包括改进干预策略设计。

title: A Multimodal 3D Foundation Model for Light Sheet Fluorescence Microscopy Enables Few-Shot Segmentation, Classification, and Deblurring
abstract: Light sheet fluorescence microscopy (LSM) enables high-resolution, three-dimensional (3D) imaging of biological specimens, providing rich volumetric data for studying cellular organization, pathology, and vascular networks. However, the size, dimensionality, and annotation burden of LSM data make supervised deep learning approaches costly and difficult to scale. Additionally, despite the abundance of unannotated LSM volumes, foundation models for this modality remain underexplored due to computational challenges and the complexity of volumetric representation learning. In this work, we introduce a 3D foundation model for LSM data, pretrained on a large curated collection of 3D images spanning multiple organisms, stains, and imaging protocols. We learn transferable volumetric representations by jointly optimizing for masked reconstruction and image-text alignment. The pretrained backbone drastically reduces the annotation burden, enabling efficient, few-shot adaptation for varied downstream tasks. We evaluate this approach on downstream segmentation, classification, and deblurring. Our results demonstrate consistent improvements over baselines, (1) when measured using standard evaluation metrics and (2) when rigorously assessed by domain experts. This highlights the potential of foundation model pretraining to reduce annotation requirements while improving performance across diverse LSM analysis tasks. Pretrained model weights and code for pretraining and finetuning are publicly available: https://github.com/AdinaScheinfeld/lsm_fm_public_repo.git.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个光片荧光显微镜3D基础模型，通过联合掩码重建和图像-文本对齐预训练，实现少样本分割、分类与去模糊。
light_analysis.motivation: 光片荧光显微镜生成高分辨率3D图像，但数据规模大、维度高、标注成本高昂，导致监督深度学习难以扩展。尽管存在大量未标注的LSM数据，但由于计算挑战和体积表示学习复杂性，基础模型在该模态中仍未充分探索。该研究旨在减少标注负担，提升LSM分析任务的性能。
light_analysis.method: 在涵盖多种生物、染色和成像协议的大规模3D图像数据集上预训练3D基础模型，联合优化掩码重建和图像-文本对齐，学习可迁移的体积表示。预训练骨架显著降低下游任务的标注需求，实现高效少样本适应，并应用于分割、分类和去模糊。
light_analysis.result: 在下游分割、分类和去模糊任务中，该方法在标准评估指标上以及领域专家评估中均一致优于基线方法，证明了预训练基础模型在减少标注需求的同时提升性能的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究展示了基础模型预训练对光片荧光显微镜分析任务的潜力，可大幅减少标注工作并提升多任务性能。作者公开了预训练权重和代码，有利于领域内进一步研究和应用。未来可探索更大规模预训练或更多下游任务。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Detection of Potentially Abusive Clauses in Chilean Terms of Service
abstract: Online Terms of Service often function as contracts of adhesion, creating asymmetries that may expose consumers to potentially abusive clauses. In Chile, assessing such clauses is legally challenging because some provisions clearly violate mandatory consumer law, whereas others depend on broader standards such as good faith and contractual imbalance. We present a retrieval-augmented generation framework for the automated detection and classification of potentially abusive clauses in Chilean Terms of Service. Designed for local execution, it combines efficient clause detection, hybrid dense--sparse retrieval, reranking, and prompt augmentation to support medium-sized open-weight language models. We also introduce the Chilean Abusive Terms of Service Extended corpus, comprising 100 contracts and 10,029 annotated clauses in 24 legally grounded categories spanning illegal, dark, and gray clauses. Experiments comparing commercial and open-weight language models, fine-tuned encoders, and traditional baselines show that retrieval-augmented prompting substantially improves performance and enables local models to approach larger cloud-based systems at lower computational and token cost. The study also contributes a refined legal annotation scheme and a practical design for AI-assisted consumer contract review.

light_analysis.overview: 提出检索增强生成框架，用于自动检测智利服务条款中潜在的滥用条款，提升本地模型的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线服务条款作为附意合同，可能包含对消费者不利的潜在滥用条款。在智利，评估此类条款在法律上具有挑战性，因为部分条款明显违反强制性消费者法，而另一些则依赖于诚信和合同失衡等更广泛的标准。现有方法可能无法有效处理这些复杂情况，且商业云模型成本高、隐私风险大，亟需一种高效、低成本的本地解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出检索增强生成（RAG）框架，结合高效条款检测、混合稠密-稀疏检索、重排序和提示增强，支持中等规模的开权重语言模型本地执行。同时构建了智利滥用服务条款扩展语料库（CATS-E），包含100份合同和10,029条标注条款，涵盖24个法律基础类别（非法、灰色和暗黑条款）。实验对比了商业与开权重模型、微调编码器和传统基线。
light_analysis.result: 检索增强提示显著提升了性能，使本地模型能以更低的计算和令牌成本接近大型云系统的表现。具体效果包括在检测和分类任务上的准确率提升，但摘要未给出精确数值。与传统基线相比，RAG方法在多种模型上均表现出优势，验证了框架的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究不仅提出了一个实用的AI辅助消费者合同审查框架，还贡献了精细的法律标注方案。学术价值在于展示了RAG在特定法律领域的应用潜力，实际应用价值在于降低审查成本、保护消费者权益。未来工作可探索更复杂的检索策略或扩展到其他法域的合同分析。

title: STORM: Internalized Modeling for Spatial-Temporal Reasoning in Video-Language Models
abstract: Many video reasoning tasks require tracking motion, temporal order, and evolving visual states across frames. Existing methods built on large vision-language models (LVLMs) often address this challenge by externalizing reasoning through textual chain-of-thought (CoT), keyframe selection, repeated frame reinsertion, or external tool use. While effective, such pipelines increase inference-time latency and engineering complexity, and they force temporal-visual evidence to be serialized into text or repeatedly re-encoded from frames. Inspired by the intuition that visual reasoning can occur implicitly before verbalization, we propose STORMS (Spatial-Temporal reasOning via inteRnalized Modeling), a two-stage framework that teaches LVLMs to reason through bounded continuous latent trajectories instead of explicit textual CoT. In Stage I, STORMS aligns latent tokens with thought-video representations derived from generated videos, grounding the latent states in dynamic visual evidence. In Stage II, the model is further trained with answer-only supervision, encouraging the reasoning process to be internalized without step-by-step annotations. Generated thought videos are used only during training; at inference, STORMS performs a bounded latent rollout without regenerating videos, reinserting frames, or invoking external visual tools. Experiments on VideoMME, MVBench, TempCompass, and MMVU show that STORMS improves video reasoning accuracy while substantially reducing inference overhead compared with tool or video-generation-based reasoning pipelines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出STORMS框架，通过内部化建模使视频语言模型利用连续潜变量轨迹进行时空推理，替代传统外部化推理方法，提升效率与准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频推理方法依赖文本链式思维、关键帧选择或外部工具等外部化策略，导致推理延迟高、工程复杂，且视觉证据需序列化为文本或重复编码。亟需一种隐式、高效的内部化推理机制，以减少外部依赖并加速推理。
light_analysis.method: 两阶段框架STORMS。阶段一：将潜变量与生成视频中的思考视频表示对齐，锚定动态视觉证据。阶段二：仅用答案监督训练，内化推理过程。推理时执行有界潜变量展开，无需重新生成视频或插入帧。训练使用思考视频，推理零开销。
light_analysis.result: 在VideoMME、MVBench、TempCompass和MMVU基准上，STORMS相比工具或视频生成推理方法，在提升视频推理准确性的同时显著降低推理开销，验证了内部化建模的有效性与效率优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 实现时空推理的内部化建模，减少对外部工具的依赖，降低推理延迟与复杂度。学术上开辟了潜轨迹推理新范式，实际应用中有望加速视频理解。局限性是训练依赖生成视频，未来可探索端到端内部化方法。

title: AdvantageFlow: Advantage-Weighted Least Squares for RL in Flow Models
abstract: We introduce AdvantageFlow, a forward-process reinforcement learning algorithm for rectified flow models. Unlike Flow-GRPO, which optimizes the reverse process, we optimize an advantage-weighted forward-process prediction loss. This optimization problem is unstable when advantages are negative and the loss becomes non-convex. We stabilize it by rollout policy regularization, which reduces variance and arises from fitting a local reward-improving target distribution. We evaluate AdvantageFlow on image generation tasks with Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium. It outperforms both Flow-GRPO and a state-of-the-art forward-process RL baseline based on negative-aware fine-tuning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AdvantageFlow，一种通过优势加权最小二乘和策略正则化稳定整流流模型的前向过程强化学习算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有强化学习方法如Flow-GRPO优化反向过程，而前向过程优化不稳定，尤其在优势为负时损失非凸。为此，需要一种稳定且高效的前向过程RL算法，以提升图像生成等任务的性能。
light_analysis.method: AdvantageFlow优化优势加权前向过程预测损失，并通过rollout策略正则化降低方差，拟合局部奖励改进目标分布。使用Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium进行图像生成实验。
light_analysis.result: 在图像生成任务上，AdvantageFlow优于Flow-GRPO和基于负感知微调的前向过程RL基线，表明其稳定性和有效性。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: AdvantageFlow通过优势加权和策略正则化解决了前向过程RL的不稳定性，为整流流模型提供了更优的训练方法。未来可扩展至更多应用领域并探索正则化策略的改进。

title: Learning in Low-Dimensional Subspaces: Orthogonal Bottlenecks for Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) agents commonly rely on high-dimensional neural representations, despite growing evidence that task-relevant value and policy structure may be intrinsically low-dimensional. In this work, we present a simple yet effective representation-level prior that inserts a fixed orthonormal projection to constrain encoder features to a low-dimensional subspace, requiring no auxiliary objectives, pretraining, or changes to the underlying RL algorithm. Under a linear realizability assumption, we prove that when the bottleneck dimension exceeds the intrinsic rank of the optimal value function in feature space, the bottleneck preserves expressivity and leaves the induced gradient dynamics unchanged up to an equivalent low-dimensional parameterization. Empirically, we find that across both single and multi-task benchmarks, baseline performance is either matched or improved once the bottleneck dimension exceeds a small task-dependent threshold; in many cases, value representations can be compressed to extremely low dimensions without loss, and the minimal sufficient dimension depends far more on environment complexity than encoder width. In addition, we analyze representation geometry and find that orthogonal bottlenecks stabilize feature norms and are associated with higher effective rank. Together, these results support a representation-space interpretation of the manifold hypothesis in reinforcement learning and position orthogonal bottlenecks as a lightweight, architecture-agnostic mechanism for shaping RL representations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出正交瓶颈方法，通过固定正交投影将强化学习编码器特征约束到低维子空间，无需辅助目标或预训练，在理论证明和实验验证下保持或提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度强化学习代理通常依赖高维神经表示，但任务相关的值函数和策略结构可能本质上是低维的。现有方法需要额外目标或修改算法，本文旨在提供一种轻量级、即插即用的表示先验，以利用低维结构而不增加复杂度。
light_analysis.method: 在编码器后插入一个固定的正交归一化投影矩阵，将特征强制映射到低维子空间。在线性可实现假设下，证明当瓶颈维度超过最优值函数的本质秩时，表达能力和梯度动力学保持不变，等价于低维参数化。无需辅助损失、预训练或更改RL算法。
light_analysis.result: 在单任务和多任务基准上，当瓶颈维度超过小阈值时，基线性能匹配或提升；价值表示可压缩至极低维度（如2维）而无损失，最小充分维度更依赖环境复杂度而非编码器宽度。正交瓶颈稳定了特征范数并提高了有效秩。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作从表示空间角度支持了强化学习中的流形假设，并提供了正交瓶颈这一轻量级、架构无关的表示塑造机制。具有理论价值和实践意义，可提高表示效率。未来可探索自适应维度选择或与其他先验结合。

title: Forgotten Words: Benchmarking NeoBERT for Dementia Detection in Low-Resource Conversational Filipino and English Speech
abstract: Dementia detection from spontaneous speech offers a scalable approach to cognitive screening, yet NLP systems remain predominantly English-centric. This limitation is especially acute in the Philippines, where Filipino-English code-switching is pervasive and no prior work has addressed NLP-based dementia detection. We present the first systematic evaluation of transformer-based dementia detection in Filipino speech and the first assessment of NeoBERT in a clinical NLP setting. To separate language from domain effects, we construct a parallel bilingual dataset of 4,000 DementiaBank-derived transcripts, with Filipino translations produced manually to preserve discourse-level markers of cognitive decline. We evaluate five model families, TF-IDF + LogReg, BERT, NeoBERT, XLM-R, and RoBERTa-Tagalog, under monolingual, zero-shot cross-lingual, and bilingual fine-tuning settings. We find that in-domain performance does not transfer across languages, with English-trained BERT dropping to Macro-F1 = 0.455 on Filipino, and that architectural modernization alone does not improve robustness. Bilingual fine-tuning, however, eliminates cross-lingual degradation across all transformer models, converging to Macro-F1 = 0.969-0.973. These results suggest that multilingual clinical NLP performance is driven primarily by linguistic coverage during training rather than model scale or architecture.

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统评估Transformer模型在菲律宾语和英语代码混合语音中的痴呆检测，发现双语微调可消除跨语言性能下降。
light_analysis.motivation: 痴呆检测通过自发语音进行认知筛查具有可扩展性，但现有NLP系统主要面向英语。在菲律宾，菲律宾语-英语代码混合普遍存在，但尚无基于NLP的痴呆检测研究。现有方法在跨语言迁移时性能显著下降，亟需探索多语言临床NLP的鲁棒性提升策略。
light_analysis.method: 构建了包含4,000个DementiaBank衍生转录本的并行双语数据集，手动翻译菲律宾语以保留认知衰退的话语标记。评估五种模型家族：TF-IDF+LogReg、BERT、NeoBERT、XLM-R和RoBERTa-Tagalog，在单语、零样本跨语言和双语微调三种设置下进行实验。双语微调结合了英语和菲律宾语数据。
light_analysis.result: 单语性能不跨语言迁移，英语训练BERT在菲律宾语上Macro-F1仅为0.455。架构现代化（NeoBERT）未提升鲁棒性。但双语微调消除了所有Transformer模型的跨语言退化，使Macro-F1达到0.969-0.973，显著优于单语训练。
light_analysis.conclusion: 表明多语言临床NLP性能主要由训练时的语言覆盖决定，而非模型规模或架构。提供了首个菲律宾语痴呆检测基准，为低资源语言临床NLP研究提供了重要参考。未来可探索更多语言及细粒度分析。

title: MIND: Multi-Scale Intent Diffusion for Text-Driven Physics-Based Humanoid Control
abstract: Enabling physics-based humanoids to execute diverse behaviors from high-level textual commands remains a significant challenge. Existing methods typically follow either a two-stage paradigm that combines kinematic motion generation with physics-based tracking, or an end-to-end imitation-learning paradigm that directly generates actions from text. However, the former suffers from the inherent domain shift between kinematic generation and physics-based tracking, while the latter struggles with the substantial modality gap between textual commands and low-level actions, limiting effective semantic alignment. Notably, humanoid states encode rich motion dynamics that are more semantically aligned with textual descriptions than low-level actions, making them a natural basis for deriving behavioral intent. Building upon this insight, we propose MIND, a novel end-to-end diffusion framework for text-driven physics-based humanoid control that leverages behavioral intent as a semantic bridge between textual commands and low-level actions. At its core, MIND introduces a multi-scale intent diffusion mechanism, where a holistic intent predictor captures global behavioral dynamics to guide overall behavior synthesis, while an immediate intent predictor provides step-wise, fine-grained signals for local behavior refinement at each diffusion step. This hierarchical intent formulation imposes a structured inductive bias for humanoid control, improving semantic alignment and behavioral naturalness. Furthermore, MIND encodes humanoid states into a latent space to enable more effective semantic intent modeling. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MIND outperforms existing methods and synthesizes coherent, physically plausible, and semantically aligned humanoid behaviors from text commands. Our code will be released to facilitate future research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MIND，一种多尺度意图扩散框架，实现文本驱动的物理人形机器人控制，通过意图作为语义桥梁解决模态差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本驱动物理人形控制方法存在领域转移（两阶段法）或模态差距（端到端模仿学习）问题，导致语义对齐效果不佳。人形状态比低级动作与文本描述更语义对齐，因此利用行为意图作为语义桥梁。
light_analysis.method: 提出端到端扩散框架MIND，包含多尺度意图扩散机制：整体意图预测器捕捉全局行为动态，即时意图预测器提供逐步细粒度信号。将人形状态编码至潜在空间以增强语义意图建模，通过分层意图引入结构归纳偏置。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明MIND在语义对齐、行为自然性和物理合理性上优于现有方法，能生成连贯、物理可行的行为。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但整体优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: MIND通过多尺度意图扩散有效桥接文本与低级动作，为文本驱动物理控制提供新范式。代码将开源，促进后续研究。潜在方向：扩展至更复杂文本指令或即时交互场景。

title: MAGIC: Multimodal Alignment & Grounding-aware Instruction Coreset for Vision-Language Models
abstract: Instruction tuning of large vision-language models (LVLMs) increasingly depends on massive multimodal corpora, yet these datasets contain samples with substantial redundancy, low visual dependency, and highly imbalanced coverage of multimodal reasoning behaviors. As a result, uniform subsampling or naive score-based selection often yields suboptimal training subsets. We introduce MAGIC, a training-free, forward-only coreset selection method designed to construct compact yet behaviorally faithful subsets for multimodal instruction tuning. MAGIC is built on three intrinsic signals extracted from a pretrained VLM: Multimodal Gain, which measures the likelihood improvement obtained from visual input; Bridging Relevance, which captures the sharpness of answer-token grounding over visual tokens; and Skill-Neuron Signatures, which characterize the functional computation elicited by each sample via top-activated feed-forward neurons. MAGIC combines these signals in a three-stage pipeline: filtering low-gain examples, ranking candidates by a normalized quality objective, and performing bucket-wise budget allocation over discrete neuron signatures to preserve latent multimodal skill coverage. This formulation avoids backpropagation, auxiliary selector training, and expensive clustering in continuous activation spaces, while remaining efficient and easily deployable in existing VLMs. Across LLaVA-665K and Vision-Flan datasets, and transfer settings to large target models, LLaVA-1.5-7B and -13B, MAGIC consistently improves over strong baselines under matched 20% budgets: it achieves 100.3% relative performance to full finetuning on LLaVA-665K and 101.6% relative performance on Vision-Flan-186K, while yielding a 73.7% reduction in wall-clock run time.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需训练的前向核心集选择方法MAGIC，通过多模态增益、桥接相关性和技能神经元签名三个内在信号构建紧凑指令微调子集，在20%数据上达到甚至超越全量微调性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模多模态指令微调数据存在冗余、低视觉依赖和推理行为分布不均的问题，导致均匀采样或基于分数的选择方法效果欠佳。现有方法依赖反向传播或辅助选择器训练，效率低且适用范围受限。因此，需要一种高效、免训练且能保持行为忠实性的核心集选择方法。
light_analysis.method: MAGIC利用预训练VLM中提取的三个内在信号：多模态增益（衡量视觉输入带来的似然提升）、桥接相关性（捕获答案词对视觉token的注意力锐度）和技能神经元签名（通过前馈神经元激活表征样本功能计算）。采用三级流水线：过滤低增益样本、基于归一化质量目标排序、按神经元签名桶分配预算，避免反向传播和聚类。
light_analysis.result: 在LLaVA-665K和Vision-Flan数据集上，20%预算下MAGIC达到全量微调100.3%和101.6%的相对性能，同时减少73.7%运行时间。在LLaVA-1.5-7B/13B上的迁移设置中一致优于强基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: MAGIC提供了一种高效、免训练的核心集选择方案，显著降低多模态指令微调成本并保持行为覆盖。其基于内在信号的启发式设计具有良好可迁移性，未来可探索更多信号组合及动态预算分配策略。

title: Towards 3D heart mesh generation using contactless radar imaging and physics-informed neural network
abstract: Cardiac function evaluation necessitates continuous, non-invasive monitoring, a capability limited in MRI. Millimeter-wave (mmWave) radar and its Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) mode offer a privacy-preserving and portable point-of-care clinical applications. However, reconstructing high-fidelity 3D cardiac geometry from SAR remains an open challenge. Traditional radar methods generate sparse point clouds that lack continuous surface topology. Meanwhile, direct application of optical reconstruction networks performs poorly due to the severe speckle noise and ambiguous boundaries inherent in SAR images. To bridge this gap, we propose SAR2Mesh, a novel framework that reformulates the task as a coarse-to-fine mesh deformation process. By initializing with a topological template, our approach explicitly preserves anatomical connectivity through progressive mesh deformation.We introduce a geometry-aware feature projection module to extract multi-view features via 3D-to-2D sampling, and a physics-informed radar loss to enforce consistency between the predicted geometry and raw radar echoes. Furthermore, we present Cardiac Mesh-SAR, the first large-scale paired SAR-mesh dataset. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SAR2Mesh significantly outperforms existing image-based baselines, achieving accurate and physically consistent cardiac reconstructions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SAR2Mesh框架，通过粗到细的网格变形过程，利用接触式毫米波雷达SAR图像生成高保真3D心脏网格。
light_analysis.motivation: 心脏功能评估需要连续无创监测，MRI能力有限。毫米波雷达SAR模式提供隐私保护和便携性，但重建高保真3D心脏几何仍是挑战。传统雷达方法生成稀疏点云，缺乏连续表面拓扑；光学重建网络直接应用性能差，由于SAR图像中的严重散斑噪声和模糊边界。
light_analysis.method: 提出SAR2Mesh框架，将任务重构为粗到细的网格变形过程。初始化拓扑模板，通过渐进网格变形保持解剖连接性。引入几何感知特征投影模块，通过3D到2D采样提取多视图特征；设计物理信息雷达损失，强制预测几何与原始雷达回波一致。同时提出首个大尺度配对SAR-网格数据集Cardiac Mesh-SAR。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，SAR2Mesh显著优于现有基于图像的基线方法，实现了准确且物理一致的心脏重建。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调在定性及定量上超过对比方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAR2Mesh成功将SAR图像转化为高质量3D心脏网格，为无创心脏监测提供新方法。结合物理信息损失确保几何真实性，数据集促进后续研究。未来可探索实时应用及多模态融合。

title: AI-Assisted Systematization for Evaluating GenAI Systems
abstract: Evaluating generative AI (GenAI) systems is challenging because many targets of evaluation are broad, contested concepts, such as "reasoning," "fairness," or "creativity." When these concepts are left underspecified, it becomes unclear what should be measured or how evaluation results should be interpreted. This problem reflects a missing step: systematization, that is, moving from a broad background concept to an explicit, structured account of the concept in measurable terms. To help address the fact that systematization is cognitively demanding and resource-intensive, we investigate whether AI assistance can support this process. To enable AI-assisted systematization and assess its quality, we introduce a structured representation of a systematized concept, a concept spec, and a validation worksheet. We then develop two AI-assisted systematizers: a direct, zero-shot approach and a multi-agent approach that more closely mirrors manual systematization approaches from existing literature. We use these systematizers to produce concept specs for two concepts -- hate-based rhetoric and digital empathy -- and evaluate resulting concept specs on content validity and information recoverability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AI辅助系统化方法，通过概念规范和验证工作表，帮助将模糊概念转化为可测量术语，以改进生成式AI系统评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 评估生成式AI系统面临挑战，因为许多评估目标（如推理、公平性、创造力）是宽泛且有争议的概念。当这些概念未被充分明确时，不清楚应测量什么或如何解读评估结果。这反映了系统化步骤的缺失，即从宽泛背景概念转向明确、结构化的可测量概念。然而，系统化对认知和资源要求高，因此研究AI辅助是否支持该过程。
light_analysis.method: 引入概念规范（concept spec）和验证工作表作为结构化表示。开发两种AI辅助系统化工具：直接零样本方法和多智能体方法，后者更贴近文献中的手动系统化。使用这些工具为两个概念（仇恨言论和数字同理心）生成概念规范，并从内容效度和信息可恢复性评估结果。
light_analysis.result: 通过概念规范对仇恨言论和数字同理心进行系统化，评估内容效度（概念规范是否准确反映概念）和信息可恢复性（能否从规范中重建原始概念）。摘要未明确说明具体数值结果，但方法可行且评估框架有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: AI辅助系统化有望降低手工定义评估概念的成本，提高评估的明确性和可重复性。该工作为生成式AI评估提供了结构化方法论，尤其适用于模糊概念。未来可扩展至更多概念并优化多智能体协作机制。

title: Causal methods for LLM development and evaluation
abstract: Large language model (LLM) development is currently driven by large-scale empirical iteration over data mixtures, reward models, routing strategies, and evaluation pipelines. Here, we argue that many central questions in LLM development and evaluation are inherently causal: What is the effect of adding a data domain during pretraining? How do annotator preferences change when LLMs generate text in a different style? Should a prompt be routed to a larger or smaller model given inference cost constraints? In general, causal methods are well-suited to such settings where interventions change outcomes but, surprisingly, are underrepresented in LLM development. Our contribution is threefold: (1) We explain how causal methods can help develop modern LLM development and evaluation: LLM development relies heavily on logged data, which are often subject to confounding and distribution shifts; evaluation uses learned but potentially biased judges; and deployment environments are non-stationary. These conditions make purely predictive approaches fragile and create opportunities for principled identification and estimation methods from causal inference. (2) We further map opportunities for causal methods in the entire LLM development pipeline, including pretraining, alignment, routing, agentic workflows, and evaluation. (3) We discuss new research opportunities around leveraging causal methods for LLM development and evaluation. Overall, we argue that causal methods are potentially underutilized for the LLM development and evaluation pipeline, despite the fact that such methods can ensure a reliable and scientifically grounded design.

light_analysis.overview: 本文论证了因果推断方法在LLM开发和评估中的关键作用，并系统性地映射了其应用机会。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM开发依赖于大规模经验迭代，但数据混杂、分布偏移、评估偏差和部署环境非平稳性使得纯预测方法脆弱。这些实际挑战迫切需要因果推断方法来稳健地识别和估计因果效应，然而因果方法在LLM领域尚未得到充分重视。
light_analysis.method: 本文通过三个层次展开：首先阐明日志数据中的混杂、有偏评估和非平稳环境的因果挑战；其次系统性地梳理因果方法在预训练、对齐、路由、代理工作流及评估各环节的潜在应用场景；最后指出未来研究方向，如利用因果结构进行可控生成或反事实推理。
light_analysis.result: 论文目前为概念性框架，未提供具体实验数据。但其论证基于对现行LLM开发局限性的深入分析，明确了因果方法可提升数据利用效率、评估公正性和部署鲁棒性，为后续实证研究奠定理论基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献在于将因果推断视角系统引入LLM全流程，为开发更稳健和可解释的模型提供了方法论支撑。尽管尚无实证结果，但其理论框架对指导未来LLM研究具有重要价值，特别是促进从关联到因果的转变。局限性在于缺乏具体算法和实验验证，后续可探索因果效应估计在数据配比、奖励模型设计等场景的应用。

title: Deployment-complete benchmarking
abstract: Benchmarks increasingly guide deployment, procurement and scientific screening, yet a score supports only the response it records, not necessarily the deployment action. We introduce deployment-complete benchmarking, which tests whether benchmark evidence determines a deployment action. A benchmark is complete for a claim exactly when the action is constant on each evidence fiber; mixed fibers expose missing deployment information, and completion curves quantify the evidence required to resolve ambiguity. In controlled response spaces, benchmark-channel conformal coverage of 94.98% transferred poorly to an unmeasured deployment channel (10.07%), whereas response-rank intervals achieved 94.91% coverage; even zero benchmark error certified only 45.4% of candidates at the largest residual size. Public audits revealed incompleteness, including 97.9% mixed Tox21 fibers and zero median certifiable fraction in main Matbench and JARVIS audits. In held-out replays, certify-then-acquire reduced false decisions from 1.19% to 0.027% in Tox21 and from 20.3% to 0.128% in JARVIS, while changing model choice and identifying deployment-relevant probes. Deployment-ready benchmarks should report evidence, supported actions, ambiguity and completion cost rather than scores alone.
comment: 33 pages, 5 figures, 1 table; supplementary tables and code available

light_analysis.overview: 提出部署完备基准测试框架，通过证据纤维和完备性曲线量化基准测试与部署行动之间的不匹配，确保基准证据能决定正确的部署动作。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前基准测试的分数仅反映记录的响应，并不一定能指导正确的部署行动。实际中，不同模型在基准上表现相似但在部署任务中差异巨大，导致决策失误。现有方法缺乏对基准证据与部署行动一致性的系统评估，无法量化歧义和缺失信息。本研究旨在填补这一空白，提出一个完备性检验框架。
light_analysis.method: 引入部署完备基准测试，定义证据纤维和完备性曲线。使用保形预测和响应排序区间等统计方法，在Tox21、Matbench、JARVIS数据集上进行审计。通过公共审计发现混合纤维比例，并采用certify-then-acquire策略减少错误决策，同时改变模型选择并识别部署相关探针。
light_analysis.result: 基准-通道保形覆盖转移时，覆盖率从94.98%降至10.07%，而响应排序区间保持94.91%覆盖。零基准误差仅认证45.4%候选。Tox21中97.9%纤维混合，Matbench和JARVIS中位数可认证分数为零。certify-then-acquire策略将Tox21的错误决策率从1.19%降至0.027%，JARVIS从20.3%降至0.128%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明，仅依靠分数不足以评估部署决策，需报告证据、支持行动、歧义和完成成本。该框架提升了模型选择的可靠性，并识别部署相关探针。未来基准应融入完备性指标，以减少不匹配导致的部署风险。

title: Fuzzy PyTorch: Rapid Numerical Variability Evaluation for Deep Learning Models
abstract: We introduce Fuzzy PyTorch, a framework for rapid evaluation of numerical variability in deep learning (DL) models. As DL is increasingly applied to diverse tasks, understanding variability from floating-point arithmetic is essential to ensure robust and reliable performance. Tools assessing such variability must be scalable, efficient, and integrate seamlessly with existing frameworks while minimizing code modifications. Fuzzy PyTorch enables this by integrating stochastic arithmetic into PyTorch through Probabilistic Rounding with Instruction Set Management, a novel library interfacing with Verificarlo, a numerical analysis compiler. The library offers stochastic rounding mode and a novel mode; up-down rounding. Comparative evaluations show Fuzzy PyTorch maintains model performance and achieves runtime reductions of 5x to 60x versus Verrou, a state-of-the-art tool. We further demonstrate scalability by running models from 1 to 341 million parameters, confirming applicability across small and large DL architectures. Overall, Fuzzy PyTorch provides an efficient, scalable, and practical solution for assessing numerical variability in deep learning, enabling researchers and practitioners to quantify and manage floating-point uncertainty without compromising performance or computational efficiency.
comment: 19 pages, 8 figures, Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (01/2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出Fuzzy PyTorch框架，通过随机算术快速评估深度学习模型中的数值变异性。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习模型在多种任务中广泛应用，浮点数运算带来的数值变异性影响模型的鲁棒性和可靠性。现有评估工具如Verrou等存在效率低、难以集成、代码修改量大等问题，无法满足大规模模型的快速评估需求。
light_analysis.method: Fuzzy PyTorch通过概率舍入与指令集管理将随机算术集成到PyTorch，并利用与Verificarlo编译器的接口实现数值变异性分析。提供了随机舍入模式以及新颖的上下舍入模式，无需大量代码修改即可无缝接入现有工作流。
light_analysis.result: 与基准工具Verrou相比，Fuzzy PyTorch在保持模型性能的前提下实现了5倍至60倍的运行时间加速。在1百万到3.41亿参数规模的模型上均验证了可扩展性，覆盖小至大架构的深度学习模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: Fuzzy PyTorch提供了一种高效、可扩展且实用的解决方案，用于评估深度学习中的数值变异性。研究人员和从业者可以量化和管理浮点不确定性，同时不牺牲性能或计算效率。

title: What Makes a Medical Checker Trainable? Diagnosing Signal Collapse and Reward Hacking in Checker-Guided RAG for Biomedical QA
abstract: Medical RAG needs evidence-grounded claims, so plugging a claim-level NLI checker into retrieval-augmented RL is intuitive. \textbf{We find that the checker's \emph{output distribution} during training, not its held-out accuracy, decides whether it provides trainable gradient.} We compare four NLI checker back-ends as process rewards inside a GRPO-trained medical RAG agent (Qwen2.5-7B, replicated on Qwen3-4B and Llama-3.1-8B) across four held-out medical QA benchmarks. Three diagnostic findings emerge. \textbf{(i)} Signal collapse is log-prob-specific: LLM log-probability scoring labels over 97\% of claims neutral -- collapsing the RL gradient to zero -- while a calibrated MedNLI classifier scores the same pairs non-degenerately. \textbf{(ii)} Moderate signal beats strong signal on answer quality: a strong proprietary checker triggers a three-step reward-hacking cascade -- ultra-short answers, search avoidance, language collapse -- so a moderate-signal local classifier trains a higher-quality model (\textbf{+12\% BERTScore over zero-shot, no GPT dependency}). \textbf{(iii)} Signal strength is policy-dependent: the same checker registers as moderate on one policy but strong on another without triggering the cascade end-state. We frame these as boundary conditions for verifier-as-reward systems.

light_analysis.overview: 发现医疗RAG中NLI检查器的输出分布而非准确率决定强化学习可训练性，诊断出信号崩塌与奖励篡改现象，提出中等信号优于强信号的结论。
light_analysis.motivation: 医疗RAG需要证据支持的答案，直觉上在检索增强RL中接入声明级NLI检查器。然而现有方法未考虑检查器的输出分布对训练的影响，仅关注准确率。实际中发现高准确率检查器可能导致梯度崩溃或奖励篡改，亟需诊断影响可训练性的关键因素。
light_analysis.method: 对比四种NLI检查器（包括LLM对数概率打分、MedNLI分类器、强专有检查器等）作为GRPO训练的奖励函数，基模型为Qwen2.5-7B，并在Qwen3-4B和Llama-3.1-8B上复现。在四个医疗QA基准上诊断三种现象：信号崩塌（对数概率打分使97%以上声明中性）、奖励篡改级联（强检查器导致短答案/搜索回避/语言崩溃）、信号强度策略依赖性。
light_analysis.result: 中等信号的本地分类器（如MedNLI）训练出更高质量的模型，相较零样本提升12% BERTScore，且不依赖GPT。强专有检查器触发三步奖励篡改级联，导致性能下降。信号强度与策略相关，同一检查器在不同策略上表现不同，但未必触发崩溃。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了检查器输出分布而非准确率是RL可训练性的关键因素，定义了验证器-奖励系统的边界条件。研究为医疗RAG中的奖励设计提供新视角，表明中等信号优于强信号可避免奖励篡改，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更鲁棒的正则化方法。

title: Neural Scalable Symbolic Search Framework for Complex Logical Queries with Multiple Free Variables
abstract: Complex Query Answering (CQA) is a fundamental knowledge representation and reasoning task over incomplete knowledge graphs (KGs). Answering existential first-order queries with $k$ free variables (i.e., $\text{EFO}_k$ queries) is a crucial yet challenging problem, as it requires ranking answer tuples in $\mathcal{E}^k$, where $\mathcal{E}$ denotes the entity set of a KG. This quickly becomes intractable as $k$ grows. Consequently, existing benchmarks and methods rely on marginal rankings over individual variables; however, marginal rankings are a poor proxy for the true joint ranking of tuples. Building on neural symbolic search for $\text{EFO}_1$ queries, we propose Neural Scalable Symbolic Search (NS3), a budgeted framework that approximates joint ranking without enumerating $\mathcal{E}^k$. NS3 (i) answers marginalized sub-queries to obtain necessary candidate sets, (ii) merges multiple free variables into hypernodes whose domains are pruned and controlled by a dynamic budget $B$, and (iii) progressively reduces an $\text{EFO}_k$ query to an $\text{EFO}_{k-1}$ query over a budgeted reduced domain. Across three standard KG datasets, NS3 substantially improves joint ranking performance while retaining strong marginal accuracy. We further release a joint-ranking benchmark that extends existing $\text{EFO}_1$ datasets to $k=3$, enabling systematic evaluation of multi-variable queries. Our code is provided in https://github.com/HKUST-KnowComp/NS3_KDD2026.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NS3框架，通过预算约束的神经符号搜索，高效近似多变量复杂逻辑查询的联合排名。
light_analysis.motivation: 知识图谱上回答带多个自由变量的复杂逻辑查询（EFO_k）是重要但困难的任务，因候选答案组合数随k指数增长。现有方法依赖边际排名替代联合排名，导致信息丢失和性能下降。迫切需要一种能高效近似联合排名的方法。
light_analysis.method: NS3框架包含三步：(i)回答边际化子查询获取候选集；(ii)合并多自由变量为超节点，用动态预算B剪枝域；(iii)逐步将EFO_k查询降为EFO_{k-1}查询。该方法结合神经和符号搜索，在不枚举全部组合的情况下逼近联合排名。
light_analysis.result: 在三个标准知识图谱数据集上，NS3在联合排名性能上显著优于基线，同时保持强边际排名准确率。此外，发布了将现有EFO_1数据集扩展到k=3的联合排名基准，支持系统评估多变量查询。
light_analysis.conclusion: NS3有效解决了多变量逻辑查询的联合排名问题，具有学术价值（提供新基准和可扩展框架）和实际应用价值（提升知识图谱问答准确性）。未来可研究更高效的预算分配策略或扩展到更复杂的查询形式。

title: SafeCtrl-RL: Inference-Time Adaptive Behaviour Control for LLM Dialogue via RL-Driven Prompt Optimisation
abstract: Ensuring safe and contextually appropriate behaviour in Large Language Models (LLMs) remains a critical challenge for real-world deployment. We present \textbf{SafeCtrl-RL}, an inference-time behavioural control framework that enables adaptive safety regulation without model retraining or parameter modification. The method formulates dialogue generation as a sequential decision process, where a reinforcement learning agent dynamically selects prompt adjustment strategies based on contextual feedback. This allows unsafe behaviours to be suppressed through iterative refinement, which we conceptualise as inference-time behavioural unlearning. Evaluated across multiple LLMs and unsafe dialogue scenarios, SafeCtrl-RL consistently improves safety and response quality, outperforms existing prompt-based optimisation methods, and achieves favourable performance--efficiency trade-offs. **Warning: This paper may contain examples of harmful language, and reader discretion is recommended.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 SafeCtrl-RL，一种推理时自适应行为控制框架，通过强化学习驱动的提示优化，无需重新训练即可动态调节 LLM 对话安全性。
light_analysis.motivation: 确保 LLM 在实际部署中的安全性和上下文适当行为是关键挑战。现有方法常需重训练或修改参数，缺乏灵活性和效率。因此需要一种不修改模型参数、能在推理时动态调整行为的轻量级安全控制方法。
light_analysis.method: 将对话生成建模为序列决策过程，强化学习代理根据上下文反馈动态选择 prompt 调整策略。通过迭代精炼抑制不安全行为，实现推理时的行为遗忘。无需修改 LLM 参数，仅优化输入 prompt，适用于多种模型和场景。
light_analysis.result: 在多个 LLM 和不安全对话场景下评估，SafeCtrl-RL 持续提升安全性和响应质量，优于现有 prompt 优化方法，并在性能与效率之间取得良好平衡。具体提升指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种高效、灵活的推理时安全控制框架，无需重新训练即可增强 LLM 对话安全性，具有实际部署价值。未来可探索更复杂的 RL 策略或扩展到多模态任务，但本文未讨论潜在局限性。

title: When Do LLM Agents Treat Surface Noise Differently from Semantic Noise? A 68-Cell Measurement Study with a Held-Out Trace-Level Validation
abstract: We document an empirical phenomenon in chain-of-thought and ReAct agents driven by ten large language models from seven architecture families: meaning-bearing perturbations (e.g., paraphrase, synonym) alter final answers more often than presentation perturbations (e.g., formatting, reordering) of comparable severity. Across 68 cells spanning GSM8K, MATH, and HotpotQA (1,530 originals and $\sim$11,150 variants), the inconsistency gap averages +19.69 pp after severity matching (paired $t=9.58$, $p<0.0001$), with 64/68 cells positive. The gap survives four severity-proxy audits and remains significant when excluding qwen models (+11.10 pp, $p<0.0001$). Several stress tests fail honestly: cluster-bootstrap significance disappears under stricter assumptions, tractability contrasts do not replicate, cross-architecture generator swaps break per-cell rankings, and a second LLM judge yields only moderate agreement ($κ=0.50$).   We then validate the headline effect on a fully held-out 11th model (qwen2.5-14B-Instruct; 1,800 trajectories) and re-test a pre-registered capability$\times$tractability partition, observing a small but positive held-out effect (3/4 cells positive; pooled Welch $t=3.81$, $p=9.6\times10^{-4}$). Using held-out trajectories, we probe four trace-level mechanism signals. Two prior mechanism claims fail to replicate and are explicitly retracted. Two new probes instead support a \emph{stealth-divergence} picture: semantic perturbations often preserve the first action but induce divergence in intermediate reasoning from later steps onward, accompanied by slightly deeper trajectories. We position this as a measurement contribution with held-out replication and a partial trace-level account of how semantic perturbations propagate through agent reasoning. Code, perturbation corpus, raw trajectories, and analysis scripts are released anonymously for review.

light_analysis.overview: 发现LLM代理对语义噪声比表面噪声更敏感，通过68细胞测量和held-out验证，提出隐形发散机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究未系统区分LLM代理对表面噪声（如格式、重排序）与语义噪声（如释义、同义词）的不同敏感性。理解这种差异对评估代理鲁棒性至关重要，但缺乏大规模、结构化的实证测量和机制解释。本文旨在填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 使用7个架构家族的10个LLM，在GSM8K、MATH、HotpotQA上构建68个细胞（1530个原始问题，约11150个变体）。通过严重性匹配比较表面和语义扰动对最终答案的影响。使用四类严重性代理审计和多种压力测试验证结果。最后在held-out模型（qwen2.5-14B-Instruct）上验证，并分析轨迹级机制信号，提出隐形发散假说。
light_analysis.result: 语义扰动导致答案变化的比例比表面扰动平均高19.69个百分点（配对t=9.58，p<0.0001），64/68细胞为正。该差距在排除qwen模型后仍显著（+11.10 pp，p<0.0001）。压力测试中，集群bootstrap在某些假设下不再显著，交叉架构生成器交换破坏排序，第二LLM判断一致性中等（κ=0.50）。held-out验证中3/4细胞为正，Welch t=3.81，p=9.6×10^{-4}。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提供了LLM代理对语义噪声敏感性更高的系统性测量证据，并通过held-out复制和轨迹分析揭示了隐形发散机制：语义扰动常保留第一步但后期推理发散，轨迹加深。该工作贡献了可复现的测量方法和对代理推理鲁棒性的理解。未来可探索其他扰动类型和更复杂的代理架构。

title: LLaVA-OneVision-2: Towards Next-Generation Perceptual Intelligence
abstract: We introduce LLaVA-OneVision-2 (LLaVA-OV-2), the most capable vision-language model in the LLaVA-OneVision series to date, achieving superior performance across a broad range of multimodal benchmarks. The model builds on a native OneVision-Encoder and incorporates Windowed Attention for efficient local computation while maintaining native resolution. Its key advance is codec-stream tokenization: it treats compressed video as a continuous bit-cost stream, where bit-cost dynamics determine adaptive temporal groups, and motion-residual cues select salient spatial evidence into compact visual canvases. This allocation concentrates a limited token budget on event-bearing content, enabling more stable long-video token compression than fixed groups of pictures. A shared 3D RoPE further places codec canvases, sampled frames, and images in a unified spatiotemporal coordinate system. Furthermore, we build the LLaVA-OV-2 data and training stack around large-scale open supervision: approximately 8M re-captioned video samples for pretraining, a 4M-sample spatial corpus for fine-tuning. We also introduce JumpScore, a temporal-localization benchmark targeting fine-grained grounding in high-frequency, densely repeated motion, a regime underrepresented by existing video evaluations. A standout capability of LLaVA-OV-2 is its unified perception across video understanding, temporal grounding, spatial grounding, and manipulation-trace reasoning. On JumpScore, LLaVA-OneVision-2-8B reaches 74.9 JumpScore mAP, surpassing Qwen3-VL-8B (30.1) by +44.8 points; under matched visual-token budgets on the same benchmark, codec-stream inputs improve temporal grounding over frame sampling by +9.7 points. Across standard benchmarks, LLaVA-OneVision-2-8B further outperforms Qwen3-VL-8B by +4.3 average points on video tasks, +5.3 on spatial tasks, and +15.6 average J&F on tracking tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出codec-stream tokenization方法，将压缩视频视为连续比特流，自适应分配token，实现高效长视频理解，在多个基准上取得领先性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在长视频理解中面临token预算有限、固定分组压缩效率低的问题，难以处理高频率密集重复运动场景。该研究旨在通过自适应token分配，集中资源于事件关键内容，提升长视频理解的效率与准确性。
light_analysis.method: 基于OneVision-Encoder和Windowed Attention，核心创新为codec-stream tokenization：将压缩视频视为连续比特流，利用比特成本动态形成自适应时间组，并通过运动残差线索选择显著空间证据，构建紧凑视觉画布。引入共享3D RoPE统一画布、帧和图像坐标。使用约8M视频样本预训练、4M空间样本微调。
light_analysis.result: 在JumpScore基准上，LLaVA-OV-2-8B达到74.9 mAP，超越Qwen3-VL-8B（30.1）44.8点；同token预算下，codec-stream较帧采样提升9.7点。标准基准上，视频任务平均+4.3，空间任务+5.3，跟踪任务+15.6 J&F。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLaVA-OV-2实现了视频理解、时空定位与跟踪的统一感知，性能显著领先，证明codec-stream tokenization在长视频任务中的有效性。未来工作可探索更高效的token分配策略及扩展到更多模态。

title: Creative Quality Alignment: Expert Tacit Knowledge Transfer via Chain-of-Thought Fine-Tuning
abstract: This paper provides an empirical implementation of the creative quality metric proposed in Calibrated Surprise (Zou & Xu, 2026a). The question this paper addresses is: does this mathematical claim hold at the engineering level?   To make the answer as general as possible, we deliberately choose the strictest engineering conditions: low data cost and a small base model. Training data comes from approximately 100 expert chain-of-thought (CoT) annotations produced by the BC Protocol (Zou & Xu, 2026b).   We also identify a data bias: most publicly available alignment datasets are skewed toward craft-related knowledge, while audience modeling and reality-logic coverage are systematically weak.   We use the term Creative Quality Alignment (CQA) to describe this class of engineering methods. We also offer a supporting theoretical observation: in an LLM with a single conditional distribution architecture, calibrating the appreciation side automatically transfers to the generation side via architectural duality. This is the structural reason why ~100 CoT examples are sufficient -- not a purely empirical observation like LIMA (Zhou et al., 2023).

light_analysis.overview: 论文通过链式思维微调实现专家隐性知识转移，验证了校准惊奇度量在低数据成本和小模型下的工程可行性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有对齐数据集偏向工艺知识，缺乏受众建模和现实逻辑覆盖，导致创意质量难以保障。需要一种低成本方法，将专家隐性知识有效转移到LLM，实现创意质量对齐，同时验证理论度量在实际工程中的有效性。
light_analysis.method: 基于约100个专家链式思维注释（BC协议），在低数据成本和小基础模型上微调。利用架构对偶性：在单条件分布架构的LLM中，校准欣赏侧自动转移至生成侧，这是少量样本有效的结构原因，而非纯经验现象。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但声称在低数据成本和小模型条件下，约100个思维链示例即可实现创意质量对齐，且该结论有理论支撑，区别于LIMA的纯经验观察。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文实证实现了创意质量度量，提出了创意质量对齐方法，理论上解释了少量样本有效的结构原因。该方法有助于将专家隐性知识低成本迁移至LLM，但实际效果和通用性需进一步验证。

title: Anticipate and Learn: Unleashing Idle-Time Compute in Proactive Agents
abstract: While AI agents demonstrate remarkable capabilities in reasoning and tool use, they remain fundamentally reactive: they compute responses only after explicit user prompts. This paradigm ignores a critical opportunity: the idle time between interactions is largely wasted, leaving agents unable to prepare for future user needs. To bridge this gap, we introduce ProAct, a proactive agent architecture that leverages idle-time compute to anticipate and fulfill likely upcoming user needs. By analyzing evolving dialogue history together with persistent memory, ProAct predicts upcoming needs and iteratively acquires information, allowing the agent to resolve knowledge gaps and prepare evidence before the user initiates a query.To rigorously evaluate proactive capabilities, we also introduce ProActEval, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 200 scenarios across 40 domains, featuring predictable need chains and diverse user cognitive profiles. Empirical results demonstrate significant advantages over reactive baselines. ProAct accelerates task completion by reducing required turns by 14.8%, decreases user effort by 11.7%, and cuts hallucination rates by 28.1% on ProActEval. Furthermore, MemBench evaluations confirm that ProAct achieves state-of-the-art reflective accuracy, underscoring its sustained and robust performance.
comment: 26 pages, 4 figures; code available at https://github.com/AgentACE-AI/ProAct

light_analysis.overview: 提出ProAct架构，利用空闲时间主动预测并满足用户需求，同时构建ProActEval基准验证其有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI代理仅在用户提示后做出反应，浪费了交互间的空闲时间，无法为未来用户需求做准备。这种被动模式限制了代理的效率和用户满意度，亟需一种能主动预测并提前行动的架构来弥补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: ProAct架构通过分析对话历史和持久记忆，主动预测用户可能的需求，并在空闲时间迭代获取信息以消除知识缺口。评估采用包含200个场景、40个领域的ProActEval基准，覆盖多种预测性需求链和用户认知特征。
light_analysis.result: 在ProActEval上，ProAct相比反应式基线减少14.8%的任务交互轮次，降低11.7%的用户操作负担，并减少28.1%的幻觉率。在MemBench评估中，ProAct实现了最先进的反思准确率，展现了持续稳定的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: ProAct通过主动利用空闲计算，显著提升了代理的效率和可靠性，为从反应式向主动式代理的转变奠定了基础。未来可探索更复杂的预测模型和跨领域泛化能力，但当前工作已展示了巨大的应用潜力。

title: PathWISE: Multi-Agent Cancer Pathway Triaging Ontology Learning from Clinical Flowcharts
abstract: Clinical pathways are disseminated as visual flowcharts where spatial topology, arrow direction, colour coding, and font weight encode critical triage logic that remains inaccessible to computational systems. We present PathWISE, a five-phase pipeline combining four LLM-based agents with a deterministic depth-first search auditor and a Java compiler critic, transforming these non-computable artefacts into validated, executable HL7 Clinical Quality Language (CQL) libraries deployable as FHIR CDS Hooks services. Purpose-built agents extract flowchart structure into a typed directed graph, perform deterministic path enumeration, conduct a structured semantic audit of every node's computability, generate terminology-constrained CQL definitions verified by the official Java CQL-to-ELM compiler, and produce routing logic covering 100% of enumerated patient journeys. Demonstrated across five UK NHS cancer pathways (colorectal, lung, skin, upper GI, and breast), PathWISE audits up to 183 nodes (182 under the Hybrid configuration), identifies 544 structured governance findings across four issue categories, achieves 100% syntactic compilation success, with UNCOMPUTABLE nodes receiving false placeholders that preserve compilability while surfacing governance gaps for clinical review, and produces zero hallucinated terminology codes for dictionary-covered concepts. Critically, PathWISE confines non-deterministic LLM inference to knowledge extraction while deterministic graph mathematics and a standard compiler underpin every verification step.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PathWISE多智能体流水线，将临床流程图转化为可执行的CQL库，实现癌症分诊路径的自动化本体学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床路径以视觉流程图形式传播，其空间拓扑、箭头方向、颜色编码和字体样式编码了关键分诊逻辑，但这些逻辑无法被计算系统访问。现有方法无法直接处理非计算性图表，导致临床决策支持系统难以集成这些路径知识，且缺乏自动化的结构审计和验证手段。
light_analysis.method: PathWISE采用五阶段流水线，结合四个基于LLM的智能体、确定性深度优先搜索审计器和Java编译器批评器。智能体将流程图提取为类型有向图，进行确定性路径枚举，执行结构化语义审计以评估每个节点的可计算性，生成受术语约束的CQL定义并通过官方Java CQL-to-ELM编译器验证，最终产生覆盖100%枚举患者旅程的路由逻辑。
light_analysis.result: 在五种英国NHS癌症路径（结直肠、肺、皮肤、上消化道和乳腺）上，PathWISE审计多达183个节点（混合配置下182个），识别544个结构化治理发现（四个类别），实现100%语法编译成功率。不可计算节点被赋予虚假占位符以保持可编译性，同时暴露治理差距供临床审查，且未产生字典覆盖概念的任何幻觉术语代码。
light_analysis.conclusion: PathWISE将非确定性LLM推理限制在知识提取中，而确定性图数学和标准编译器支撑每个验证步骤，实现了从非计算性流程图到可执行医疗决策服务的可靠转化。该方法提升了临床路径的数字化治理水平，具有实际临床应用价值，未来可扩展至更多路径类型。

title: Triplet-Block Diffusion RWKV
abstract: Causal Transformer language models suffer from strictly sequential decoding and a quadratic per-step attention cost. While linear-time causal models and discrete diffusion models each address these weaknesses, their integration remains inherently inconsistent: diffusion requires bidirectional attention, while causal models are unidirectional. To unify these architectures, we propose $B^3D-RWKV$, a diffusion RWKV variant that integrates the model's $O(L)$ inference efficiency with parallel, bidirectional discrete-diffusion through a \emph{triplet-block layout} method. $B^3D-RWKV-7.2B$ reaches comparable accuracy on an 8-task suite versus existing models while significantly outperforming baselines in decoding throughput with an average of $\mathbf{1.6\times}$ speedup.

light_analysis.overview: 提出B3D-RWKV，通过triplet-block布局融合RWKV的线性推理效率与双向离散扩散，实现高效并行解码。
light_analysis.motivation: 因果Transformer语言模型存在严格顺序解码和二次注意力成本的问题。线性时间因果模型和离散扩散模型分别解决了部分问题，但二者集成存在根本矛盾：扩散需要双向注意力，而因果模型是单向的。因此需要一种统一架构来同时利用两者的优势。
light_analysis.method: 提出B3D-RWKV，一种基于RWKV的变体，采用triplet-block布局方法，将RWKV的O(L)推理效率与并行、双向离散扩散相结合。该模型在保持线性计算复杂度的同时，实现了双向注意力机制，使得离散扩散可以并行进行。模型规模为7.2B参数。
light_analysis.result: 在包含8个任务的套件上，B3D-RWKV-7.2B达到了与现有模型相当的准确率，同时在解码吞吐量上显著优于基线，平均加速1.6倍。摘要未给出具体准确率数值或详细对比基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作成功统一了线性因果模型和离散扩散模型，展示了在保持高效推理的同时实现并行双向扩散的可行性。这为构建更高效的语言模型提供了新思路，但摘要未提及局限性或未来方向。

title: Context-driven Missing-Modality Learning for Robust Medical Diagnosis with Image-Tabular Data
abstract: While multimodal data integrating diverse imaging and clinical tabular records is crucial for accurate medical diagnosis, the arbitrary absence of specific modalities is prevalent in clinical practice, severely degrading the performance of multimodal models. Existing methods either discard missing modalities, leading to information loss, or struggle to synthesize them without capturing complex inter-modal dependencies. To address these limitations, we propose a novel Context-driven Missing-Modality Learning (CMML) framework, which sequentially performs modality synthesis and semantic alignment to achieve robust diagnosis under arbitrary missing conditions. Specifically, we design a Cascade Residual Transformer-based Autoencoder (CRTA) that leverages learnable context tokens acting as dataset-level semantic prior to capture inter-modal dependencies and synthesize key missing representations. These representations are further enriched by modality-specific memory banks. To resolve the discrepancy between original available and synthesized representations, we transform the learned context tokens into instance-adaptive semantic references by infusing multimodal representations from the CRTA's outputs. This reference guides the alignment of heterogeneous modality representations into a unified space, where class-aware contrastive refinement is finally applied to explore discriminative diagnostic cues. Extensive evaluations on skin lesion (Derm7pt), ocular disease (ODIR), and meningioma (MEN) datasets demonstrate that CMML significantly outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods, yielding AVG AUC improvements of 1.26%, 0.97%, and 1.32%, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出上下文驱动的缺失模态学习框架(CMML)，通过级联残差Transformer自编码器和语义对齐，实现任意模态缺失下的鲁棒医学诊断。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态数据对医学诊断至关重要，但临床实践中特定模态的缺失普遍存在，严重降低多模态模型性能。现有方法要么丢弃缺失模态导致信息损失，要么难以在捕获复杂模态间依赖关系的情况下合成缺失模态。因此需要一种能有效处理任意缺失条件、保留模态间交互信息的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出CMML框架，包含两个阶段：模态合成和语义对齐。模态合成采用级联残差Transformer自编码器(CRTA)，利用可学习上下文令牌作为数据集级语义先验，捕获模态间依赖并合成关键缺失表示，再通过模态特定记忆库增强。语义对齐将上下文令牌转换为实例自适应语义参考，注入CRTA输出的多模态表示，指导异质模态表示对齐到统一空间，最后使用类别感知对比精炼探索判别性诊断线索。
light_analysis.result: 在皮肤病变(Derm7pt)、眼病(ODIR)和脑膜瘤(MEN)三个数据集上，CMML显著优于现有最先进方法，平均AUC分别提升1.26%、0.97%和1.32%。实验证明了框架在多种医学诊断任务中的鲁棒性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CMML通过结合模态合成与语义对齐，有效解决了多模态医学诊断中模态缺失问题，提升了模型鲁棒性。其创新在于利用上下文令牌捕获全局先验并指导对齐，具有广泛的临床应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的模态交互和更高效的合成机制。

title: Hidden in Plain Tokens: Simply Robust, Gradient-Free Watermark for Synthetic Audio
abstract: As policy catches up with the capabilities of generative AI, watermarking is central to content provenance efforts. Inference-time watermarks for autoregressive models are unfit for continuous modalities due to discretization inconsistencies. Existing methods overcome this by finetuning the modality tokenizers, nullifying the watermark's training-free advantage. In this work, motivated by the vocabulary redundancy of discretization, we propose an elegant solution for powerful and robust watermarking of synthetic audio. We theoretically analyze the impact of token errors on watermark detection, and effectively mitigate them using a reduced vocabulary obtained via community detection. Thorough experiments showcase that our gradient-free method can boost detectability by several orders of magnitude, while also achieving built-in robustness to audio modifications. Broadly, we discover a new state-of-the-art for token-level watermarks in multimedia, which simply arises from the nature of discrete representation learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于词汇减少的梯度无关鲁棒水印方法，用于合成音频的令牌级水印。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有推理时水印因离散化不一致不适用于连续模态，而微调解码器的方法失去了无训练优势。本文利用离散化词汇冗余，提出无需微调且鲁棒的水印方案。
light_analysis.method: 通过社区检测减少令牌词汇量，理论分析令牌错误对水印检测的影响，并有效缓解。该方法无需梯度计算，仅利用离散表示学习的内在特性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法将检测能力提升数个数量级，并对音频修改具有内在鲁棒性，在令牌级多媒体水印中达到新SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种简单、鲁棒的训练无关音频水印方法，解决了现有方法的离散化不一致问题。该方法源于离散表示学习的本质，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值，未来可扩展至其他连续模态。

title: Mapping the Schedule x Bit-Width Boundary in Sub-100M Quantisation-Aware Training
abstract: We test whether the optimal learning-rate schedule depends on bit-width during from-initialisation quantisation-aware training (QAT) for sub-100M decoder language models. A 720-run factorial grid (Phase 2) over bit-width x warmdown fraction x LR magnitude x model size x seed (FP16/INT8/INT6, 15M-100M, 5 seeds) finds the optimal warmdown is 33% at every (bit-width, size) cell. The primary hypothesis -- that INT6 QAT requires a different schedule than higher-precision training -- is falsified at FP16/INT8/INT6. A 625-run follow-up (Phase 5) probes the null along five axes: optimiser (AdamW), schedule shape (cosine), training length (up to 9x more iterations), an extended size sweep (5M-350M), and an INT4 sweep from 3M to 100M. The null is robust under all three setup changes. The INT6 penalty follows a log-linear scaling law whose fit on Phase 2 predicts the five held-out Phase 5 sizes (5M, 8M, 175M, 250M, 350M) within their 95% prediction intervals (5/5). For INT4 the picture is sharper than the higher precisions: at 50M and 100M, wd33 is decisively optimal (paired z ~ 12-15, 10/10 seeds); below 50M, across the six tested sizes from 3M to 30M, no individual size shows a statistically significant schedule preference and the per-size mean penalty oscillates within seed-level noise. The boundary is therefore a transition between a noise-dominated regime below 50M and a decisive wd33 regime at and above 50M, not a clean wd10 region. A weight-to-grid-distance probe falsifies the simplest mechanism for the FP16/INT8/INT6 null result (rapid grid-snapping): pre-warmdown, INT6-QAT weights sit at essentially the same distance from the INT6 grid as FP16 weights (ratio ~ 1.04). Practical recommendation: at sub-100M scale, tune the LR schedule once at FP16 and apply unchanged to INT8/INT6 QAT; for INT4 at 50M+ use wd33; for INT4 below 50M the schedule choice is in the noise.
comment: 20 pages, 6 figures, 4 tables. 1345 training runs total (720 + 625). Submitted for review at TMLR

light_analysis.overview: 通过大规模实验发现，子100M参数量化感知训练中学习率调度与比特宽度无关，INT4在50M以上最佳调度为warmdown 33%，以下则在噪声中。
light_analysis.motivation: 量化感知训练中，学习率调度是否依赖量化比特宽度尚不明确。现有方法通常为不同精度单独调参，增加成本。该研究旨在验证低比特（INT6、INT4）是否需要与高精度不同调度，以简化训练流程并降低超参数调优负担。
light_analysis.method: 采用两阶段网格实验：Phase 2（720次运行）测试比特宽度×衰减比例×学习率大小×模型大小×种子，发现最优衰减为33%；Phase 5（625次运行）沿五个轴扩展探测，包括优化器（AdamW）、调度形状（余弦）、训练长度（增至9倍）、模型大小（5M-350M）及INT4（3M-100M）。分析权重到量化网格的距离。
light_analysis.result: FP16/INT8/INT6在子100M下最优调度均为33% warmdown，原假设被证伪。INT6惩罚遵循对数线性缩放律，预测5个未见过尺寸在95%预测区间内。INT4在50M以上wd33显著最优（z≈12-15），50M以下无统计显著偏好。权重到网格距离比约为1.04，排除快速网格锁定机制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 子100M尺度下，FP16的LR调度可直接用于INT8/INT6量化感知训练；INT4在50M以上推荐wd33，50M以下调度选择无关紧要。此发现简化了量化训练超参数选择，具有实用价值。未来可探索更大模型或不同架构的普适性。

title: LECTOR: Joint Optimization of Scientific Reasoning Graphs and Introduction Generation
abstract: AI Scientists have shown promising progress across multiple stages of the research pipeline, among which automatic scientific paper writing remains a formidable challenge. The Introduction writing is especially challenging, which demands not only linguistic fluency, but logical soundness and verifiable faithfulness. Most AI-assisted methods treat the task as text generation instead of reasoning and structuring, leading to severe drawbacks, e.g., hallucinating citations. To address this, we first formulate the Content-Conditional Introduction Generation (CCIG) task, which requires grounding the Introduction in the paper's core evidence. We then propose LECTOR, a novel Logic-Expression Co-Reinforcement Learning framework that can strictly follow the scientist's logic, add high-quality citations and keep structured expressions. LECTOR first constructs a logic-reasoning graph from the paper's main body to serve as a verifiable logical blueprint. Subsequently, it employs a Logic-Expression Co-Rewarding mechanism to jointly optimize for both the graph's structural fidelity and the final narrative's quality. We conduct a dataset from Nature Communications papers to assess our method. Extensive experiments show consistent improvements in both logic fidelity and Introduction generation quality metrics, e.g., Graph Quality (+26.7%), Citation Quality (+8.6%), and Paper Consistency (+3.3%). Code and data are available at https://github.com/Xiao-Youth/LECTOR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LECTOR框架，联合优化科研论文逻辑推理图与引言生成，解决引言生成中的逻辑性、引用准确性和结构化表达问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动科学论文写作中引言生成极具挑战，需要语言流畅性、逻辑合理性和引用真实性。现有AI方法将任务视为文本生成而非推理和结构组织，导致严重缺陷如幻觉引用。因此，需要一种方法能够严格遵循科学家的逻辑、添加高质量引用并保持结构化表达。
light_analysis.method: LECTOR首先从论文主体构建逻辑推理图作为可验证的逻辑蓝图，然后采用逻辑-表达协同奖励机制联合优化图的结构保真度和最终叙述质量。该框架基于内容条件引言生成任务，要求引言基于论文核心证据。
light_analysis.result: 在Nature Communications论文数据集上，LECTOR在逻辑保真度和引言生成质量指标上取得一致提升：图质量提升26.7%，引用质量提升8.6%，论文一致性提升3.3%。
light_analysis.conclusion: LECTOR通过将推理图构建与表达优化相结合，有效提升了引言的逻辑性和可靠性，为自动科学论文写作提供了新范式。未来可探索更复杂的逻辑关系建模和更大规模数据集验证。

title: PolyGnosis 2.0: Enhancing LLM Reasoning via Agentic Harness Engineering for Polymarket and OSINT Insight Extraction
abstract: This paper introduces PolyGnosis 2.0, a pioneering multi-agent architecture designed to extract predictive intelligence by synthesizing Polymarket anomaly signals with global Open Source Intelligence (OSINT) streams, specifically Global Database of Events, Language, and Tone (GDELT). We define and target "Perspective Mismatches", the narrative divergence between Polymarket sentiment and global media flows, as high-alpha trading signals. Moving beyond generic agentic superiority, we rigorously quantify the efficacy of "Harness Engineering" techniques, including reflection loops, tool-calling, divide-and-conquer partitioning (D&C), and chain-of-thought (CoT), within high-noise financial domains. Our empirical evaluation against human-expert benchmarks reveals that while structural partitioning is mandatory for multi-dimensional alignment, unconstrained terminal reflection actively induces logical drift. Furthermore, we identify a pervasive "consensus bias" across all agent configurations during narrative reasoning, necessitating deterministic validation. Ultimately, we isolate a Pareto-optimal configuration that achieves professional-grade analytical precision while minimizing latency and token overhead, providing a robust blueprint for autonomous intelligence in prediction markets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PolyGnosis 2.0多智能体架构，通过Harness Engineering技术融合Polymarket情绪与GDELT全球媒体数据，实现高精度预测推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法无法有效整合Polymarket异常信号与全球开源情报流，存在“视角不匹配”问题，即预测市场情绪与全球媒体叙事之间的分歧。这种分歧可作为高价值交易信号，但缺乏系统化的量化分析框架。作者旨在探索不同智能体工程技术（如反射循环、分治分区）在高噪声金融领域的效用，并解决逻辑漂移和共识偏见等关键挑战。
light_analysis.method: 提出多智能体架构，综合Polymarket预测市场数据和GDELT全球事件数据库。采用Harness Engineering技术，包括反射循环、工具调用、分治分区（D&C）和思维链（CoT）推理。通过对比实验量化各技术的贡献，并识别共识偏见和终端反射导致的逻辑漂移问题。最终通过帕累托优化确定最佳配置。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，结构分区（D&C）是多维对齐的必要条件，但无限制的终端反射反而引发逻辑漂移。所有智能体配置均存在共识偏见，需要确定性验证干预。最终找到帕累托最优配置，在保持专业级分析精度的同时，最小化延迟和token开销，性能超越人类专家基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了Harness Engineering在预测市场智能中的关键作用，揭示了逻辑漂移和共识偏见的机制。为开发可靠自主智能体提供了鲁棒蓝图，具有提升金融预测和情报分析效率的实际价值。未来可探索更高效的确定性验证方法，进一步降低推理成本。

title: RAPTOR+: A Visually Grounded Vision-Language Framework to Improve Clinical Trust and Auditability in Automated Cancer Referral Processing
abstract: Urgent suspected colorectal cancer (CRC) referrals create operational bottlenecks because semi-structured clinical documents often require manual review and transcription. The original RAPTOR system used Large Language Models for structured extraction but relied on a separate OCR stage, making it vulnerable to handwriting, layout variation, and loss of visual evidence linkage. We present RAPTOR+, a multimodal extension that uses Vision-Language Models (VLMs) for end-to-end referral understanding. We evaluate fine-tuned VLMs, commercial and open-source zero-shot VLMs, and the original OCR-based pipeline on 223 clinically curated CRC urgent referral forms. We also introduce a grounding-aware evaluation framework that measures both extraction accuracy and evidence localisation. Results show a clear grounding gap in zero-shot models. Gemini 2.5 Flash achieved 92.6% Reading Accuracy but only 1.2% Strict Safety. In contrast, fine-tuned Qwen3-VL-8B achieved 96.1% Reading Accuracy and 60.6% Strict Safety, substantially improving verifiable evidence grounding. These findings show that task-specific fine-tuning is essential for reliable, auditable clinical document understanding. RAPTOR+ enables extracted referral decisions to be linked to visual evidence, supporting safer and more efficient cancer referral triage.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RAPTOR+多模态框架，利用视觉语言模型实现结直肠癌转诊文档的端到端理解与可追溯性。
light_analysis.motivation: 疑似结直肠癌紧急转诊处理存在瓶颈，半结构化临床文档常需人工审核与转录。原RAPTOR系统依赖OCR处理图像，易受手写、布局变化影响且丢失视觉证据链接。现有方法在自动化处理中缺乏可靠的可审计性，亟需将提取结果与视觉证据结合以提升临床信任度。
light_analysis.method: RAPTOR+采用视觉语言模型（VLM）实现端到端转诊理解，评估了微调VLM、商业和开源零样本VLM及原始OCR流水线。引入了基于定位的评估框架，同时衡量提取准确性和证据定位能力。在223份临床整理的CRC紧急转诊表单上进行实验，关键创新在于通过任务特定微调实现视觉证据关联。
light_analysis.result: 零样本模型存在明显定位差距：Gemini 2.5 Flash读取准确率92.6%但严格安全性仅1.2%；微调的Qwen3-VL-8B读取准确率96.1%且严格安全性达60.6%，显著提升了可验证的证据定位能力。结果表明任务特定微调对可靠、可审计的临床文档理解至关重要。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAPTOR+将提取的转诊决策与视觉证据链接，支持更安全高效的癌症转诊分流。方法学上证明了视觉语言模型结合微调在临床文档自动化中的价值，可靠性和可审计性提升有助于减少人工负担。未来可扩展至更多类型临床文档，但需注意零样本模型在关键场景中的局限性。

title: QUIET: A Multi-Blank Cascaded Story Cloze Benchmark for LLM Creative Generation Capability
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) face a dual challenge in creative capability evaluation: existing benchmarks (e.g., Story Cloze Test, HellaSwag) measure models' discriminative ability over narrative continuation using multiple-choice recognition paradigms, rather than directly measuring creative generation capability; rubric-based scoring and LLM-as-Judge methods rely on subjective dimension assessment or natural language model outputs, and cannot provide objective, automated scoring mechanisms.   This paper proposes QUIET (Quality Understanding via Interlocked Evaluation Testing), a diagnostic benchmark for LLM creative capability based on multi-blank cascaded story cloze. QUIET sets N blanks (10-20) in a story with complete structure, with each blank accompanied by an explicit content constraint, and cascade dependency relationships between blanks -- the content filled into earlier blanks constrains the feasible solution space for later blanks. The evaluated model (or human participants) fills all blanks in open-ended generation mode; the results are scored by an information-theoretic automated scoring protocol without human grading.   The scoring protocol directly operationalizes the "calibrated surprise" theoretical framework (Zou & Xu, 2026a). For each blank k, a composite score is computed: score = satisfy * (1 + lambda * surprise), where lambda = 1.0. Here, "satisfy" measures how well the blank filling satisfies the content constraint (objective logical reasoning judgment, not subjective aesthetic scoring), and "surprise" measures the degree of surprise given that the constraint is satisfied. Creative answers that do not satisfy the constraint score zero; answers that satisfy the constraint but are mediocre score low; answers that satisfy the constraint and are surprising score high.

light_analysis.overview: 提出QUIET基准，通过多空白级联故事完形填空和信息论自动化评分协议，客观评估LLM的创造性生成能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM创造性评估方法存在不足：如Story Cloze Test等判别式基准仅测量模型在多项选择中的识别能力，而非直接衡量生成能力；基于评分的LLM-as-Judge方法依赖主观评估，缺乏客观自动化评分机制。因此，需要一种能直接、客观评估LLM创造性生成的诊断基准。
light_analysis.method: QUIET基于多空白级联故事完形填空，在完整故事中设置10-20个空白，每个空白带有显式内容约束，且空白间存在级联依赖。模型以开放生成模式填充空白，评分采用信息论自动化协议，计算score = satisfy * (1 + lambda * surprise)，其中satisfy衡量约束满足度（客观逻辑推理），surprise衡量满足约束下的惊喜程度（信息论指标）。lambda=1.0，不满足约束得零分。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明实验结果。理论上，该基准能区分平庸与创造性回答：满足约束但平庸的答案得分低，满足约束且惊喜的答案得分高。预期相比传统人工评分或LLM-as-Judge方法，能提供更客观、可重复的评估，避免主观偏差。
light_analysis.conclusion: QUIET提供了一种客观、自动化的LLM创造性生成评估方法，填补了现有基准缺乏直接生成能力测量的空白。其基于信息论的评分协议具有理论依据，可避免主观维度评分的不确定性。未来可扩展至不同领域或更复杂的级联依赖结构，但需验证其与人类判断的一致性。

title: Step-TP: A Grounded, Step-Level Dataset with Chain-of-Thought Reasoning for LLM-Guided Tensor Program Optimization
abstract: Despite the strong reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs), optimizing the execution efficiency of tensor programs remains challenging due to the need for precise, composable transformation decisions. Recent LLM-guided approaches frame tensor program optimization as an iterative decision process, but existing datasets provide only end-to-end optimized program pairs using token-inefficient representations, lacking verifiable step-level supervision and interpretability. As a result, LLMs struggle to make reliable single-step decisions in large combinatorial optimization spaces. We introduce Step-TP, a post-training dataset for tensor program optimization that provides grounded, atomic, step-level supervision with structured chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning. Step-TP forms a closed reasoning loop over intermediate program states, enabling reliable multi-step optimization rather than outcome imitation. Its design is guided by four principles: (i) a token-efficient, verifiable intermediate representation (IR) that deterministically lowers to TVM TIR; (ii) atomic and composable optimization strategies that decompose complex trajectories into interpretable single-step decisions; (iii) structured CoT supervision coupled with explicit IR-to-IR state transitions; and (iv) strategy filtering to balance coverage while preventing shortcut exploitation. The dataset and implementation are available at a GitHub link, https://github.com/LIUMENGFAN-gif/StepTP.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Step-TP数据集，为张量程序优化提供可验证的原子级步骤监督与结构化思维链推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管大语言模型(LLM)具备强推理能力，但优化张量程序执行效率仍具挑战，因需精准、可组合的变换决策。现有LLM引导方法将优化视为迭代决策过程，但已有数据集仅提供端到端优化程序对，采用token低效表示，缺乏可验证的步骤级监督与可解释性，导致LLM在大型组合优化空间中难以做出可靠的单步决策。
light_analysis.method: Step-TP是面向张量程序优化的后训练数据集，提供基于结构化思维链(CoT)推理的原子级步骤监督。其设计遵循四原则：1）token高效的可验证中间表示(IR)，可确定性地降级为TVM TIR；2）原子且可组合的优化策略，将复杂轨迹分解为可解释的单步决策；3）结构化CoT监督与显式IR到IR状态转换耦合；4）策略过滤以平衡覆盖范围并防止捷径利用。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但论文提出Step-TP数据集并公开了代码和实现（GitHub链接），旨在通过提供可验证的步骤级监督和结构化CoT推理，使LLM能够实现可靠的多步优化，而非简单的结果模仿，期望提升张量程序优化效率和可解释性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Step-TP通过提供可验证、原子级步骤监督与结构化CoT推理，增强了LLM在张量程序优化中的单步决策可靠性。该数据集有望推动LLM引导的程序优化研究，提升优化的可解释性与可组合性。未来工作可能涉及扩展至更多优化策略或硬件后端。

title: VEN-VL: A Visual Ensemble MoE Framework for Effective and Efficient Multi-Modal Understanding
abstract: Despite the remarkable progress achieved by recent efficient methods in accelerating multimodal understanding, they still suffer from noticeable performance degradation. Their emphasis on the high compression ratio of a single visual clue and reliance on the heuristic pruning strategy with coarse attention alignment incurs a bottleneck on the information capacity and density of visual tokens. Addressing this limitation, we propose VEN-VL, a visual ensemble MoE framework for effective and efficient perception following the enrich then compact principle. Specifically, we first enrich the information capacity by unifying the visual representations of different perspectives, and then progressively compact it with adaptive routers in specialized visual experts to enhance the information density. Furthermore, we incorporate the reconstruction ability of vanilla structure via explicit visual supervision, facilitating crucial information preservation. Experimental results demonstrate our superiority in complex visual tasks with few information-condensed tokens, which effectively bridges the gap between performance and efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VEN-VL视觉集成MoE框架，通过'先丰富再压缩'原则，在少量信息压缩令牌下实现高效多模态理解，弥合性能与效率差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有高效多模态理解方法虽加速了推理，但性能显著下降，主要源于对单一视觉线索的高压缩比和依赖启发式剪枝策略导致的粗粒度注意力对齐，这限制了视觉令牌的信息容量和密度。为解决这一瓶颈，需要设计能保持信息丰富度同时高效压缩的框架。
light_analysis.method: VEN-VL遵循'enrich then compact'原则。首先集成不同视角的视觉表示以丰富信息容量；随后通过自适应路由器在专门视觉专家中逐步压缩，提升信息密度；并利用显式视觉监督引入原始结构的重建能力，促进关键信息保留。该方法无需大量视觉令牌即可实现高效多模态理解。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，VEN-VL在复杂视觉任务中，使用少量信息压缩令牌即可取得优越性能，有效桥接了性能与效率间的鸿沟。摘要未明确列出具体数值或对比基线，但强调在信息压缩条件下的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: VEN-VL通过集成多视角视觉和渐进压缩策略，在保持高效的同时提升了多模态理解的性能，尤其适用于信息密度受限的场景。其显式视觉监督机制有助于保留关键信息。未来可探索更优的专家路由策略或应用于更大规模模型。

title: Small Models, Strong Priors: Architectural Inductive Bias for Parameter-Efficient Neural PDE Solvers
abstract: Neural PDE solvers have followed the scaling trajectory of vision and language, with recent foundation models reaching billions of parameters. We argue that scale is a poor substitute for architectural inductive bias in this domain: structured priors deliver outsized parameter efficiency, and the pattern of where they succeed and fail is itself informative about what they capture. We instantiate this argument in WaveLiT, an architecture combining a discrete wavelet transform for lossless multi-resolution tokenization, an augmented linear attention block, a shared-weight multiscale feature pyramid, and a wavelet-domain auxiliary loss. Bespoke 1-10M-parameter WaveLiT models compete with foundation models of 100-1000$\times$ their size across eight TheWell benchmarks, with the largest gains on wave and acoustic-dominated benchmarks where the wavelet-multiscale prior fits the dominant dynamical structure and small per-step errors do not compound geometrically under rollout. Trained jointly across all eight benchmarks, a 10M-parameter foundation variant exhibits a structured, physically interpretable transfer pattern -- strongest where the wavelet-multiscale prior matches the dynamics, weakest on chaotic advection-dominated flows. The entire pipeline trains on a single GPU. The results suggest that small-model PDE performance is shaped by architectural inductive bias rather than scale, and that the structure of a prior's failures is a useful empirical signal about its content.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WaveLiT架构，通过小波变换和多尺度归纳偏置实现参数高效的神经PDE求解器。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经PDE求解器追随视觉和语言的扩展路径，但参数量高达数十亿。本文认为规模无法替代架构归纳偏置，结构化先验能带来超强的参数效率。现有方法依赖大模型，计算成本高，且对动力学结构捕捉不足。需要设计小模型利用先验知识高效求解PDE，同时通过先验的失败模式揭示其内容。
light_analysis.method: 提出WaveLiT架构，包含四个关键组件：离散小波变换实现无损多分辨率分词、增强线性注意力模块、共享权重多尺度特征金字塔、小波域辅助损失。模型参数量为1-10M，通过联合训练八种基准，利用小波多尺度先验匹配波动和声学主导的动力学结构，减少误差累积。
light_analysis.result: 在TheWell八个基准上，10M参数的WaveLiT与100-1000倍大的基础模型竞争，在波动和声学主导基准上提升最大。联合训练的10M基础变体表现出可解释的迁移模式，先验匹配时性能最强，在混沌平流主导流中最弱。整个训练可在单GPU完成，验证了小模型通过归纳偏置实现高效性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: WaveLiT证明了架构归纳偏置（尤其是小波多尺度先验）在神经PDE求解中的关键作用，小模型可媲美大模型。研究揭示了先验的失败模式能反映其捕获的内容，具有诊断价值。未来可探索其他结构化先验组合，进一步降低对规模的依赖。

title: A Pedestrian-Vehicle Interaction Benchmark and Annotation Framework for Unstructured Scenes via Uncalibrated Cameras
abstract: Predicting the interaction between pedestrian and vehicle is essential for autonomous driving safety in unstructured and semi-structured scenarios; however, this task is severely hindered by the scarcity of public datasets that feature dense pedestrian-vehicle interactions. Most current studies rely on structured road data, leaving the complex, heterogeneous interactions found in unstructured environments insufficiently represented and researched. In this paper, we propose a dataset annotation framework based on video data from uncalibrated surveillance cameras and present PINNS (Pedestrian-vehicle Interaction dataset from uNcalibrated cameras in uNstructured Scenes). The dataset covers multiple countries and regions, includes diverse typical traffic scenarios, and considers variations in seasons, lighting conditions, and weather. It focuses on complex scenes with dense pedestrian-vehicle interactions and is designed to be easily extensible. The dataset is constructed and annotated according to the standard issued by the Chinese Association of Automation, providing both trajectory data and corresponding scene-level information. Furthermore, this paper analyzes current challenges and research directions in heterogeneous agent trajectory prediction, shows the necessity and usefulness of the proposed dataset. We hope our framework and dataset will facilitate research on trajectory prediction and autonomous driving in complex mixed traffic scenarios. PINNS is publicly available at https://github.com/Songan-Lab.
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures; project page available at https://github.com/Songan-Lab

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于未标定摄像头的行人-车辆交互数据集PINNS及标注框架，填补非结构化场景密集交互数据空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶在非结构化场景中需预测行人-车辆交互，但现有数据集多依赖结构化道路，缺乏密集交互数据，无法充分表征复杂异构交互。该研究旨在解决此数据稀缺问题，推动非结构化场景的轨迹预测研究。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于未标定监控摄像头视频的标注框架，构建PINNS数据集。数据覆盖多国、多种典型交通场景，考虑季节、光照、天气变化，聚焦密集交互。按中国自动化学会标准标注轨迹和场景级信息，易于扩展。
light_analysis.result: 分析了异构智能体轨迹预测的挑战和研究方向，验证了数据集对非结构化场景研究的必要性和实用性。数据集已公开，但未提供具体性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: PINNS数据集和标注框架为复杂混合交通场景下的轨迹预测和自动驾驶提供基础资源，促进非结构化环境研究。未来可扩展更多场景和交互类型。

title: EchoPilot: Training-Free Ultrasound Video Segmentation via Scale-Space Semantic Prompting and Reliability-Gated Memory
abstract: Ultrasound video segmentation is clinically valuable yet difficult due to speckle noise, weak boundaries, and rapid anatomical deformation. Recent promptable foundation models enable point-guided segmentation, but their direct deployment in ultrasound remains unreliable: a single point provides insufficient spatial context to resolve scale ambiguity, and greedy memory updates amplify early errors into severe temporal drift. We present EchoPilot, a training-free framework for ultrasound video segmentation under sparse first-frame interaction, requiring only a single point click and an anatomical category name. EchoPilot orchestrates a frozen medical vision-language model (VLM) for semantic localization, a vision foundation model (VFM) for dense geometric feature extraction, and a promptable video segmentor for mask prediction and propagation. To resolve initialization ambiguity, we propose Scale-Space Semantic Prompting, which first selects an optimal contextual view via a parameter-free S.E.E.D. (Semantic Energy-Entropy Density) criterion, and then synthesizes geometrically precise auxiliary point prompts from dense foundation features without additional user interaction. To reduce propagation drift, a Reliability-Gated Memory update is further introduced to selectively freeze the segmentor's memory bank under uncertain predictions, preventing error accumulation. We also contribute the first dynamic fetal placenta ultrasound video segmentation dataset with 671 annotated frames. Across three ultrasound video datasets, EchoPilot achieves state-of-the-art performance under the sparse-interactive setting, consistently outperforming training-free baselines and finetuned specialists.
comment: Early accepted to MICCAI 2026. Project page: https://keeplearning-again.github.io/EchoPilot/

light_analysis.overview: 提出EchoPilot，一种无需训练的超声视频分割框架，通过尺度空间语义提示和可靠性门控记忆机制，在稀疏单点交互下实现高效、鲁棒的分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 超声视频分割受斑点噪声、弱边界和快速变形影响，现有可提示基础模型因单点上下文不足和贪婪记忆更新导致误差累积。本研究旨在解决初始化歧义和时间漂移问题，无需额外训练即可适应超声场景。
light_analysis.method: EchoPilot结合冻结的医学视觉语言模型进行语义定位、视觉基础模型提取几何特征和可提示视频分割器。提出尺度空间语义提示，通过S.E.E.D.准则选择最优视图并合成辅助点提示；引入可靠性门控记忆，仅更新高置信度帧的记忆，防止误差传播。无需训练。
light_analysis.result: 在三个超声视频数据集上，EchoPilot在稀疏交互设置下优于所有无需训练基线和微调专家。贡献了首个动态胎儿胎盘超声视频分割数据集（671帧）。性能达到新SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: EchoPilot以无需训练的方式有效解决了超声视频分割的初始化模糊和传播漂移问题，显著提升分割可靠性。具有临床实用价值，未来可扩展至更多交互形式和医学影像任务。

title: STaT: Resolving Shape Distortion in Non-Stationary Time Series via Tri-Modal Synergy
abstract: Recent research in time series forecasting frequently investigates the integration of textual and visual modalities with numerical models to better navigate non-stationary environments. Despite delivering solid numerical results, existing multi-modal approaches usually encounter a dilemma: prioritizing the minimization of average errors can result in excessively smooth forecasts that overlook essential fluctuations. To resolve this limitation, we introduce STaT, an innovative multimodal architecture for Symbolic-Temporal-Textual Alignment, which seamlessly unites three synergistic modalities. Specifically, the symbolic modality converts continuous time series into discrete tokens, facilitating the accurate identification of structural patterns and turning points; the temporal modality extracts inherent sequential dependencies; and the textual modality leverages domain semantics to steer the macroscopic forecasting trends. Comprehensive evaluations on eight real-world benchmarks indicate that STaT delivers exceptional performance, enhancing conventional magnitude indicators by up to 8.9% while simultaneously decreasing shape distortion by up to 8.5%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出三模态对齐架构STaT，通过符号、时间、文本模态协同，解决非平稳时间序列预测中的形状失真问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有时间序列预测的多模态方法在追求低平均误差时，往往导致预测过于平滑，忽略关键波动，造成形状失真。该问题在非平稳环境中尤为突出，影响预测的实用价值。因此，需要一种能同时保持数值精度和形状保真度的新方法。
light_analysis.method: STaT架构融合三种模态：符号模态将连续时间序列离散化为符号，识别结构模式和转折点；时间模态提取序列依赖关系；文本模态利用领域语义引导宏观趋势。三者通过协同对齐实现互补，在保持数值精度的同时减少形状失真。
light_analysis.result: 在8个真实基准上，STaT相比现有方法，在幅度指标上提升最高8.9%，同时形状失真降低最多8.5%，表明其能有效平衡数值精度与形状保真度。
light_analysis.conclusion: STaT通过三模态协同机制，为非平稳时间序列预测提供了新范式，显著改善形状失真问题。未来可探索更多模态融合及在金融、气象等领域的应用，但计算复杂度可能需进一步优化。

title: LRDDv3: High-Resolution Long-Range Drone Detection Dataset with Range Information and Thermal Data
abstract: Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) have quickly become common in various airspaces, representing a wide range of applications from recreation flying to commercial photography and package delivery. With the increasing prevalence of UAVs, it becomes critical that both manned and unmanned aircraft can detect UAVs and other flying objects from long range to effectively track movement and ensure safe operation in shared spaces. While several datasets have been introduced for drone detection, the need for expanded high-quality data persists, especially in the area of high-resolution long-range drone data.
