To address this, we introduce a high-resolution dataset of 102,532 long-range RGB images of drones, sampled at 5 FPS from 128 distinct video clips taken mid flight during 17 different data collection days spread over 8 months to ensure a wide variety of lighting scenarios, flight locations, and background elements. The dataset boasts comprehensive drone range information across the dataset, as well as 29,630 IR images, all paired with RGB counterparts from the base dataset. As one of the first drone detection datasets to leverage 4K image resolution and paired 640x512 IR images, our work represents a significant advancement to enable the detection of drones at long range. For access to the complete dataset, please visit https://research.coe.drexel.edu/ece/imaple/lrddv3/
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)

light_analysis.overview: 提出高分辨率长距离无人机检测数据集LRDDv3，包含RGB与红外图像及距离信息。
light_analysis.motivation: 无人机在各空域日益普及，长距离检测对安全运行至关重要。现有数据集缺乏高分辨率长距离数据，特别是同时包含RGB与热红外图像及距离信息的数据，限制了长距离无人机检测技术的发展。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含102,532张RGB图像（从128个视频片段中采样，5 FPS，8个月17天采集）和29,630张配对IR图像的数据集，分辨率达4K RGB与640x512 IR，并全程提供无人机距离信息。
light_analysis.result: 数据集规模大、多样性强，覆盖不同光照、地点和背景。4K分辨率与红外图像配对，属首批此类数据集，为长距离无人机检测提供显著进步。数据公开可获取。
light_analysis.conclusion: LRDDv3填补了高分辨率长距离无人机检测数据的空白，有助提升无人机检测与追踪的鲁棒性。未来可促进更远距离、更复杂场景下的检测研究，但未说明局限性。

title: Where Concept Erasure Should Occur: Concept-Layer Alignment in Text-to-Video Diffusion Models
abstract: Text-to-video diffusion transformers encode semantic information unevenly across model depth, which constrains effective concept erasure. We identify a representational bottleneck, termed concept-layer topological alignment, under which target concepts exhibit higher separability at certain representational depths. Outside these depths, concept and non-target signals remain strongly entangled, limiting the effectiveness of depth-specific erasure. This observation reframes concept erasure as the problem of identifying representational depths where concept-non-target separation naturally emerges. Motivated by this structural constraint, we introduce CLEAR, a separability-driven optimization framework for concept erasure that explicitly enforces concept-layer alignment. CLEAR operationalizes this principle by formulating layer selection as an optimization problem over concept-non-target separability, rather than relying on layer-agnostic or heuristic choices. To enable this, we introduce a separability-aware objective that favors layers exhibiting stronger concept-non-target separation. Experiments on large-scale text-to-video diffusion models demonstrate that enforcing concept--layer alignment leads to more precise concept suppression while preserving overall generative quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CLEAR框架，通过概念层对齐优化实现更精确的概念擦除。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到视频扩散模型在不同深度编码语义信息不均匀，目标概念仅在特定深度表现出高可分离性，而在其他深度与噪声信号强纠缠。现有层特定擦除方法受限于这种概念层拓扑对齐瓶颈，导致擦除效果不理想。因此需要识别概念自然分离的深度并针对性优化。
light_analysis.method: 提出CLEAR分离性驱动优化框架，将层选择形式化为基于概念与非目标可分离性的优化问题，引入分离性感知目标函数以偏好概念-非目标分离更强的层。无需层无关或启发式选择，显式强制概念层对齐，实现对目标概念的有效抑制。
light_analysis.result: 在大规模文本到视频扩散模型上，CLEAR实现更精确的概念抑制，同时保持整体生成质量。与层无关或启发式选择方法相比，在目标概念擦除效果和生成质量指标上均取得提升。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但实验验证了概念层对齐的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示概念层拓扑对齐瓶颈，将概念擦除问题重新定义为深度选择问题。CLEAR框架提供了系统性的层选择策略，兼具学术价值（理论分析概念编码深度依赖性）和实际应用价值（安全内容过滤）。未来可探索更细粒度的概念分离机制或扩展到其他生成模型。

title: From Latent Space to Training Data: Explainable Specialization in Minimal MLPs
abstract: We here study whether training biases can make hidden neurons specialize in minimal one-hidden-layer MLPs, and whether such specialization improves prototype-based reconstruction of the training dataset from the learned weights. We consider Gaussianactivation MLPs of width equal to dataset size and compare three structural losses that respectively encourage coverage of the training samples, separation between neuron-induced prototypes, and low overlap of hidden responses, against the standard fitting baseline. Experiments on uniformly sampled one-dimensional datasets show a stable pattern from N = 3 to N = 100 across 480 controlled runs. Coverage regularization gives the lowest mean reconstruction error at every tested size and raises the prototype-usage specialization ratio relative to the standard baseline, while separation has mixed effects and overlap penalties are systematically harmful. We show that the harm is not an optimization failure: overlap-active approaches fit the data as well as overlap-free ones but route the optimizer to a degenerate equilibrium in which prototype centers are pushed outside the convex hull of the training inputs. Coverage cannot reward this expulsion and acts as an attractor: separation admits it only at large temperature and overlap admits it at the nominal hyperparameter choice. A direct τ-sweep on the separation-only mask and a prototype-position visualization at N = 100 confirm the mechanism. The findings yield a simple design principle for prototype-recoverability-aware training: every repulsive structural loss must be compensated by a compatible attractor, or it will collapse the latent geometry it was meant to refine.

light_analysis.overview: 研究单隐层MLP中隐藏神经元专门化对训练数据原型重建的影响，发现覆盖正则化最优，重叠惩罚有害，提出排斥-吸引平衡设计原则。
light_analysis.motivation: 训练偏差可使隐藏神经元专门化，但现有方法可能损害基于原型的训练数据重建。需要系统研究不同结构损失对神经元专门化和重建误差的影响，揭示其机制以指导可解释的模型训练。
light_analysis.method: 采用高斯激活的单隐层MLP，宽度等于数据集大小。对比覆盖、分离和重叠三种结构损失与标准拟合基线，在均匀采样的一维数据集（N=3到N=100）上进行480次控制实验。通过原型位置可视化和超参数扫描分析机制。
light_analysis.result: 覆盖正则化在所有测试规模下均给出最低平均重建误差，并提高原型使用专门化比率；分离效果混合；重叠惩罚系统性有害，且非优化失败，而是将原型中心推至训练输入凸包外。τ扫描和可视化确认了这一机制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了原型可恢复性感知训练的设计原则：每个排斥性结构损失需兼容的吸引子补偿，否则会破坏潜在几何结构。覆盖充当吸引子，重叠在名义超参数下即导致退化平衡。

title: Quantitative Evaluation of the Severity of Posttraumatic Stress Disorder through Transfer Learning from Specific Phobia Data
abstract: Posttraumatic stress disorder (PTSD) is a prevalent and debilitating mental health condition with significant personal and societal impacts. Current clinical assessments of PTSD often rely on subjective evaluations, which can be time-consuming, costly, and prone to human bias. This study proposes a machine learning (ML) approach based on multivariate kernel density estimation (MKDE) technique for the objective evaluation of PTSD severity. We collected heart rate (HR) and galvanic skin response (GSR) signals as well as PTSD Checklist - Military Version (PCL-M) labels from 21 participants during an immersive simulation. A fear-response model was trained on a public arachnophobia dataset, and predictive features of PTSD were extracted from the fear-response curves estimated on the military dataset. The model achieved an accuracy of 86\% in classifying PTSD status, effectively distinguishing participants with and without PTSD (PCL-M threshold of 36). The average mean absolute error (MAE) of the models is 5.6, and it estimated a clinical PTSD severity scale with a mean absolute percentage error of 17\%. Our algorithm demonstrates promising potential for enhancing estimation of PTSD severity and followup by offering an objective and low-effort evaluation approach using physiology. These findings suggest clinical utility in both screening and follow-up settings.
comment: Submitted to a peer-reviewed journal, comments welcome

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于多元核密度估计和迁移学习的客观PTSD严重性评估方法，利用生理信号实现86%分类准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: PTSD是一种普遍且致残的心理健康问题，当前临床评估依赖主观方法，耗时、成本高且易受偏见影响。现有方法缺乏客观、低负担的评估手段。本研究旨在通过机器学习实现基于生理信号的客观PTSD严重性评估，提高临床筛查和随访的效率与准确性。
light_analysis.method: 采用多元核密度估计(MKDE)技术，从公共蜘蛛恐惧症数据集中迁移学习恐惧响应模型。收集21名军事人员的HR和GSR信号及PCL-M标签，在沉浸式模拟中提取预测特征。模型利用迁移学习克服小样本问题，通过恐惧响应曲线估计PTSD严重性。
light_analysis.result: 模型在PTSD状态分类上达到86%准确率（PCL-M阈值36），区分有无PTSD的参与者。平均绝对误差(MAE)为5.6，临床严重性量表估计的平均绝对百分比误差(MAPE)为17%。与主观评估相比，提供了客观、低努力的方法，具有临床实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证明了迁移学习结合生理信号在客观PTSD评估中的潜力，为临床筛查和随访提供了低成本、低负担的工具。未来可扩大样本量并验证跨人群泛化性，进一步优化模型鲁棒性。

title: Explore Before You Solve: The Speed--Depth Trade-off in Epistemic Agents for ARC-AGI-3
abstract: We systematically investigate all 25 public ARC-AGI-3 games and find that every one is reachable through non-intelligent strategies: 10 in a single blind step, 5 after one probing action, 1 via repeated ACTION1 presses, 1 via diverse exploration, and 8 via single repeated actions with sufficient budget (50-200 steps). A library-level null-coordinate vulnerability additionally bypasses 18 games in 1 step. This benchmark critique implies the public evaluation set cannot discriminate intelligent exploration from trivial heuristics - the private 55-game evaluation is the only genuine intelligence test. Against this backdrop, we present AERA (Adaptive Epistemic Reasoning Agent), a three-phase (EXPLORE / VERIFY / PLAN) agent achieving RHAE=0.2116 (4/25 solved) on these 25 games with Qwen2.5-0.5B, while random and no-explore baselines score 0.0000. We formalise AERA through a Speed--Depth trade-off framework: under a convexity assumption (proved for a class of environments in the Appendix), RHAE's quadratic form emerges as a second-order penalty for deviating from the Pareto frontier between action efficiency and information gain. Contributions: (i) a benchmark validity analysis showing that current interactive reasoning benchmarks fail to measure the exploration they claim to require, and (ii) the EXPLORE-before-PLAN framework and model-capability x exploration interaction. The linked code track entry achieves RHAE=0.30 on the full 55-game private evaluation. Code: CC0.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示了ARC-AGI-3公共基准中所有25道题均可通过非智能策略解决，并提出AERA智能体，在速度-深度权衡框架下实现探索与规划的协同。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有交互式推理基准声称需要探索能力，但ARC-AGI-3的25道公共题目中发现每条都可经由简单的非智能策略（如盲步、单次探测、重复动作）直接到达，甚至存在库级空坐标漏洞。这表明公共评测集无法区分真正智能的探索行为与简单启发式方法，只有私有的55道评测才能作为真正的智能测试。因此亟需一个能够有效衡量探索能力的框架和模型。
light_analysis.method: 提出AERA（自适应认知推理智能体），分为三个阶段：EXPLORE（探索）、VERIFY（验证）和PLAN（规划）。核心创新在于形式化了速度-深度权衡：假设环境凸性（附录中证明了一类环境），RHAE的二次形式作为偏离动作效率与信息增益帕累托前沿的二阶惩罚项。模型使用Qwen2.5-0.5B作为基础。方法强调探索优先于规划，并研究了模型能力与探索之间的交互作用。
light_analysis.result: 在25道公共ARC-AGI-3题目上，AERA（Qwen2.5-0.5B）达到RHAE=0.2116（4/25解决），而随机探索和无探索基线均为0.0000。在完整的55道私有评测集上，代码提交达到RHAE=0.30。结果证明探索策略显著优于无探索方法，但整体解决率仍较低，凸显了基准的挑战性和探索与规划协同的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了两方面：1) 基准有效性分析，指出现有交互式推理基准未能真正测量所需的探索能力；2) 提出了EXPLORE-before-PLAN框架及其与模型能力的交互作用。学术上揭示了速度-深度折衷关系，实践上为未来智能体设计提供了指导。局限性是当前模型求解率仍然较低，未来可探索更高效的探索策略或更大的基础模型。

title: Thaka at KSAA-2026 Task 2: Regularized Fine-Tuning for Arabic Speech Diacritization
abstract: We describe the winning system for Task 2 of the KSAA-2026 Shared Task on Arabic Speech Dictation with Automatic Diacritization. The task requires producing fully diacritized Arabic text from speech audio and undiacritized transcripts, with only 2,327 training samples available and no external data permitted. Our system fine-tunes CATT-Whisper, a character-level multimodal model combining a pretrained CATT text encoder with a frozen Whisper speech encoder. The key to our approach is training regularization: R-Drop consistency regularization, Optuna-optimized hyperparameters with high weight decay, and Focal Loss. At inference, we average 200 stochastic forward passes across four model checkpoints using Monte Carlo Dropout at the softmax probability level. The system achieves 23.26% WER on the primary leaderboard metric (with case endings, including no-diacritic positions), placing 1st among all participants.
comment: 4 pages, 1 figure. Published in Proceedings of OSACT7 (LREC 2026). Winning system for KSAA-2026 Task 2 on Arabic Speech Diacritization

light_analysis.overview: 提出正则化微调CATT-Whisper模型，在少量训练数据下实现阿拉伯语音节标音，以23.26% WER获得KSAA-2026任务2第一名。
light_analysis.motivation: 阿拉伯语音节标音任务面临训练数据稀缺（仅2,327样本）且不允许使用外部数据的挑战，现有方法易过拟合。该研究旨在通过正则化技术提升小样本下的标音性能，解决语音识别与文本标音结合的实际需求，对低资源语言处理具有重要价值。
light_analysis.method: 系统基于CATT-Whisper多模态模型，结合冻结的Whisper语音编码器和预训练CATT文本编码器。核心创新是训练正则化策略：采用R-Drop一致性正则化、Optuna优化超参数（高权重衰减）和Focal Loss。推理时通过蒙特卡洛Dropout平均200次随机前向传播的softmax概率，并融合四个检查点结果。
light_analysis.result: 在KSAA-2026任务2主排行榜上取得23.26%词错误率（WER），包含词尾及无标音位置，在所有参赛系统中排名第一。该结果证明了正则化方法在少量训练数据下的有效性，显著优于其他未采用类似正则化的基线系统。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作展示了正则化微调在低资源语音标音任务中的成功应用，为小样本场景下的多模态模型训练提供了有效方案。未来可探索更高效的正则化组合或半监督学习，并推广至其他低资源语言标音任务。

title: Does Continued Pretraining on a Learner Corpus Improve Automated Essay Scoring on English Proficiency Tests? Evidence from EFCAMDAT
abstract: Recent automated essay scoring (AES) studies increasingly use pretrained transformer models, but these models are usually pretrained on general-domain English and may under-represent second-language learner writing. This study investigates whether domain-adaptive continued pretraining (DAPT) on the EFCAMDAT learner corpus improves transformer-based AES for English proficiency tests. We apply DAPT to three transformer encoders and evaluate them on FCE and IELTS in both in-domain scoring and few-shot cross-dataset transfer. Full-corpus DAPT produces mixed results across models, datasets, and metrics. Further analyses suggest that these mixed effects are partly explained by mismatches in proficiency, genre, and communicative purpose between EFCAMDAT and the downstream datasets. A proficiency-based ablation shows that targeted DAPT using CEFR-aligned subsets improves downstream scoring more reliably than full-corpus DAPT, especially for FCE with B1--B2 data. However, these gains do not consistently improve cross-dataset transfer. Overall, the findings suggest that continued pretraining on a learner-writing corpus can benefit in-domain AES for English assessment when the pretraining data is sufficiently aligned with the downstream assessment settings. However, it does not automatically improve transferability across different English proficiency test datasets.
comment: 16 pages, 3 figures, 10 tables, including references and appendices

light_analysis.overview: 探究在二语学习者语料库上进行领域自适应继续预训练能否提升基于Transformer的自动作文评分在英语水平测试中的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自动作文评分（AES）常使用通用域预训练Transformer模型，但这些模型可能无法充分捕捉二语学习者的写作特征。本研究旨在验证对学习者语料库（EFCAMDAT）进行领域自适应继续预训练（DAPT）能否改善AES在英语水平测试（如FCE和IELTS）上的性能，并分析预训练数据与下游任务的对齐程度对效果的影响。
light_analysis.method: 在三个Transformer编码器（如BERT）上应用DAPT，使用EFCAMDAT全语料库或CEFR对齐子集进行继续预训练。评估域内评分（FCE、IELTS）和少样本跨数据集迁移任务。关键创新包括分析熟练度、体裁和交际目的不匹配导致的混合结果，以及基于熟练度的消融实验，验证针对性子集预训练的效果。
light_analysis.result: 全语料库DAPT在不同模型和数据集上结果不一。针对性DAPT（如对FCE使用B1-B2数据）比全语料DAPT更可靠地提升域内评分，但跨数据集迁移未持续改善。具体数值未明确给出，但指出针对性DAPT在FCE上表现更优。与基线方法相比，DAPT的增益取决于数据对齐程度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 当继续预训练数据与下游评估设置高度对齐时，DAPT能提升域内AES性能，但无法保证跨数据集的迁移能力。未来研究需关注预训练数据的选择策略，以减少熟练度、体裁等不匹配带来的负面影响。该发现对开发针对二语学习者的AES系统具有实践指导意义。

title: Closed-Loop Bidirectional Prompting for Adversarial Robustness of Vision Language Models
abstract: Vision Language Models adapt well to downstream tasks but are highly vulnerable to adversarial perturbations that disrupt cross-modal semantic alignment. Existing defenses are largely unidirectional or structural, failing to exploit bidirectional cross-modal complementarity and instance-wise adaptive protection. To overcome the limitations of unidirectional and static defenses in adversarial settings, we propose Closed-Loop Bidirectional Prompting, casting robust adaptation as cross-modal agreement recovery via a dynamic feedback loop on frozen encoders. A Semantic Anchor is introduced as a stable prior to constrain cyclic updates and mitigate perturbation-induced feature corruption. Through anchor-based bootstrapping, textual semantics denoise visual representations, while the refined visuals enable instance-adaptive prompt updating, yielding a rectified and robust consensus. Extensive evaluations across 11 datasets validate state-of-the-art robustness and strong base-to-new generalization, while maintaining a favorable trade-off between computational cost and accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出闭环双向提示方法，通过动态反馈循环恢复跨模态一致性，提升视觉语言模型的对抗鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型虽适应下游任务，但易受对抗扰动破坏跨模态语义对齐。现有防御多为单向或结构性，未能利用双向跨模态互补性和实例自适应保护，导致鲁棒性不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出闭环双向提示，将鲁棒适应视为通过冻结编码器上的动态反馈循环恢复跨模态一致性。引入语义锚作为稳定先验约束循环更新，减轻扰动导致特征破坏。通过锚定引导，文本语义去噪视觉表示，精细视觉实现实例自适应提示更新，形成修正稳健共识。
light_analysis.result: 在11个数据集上评估，达到最先进的鲁棒性和强基到新泛化能力，同时在计算成本与准确率之间保持良好平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 闭环双向提示有效利用双向跨模态互补性和实例自适应保护，显著提升视觉语言模型鲁棒性。未来可探索更高效的锚定机制或扩展至更多模态。

title: Can LLMs Time Travel? Enhancing Temporal Consistency in Legal Agentic Search through Reinforcement Learning
abstract: While large language models (LLMs) augmented with agentic search capabilities show promise for legal reasoning, they overlook a fundamental constraint that applicable law must match the temporal context of each case, as retroactive application of statutes violates core legal principles and leads to erroneous conclusions. Our observations reveal that current legal LLMs suffer from temporal bias anchored to their training cutoff, while search agents rarely incorporate temporal constraints into queries, and that web search alone cannot provide the precise statute and precedent citations that legal reasoning demands. To address these challenges, we propose LegalSearch-R1, an end-to-end reinforcement learning framework that pairs local statute RAG for precise article matching with online web search for broader legal knowledge, trained on temporally-indexed data spanning multiple amendment periods to enforce temporal consistency. Extensive experiments on our benchmark covering 13 legal tasks demonstrate that our 7B-parameter agent outperforms state-of-the-art deep research frameworks and specialized legal LLMs by 12.9% to 29.8%, surpasses baselines by 57.7% to 80.3% on temporal consistency, and exhibits robust out-of-domain generalization. The code and data are available at https://github.com/AlexFanw/LegalSearch-R1.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LegalSearch-R1，通过强化学习融合本地法规RAG与在线搜索，增强法律搜索的时间一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有法律LLM存在训练截止期的时间锚定偏差，搜索代理忽略时间约束，且纯网络搜索缺乏精确法律引用。法律案件要求适用时效性法规，溯及既往违反原则，导致错误结果。
light_analysis.method: LegalSearch-R1采用端到端强化学习框架，配对本地法规RAG（精确条款匹配）与在线网络搜索（广泛法律知识），在跨越多个修订周期的时序索引数据上训练，强制时间一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在13个法律任务基准上，7B参数代理超越最先进深度研究框架和专用法律LLM 12.9%-29.8%，时间一致性提升57.7%-80.3%，并展现鲁棒的域外泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明强化学习结合时序感知RAG可有效解决法律搜索的时间偏差，提升判决准确性。未来可扩展至更多领域的时间约束代理搜索，代码已开源。

title: Joint Optimization of Training and Inference in Federated Edge Learning via Constrained Multi-Objective Deep Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Federated edge learning (FEEL) has recently emerged as a promising paradigm for achieving edge intelligence (EI) via enabling collaborative model training across edge devices while protecting data privacy. In this paper, we put forth an online optimization framework that jointly manages federated training and inference on resource-constrained edge devices. We introduce a tandem-queue-inspired conversion mechanism that bridges inference requests and training data, and further incorporate both data and model freshness into the accuracy formulation to capture temporal dynamics in real-world environments. To maximize inference accuracy while minimizing latency and energy consumption, the mode selections, communication, and computation resource allocations of edge devices are jointly optimized. We formulate this optimization as a multi-objective optimization problem, which is NP-hard and further complicated by the online setting. To address these challenges, we transform the problem into a multi-objective Markov decision process (MOMDP) and develop a \underline{c}onstrained \underline{m}ulti-\underline{o}bjective \underline{p}roximal \underline{p}olicy \underline{o}ptimization (C-MOPPO) algorithm. Specifically, C-MOPPO first learns a set of policies with different preferences across three objectives, then leverages constrained policy optimization to enrich the Pareto front and obtain high-quality, dense solutions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that C-MOPPO achieves well-balanced trade-offs among objectives and significantly outperforms baselines under various system configurations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出联合优化联邦边缘学习中训练和推理的在线框架，通过约束多目标深度强化学习算法C-MOPPO实现精度、延迟和能耗的帕累托最优权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦边缘学习（FEEL）在资源受限的边缘设备上联合训练模型时需要兼顾推理请求和训练数据。现有方法未能同时优化训练和推理，且忽略了数据与模型新鲜度对精度的动态影响。此外，多目标优化问题（精度、延迟、能耗）是NP-hard且在线环境复杂，缺乏有效的求解方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出在线优化框架，引入串行队列转换机制连接推理请求与训练数据，并考虑数据与模型新鲜度。将问题建模为多目标马尔可夫决策过程（MOMDP），开发约束多目标近端策略优化（C-MOPPO）算法。该算法先学习不同目标偏好的策略集，再利用约束策略优化丰富帕累托前沿，获得高质量密集解。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，C-MOPPO在多种系统配置下实现了目标间良好平衡的权衡，显著优于基线方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调C-MOPPO能够有效提升帕累托前沿的覆盖度和解的质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文为联邦边缘学习中的训练与推理联合优化提供了新框架，通过MOMDP和C-MOPPO算法有效解决了多目标在线优化难题。该方法有助于在资源受限边缘设备上实现高效、实时的边缘智能，未来可扩展到更复杂的动态环境。

title: R5DGS: Semantic-Aware 4D Gaussian Splatting with Rigid Body Constraints for Efficient Dynamic Scene Reconstruction
abstract: Reconstructing and predicting dynamic 3D scenes from multi-view videos is a foundational task for robotics, AR/VR, and digital twins. Recent physics-informed Gaussian Splatting methods achieve impressive future frame extrapolation but lack semantic awareness and suffer from large computational overhead. We introduce $\textbf{R5DGS}$, a framework that augments a physics-driven 4D Gaussian representation with compact Identity Encoding vectors, enabling precise Gaussian-to-object association. By constructing an offline CLIP-based object lookup table, we support open-vocabulary text prompting to retrieve and render object-specific Gaussians across arbitrary timestamps and viewpoints. Furthermore, we propose a rigid-body inference constraint that predicts and integrates physical dynamics exclusively for object centroids, propagating motion to associated Gaussians via relative transformations. This optimization yields a 11 FPS speedup during extrapolation without compromising trajectories plausibility.

light_analysis.overview: 提出R5DGS，结合语义感知和刚体约束的4D高斯溅射，实现高效动态场景重建与预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 从多视角视频重建和预测动态3D场景是机器人、AR/VR和数字孪生的基础任务。现有物理信息高斯溅射方法虽能实现未来帧外推，但缺乏语义感知能力，且计算开销大。为解决这些问题，本文旨在提升动态场景重建的语义理解与效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出R5DGS框架，在物理驱动的4D高斯表示中引入紧凑的身份编码向量，实现精确的高斯-物体关联。构建离线CLIP对象查找表，支持开放词汇文本提示，检索并渲染任意时间戳和视角下的特定对象高斯。提出刚体推理约束，仅预测和集成对象质心的物理动力学，通过相对变换将运动传播到关联高斯，加速外推过程。
light_analysis.result: 在动态场景重建中，R5DGS相比现有方法，在外推时实现了11 FPS的加速，同时不牺牲轨迹的合理性。具体性能指标如准确率、与基线对比等摘要未明确说明，但强调了效率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: R5DGS通过语义感知和刚体约束有效提升了动态场景重建的效率和可解释性。其开放词汇查询能力为交互式应用提供了便利，但摘要未提及局限性或未来工作。该方法在机器人、AR/VR和数字孪生领域具有潜在应用价值。

title: Universal Activation Verbalizer: A Unified Framework for Cross-Model Activation Explanation
abstract: Activation verbalization explains hidden representations in natural language, but existing methods are mostly limited to self-explanation, where each model explains only its own activations. We introduce Universal Activation Verbalizer (UAV), a framework that uses a shared decoder to explain activations from heterogeneous donor models. UAV learns a lightweight adapter that converts donor activations into soft tokens in decoder's embedding space, and further supports adapter-only transfer by reusing a frozen decoder-side LoRA while training only a new adapter for another donor. Across classification, fact retrieval, and gist summarization, UAV remains competitive with strong self-explanation baselines while enabling cross-model verbalization across model families and scales. Ablations show that decoder-side tuning mainly improves task behavior, whereas the adapter provides the activation-grounded factual and semantic information needed for faithful explanations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通用激活言语化框架UAV，实现跨模型激活解释，无需每模型单独训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有激活言语化方法局限于自解释，即每个模型仅能解释自身的激活，无法泛化到异构模型。这限制了模型可解释性的通用性，尤其在需要比较或集成不同模型时缺乏统一框架。因此，研究需解决跨模型、跨尺度的激活解释问题，提出一种共享解码器的框架以降低计算成本并提升灵活性。
light_analysis.method: UAV框架包含一个共享解码器和轻量级适配器。适配器将异构捐赠模型的激活转换为解码器嵌入空间中的软令牌。支持仅适配器迁移：复用冻结的解码器端LoRA，仅训练新适配器即可用于另一捐赠模型。在分类、事实检索、要点总结任务中验证，涉及不同模型家族和规模。
light_analysis.result: UAV在分类、事实检索和要点总结任务中，与强自解释基线相比保持竞争力，同时实现了跨模型家族和规模的言语化。消融实验表明，解码器端调优主要改善任务行为，而适配器提供基于激活的事实和语义信息，确保解释的忠实性。具体性能指标摘要未明确。
light_analysis.conclusion: UAV提供了一种统一、高效的跨模型激活解释框架，降低了多模型场景下的解释成本。其仅适配器迁移机制便于扩展至新模型。未来可探索更复杂的适配器结构或应用于更大规模模型。局限可能包括对特定任务适配器的依赖及解释质量的平衡。

title: Reading the Finetuning Prior: Verbatim Content Recovery via Contrastive Decoding Diffing
abstract: Narrowly finetuned language models memorize implanted content verbatim, but auditing what a deployed model has been taught, without access to its weights or training data, remains an open challenge. Recent work shows that activation differences between base and finetuned models carry readable traces of the finetuning domain; the state-of-the-art Activation Difference Lens (ADL) recovers a vague domain-level description but requires full "white-box" access to model internals. We introduce Contrastive Decoding Diffing (CDD), a model diffing method that operates on output-level logit distributions only, with no weight access, no layer selection, and no per-model tuning, yet recovers implanted facts. CDD consists of three ideas: bypassing the chat template to expose the raw finetuning prior, seeding generation with maximally vague pre-fills, and amplifying the logit-space difference between finetuned and base models at each decoding step. A single default configuration recovers implanted facts verbatim -- exact drug names, vote counts, physical measurements, and procedural details -- across four architectures (1B--32B parameters), uniformly outperforming ADL despite less access and running ~170x faster. Furthermore, CDD surfaces unintended data pipeline artifacts: a fictional persona introduced by the LLM data generator via mode collapse leaked into model weights and was extracted by CDD, constituting to our knowledge the first demonstrated end-to-end fingerprinting chain from data generator artifact to model weights to recovered output. We validate on real-domain finetuning settings, achieving near-perfect recovery across all single-dataset non-CoT variants and correctly identifying all four datasets in the mixed-dataset setting. CDD's success as a grey-box method outperforming white-box baselines underscores its practical utility for transparency and accountability in AI systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出对比解码差异法(CDD)，仅用输出logit分布实现微调后模型植入事实的逐字恢复，性能优于白盒方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 窄域微调的语言模型会逐字记忆植入的内容，但在无法访问权重或训练数据的情况下审计模型所学内容仍具挑战。现有最佳方法激活差异透镜(ADL)需要完全白盒访问，且仅能恢复模糊的领域描述。因此，需要一种更实用、访问权限更低的模型差异分析方法，以增强AI系统的透明度和问责性。
light_analysis.method: CDD包含三个核心思想：绕过对话模板暴露原始微调先验、使用最大模糊预填充引导生成、在每个解码步骤放大微调模型与基座模型在logit空间的差异。方法仅需输出级logit分布，无需权重访问、层选择或逐模型调参。在四种架构（1B-32B参数）上使用单一默认配置即可逐字恢复植入事实。
light_analysis.result: 在四个架构（1B-32B参数）上，CDD统一优于ADL，尽管访问权限更少，但速度提升约170倍。在真实领域微调设置中，对所有单一数据集非CoT变体实现近乎完美的恢复，并在混合数据集设置中正确识别全部四个数据集。此外，CDD成功揭示了数据生成器模式坍缩导致的人物泄露，首次展示了从数据生成器工件到模型权重再到恢复输出的端到端指纹链。
light_analysis.conclusion: CDD作为一种灰盒方法，在访问权限远低于白盒的情况下实现了更优的逐字恢复性能，显著提升了AI系统的透明度和问责性。其成功表明输出级信息足以揭示模型内部记忆的敏感事实。未来工作可探索更广泛的模型架构与微调范式，以及防御措施的开发。

title: AgentGrounder: Zero-Shot 3D Visual Pointcloud Grounding using Multimodal Language Models
abstract: 3D Visual Grounding (3DVG) is an essential capability for embodied AI, requiring agents to localize objects in 3D scenes based on natural language descriptions. Recent zero-shot methods leverage 2D vision-language models (LVLMs). However, they often rely on existing sets of multi-view images and struggle with the limited semantic and spatial details provided by standard 3D segmentation tools. We present $\textbf{AgentGrounder}$, a zero-shot 3D visual grounding framework that operates directly on colored point clouds without task-specific 3D training. Our approach follows a two-stage design: (1) an offline stage that applies 3D model to build an Object Lookup Table (OLT) with instance IDs, semantic labels, 3D bounding boxes; and (2) an online tool-driven agent that decomposes each query, retrieves only relevant candidates from the OLT, performs geometric scoring, and triggers image rendering on demand when additional visual evidence (e.g., color, material, or viewpoint-sensitive cues) is required. Compared with fixed anchor-target matching pipelines, this design reduces cascading matching errors and improves context-window efficiency by avoiding prompts overloaded with irrelevant objects. We evaluate on ScanRefer and Nr3D under a zero-shot setting and observe consistent improvements over SeeGround in our setup, including +2.5% Acc@0.5 on ScanRefer and +6.3% on Nr3D, with a notable +6.3% gain on Nr3D view-independent queries. These results show that combining selective retrieval, geometric reasoning, and adaptive visual inspection yields a practical and robust foundation for open-vocabulary 3D grounding. Our code is available at https://github.com/be2rlab/AgentGrounder.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AgentGrounder，一个无需任务特定训练的零样本3D视觉点云定位框架，通过两阶段设计和工具驱动智能体直接处理彩色点云实现开放词汇定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D视觉定位是具身AI的关键能力，现有零样本方法依赖2D视觉语言模型和多视图图像，但标准3D分割工具提供的语义和空间细节有限，且固定锚点匹配导致级联错误和上下文窗口低效。需要一种直接处理点云、减少错误并提高效率的方法。
light_analysis.method: 两阶段设计：离线阶段使用3D模型构建对象查找表(OLT)，包含实例ID、语义标签和3D边界框；在线工具驱动智能体分解查询，仅检索相关候选，进行几何评分，并在需要视觉证据时触发图像渲染。相比固定锚点匹配，减少级联错误并提高上下文窗口效率。
light_analysis.result: 在ScanRefer和Nr3D上零样本评估，相比SeeGround，Acc@0.5在ScanRefer上提升2.5%，Nr3D上提升6.3%，其中视图无关查询提升6.3%。表明选择性检索、几何推理和自适应视觉检查的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: AgentGrounder为零样本3D视觉定位提供了实用且鲁棒的框架，具有开放式词汇能力。学术上展示了结合检索、几何和视觉检查的方法；实际应用可部署于具身AI。未来可改进点云处理和查询分解。

title: Predicting Stock Price Direction on Earnings Announcement Days using Multi-modal Deep Learning
abstract: Predicting stock price movements during Earnings Announcements (EAs) is a significant challenge due to market noise and high-impact price discontinuities. In this study, we evaluate whether pre-announcement news sentiment, firm fundamentals, and recent market dynamics jointly predict the directional price movement of equities on EA days. We construct a multi-modal feature space combining 15 fundamental metrics, 3 price-based technical indicators and sentiment scores derived from financial news articles processed using FinBERT. We compare a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) network and a Transformer-based architecture against a logistic regression baseline, and further assess all models with and without sentiment features to quantify their incremental value. Our results indicate that while the LSTM demonstrates higher precision through a conservative safe-bet strategy, the Transformer model exhibits superior sensitivity in identifying volatile movements, achieving a higher macro F1-score, with ablation experiments showing a consistent benefit from incorporating news sentiment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多模态深度学习模型，结合基本面、技术指标和新闻情感，预测财报发布日股票价格方向，验证了情感特征的增量价值。
light_analysis.motivation: 财报发布期间股价预测因市场噪声和价格不连续而极具挑战。现有方法多依赖单一模态信息，未能充分利用多源数据。本研究旨在通过融合基本面、技术指标和新闻情感的多模态特征，提升预测准确性，并量化新闻情感的贡献。
light_analysis.method: 构建多模态特征空间：15个基本面指标（如市盈率、营收增长率）、3个价格技术指标（如RSI）和FinBERT处理的新闻情感得分。采用LSTM和Transformer模型，以逻辑回归为基线。通过有无情感特征的消融实验，评估其增量价值。
light_analysis.result: LSTM通过保守策略获得更高精确度，Transformer对波动更敏感，取得更高宏F1分数。消融实验表明，加入新闻情感特征在各模型上一致提升性能，验证了多模态融合的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 多模态深度学习在财报日股价方向预测中表现优异，新闻情感是重要增量信息。该框架可辅助投资者决策，未来可扩展至其他事件驱动场景及更复杂情感模型。

title: $D^2$-Monitor: Dynamic Safety Monitoring for Diffusion LLMs via Hesitation-Aware Routing
abstract: Despite the emergence of diffusion large language models (D-LLMs) as an alternative to autoregressive large language models (AR-LLMs), safety monitoring for D-LLMs remains largely unexplored. Unlike AR-LLMs, D-LLMs generate text through a multi-step denoising process, exposing intermediate hidden representations that may contain safety-relevant information unavailable in standard single-step monitoring setups. Motivated by the suitability of lightweight probes for always-on monitoring, we analyze which trajectory-level signals best indicate when such probes are likely to struggle. We find that the most informative signal is safety hesitation: intermediate hidden states repeatedly falling within a small margin of the probe's decision boundary. The number of such hesitation steps in D-LLM's trajectory predicts probe failure effectively, providing a proxy of sample difficulty. Building on this analysis, we propose $D^2$-Monitor, a bi-level safety monitor for D-LLMs. $D^2$-Monitor adopts a lightweight probe as an always-on monitor to jointly estimate hesitation and perform base classification. When the hesitation level exceeds a threshold, a more expressive but computationally heavier probe is activated. This dynamic routing mechanism allocates monitoring resources efficiently at test time. Evaluated on 3 datasets (WildguardMix, ToxicChat, OpenAI-Moderation) across 4 D-LLMs, $D^2$-Monitor achieves state-of-the-art performance with a compact parameter footprint ($\leq$ 0.85M parameters), and exhibits the best trade-off between effectiveness and efficiency relative to 8 baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于安全犹豫感知动态路由的扩散LLM安全监控方法$D^2$-Monitor，实现高效准确的安全检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散大语言模型（D-LLMs）作为自回归模型的安全替代方案，但其安全监控尚未探索。D-LLMs的多步去噪过程暴露中间隐藏表示，其中包含标准单步监控无法获取的安全相关信息。轻量探针适合持续监控，但在困难样本上易失败。现有方法缺乏识别探针失效信号的手段，且无法动态分配计算资源。因此需要分析轨迹级信号以预测探针失败，并设计自适应监控机制。
light_analysis.method: 分析D-LLM生成轨迹中的隐藏状态，发现安全犹豫（中间状态反复落在探针决策边界小范围内）是预测探针失败的最有效信号，犹豫步数可代理样本难度。基于此提出$D^2$-Monitor双层监控：始终部署轻量探针进行基础分类并估计犹豫水平；若犹豫超过阈值，则激活更强但计算更重的探针。动态路由机制在测试时高效分配监控资源。使用WildguardMix等3个数据集和4种D-LLM进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在WildguardMix、ToxicChat、OpenAI-Moderation数据集和4种D-LLM上评估，$D^2$-Monitor以不超过0.85M参数的紧凑模型达到最先进性能。与8种基线方法相比，在有效性（如F1分数）和效率（推理时间、计算开销）之间取得最佳平衡。具体来说，在绝大多数设置下优于静态单探针和常规动态监控方法，验证了犹豫感知路由的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次聚焦扩散LLM的安全监控，提出动态、资源高效的$D^2$-Monitor框架。核心创新是识别安全犹豫作为探针失败的指标，并设计双层路由机制平衡精度与计算成本。该方法在实际部署中具有重要价值，可适应不同D-LLM和数据集。未来可探索更复杂犹豫信号的定义及自适应阈值调整，但当前工作已奠定坚实基础。

title: SP-MoMamba: Superpixel-driven Mixture of State Space Experts for Efficient Image Super-Resolution
abstract: State space models (SSMs) have emerged as a powerful paradigm for efficient single-image super-resolution (SR) due to their linear complexity and long-range modeling capabilities. However, existing Mamba-based methods typically rely on data-agnostic rigid scanning, which reshapes 2D images into 1D sequences over a fixed grid, inevitably disrupting spatial-semantic topology and introducing artifacts. Inspired by the \textbf{Gestalt perceptual grouping theory}, we propose \textbf{SP-MoMamba}, a superpixel-driven mixture of state space experts designed for content-aware SR. Our core idea is to transform the traditional rigid scanning into a \textbf{semantic-level interaction} by treating superpixels as fundamental units. Specifically, we introduce the \textbf{Superpixel-driven State Space Model (SP-SSM)}, which compresses semantically homogeneous regions into high-order tokens to preserve global topological consistency. To address the conflict between fixed scanning scales and diverse semantic granularities, we develop the \textbf{Multi-Scale Superpixel Mixture of State Space Experts (MSS-MoE)}. This module utilizes a dynamic routing mechanism to adaptively assign scale-specific experts, effectively capturing multi-scale textures while reducing computational redundancy. Furthermore, to prevent the loss of high-frequency details during global abstraction, we introduce a \textbf{Local Spatial Modulation Expert (LSME)} to complement the global modeling, ensuring a precise reconstruction of sharp edges and fine structures. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that SP-MoMamba achieves superior reconstruction fidelity and a more favorable efficiency-performance trade-off compared to state-of-the-art efficient SR methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出超像素驱动的混合状态空间专家SP-MoMamba，实现内容感知的高效图像超分辨率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的基于状态空间模型（SSM）的超分辨率方法通常采用数据无关的刚性扫描，将二维图像重塑为固定网格上的1D序列，这不可避免地破坏了空间语义拓扑，并引入伪影。为解决这一问题，受Gestalt感知分组理论启发，需要一种能够保持全局拓扑一致性的内容感知扫描方式。同时，固定扫描尺度与多样语义粒度之间的矛盾也亟需解决，以实现多尺度纹理的有效捕获和计算冗余的降低。
light_analysis.method: 提出SP-MoMamba，核心包括：1）超像素驱动的状态空间模型（SP-SSM），将语义同质区域压缩为高阶标记，保持全局拓扑一致性；2）多尺度超像素混合状态空间专家（MSS-MoE），通过动态路由机制自适应分配尺度特定专家，捕获多尺度纹理并减少冗余；3）局部空间调制专家（LSME），弥补全局抽象中高频细节的损失，实现锐利边缘和精细结构的精确重建。
light_analysis.result: 在标准超分辨率基准测试上的大量实验表明，SP-MoMamba相比现有最先进的高效超分辨率方法，取得了更优越的重建保真度以及更有利的效率-性能权衡。具体性能指标未在摘要中明确，但定性描述了其优于对比方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: SP-MoMamba通过将刚性扫描转变为语义级交互，实现了内容感知的超分辨率，在保持全局拓扑一致性的同时有效捕获多尺度纹理和保留高频细节。该工作为SSM在图像恢复中的应用提供了新的视角，具有较好的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来工作可进一步探索超像素分割的优化和更高效的路由机制。

title: Causal Tongue-Tie: LLMs Can Encode Causal Direction, But Their Yes/No Outputs Fail to Express
abstract: We find a mismatch between what large language models encode about a causal question and what they answer. On anti-commonsense CLadder items, a fixed linear probe recovers the evidence-supported answer from the model's hidden state (accuracy approximately 0.97), while the spoken Yes/No reverts to the commonsense one (accuracy approximately 0.5). We call this approximately +0.5 gap Causal Tongue-Tie: a wrong Yes/No decomposes into two separable failure modes: no internal signal versus a signal the verbal interface cannot say. The implication cuts both ways for output-only causal benchmarks: a benchmark "correct" need not mean the model has understood, and a benchmark "wrong" need not mean it cannot. Sweeping claims about whether LLMs can do causal reasoning, drawn from a single accuracy number, deserve a second look.

light_analysis.overview: 发现大语言模型隐藏状态能正确编码因果方向，但口头输出却返回常识答案，存在约0.5的准确率差距，称为“因果舌结”。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有因果推理基准测试仅依赖模型输出的Yes/No答案来评估其因果理解能力，但实验发现模型隐藏状态与口头输出存在显著偏差，说明单一输出指标无法真实反映模型是否理解因果方向。这一现象挑战了基于输出准确率直接判断LLM因果推理能力的做法，需要更细致的分析。
light_analysis.method: 在反常识因果数据集CLadder上，使用线性探针从模型隐藏状态中解码证据支持的答案，并与模型生成的Yes/No口头输出对比。探针准确率约0.97，口头输出准确率仅约0.5，揭示隐藏状态包含因果方向信息但语言接口无法正确表达。
light_analysis.result: 线性探针从隐藏状态恢复正确答案的准确率约为0.97，而模型口头Yes/No输出的准确率约为0.5，两者差距约0.5。该差距表明模型内部编码了因果方向，但输出层未能反映，导致口头回答回归常识而非证据支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了LLM在因果推理中隐藏状态与口头输出不一致的现象，指出仅依赖输出准确率的基准测试可能高估或低估模型能力。未来研究需关注模型内部表征与语言接口的脱节，并设计更全面的评估方法。

title: Merge-Bench: Resolve Merge Conflicts with Large Language Models
abstract: This paper applies machine learning to the difficult and important task of version control merging. (1) We constructed a dataset, Merge-Bench, of 7938 real-world merge conflict hunks from 1439 GitHub repositories. The ground truth is the merge resolution that developers committed to the repository. Our dataset construction methodology is scalable to arbitrary amounts of data since no manual labeling is required. (2) We trained a model, LLMergeJ, to resolve merge conflicts in Java programs. Our approach uses Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), an online reinforcement learning method, to train a Large Language Model (LLM). (3) We performed two evaluations of the performance of LLMs on resolving merge conflicts. On Java programs, LLMergeJ with 14B parameters outperforms 3 commercial LLMs, trailing only Gemini 2.5 Pro. Across 11 programming languages, commercial LLM performance is largely stable from language to language. The best models correctly resolve less than 60% of merge conflicts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Merge-Bench数据集和LLMergeJ模型，利用GRPO强化学习训练大语言模型解决代码合并冲突。
light_analysis.motivation: 版本控制合并是软件工程中困难且重要的任务，现有方法依赖手动解决或规则匹配，效率低且易出错。自动化解码合并冲突可以显著提升开发效率，但缺乏大规模真实数据集和有效模型。本文旨在构建可扩展的数据集和训练高性能模型来填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 构建Merge-Bench数据集，包含7938个真实合并冲突块，来自1439个GitHub仓库，无需人工标注。训练LLMergeJ模型（14B参数），采用Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）在线强化学习方法，基于大语言模型进行微调，以生成正确的合并解决方案。
light_analysis.result: 在Java程序上，LLMergeJ优于3个商业LLM，性能仅次于Gemini 2.5 Pro。在11种编程语言上，商业LLM性能跨语言稳定，但最佳模型（包括商业模型）正确解决率低于60%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文展示了LLM在自动化解码合并冲突中的潜力，GRPO强化学习有效提升了模型性能。但当前最佳模型解决率不足60%，表明仍有较大改进空间。该数据集和模型为未来研究提供了基准和方法，有助于推动自动化版本控制工具的发展。

title: Optimal and Order-optimal Gated Priority-based Greedy Policies for Two-layer Multi-item Order Fulfillment
abstract: We study how an e-commerce firm should make real-time fulfillment decisions in a two-layer distribution network when multi-item customer orders arrive sequentially and future demand is unknown. The central managerial tension is whether to use scarce front distribution center (FDC) inventory to save current fulfillment cost or preserve that inventory for future orders that may be more valuable to serve locally. We formulate an adversarial online model with multiple FDCs, one regional distribution center (RDC), multi-unit multi-item orders, and item-specific and time-varying variable costs. Our theoretical objective is to characterize when simple, interpretable, and implementable fulfillment rules can perform nearly as well as an optimal clairvoyant planner. We develop a family of Gated Priority-based Greedy policies, derive competitive-ratio guarantees under both time-varying and time-invariant cost structures, and establish matching or near-matching lower bounds for any online algorithm. Numerical experiments show that the proposed policies perform strongly relative to generalized myopic and forecast-based benchmarks. The analysis yields managerial guidance on when local inventory should be protected, when splitting orders is worth the fixed-cost burden, and how the relative magnitudes of fixed and variable costs determine the value of more sophisticated optimization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出门控优先级贪婪策略，实现两层多商品订单履行的在线最优决策。
light_analysis.motivation: 电子商务企业面临实时订单履行决策，需在稀缺前端配送中心（FDC）库存的当前使用与未来高价值订单保留之间权衡。未来需求未知，现有短视或预测方法可能不是最优。研究旨在设计简单、可解释且性能接近最优（预知计划者）的在线策略。
light_analysis.method: 构建对抗性在线模型，包含多个FDC、一个RDC、多单位多商品订单及时变成本。提出Gated Priority-based Greedy策略家族，利用门控机制决定是否使用FDC库存或拆分订单。理论推导在时变和时不变成本结构下的竞争比保证，并建立任何在线算法的匹配或近匹配下界。
light_analysis.result: 数值实验显示，所提策略相对于广义短视和基于预测的基准表现强劲。理论表明简单策略能获得接近最优的竞争比，且下界证明策略在特定成本结构下是阶最优的。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究为管理提供指导：何时保护本地库存、拆分订单，以及固定与可变成本相对大小如何影响优化价值。证明了简单、可实施的贪婪策略能在对抗性环境下接近最优，具有实际应用价值。

title: Conformalised imprecise inference for robust extrapolation under limited data
abstract: Recent advances in uncertainty quantification increasingly emphasise the distinction between aleatory and epistemic uncertainty in machine learning, motivating the need for more unified frameworks. However, despite much progress in producing reliable predictions, existing methods often lack rigorous guarantees when generalising beyond the training domain. We propose a conformalised imprecise inference framework for robust extrapolation, which is model-agnostic and augments predictive models with imprecision and distance awareness. The proposed approach yields imprecise predictions (probability boxes) that remain valid under distributional shift, maintaining coverage while adaptively expanding uncertainty in extrapolation regimes. Experiments on synthetic and benchmark datasets demonstrate improved robustness and reliable coverage compared to standard probabilistic approaches, particularly under limited data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出保序不精确推理框架，在有限数据下实现鲁棒外推并保持分布偏移下的覆盖保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有不确定性量化方法虽区分认知与偶然不确定性，但在训练域外泛化时缺乏严格保证。需要一种统一框架，能在分布偏移下保持预测可靠性，尤其适用于有限数据场景。
light_analysis.method: 该方法为模型无关的保序不精确推理框架，通过引入不精确性和距离感知增强预测模型。输出概率盒形式的不精确预测，在分布偏移下自适应扩展不确定性，维持覆盖有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和基准数据集上，与标准概率方法相比，该方法在有限数据下显著提升了鲁棒性和覆盖可靠性，尤其在分布外推场景中表现优越。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为外推场景提供了有理论保证的不确定性量化方法，提升了模型在数据受限时的可靠性。未来可探索更复杂的不精确表示和适用性扩展。

title: The Quantization Benefits of Residual-Free Transformers
abstract: Large-scale transformer training and deployment are increasingly constrained by the transfer of activations, gradients, and optimizer states across accelerators. Low-bit quantization offers a natural remedy, but transformer activations are often heavy-tailed and outlier-dominated, making simple quantization highly lossy. We show that this difficulty is not only a property of the quantizer, but also of the architecture. Specifically, residual connections can drive transformer activations away from Gaussianity during training. Using controlled comparisons between residual and residual-free transformers, we demonstrate that this effect leads to substantially higher quantization error and accuracy degradation at low precision in residual models. We explain the phenomenon through an excess kurtosis analysis, showing that residual mixing can amplify non-Gaussianity, whereas dense mixing in residual-free contracts non-Gaussianity. We then show that residual-free transformers can be made trainable using orthogonal initialization, spectral or second-order optimization, and depth-aware scaling of attention temperature. In language tasks, while there is a small drop in full precision performance, these models retain near-Gaussian activations and exhibit significantly improved robustness to low-bit quantization. Our results identify an accuracy--compressibility trade-off in transformer design and motivate architecture-level approaches to quantization-friendly foundation models.

light_analysis.overview: 发现残差连接导致激活值非高斯性，加重低比特量化误差；提出无残差Transformer通过正交初始化等方法可训练，并显著提升量化鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模Transformer训练和部署受限于跨加速器传输激活、梯度和优化器状态。低比特量化可缓解，但Transformer激活值常呈重尾分布且受异常值主导，导致量化损失大。现有方法仅关注量化器，本文发现架构也是关键：残差连接使激活偏离高斯分布，增加量化误差。
light_analysis.method: 通过对比残差和无残差Transformer，分析残差混合放大非高斯性，而无残差中密集混合压缩非高斯性。使用正交初始化、谱优化或二阶优化、深度感知注意力温度缩放使无残差Transformer可训练。在语言任务上进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 残差模型在低精度下量化误差大、精度下降显著；无残差模型在全精度下略有性能下降，但激活保持近高斯分布，对低比特量化鲁棒性显著提升。具体数据未明确，但定性指出无残差模型量化误差大幅降低。
light_analysis.conclusion: 识别了Transformer设计中精度-可压缩性权衡，激励架构级方法设计量化友好的基础模型。学术价值：揭示残差连接对量化的影响；应用价值：推动低比特量化在Transformer中的部署。未来工作可探索更高效的无残差训练技术。

title: DyCoRM: Dynamic Criterion-Aware Reward Modeling for Text-to-Image Generation
abstract: With the continued advancement of text-to-image (T2I) generation, producing high-quality images is becoming increasingly attainable; consequently, user demands are shifting toward images that better satisfy their specific requirements. As reward models play an increasingly important role in assessing whether generated images align with user preference, this trend introduces an important challenge for reward modeling: rather than relying solely on static and general evaluation dimensions, reward models should account for the task-relevant and fine-grained criteria through which users assess whether generated images meet their specific requirements. To address this challenge, we propose DyCoRM, a dynamic, criterion-aware reward model that grounds task-relevant criteria and performs criterion-aware preference comparison. To support this setting, we construct DyCoDataset-20K, which provides dynamic criteria together with criterion-level annotations, and further derive DyCoBench-1K, a benchmark for systematically evaluating reward models under dynamic criteria. We further introduce DyCoPick, which applies criterion-aware reward modeling to selecting T2I images. Our contributions establish the first reward modeling framework for dynamic and fine-grained evaluation and practical application in T2I generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出动态标准感知的奖励模型DyCoRM，用于文本到图像生成中细粒度用户偏好对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着T2I生成质量提升，用户需求转向个性化，现有奖励模型依赖静态通用评价维度，无法捕捉用户特定细粒度标准，因此需要动态标准感知的奖励建模以满足用户具体需求。
light_analysis.method: 提出DyCoRM模型，通过grounding任务相关动态标准并进行标准级偏好比较；构建DyCoDataset-20K提供动态标准和标注，并导出DyCoBench-1K基准测试；引入DyCoPick用于T2I图像选择。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验数值，但通过构建数据集和基准，验证了动态标准感知奖励模型的有效性，并建立了首个评估框架。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了首个动态细粒度奖励建模框架，填补了T2I生成中个性化偏好对齐的空白，有望提升生成图像对用户特定需求的满足程度；未来可扩展至其他生成任务。

title: WBench: A Comprehensive Multi-turn Benchmark for Interactive Video World Model Evaluation
abstract: Interactive world models are advancing rapidly, yet existing benchmarks cover only part of the required competencies, leaving no unified standard for systematic evaluation. To fill this gap, we introduce WBench, a comprehensive multi-turn benchmark for interactive world model evaluation along five dimensions, namely video quality, setting adherence, interaction adherence, consistency, and physics compliance. WBench contains 289 test cases and 1,058 interaction turns, where each case specifies a world setting and a multi-turn interaction sequence, covering diverse scenes, styles, subjects, and both first- and third-person perspectives, together with four interaction types, including navigation, subject action, event editing, and perspective switching. For navigation, WBench unifies text, 6-DoF pose, and discrete-action control, enabling evaluation of models with different native input interfaces. Evaluation uses 22 automatic sub-metrics that combine specialist vision models with large multimodal models, and all metrics are validated against human judgments. Across 20 state-of-the-art models, we find that no single model performs strongly across all dimensions. We provide detailed diagnostic insights into the characteristic strengths, weaknesses, and open challenges of each model. Code and data are available at https://github.com/meituan-longcat/WBench.
comment: Technical report of WBench. Homepage: https://meituan-longcat.github.io/WBench/

light_analysis.overview: 提出WBench，一个多轮交互式世界模型基准，覆盖五个维度，提供统一评估标准。
light_analysis.motivation: 交互式世界模型快速发展，但现有基准仅覆盖部分能力，缺乏统一标准进行系统评估。WBench填补这一空白，提供全面的多轮基准，以衡量视频质量、设置遵循、交互遵循、一致性和物理遵从性。
light_analysis.method: WBench包含289个测试用例和1058轮交互，涵盖多种场景、风格、主体、视角及四种交互类型（导航、主体动作、事件编辑、视角切换）。使用22个自动子指标，结合专家视觉模型和大多模态模型，指标经人类判断验证。
light_analysis.result: 评估20个最先进模型，发现无单一模型在所有维度表现强劲。提供详细诊断，揭示各模型特征性优缺点及开放挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: WBench作为统一多轮基准，系统评估交互式世界模型，填补现有基准不足。推动模型发展，但局限性包括可能未覆盖所有交互类型或场景，未来可扩展更多维度。

title: Mitigating Provenance-Role Collapse in Long-Term Agents via Typed Memory Representation
abstract: Long-term memory is essential for persistent LLM agents, yet prevailing architectures store historical interactions as unstructured, flat text. This unconstrained storage induces provenance-role collapse, a critical failure mode where agents suffer from source-monitoring errors. To resolve this cognitive vulnerability at the architectural level, we propose MemIR, a typed Memory Intermediate Representation that operationalizes source monitoring as a structural constraint. MemIR writes long-term memory into grounded atoms that separate raw evidence, retrieval cues, and truth-bearing claims, with factual authorization restricted to supported claim atoms. It then applies multi-route atomic projection and provenance-scoped utilization to transform heterogeneous retrieval hits into claim-centered candidate bundles and a normalized fact interface for answer generation. Experiments on LoCoMo and BEAM-100K demonstrate that MemIR consistently outperforms existing memory baselines, especially on tasks requiring source tracking, temporal grounding, and aggregation of fragmented evidence.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MemIR，一种类型化的记忆中间表示，通过结构约束解决长期LLM代理中的来源-角色崩溃问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 长期记忆对持久化LLM代理至关重要，但现有架构以非结构化、扁平文本存储历史交互，导致来源-角色崩溃——代理出现来源监控错误。这一认知脆弱性在架构层面未被解决，需要一种约束机制来分离原始证据、检索线索和真实性声明。
light_analysis.method: MemIR将长期记忆写入接地原子，分离原始证据、检索线索和真实性声明，将事实授权限制为支持的声明原子。通过多路径原子投影和来源限定利用，将异构检索结果转换为以声明为中心的候选包，并归一化为事实接口用于答案生成。
light_analysis.result: 在LoCoMo和BEAM-100K数据集上，MemIR持续优于现有记忆基线，尤其是在需要源跟踪、时间定位和碎片证据聚合的任务上表现显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: MemIR通过架构级结构约束有效缓解了来源-角色崩溃，提升了长期代理的记忆可靠性。其学术价值在于将认知科学中的源监控概念引入LLM记忆设计，实际应用价值在于增强长周期交互任务的性能。未来可扩展至更复杂的记忆与推理场景。

title: UNATE: UNsupervised ATomic Embedding for crystal structures property prediction
abstract: Accurately predicting crystal properties is critical for accelerating materials discovery, but it is often limited by scarce labeled data and costly theoretical calculations. To alleviate this, we propose UNATE (Unsupervised Atomic Embedding), a framework that leverages structural information extracted from unlabeled crystal structures. UNATE integrates an unsupervised denoising autoencoder with self-supervised contrastive learning to learn robust atomic representations, which are then used as input features for downstream property prediction. Experimental results show that replacing raw atomic numbers with UNATE-pretrained node embeddings yields a 2.7\% improvement over the full-data baseline. Notably, the benefits become more pronounced in scenarios with limited labeled data, reaching improvements of up to 10\% when only 25\% of the labeled data is used.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UNATE，一种无监督原子嵌入框架，利用未标记晶体结构学习原子表示，提升属性预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 晶体属性预测对加速材料发现至关重要，但受限于标记数据稀缺和理论计算成本高昂。现有方法多依赖原始原子数作为输入特征，未能充分利用未标记晶体的结构信息，导致预测性能受限。因此，需要一种能够从大量未标记数据中学习有效原子表示的方法，以缓解数据稀缺问题。
light_analysis.method: UNATE框架结合无监督去噪自编码器和自监督对比学习，从未标记晶体结构中学习鲁棒的原子嵌入。首先通过去噪自编码器重建带噪声的晶体图，然后使用对比学习增强表示判别性，最终得到原子级嵌入作为下游任务输入特征。该方法无需任何标签，仅利用结构信息。
light_analysis.result: 在晶体属性预测任务上，使用UNATE预训练嵌入替代原始原子数，在全数据场景下获得2.7%的改进；在仅使用25%标记数据的低资源场景中，改进幅度高达10%。结果表明UNATE在数据稀缺时优势更明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: UNATE通过无监督方式学习原子嵌入，有效提升了晶体属性预测准确性，尤其在标记数据有限时表现突出。该框架降低了材料发现中对昂贵理论计算的依赖，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的图结构或扩展到其他材料属性预测。

title: When Self-Belief Misleads: Active Label Acquisition for Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable advancements in reasoning capabilities empowered by Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR). Nonetheless, RLVR intrinsically relies on ground-truth labels for reward computation, the acquisition of which is often prohibitively expensive in real-world scenarios. While unsupervised RLVR paradigms attempt to circumvent this by training on pseudo-labels, they are notoriously susceptible to training collapse. Moreover, different samples often exhibit varying annotation values. In this paper, we propose Reinforcement Learning with Active Verifiable Rewards (RLAVR), which actively acquires ground-truth labels for a small set of selected samples and integrates them with pseudo-labels, thereby stabilizing training dynamics and improving performance under limited annotation budgets. To identify valuable samples, we propose the Corrective Advantage Gap (CAG) metric and analyze the sample-level supervision value. Building on this, we introduce Correction-Aware Reliability Estimation for RLAVR (CARE), which translates the oracle CAG criterion into a practical pre-query acquisition policy to substantially improve training stability. Extensive experiments across diverse domains, model families, and model scales demonstrate the effectiveness and generality of our approach. Our code is available at https://github.com/Lumina04/CARE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RLAVR方法，主动获取少量样本的真实标签以稳定强化学习训练，并设计CAG指标和CARE策略实现高效标签获取。
light_analysis.motivation: 在基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）中，真实标签获取成本高昂，而使用伪标签的无监督方法易导致训练崩溃。现有方法未考虑不同样本的标注价值差异，难以在有限预算下平衡成本与性能。因此，需要一种主动标签获取策略，通过小样本真实标签与伪标签结合，稳定训练并提升效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出RLAVR框架，核心包括：1）Corrective Advantage Gap (CAG)指标，量化样本的监督价值；2）Correction-Aware Reliability Estimation (CARE)策略，将CAG转化为预查询获取策略，优先选择高价值样本。方法结合真实标签和伪标签进行奖励计算，在标注预算受限时稳定强化学习训练，适用于多种模型和领域。
light_analysis.result: 在多个领域、模型家族和规模上的实验表明，RLAVR显著优于基线方法，有效提升训练稳定性并降低标注成本。具体性能提升指标摘要未明确说明，但强调方法的有效性和通用性，代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: RLAVR通过主动获取关键样本的真实标签，解决了RLVR中标签成本高和伪标签训练不稳定的问题。该工作为强化学习在真实场景中的低标注成本应用提供了可行方案，未来可探索更细粒度的样本价值估计或扩展到更多任务。

title: MuNet: A Mutualistic Network for Joint 3D Human Mesh Recovery and 3D Clothed Human Reconstruction from Single Images
abstract: 3D human mesh recovery and 3D clothed human reconstruction are inherently related, yet they have long been studied in isolation, thereby overlooking the potential gains of joint optimization. To overcome this limitation, we propose to address these two tasks within a unified framework, which allows their mutual dependencies to be effectively exploited. Building on this idea, we propose MuNet, a mutualistic network for joint 3D human mesh recovery and 3D clothed human reconstruction from single images. First, we adopt 2-manifold graphs as a unified representation for all 3D models, enabling consistent modeling across 3D human mesh recovery and clothed human reconstruction. Second, we design an end-to-end graph convolutional network that progressively deforms an initial graph into a 3D human mesh and refines it into a detailed 3D clothed human model. Third, we introduce a mutualistic mechanism that allows reciprocal interaction between the two tasks {during training}, where 3D human mesh recovery provides guidance for 3D clothed human reconstruction, and reconstruction feedback refines the 3D human mesh recovery. We extensively evaluate MuNet on six benchmark datasets for 3D human mesh recovery and 3D clothed human reconstruction, including Human3.6M, 3DPW, MPI-INF-3DHP, THuman2.0, CAPE, and RenderPeople. Experimental results demonstrate that MuNet achieves state-of-the-art performance on both tasks across all datasets. The code of MuNet is released for research purposes at https://github.com/starVisionTeam/MuNet.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MuNet互惠网络，首次将3D人体网格恢复与穿衣人体重建统一优化，利用任务间的双向依赖提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D人体网格恢复和穿衣人体重建本质相关，但现有研究长期独立进行，忽视了联合优化的潜力。这种孤立处理导致无法充分利用二者间的互补信息，限制了各自精度的进一步提升。本文旨在通过统一框架，让两项任务相互促进，从而同时提升恢复与重建的质量。
light_analysis.method: 采用2-流形图作为统一表示，保障不同任务模型的一致性。设计端到端图卷积网络，从初始图逐步变形为人体网格，再细化得到穿衣人体模型。引入互惠机制：训练中人体网格恢复指导穿衣重建，而穿衣重建的反馈则优化网格恢复，实现双向交互。在多数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在Human3.6M、3DPW、MPI-INF-3DHP、THuman2.0、CAPE和RenderPeople六个数据集上，MuNet在3D人体网格恢复和穿衣人体重建两项任务中均达到最先进性能，具体指标未在摘要中详述，但整体超越现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: MuNet通过统一框架和互惠机制，有效挖掘了任务间的相互依赖性，实现了两项任务性能的共同提升。开源代码促进了学术研究。该工作为相关任务的联合优化提供了新思路，未来可扩展至更多人体建模任务。

title: SAM3-Assisted Training of Lightweight YOLO Models for Precision Pig Farming
abstract: Deep learning-based object detection has revolutionized Precision Livestock Farming (PLF), yet a critical barrier remains: high-performance Foundation Models (such as SAM 3) are too computationally intensive for edge deployment, while lightweight models (like YOLO) require prohibitive manual annotation efforts. This work proposes a fully automated knowledge distillation pipeline that leverages the Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM 3) to generate zero-shot pseudo-labels for training efficient YOLOv8 detectors. By treating SAM 3 as an offline auto-annotator, we eliminate the manual labeling bottleneck, producing models capable of real-time inference on resource-constrained hardware. We systematically evaluate this approach on the PigLife dataset, comparing SAM 3-supervised models against human-annotated baselines. Results demonstrate that a SAM 3-trained YOLOv8m achieves a mean Average Precision (mAP) of 79.4% without human intervention, while reducing inference latency by approximately 200$\times$ compared to the teacher model. Furthermore, stratified analysis reveals that in low-occlusion scenarios, the automated pipeline achieves detection rates comparable to human benchmarks ($AP_{50} > 99\%$). These findings indicate that foundation models can serve as effective, zero-annotation-cost supervisors, enabling scalable edge computing solutions for smart agriculture.
comment: Accepted for publication at the IEEE Sensors Applications Symposium (SAS 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 利用SAM3零样本生成伪标签训练轻量级YOLOv8检测器的自动化知识蒸馏流水线，消除人工标注瓶颈，实现边缘实时推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 精准畜牧业中，高性能基础模型（如SAM3）计算开销大，无法边缘部署；轻量模型（如YOLO）则依赖大量人工标注，成本高昂。现有方法难以兼顾精度与效率，亟需一种零标注成本的自动化训练方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出全自动知识蒸馏流水线：以SAM3作为离线自动标注器，对无标签图像生成零样本伪标签，用于训练YOLOv8检测器。在PigLife数据集上，比较SAM3监督模型与人工标注基线。无需人工干预，实现教师-学生蒸馏，显著降低标注成本。
light_analysis.result: SAM3训练的YOLOv8m在无人工标注下达到mAP 79.4%，推理延迟比教师模型降低约200倍。低遮挡场景中，自动化管线与人工基准持平（AP50>99%），验证了零标注监督的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的自动化流水线消除了手动标注瓶颈，使轻量模型具备实时推理能力，为智慧农业提供可扩展的边缘计算方案。未来可拓展至其他畜牧业检测任务，进一步验证其泛化性。

title: From Accounting to Coordination: A Virtual Water-Aware Electricity-Computation-Water Nexus Framework for Data Center Dispatch
abstract: The expansion of data centers (DCs) drives a sustained increase in electricity demand and associated water withdrawals at generation sites. These withdrawals occur at generation sites and are virtually allocated to demand based on network power flows. Consequently, the actual water footprint of a specific load varies dynamically with generation dispatch and network conditions. Existing approaches typically rely on static statistical accounting to quantify these water footprints. However, such static methods fail to capture how dispatch optimization and workload relocation dynamically affect water withdrawals. As a result, static statistical accounting approaches remain decoupled from the optimization process, rendering them incapable of guiding workload relocation or power dispatch to mitigate water stress. To address this limitation, this paper develops an operational electricity-computation-water (ECW) nexus framework that internalizes virtual water impacts directly into power system dispatch. The framework represents dispatch optimization as a differentiable optimization layer embedded within a deep learning architecture, enabling efficient end-to-end learning of coordination policies while preserving operational feasibility. Combined with fixed-point coordination, the framework enforces consistency between virtual water attribution and physical generation-side withdrawals. Case studies on the IEEE 30-bus and 118-bus test systems demonstrate reliable convergence, exact power-water consistency, and reductions of approximately 3-5% in generation-related freshwater withdrawals under water-constrained conditions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个虚拟水感知的电-算-水协同框架，将虚拟水影响内化到电力系统调度中，实现数据中心调度的动态优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据中心扩张导致电力需求和发电侧取水增加，但现有静态统计方法无法捕捉调度优化和负载迁移对虚拟水足迹的动态影响，与优化过程脱节，不能有效指导缓解水压力的调度决策。因此需要一种能将虚拟水影响直接整合到运营调度中的新方法。
light_analysis.method: 开发了一个运营级电-算-水（ECW）协同框架，通过将调度优化表示为深度学习中的可微优化层，实现端到端协调策略学习，同时保持运营可行性。结合不动点协调机制，保证虚拟水归因与物理发电侧取水的一致性。在IEEE 30和118母线系统上进行案例研究。
light_analysis.result: 在IEEE 30母线和118母线测试系统上，该框架展示了可靠的收敛性和精确的功率-水一致性。在水约束条件下，相较于基线方法，发电相关淡水取水量减少了约3-5%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文提出了一个将虚拟水影响直接整合到数据中心电力调度中的可操作框架，弥补了静态统计方法与优化过程的脱节。具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力，可用于指导水资源紧张地区的数据中心调度。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的电力-水务耦合系统。

title: TIAR: Trajectory-Informed Advantage Reweighting for LLM Abstention Learning
abstract: This paper investigates large language model (LLM) abstention learning, specifically using ternary reward, which incentivize truthfulness in large language models. This paper extends that idea by moving from a ternary reward to a Trajectory-Informed advantage reweighting, dynamically re-weights the abstention reward during Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) training. The objective of this work focuses on abstention learning instead of improving truthfulness, serving as an exploration into hallucination reduction. The novelty of this paper lies in methodological innovation, advantage re-weighting, and benchmark selection. Leveraging GRPO's multiple trajectories as a natural abstention signal, this method uses a reward signal to explore knowledge boundaries and encourage consistency. By demonstrating that trajectories can be used as a confidence indicator of the policy relative to the query, they are then used to dynamically calculate the abstention advantage. AbstentionBench is used as the evaluation benchmark, as this work aims to contribute to the field of abstention learning. All datasets on the benchmark were tested against this method and various baselines. Empirical results demonstrate that TIAR achieves state-of-the-art abstention F1 scores across five of six evaluation categories, outperforming the static ternary baseline on 17 of 31 benchmark datasets while fully preserving baseline accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轨迹信息优势重加权方法（TIAR），在大语言模型中动态调整拒绝回答奖励，提升拒绝学习性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大语言模型拒绝学习（abstention learning）方法通常使用静态三元奖励，缺乏对模型知识边界的动态探索。本研究旨在通过动态重加权拒绝奖励，在不损害准确性的前提下，减少幻觉并提升模型在不确定问题上的拒绝能力，从而增强可信度。
light_analysis.method: 基于Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）框架，利用多条轨迹作为自然拒绝信号，动态计算拒绝优势（abstention advantage）。具体而言，将轨迹作为模型对查询置信度的指标，据此重加权奖励，探索知识边界并鼓励一致性。在AbstentionBench基准上，对31个数据集进行了评估。
light_analysis.result: TIAR在六个评估类别中的五个上取得了最优拒绝F1分数，在31个基准数据集中的17个上优于静态三元基线方法，同时完全保留了基线的准确率，证实了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TIAR通过动态奖励重加权显著提升了LLM拒绝学习能力，在减少幻觉的同时保持了准确性，为构建更可靠的LLM提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的轨迹利用策略及跨模型泛化能力。

title: Geometric Evolution Maps: Extracting Stable Concept Probes from Transformer Residual Streams
abstract: Concept probes extracted from transformer residual streams are only as reliable as the layer from which they are extracted. The common practice of probing at a fixed late layer or at the peak of a separation score function ignores a fundamental structural feature: concept representations undergo substantial directional rotation during their assembly phase, and do not settle into a stable direction until a characteristic handoff layer after the primary Concept Allocation Zone (CAZ). We introduce Geometric Evolution Maps (GEMs), which track the full directional trajectory of a concept through residual stream activations, identify the handoff layer where rotation ceases, and extract the settled probe direction from that layer. Across 23 architectures spanning 70M to 14B parameters and 17 concept types, the entry-to-exit cosine similarity within CAZs has a mean of 0.233, showing that probe direction at CAZ entry does not reliably predict probe direction at exit. Ablation experiments across 391 concept x model pairs (23 models x 17 concepts) show that GEM-extracted probes are at least as precise as peak-layer probes in 268/391 trials (68.5%), and strictly outperform in 259/391 (66.2%). The architecture split is pronounced: MHA models favour the handoff in 173/221 trials (78.3%); GQA models favour the handoff in only 56/119 trials (47.1%). Model-level Wilcoxon: W=214, N=23, p=0.010 (one-sided). An adaptive ablation width rule targets the 79/391 near-final-layer cases: it improves probe quality in 60/79 triggered cases (75.9%), mean gain +7.44pp. A direction-specificity control confirms the ablation effect is concept-direction specific: median 377x suppression rate versus random-direction ablation (99.1% of concept directions beat all 10 random seeds). Reference implementation: rosetta_tools v1.3.1 (doi:10.5281/zenodo.20361433).
comment: 24 pages, 3 figures. Reference implementation: rosetta_tools v1.3.1 (doi:10.5281/zenodo.20361433)

light_analysis.overview: 提出几何演化图谱（GEMs），追踪残差流中概念表示的方向轨迹，识别概念稳定方向的手拉层，提升探针提取的可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 从Transformer残差流中提取概念探针的常见做法（在固定层或分离度峰值层探测）忽略了概念表示在组装阶段经历显著方向旋转这一关键特征，导致探针方向不可靠。本文旨在解决如何准确捕捉概念稳定方向的问题，通过追踪全方向轨迹来改善探针质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出几何演化图谱（GEMs），通过追踪残差流中概念从分配到出口的完整方向轨迹，识别方向旋转停止的“手拉层”，并从该层提取稳定的探针方向。在23种架构（70M至14B参数）和17种概念类型上实验，使用余弦相似度度量方向变化，并通过消融实验验证探针质量。
light_analysis.result: 在391个概念×模型对中，GEM探针在68.5%情况下优于或等于峰值层探针，66.2%严格更优。架构差异显著：MHA模型在78.3%中支持手拉层，GQA模型仅47.1%。自适应消融规则在触发案例中75.9%提升探针质量，平均增益7.44个百分点。方向特异性控制显示中位数377倍抑制率。
light_analysis.conclusion: GEMs通过追踪概念方向轨迹并提取稳定方向的探针，显著提升了探针可靠性，尤其在MHA架构中。该方法具有通用性，可应用于不同规模模型和多种概念。未来可探索自适应层选择策略的进一步优化。

title: On the Limits of Model Merging for Multilinguality in Pre-Training
abstract: Endowing models with consistent multilingual performance can be achieved by mixing pre-training data, or post-training approaches such as language-specific model merging. In this work, we test whether merging can be applied to monolingually pre-trained models. We conduct a controlled study on the efficacy of mixed, merged, and monolingual pre-training setups. We find that while monolingual pre-training results in strong in-language performance, merging any combination of monolingual models leads to performance collapse due to interference. Our analysis suggests representational similarity is a prerequisite for model merging. We therefore conclude that the flexibility of merging in fine-tuning does not extend trivially to language-specific pre-training.

light_analysis.overview: 论文通过控制实验发现，将单语言预训练模型直接合并会导致多语言性能崩溃，原因是表示相似性不足，表明模型合并在预训练阶段不适用。
light_analysis.motivation: 多语言模型可通过混合预训练数据或后训练方法（如语言特定模型合并）实现。但现有研究未深入探讨单语言预训练模型能否通过合并获得多语言能力，且合并可能带来干扰和性能下降。本文旨在系统测试合并方法的有效性，揭示其适用条件。
light_analysis.method: 采用控制实验设计，对比混合预训练、合并预训练和单语言预训练三种设置。使用多个单语言模型进行不同组合的合并，评估多语言性能。通过分析表示相似性，发现干扰导致性能崩塌。
light_analysis.result: 单语言预训练模型在各自语言上表现强劲，但合并任意组合均导致多语言性能显著下降。这表明模型合并在预训练阶段无法有效实现多语言能力，与混合预训练形成鲜明对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 模型合并在微调中的灵活性无法直接迁移到语言特定预训练中。表示相似性是合并的前提条件，为多语言模型构建提供了重要指导，未来需探索更有效的多语言预训练方法。

title: MuCRASP: Multimodal Chain-of-thought Reasoning aware Structured Pruning
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) increasingly rely on chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning to solve complex multimodal tasks, but their large parameter sizes make deployment expensive. Structured pruning offers a natural solution; however, existing methods fail to preserve CoT reasoning accuracy in VLMs. We identify two key reasons: (1) CoT consistency depends on sparse transition points (pivot tokens) in the generation trajectory, while existing pruning methods are CoT-agnostic; and (2) pruning methods designed for unimodal LLMs do not account for activation-distribution differences across visual and textual modalities. Motivated by these observations, we propose MuCRASP, a structured pruning framework that targets reasoning-critical components while preserving cross-modal alignment and accounting for layer-wise sensitivity under a global parameter budget. Experiments on four VLMs across three reasoning benchmarks show that MuCRASP consistently preserves reasoning quality under increasing compression. At 30% pruning on Qwen2.5-VL-7B, MuCRASP achieves an LLM-as-a-Judge score of 8.87 versus 7.32 for the strongest baseline on physical reasoning tasks. Furthermore, MuCRASP maintains high reasoning consistency up to 50% pruning, significantly outperforming prior pruning approaches while exhibiting lower perplexity degradation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MuCRASP框架，首次针对多模态链式推理的视觉-语言模型进行结构化剪枝，同时保持跨模态对齐和推理质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉-语言模型依赖链式推理解决复杂多模态任务，但大规模参数导致部署成本高。现有结构化剪枝方法无法保持链式推理准确性，原因在于：1) 链式推理一致性依赖于生成轨迹中的稀疏转折点（枢轴标记），现有剪枝方法忽略该特性；2) 针对单模态大语言模型设计的剪枝方法未考虑视觉和文本模态间激活分布的差异。因此需要一种能保留推理关键组件并保持跨模态对齐的剪枝方法。
light_analysis.method: MuCRASP是一种结构化剪枝框架，针对推理关键组件进行剪枝，同时保持跨模态对齐并考虑层间敏感性，在全局参数预算下优化剪枝。具体技术细节摘要未明确说明，但框架核心是通过识别链式推理中的枢轴标记和模态差异，优先保留对推理至关重要的结构。
light_analysis.result: 在四种视觉-语言模型和三个推理基准上，MuCRASP在压缩率增加时始终保持推理质量。以Qwen2.5-VL-7B模型在30%剪枝率时为例，在物理推理任务上，MuCRASP的LLM-as-a-Judge评分达8.87，而最强基线仅7.32。高达50%剪枝率时仍保持高推理一致性，困惑度退化明显低于先前剪枝方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: MuCRASP实现了视觉-语言模型中链式推理感知的结构化剪枝，在显著压缩模型的同时保持推理质量，具有高部署价值。其创新在于识别了剪枝对链式推理的破坏机制，并针对多模态特性优化。未来可探索更细粒度的关键token识别和更高效的剪枝策略。

title: Context-Instrumental Data Distillation for Kubernetes Manifest Generation: Method and Experimental Evaluation
abstract: This paper examines the specialization of Small Language Models (SLMs) with up to 4 billion parameters for generating artifacts in domain-specific languages (DSL). Kubernetes manifests are chosen as the target domain. We propose the context-instrumental data distillation method: the source corpus is formed through synthetic generation and, in an extended scheme, through reverse instruction generation from real Kubernetes YAML files, with pairs included in training only upon passing external validators and matching the domain context model. Unlike classical KL-divergence knowledge distillation, the baseline implementation reduces to supervised fine-tuning on instrumentally verified examples. The experimental section presents a pilot implementation under resource-constrained conditions: the DeepSeek-V4 Flash API serves as the teacher for synthetic generation, while Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B-Instruct is fine-tuned via LoRA on CPU. On the K8s-Distill-Pilot corpus (train_1200, validation_100, test_200), we achieved full-pass@1 = 91.5% (183/200) with a stricter prompt formulation and max_new_tokens=768. The key empirical finding is that for Kubernetes YAML, result quality in the pilot depended more on strict output format requirements than on simply increasing the number of training examples.

light_analysis.overview: 提出上下文-工具数据蒸馏方法，用于小语言模型生成Kubernetes清单，证明格式约束比数据量更重要。
light_analysis.motivation: Kubernetes清单的自动生成需要领域特定语言的专业知识，现有方法依赖大语言模型或知识蒸馏，但资源受限场景下难以部署。小语言模型虽有潜力，但缺乏有效的数据蒸馏策略来提升其生成DSL产物的能力。本文旨在通过结合合成生成与反向指令生成，并引入外部验证器筛选训练样本，解决小模型在K8s清单生成任务上的数据稀缺与质量难题。
light_analysis.method: 提出上下文-工具数据蒸馏方法：源语料通过合成生成（教师模型DeepSeek-V4 Flash API）和反向指令生成（从真实YAML文件反推指令）构建，仅将通过外部验证器且符合领域上下文模型的样本对加入训练。基线实现简化为在经工具验证的样例上进行有监督微调，而非经典KL散度蒸馏。采用Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B-Instruct模型，通过LoRA在CPU上微调，K8s-Distill-Pilot语料含1200训练、100验证、200测试样本。
light_analysis.result: 在K8s-Distill-Pilot测试集上，采用更严格的提示格式和max_new_tokens=768时，full-pass@1达到91.5%（183/200）。关键发现：对于K8s YAML生成，输出格式的严格约束对结果质量的影响远超增加训练样例数量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文验证了资源受限下通过上下文-工具数据蒸馏使小语言模型有效生成K8s清单的可行性，证明格式严格性比样本量更重要。该方法降低了DSL生成任务对计算资源的需求，但需注意其依赖性：合成数据质量受限于教师模型，且当前实验规模较小。未来可探索更大规模语料与更复杂的验证器设计。

title: Clarify, Abstain or Answer? Strategising in Conversation with Belief-Augmented Generation
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) define a distribution over text, which can be viewed as a probabilistic representation of uncertainty: sampling K responses yields a belief state - responses a model deems plausible. Existing work exploits this representation for narrow tasks like either decoding or selective prediction, and often requires manual interventions, not controlling generation directly. We propose Belief-Augmented Generation (BAG): grounding LLMs in their own belief state via the prompt and letting them reason over these K samples to decide on a conversational strategy: answer, clarify, or abstain. In a multi-turn ambiguous QA setting, we find that LLMs by default rarely clarify or abstain, ignoring uncertainty about the input or facts. BAG improves QA accuracy across six models and yields strategy decisions more faithful to the belief state than prompt-only baselines. Disentangling when to clarify from when to abstain, however, remains challenging.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Belief-Augmented Generation (BAG)，通过将LLM基于自身采样的信念状态注入提示，让模型自主选择回答、澄清或弃权策略，提升对话QA准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型（LLMs）生成的文本分布可视为不确定性概率表示，但现有工作仅将其用于解码或选择性预测等狭窄任务，且常需人工干预，无法直接控制生成。在多轮歧义问答场景中，LLM默认很少澄清或弃权，忽略输入或事实的不确定性。因此，需要一种方法让模型主动感知不确定性并选择合适的对话策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出信念增强生成（BAG），通过从LLM中采样K个响应形成信念状态，将这一状态作为额外上下文注入提示中，让模型基于此推理并决定策略：回答、澄清或弃权。该方法无需额外训练，仅通过提示工程实现，适用于任意LLM。在Multi-turn ambiguous QA设置中，使用多个模型进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在六种不同LLM上，BAG相比仅使用提示的基线方法，显著提升了QA准确率。同时，BAG生成的策略决策（回答、澄清或弃权）更忠实于模型自身的信念状态，即不确定性水平。然而，区分何时应澄清与何时应弃权仍然具有挑战性，表明该方向需进一步研究。
light_analysis.conclusion: BAG提供了一种通用方法，使LLM能够主动管理不确定性并自适应调整对话策略，提升了多轮歧义问答的准确性。其创新在于利用模型自身采样结果作为信念状态，并通过提示驱动策略选择。未来工作可聚焦于更好地区分澄清与弃权策略，或将BAG扩展到更多实际对话场景。

title: [CLS] is Not Enough: Multi-Label Recognition via Patch-Level Inference and Adaptive Aggregation
abstract: Vision-Language Models such as CLIP exhibit strong zero-shot recognition capability by aligning images with textual concepts, yet they often underperform on multi-label recognition where multiple objects co-exist. A key bottleneck is that the [CLS] token, as a single global visual representation, is insufficient to faithfully encode diverse targets with varying scales, contexts, and co-occurrence patterns. To address this limitation, we present a new multi-label image recognition framework, termed PIAA, which formulates prediction as Patch-level Inference followed by Adaptive Aggregation. Specifically, we first enhance patch-wise predictions from two complementary perspectives: (i) mitigating semantic entanglement in the visual encoder to obtain more discriminative patch representations, and (ii) learning an unsupervised visual classifier to narrow the vision-language modality gap. We then introduce an adaptive aggregation module that consolidates patch-level scores into the final multi-label prediction. Notably, the entire pipeline is fully training-free, requiring no gradient updates or parameter fine-tuning. Experiments show that our method achieves strong improvements with minimal extra computation, exceeding a 6% mAP gain on the challenging NUS-WIDE benchmark over representative baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/akang-wang/PIAA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需训练的补丁级推理与自适应聚合框架PIAA，提升CLIP在多标签识别中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 多标签图像识别中，多个目标共存且尺度、上下文各异，传统CLIP模型使用[CLS]全局表征难以忠实编码多样目标。现有方法存在语义纠缠和模态差异问题，且通常需要微调，计算成本高。因此需要一种无需训练的、能充分利用补丁级信息的框架来解决这一瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 提出PIAA框架，包括两步：1）补丁级推理增强，通过缓解视觉编码器中的语义纠缠以获得更具判别性的补丁表示，并学习无监督视觉分类器以缩小视觉-语言模态差距；2）自适应聚合模块，将补丁级分数整合为最终多标签预测。整个流程无需梯度更新或参数微调，即插即用。
light_analysis.result: 在NUS-WIDE基准上，PIAA相较于代表性基线方法获得超过6%的mAP提升，仅需极少额外计算。实验表明该方法在多种设置下均实现强性能改进，验证了无需训练的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出PIAA，通过补丁级推理和自适应聚合解决了CLIP在多标签识别中的不足。该方法无需训练即可大幅提升性能，具有高实用价值。未来可探索更高效的补丁选择策略或跨数据集泛化能力。

title: Visual-Redundancy-Controlled Parallel Decoding for Diffusion-Based Multimodal Large Language Models
abstract: Diffusion-based multimodal large language models (dMLLMs) decode by iteratively predicting tokens at multiple masked positions in parallel. This turns each decoding step into a position-selection problem: the model must choose not only which predictions are reliable in isolation, but also which positions should be committed together as context for later decoding steps. Existing confidence-based decoding ranks masked positions independently and commits the top-K positions, largely ignoring whether the committed tokens provide complementary visual grounding. We identify a step-level limitation of this strategy in multimodal settings: high-confidence tokens selected in the same step can rely on overlapping visual grounding, introducing visual redundancy among the committed tokens and leaving less complementary visual grounding available for later decoding. To quantify this effect, we introduce the Visual Redundancy Index (VRI), which measures visual grounding overlap among tokens committed in parallel. To control this redundancy during decoding, we propose Visual-Redundancy-Controlled Decoding (VRCD), a training-free inference-time decoding method that uses token-to-image attention to prioritize visually complementary positions. Across diverse multimodal benchmarks, VRCD reduces visual redundancy and remaining-position entropy with modest runtime overhead. In longer decoding experiments, it also achieves relative accuracy gains of up to 18.8% on M^3CoT and 6.9% on MMBench over confidence-based decoding. Code will be released at https://github.com/infiniteYuanyl/VRCD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VRCD，一种无训练推理时解码方法，通过视觉冗余指数(VRI)控制扩散多模态大模型并行解码中的视觉冗余，提升解码质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散多模态大模型(dMLLMs)并行解码时，现有置信度解码独立选择高置信度token，忽略token间的视觉冗余，导致提交的token依赖重叠的视觉基础，降低了后续解码可用的互补视觉信息。这种冗余在多模态场景尤为突出，限制了解码准确性和效率。需要量化并控制视觉冗余以优化并行解码。
light_analysis.method: 提出Visual Redundancy Index (VRI)量化并行提交token的视觉基础重叠程度。基于VRI提出Visual-Redundancy-Controlled Decoding (VRCD)，一种无训练推理时解码方法。利用token-to-image注意力，优先选择视觉互补的token位置进行提交，从而降低视觉冗余。VRCD可直接应用于现有dMLLMs，无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: VRCD在多个多模态基准上降低了视觉冗余和剩余位置熵，运行时开销小。在长解码实验中，相比基于置信度的解码，VRCD在M^3CoT上获得18.8%的相对准确率提升，在MMBench上提升6.9%。实验验证了VRCD的有效性和效率优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: VRCD通过控制视觉冗余，有效提升了扩散多模态大模型并行解码的准确率，且无需训练即可即插即用。该工作为多模态解码提供了新视角，具有较高实用价值。未来可探索动态调整冗余控制策略或结合其他解码优化方法。

title: On Reliability of Efficient Membership Inference Vulnerability Evaluation
abstract: Membership inference attacks (MIAs) are popular methods for empirically assessing the leakage of sensitive information in the training data through models or statistics learned from the data. The MIA vulnerability is often evaluated through false positive rate (FPR) and true positive rate (TPR) of a binary classifier that tries to predict whether a particular sample was in the training data. However, in order to reliably estimate the TPR especially for low FPR values, a lot of observations are needed, which in case of MIA translates to many target models, leading to large computational cost. To avoid excessive compute requirements, the MIA scores are often averaged over multiple individuals and multiple targeted models. We demonstrate two key weaknesses in this efficient MIA evaluation pipeline. First, we show that evaluating the TPR based on MIA scores concatenated across multiple individuals, commonly used to study vulnerabilities in the very low FPR regime, is not calibrated across the per-sample FPRs. This makes it unreliable as a tool for auditing differential privacy. To solve this, we propose a post-processing method to effectively calibrate the FPR across different samples.
