Notably, we demonstrate strong zero-shot generalization: For example, heuristics trained on Blocksworld instances with fewer than 30 blocks successfully solve instances with 488 blocks without search.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自我改进的WA*学习框架，结合关系图神经网络值启发式，实现规划问题中的强零样本泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 组合泛化是深度强化学习的核心挑战，经典规划通过显式关系描述提供简单但有挑战的测试环境。在稀疏奖励域，标准RL探索无效，学习方法常依赖专家演示或从目标状态随机游走，而规划器如A*可从零开始解决问题。现有方法泛化能力不足，需要一种能自我改进且无需搜索即可解决新实例的启发式方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出自我改进的WA*学习框架，使用关系图神经网络表示值启发式。启发式指导WA*搜索，搜索过程产生的数据通过Q学习更新启发式，形成自我改进循环。该启发式可充当通用策略，甚至无需搜索即可解决新实例，避免了其他DRL方法对专家演示或目标状态知识的依赖。
light_analysis.result: 在Sokoban、PushWorld、The Witness和2023国际规划竞赛基准测试中，该方法展现了强零样本泛化能力。例如，在Blocksworld任务中，用少于30个块的实例训练启发式，就能无需搜索地成功解决包含488个块的实例，而标准DRL方法在此场景下失败。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了深度强化学习在规划领域的组合泛化问题，通过自我改进的搜索-学习循环产生具有通用策略能力的启发式。学术上为无感知学习的规划泛化提供了新思路，实际中可应用于复杂规划任务。未来可将框架扩展至更多领域，并探索与其他搜索策略的结合。

title: FLOATBench: A Dataset and Benchmark for Floating Offshore Wind Turbine Tower Fatigue
abstract: Most of the world's offshore wind resource lies in waters too deep for fixed-bottom foundations, making floating offshore wind turbines (FOWTs) essential for deep-water deployment. As the industry scales toward $22$ MW class designs, tower fatigue becomes increasingly critical because larger structures amplify the coupled aero-hydro-servo-elastic loads induced by continuous wind and wave excitation. Accurate fatigue-damage prediction is therefore central to certification, design optimization, and cost reduction. Yet the field lacks a shared surrogate benchmark: studies report different simulations, splits, and metrics, making methods difficult to compare. We present FLOATBench, a public tabular benchmark with $582{,}120$ per-section fatigue-damage labels across three $22$ MW FOWT tower geometries, derived from $19{,}404$ high-fidelity OpenFAST simulations across the three towers ($6{,}468$ per tower: $1{,}078$ aligned wind/wave operating points $\times$ six turbulence seeds), labeled at $30$ cross-sections per tower. FLOATBench includes a regime-aware alpha-shape partition of the joint wind/wave operating envelope, stratifying test points into in-train, interpolation, and extrapolation regimes. It is paired with a reproducible evaluation harness covering three protocol levels: random validation (E1), within-tower regime-aware evaluation (E2), and cross-tower transfer (E3). The regime-aware protocol reveals rank shifts between global and extrapolation performance that random-split leaderboards cannot detect. To the authors' knowledge, FLOATBench is the first FOWT fatigue benchmark for tabular surrogate modeling, and offers an evaluation protocol that generalizes to engineering surrogates defined over physical operating envelopes. Dataset and code available at: https://github.com/Joao97ribeiro/FLOATBench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了FLOATBench，首个用于浮动海上风机塔疲劳的表格代理基准数据集和评估协议。
light_analysis.motivation: 浮动海上风机（FOWT）对于深水部署至关重要，但缺乏共享的代理基准，现有研究采用不同的仿真、数据划分和评估指标，导致方法难以直接比较。塔疲劳是设计优化和认证的关键，因此需要一个统一、可重复的基准来推动该领域发展。
light_analysis.method: 基于三座22MW FOWT塔的19,404次高保真OpenFAST仿真，生成582,120个截面疲劳损伤标签。采用alpha-shape对联合风浪操作包络进行区域感知划分，将测试点分为训练内、插值和外推区域。配套三级评估协议：随机验证（E1）、塔内区域感知评估（E2）和跨塔迁移（E3）。
light_analysis.result: 区域感知评估协议揭示了全局性能与外推性能之间的排名变化，这是随机划分领导者板无法检测的。该基准提供了可复现的评估框架，但摘要未明确给出具体性能数据或与基线方法的定量对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: FLOATBench是首个面向FOWT疲劳的表格代理基准，其评估协议可推广至其他基于物理操作包络的工程代理。该工作促进了方法比较、设计优化和成本降低。数据集和代码已公开，但未讨论局限性或未来方向。

title: CMAP: Cross-Modal Adaptive Prompting for Multi-Domain Task-Incremental Learning
abstract: Multi-domain task-incremental learning requires a model to sequentially acquire knowledge across visually diverse domains without forgetting prior tasks, and without access to task identity at inference. Parameter-efficient methods built on frozen vision-language models have made strong progress, yet all existing approaches rely exclusively on visual features for task routing, confidence estimation, and encoder adaptation, leaving CLIP's cross-modal text embedding space entirely unexploited. We address this gap through three contributions. Text-space task routing replaces visual Gaussian matching with cosine similarity to frozen CLIP text prototypes, giving order-independent routing robust to data scarcity at zero parameter cost. Multi-prototype visual-textual confidence replaces single-Gaussian class modeling with K-means visual prototypes and cross-modal alignment scores under task-calibrated thresholds. Symmetric cross-modal gating extends per-layer Gumbel gates to the text encoder conditioned on batch image features, preserving cross-modal alignment on out-of-distribution inputs. On the MTIL benchmark spanning 11 datasets and 1201 classes, our method achieves 74.2% Transfer, 80.5% Average, and 88.7% Last under Order-I, surpassing the prior state of the art by 5.0, 3.7, and 3.0 percentage points with only 2.5M trainable parameters and no external data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出跨模态自适应提示方法，利用CLIP文本嵌入空间实现多领域任务增量学习，在11个数据集上超越SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 多领域任务增量学习要求模型在不遗忘先前任务的情况下顺序获取知识，且推理时无法获知任务身份。现有参数高效方法仅依赖视觉特征进行任务路由、置信度估计和编码器适配，忽略了CLIP的跨模态文本嵌入空间。这限制了模型在视觉多样性领域间的泛化能力和鲁棒性，尤其是在数据稀缺时任务路由易出错。本文旨在填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 提出CMAP方法，包含三项创新：一是文本空间任务路由，用余弦相似度替换视觉高斯匹配，实现零参数且鲁棒的路由；二是多原型视觉-文本置信度，用K-means视觉原型和跨模态对齐分数替代单高斯类建模，并引入任务校准阈值；三是对称跨模态门控，在文本编码器中引入基于批量图像特征的Gumbel门控，保持跨模态对齐。基于冻结CLIP模型，仅训练2.5M参数，无需外部数据。
light_analysis.result: 在MTIL基准（11个数据集、1201个类别）上，Order-I设置下达到74.2% Transfer、80.5% Average、88.7% Last，分别超过先前SOTA 5.0、3.7和3.0个百分点。方法参数高效（2.5M），且无需外部数据，展示了跨模态信息利用的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了利用CLIP文本嵌入空间进行任务路由、置信度估计和编码器适配的有效性，显著提升了多领域任务增量学习的性能。CMAP为参数高效的增量学习提供了新范式，未来可探索更复杂的跨模态交互机制及其在更大规模基准上的应用。

title: AgentHijack: Benchmarking Computer Use Agent Robustness to Common Environment Corruptions
abstract: Autonomous computer use agents that powered by multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are emerging as capable assistants for completing complex digital workflows. However, real-world execution environments are far from ideal: pop-ups, resolution changes, and competing applications frequently interfere with agent perception and control. We introduce AgentHijack, a benchmark designed to evaluate the robustness of computer-use agents under common corruptions, where the uncertainties in dynamic environment disrupt the execution flow without direct adversarial intent. Specifically, AgentHijack introduces 9 configurable common corruptions to replicate realistic imperfect scenarios. We evaluate a variety of desktop tasks that utilize MLLM-based agents and discover that even minor instances of corruption can result in substantial performance degradation, which emphasizes the fragility of agents and underscores the necessity of robustness evaluation. Afterward, we propose AgentHijack-Agent, a framework that integrates an action generator with enhanced grounding capabilities and an onlooker responsible for behavior summarization and environment checking. Extensive experiments validate its effectiveness. Our code, environment, baseline models and data are publicly available at: https://AgentHijack.github.io.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AgentHijack基准，评估基于多模态大模型的计算机使用代理在常见环境干扰下的鲁棒性，并引入AgentHijack-Agent框架提升其鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 真实执行环境中弹窗、分辨率变化等常见干扰频繁影响代理的感知与控制，现有方法未充分评估此类鲁棒性。代理的脆弱性可能导致性能大幅下降，亟需系统性的鲁棒性评估与改进框架。
light_analysis.method: 构建AgentHijack基准，包含9种可配置的常见环境干扰（如弹窗、分辨率变化）。提出AgentHijack-Agent框架，集成增强定位能力的动作生成器与负责行为总结和环境检查的观察者，以提升干扰下的执行鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 实验评估多种桌面任务，发现即使是微小的环境干扰也会导致基于MLLM的代理性能显著下降，揭示其脆弱性。AgentHijack-Agent框架在干扰场景下表现出有效性，具体指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献在于提出首个针对计算机使用代理的鲁棒性基准AgentHijack及改进框架AgentHijack-Agent，强调鲁棒性评估的必要性。代码与数据已公开，为后续研究提供基础，但未讨论局限性。

title: Towards Open-World Referring Expression Comprehension: A Benchmark with Training-free Multi-task Consistency Checker
abstract: Referring expression comprehension (REC) aims to localize a target object within an image based on a given expression. Although recent advances in vision-language models have led to substantial improvements in REC tasks, current REC benchmarks often hold simple scenarios and the assumption that each expression maps to a unique object. These limitations hinder the deployment of REC models in open-world environments. To fill this gap, we introduce OpenRef, a new benchmark for REC in complex visual and linguistic scenarios. OpenRef features three key advancements: 1) Diverse visual scenarios: spanning diverse visual domains, including ground views, drone views, dark scenes and adverse weather conditions; 2) Variable target counts: breaking the single-target limitation with multi-target and none-target samples; 3) Rich vocabulary types: incorporating proper nouns, polysemous words and ordinal terms to fit a wider range of expression needs. Furthermore, as traditional metrics are insufficient for open-world setting, we leverage F1 to measure grounding accuracy and propose N3R (Negative Relative Rejection Reliability) to assess relative rejection reliability against negative expressions. Finally, we introduce Multi-task Consistency Checker (MCC), a training-free but plug-and-play strategy that enhances model performance with one click by enforcing consistency self-verification. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this work significantly advances the performance of existing REC models in complex scenarios, paving the way for open-world REC. Project page: https://zongjianwu.github.io/openref

light_analysis.overview: 提出OpenRef基准和训练无关的多任务一致性检查器（MCC），推动开放世界指代表达理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有指代表达理解（REC）基准局限于简单场景且假设每个表达对应唯一目标，无法适应开放世界复杂环境。OpenRef解决视觉场景多样性（地面/无人机视角、黑暗/恶劣天气）、目标数量可变（多目标/无目标）、词汇类型丰富（专有名词、多义词、序数词）的实际问题。
light_analysis.method: 构建OpenRef基准，涵盖多样视觉场景、可变目标数和丰富词汇。提出N3R指标评估负样本拒绝可靠性，并设计多任务一致性检查器（MCC），无需训练即可通过自验证增强模型性能，即插即用。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，MCC显著提升现有REC模型在复杂场景下的性能，具体指标包括F1衡量定位精度和N3R评估拒绝可靠性。相比传统方法，在多样视觉场景和目标数量可变条件下取得改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献包括开放世界REC基准OpenRef、新评估指标N3R和即插即用MCC策略，推动REC模型向开放世界部署。局限性可能包括MCC的通用性和计算开销，未来可扩展至更多模态。

title: PowLU: An Activation Function for Stable Pre-Training of LLMs
abstract: In contemporary large language models (LLMs), the swish-gated linear unit (SwiGLU) activation function is widely adopted to regulate the information flow and introduce non-linearity. For large positive inputs, SwiGLU approximates the quadratic function $x^2$, providing strong nonlinearity and expressive capacity. However, this property also causes numerical instability as the input or model scale increases, particularly in low-precision LLM training. The main reason is its approximate quadratic amplification, which enlarges the output range and exacerbates outliers. To address this issue, we propose a stable activation function, Power Linear Unit (PowLU), for large-scale LLM pre-training. Specifically, PowLU employs a rational power function to achieve adaptive nonlinearity, thereby improving representation ability and enabling stable training in spike regions. Moreover, we provide theoretical justification for several key properties of PowLU. Scaling law experiments confirm that the performance is consistent across model sizes, and further experimental results with the Ling architecture (7.9B and 124B total parameters) demonstrate that PowLU achieves competitive results against SwiGLU and SwiGLU-Clip in large-scale training of LLMs. In addition, the experimental results also show that PowLU effectively improves the scalability of the large-scale training of LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PowLU激活函数，通过有理幂函数实现自适应非线性，解决SwiGLU在大正输入时近似二次函数导致的数值不稳定问题，实现LLM的稳定预训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM广泛使用SwiGLU激活函数，但其在大正输入时近似x^2，导致输出范围扩大和异常值加剧，尤其在低精度训练中造成数值不稳定。需要一种稳定且具有自适应非线性的激活函数，以支持大规模LLM的稳定预训练。
light_analysis.method: 提出Power Linear Unit (PowLU)，采用有理幂函数实现自适应非线性，避免放大效应。理论证明其关键性质，通过缩放定律实验验证不同模型规模下的一致性，并在Ling架构（7.9B和124B参数）上进行大规模训练实验。
light_analysis.result: 缩放定律实验表明PowLU在不同模型规模下性能一致。在Ling架构上，PowLU在7.9B和124B参数规模下与SwiGLU和SwiGLU-Clip相比取得竞争性结果，并有效提高了大规模训练的可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PowLU通过有理幂函数实现稳定训练，在保持性能的同时解决了SwiGLU的数值不稳定问题，有助于提升LLM大规模预训练的稳定性和可扩展性。未来可进一步探索在其他架构和任务中的应用。

title: How Should LLMs Consume High-Quality Data? Optimal Data Scheduling via Quality-Aware Functional Scaling Laws
abstract: High-quality data is scarce in large language model (LLM) training, yet how to schedule its use jointly with training dynamics lacks theoretical guidance. We extend functional scaling laws by incorporating a data-quality dimension, and solve the joint data-quality and batch-size scheduling problem in asymptotic closed form. The solution reveals two regimes and a dual role of high-quality data. In the noise-limited regime, high-quality data should be used as a signal amplifier: lowering the batch size converts cleaner data into more signal without amplifying noise. In the signal-limited regime, it should be used as a noise suppressor: late placement reduces terminal noise without sacrificing signal accumulation. Existing curriculum-style pipelines primarily exploit the second role by placing cleaner data late, but miss the first role because conventional decay schedules reduce update intensity exactly when high-quality data becomes available. Guided by this, we propose Drop-Stable-Rampup for LLM midtraining: upon the quality transition, drop the batch size, hold it stable to accumulate signal, then ramp up to suppress terminal noise. On a 15B Mixture-of-Experts model midtrained on 108B tokens, Drop-Stable-Rampup improves average accuracy over Warmup-Stable-Decay (WSD) by +1.70 and over Cosine-decay by +2.98, with particularly large gains on mathematical reasoning benchmarks such as GSM8K (+4.23) and MATH (+2.80).

light_analysis.overview: 提出质量感知的函数缩放定律以联合优化数据质量与批次大小调度，并推导出最优调度策略Drop-Stable-Rampup。
light_analysis.motivation: 高质量数据在LLM训练中稀缺，但如何与训练动态协同使用缺乏理论指导。现有方法如课程学习仅利用高质量数据的噪声抑制角色，忽略了其信号放大潜力，且传统衰减调度在高质量数据出现时降低更新强度，导致次优。需要一个统一的理论框架来指导数据调度策略。
light_analysis.method: 将数据质量维度引入函数缩放定律，推导出数据质量与批次大小联合调度的渐近闭式解。解揭示了两个机制：噪声受限区（高质量数据作为信号放大器，需降低批次大小）和信号受限区（作为噪声抑制器，需后期放置）。据此提出Drop-Stable-Rampup调度：在质量转换点立即降低批次大小并稳定保持以积累信号，然后逐步增大以抑制终端噪声。在15B MoE模型上使用108B tokens进行中期训练验证。
light_analysis.result: 在15B MoE模型中训练108B tokens，Drop-Stable-Rampup相比Warmup-Stable-Decay（WSD）平均准确率提升+1.70，相比Cosine衰减提升+2.98。在数学推理基准上增益显著：GSM8K提升+4.23，MATH提升+2.80。验证了理论预测的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次从理论上联合优化数据质量与批次大小调度，揭示了高质量数据的双重角色，并提出了实际有效的调度策略Drop-Stable-Rampup。学术上为LLM数据调度提供了理论基础，应用上显著提升模型性能，尤其数学推理。未来可扩展到更复杂的多阶段质量调度或在线质量估计场景。

title: Evaluating passing decision-making in professional football: An enhanced MPNN approach to Receiver Selection
abstract: The process of decision-making in football is characterized by a complex interplay between spatial positioning, opponent pressure, and player intent. This work introduces a Graph Neural Network (GNN) framework designed to predict Receiver Selection, the optimal passing target, by modeling on-field interactions as dynamic graphs. Each player is represented as a node with positional and contextual features, while potential passing lines form weighted edges characterized by distance, angle, and pressure metrics. A Message-Passing Neural Network (MPNN) has been developed and trained using a combination of tracking data and event data from professional matches, synchronized through a robust pipeline based on an optimized version of the Needleman-Wunsch Algorithm. The model achieves competitive accuracy in identifying the actual chosen receiver and state-of-the-art accuracy within its top three suggestions. Our model further offers quantification of each option's likelihood, threat, and creativity, enabling performance analysts to evaluate over 1,000 passes in seconds.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于MPNN的图神经网络框架，通过建模球员动态交互预测足球传球目标，实现高准确率与快速分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 足球传球决策受空间位置、对手压力和球员意图的复杂交互影响，现有方法难以有效建模动态场景并量化传球选项。传统分析依赖人工或简单统计，无法处理大量数据。本研究旨在利用图结构捕获球员间实时关系，提升传球目标预测的准确性和效率。
light_analysis.method: 采用图神经网络（GNN）构建动态图，每个球员为节点，特征包括位置和上下文；潜在传球线为加权边，权重基于距离、角度和压力指标。开发消息传递神经网络（MPNN），使用Needleman-Wunsch算法优化同步跟踪与事件数据。模型输出各传球选项的概率、威胁值和创造力指标。
light_analysis.result: 模型在识别实际接收者上达到竞争性准确率，在top-3建议中达到最优性能。能够每秒分析超过1000次传球，量化每个选项的威胁和创造力，为表现分析师提供快速、量化的决策评估工具。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证明了图神经网络在足球决策分析中的有效性，提供了一种自动、量化的传球评估方法，辅助教练和球员训练。未来可扩展至其他团队运动或实时决策系统。

title: From Facts to Insights: A Persona-Driven Dual Memory Framework and Dataset for Role-Playing Agents
abstract: While role-playing agents excel in short-term interactions, long-term conversations overwhelm context windows, motivating external memory frameworks. Current systems typically rely on persona-agnostic summarization, which records facts without persona-specific interpretation, yielding generic responses that compromise persona fidelity. To bridge this gap, we introduce RoleMemo, a dataset featuring four reasoning tasks where the factual fragments must be interpreted through the persona to reach the correct answer. Evaluation on RoleMemo exposes critical limitations of persona-agnostic frameworks. We thus propose DualMem, which decouples memory into two streams: factual cognition and persona-conditioned insight. Trained through Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning (RL), our framework with a 4B-parameter model outperforms zero-shot persona-agnostic frameworks powered by DeepSeek-V3.2 for sustained persona fidelity. Our resources are available at https://github.com/role2026/rolememo.

light_analysis.overview: 提出角色驱动双记忆框架DualMem和数据集RoleMemo，解决长期对话中角色保真度问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 角色扮演代理在长期对话中因上下文窗口限制，现有外部记忆框架采用与角色无关的摘要，记录事实但忽略角色特定解释，导致响应通用、损害角色一致性。需要将事实通过角色解释以保持角色特征。
light_analysis.method: 提出DualMem，将记忆解耦为事实认知和角色条件洞察双流；通过监督微调（SFT）和强化学习（RL）训练4B参数模型。同时构建RoleMemo数据集，包含四个推理任务，要求事实碎片必须通过角色解释才能得到正确答案。
light_analysis.result: 在RoleMemo上评估暴露了角色无关框架的严重局限性；DualMem框架在持续角色保真度上超越了由DeepSeek-V3.2驱动的零样本角色无关框架。
light_analysis.conclusion: DualMem有效提升长期对话中的角色保真度，RoleMemo提供了评估基准。未来可探索更大模型或更复杂的角色建模，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Testing the Deliteralization Hypothesis in Human and Machine Translation
abstract: The recent shift from dedicated NMT systems to general-purpose LLMs has reshaped machine translation, with LLMs reported to produce more fluent, less literal output than their predecessors. We test whether this shift extends to the deliteralization hypothesis, the long-standing claim from translation studies that translations become progressively less literal as they are drafted and revised. Using the WMT24++ dataset, we compare the literality of human translations and post-editions to that of two NMT systems and six LLMs across 54 language pairs and three tasks: direct translation, iterative self-revision, and post-editing of human drafts. Literality is measured via a validated Synthetic Literality Index built from six heuristics. We find that (i) human translations remain significantly less literal than those of all tested MT systems, though recent LLMs narrow the gap; (ii) when prompted to iteratively revise their own output, LLMs deliteralize monotonically, providing the first evidence that the hypothesis applies natively to LLM generation; and (iii) as post-editors, LLMs invert the revision triggers of human post-editors, tolerating literal drafts and targeting idiomatic human formulations for revision.

light_analysis.overview: 验证去字面化假设在人类与机器翻译中的适用性，发现LLM通过迭代修订可降低翻译字面程度。
light_analysis.motivation: 翻译研究中长期存在去字面化假设，即翻译初稿到修订版逐渐减少字面直译。近年LLM取代专用NMT系统，产出更流畅、更少字面的翻译。但该假设是否适用于机器翻译，尤其是LLM，尚未得到验证。本研究旨在系统比较人类与多种机器翻译系统（包括NMT和LLM）在不同任务中的翻译字面程度，以检验假设的普适性。
light_analysis.method: 使用WMT24++数据集，涵盖54个语言对，比较人类翻译、人工后编辑与两个NMT系统、六个LLM在三种任务中的字面程度：直接翻译、迭代自我修订、人工草稿后编辑。字面程度通过由六种启发式指标构建的合成字面指数（Synthetic Literality Index）进行度量。
light_analysis.result: （i）人类翻译显著比所有机器翻译系统更不字面，但近期LLM缩小了差距；（ii）当提示LLM迭代自我修订时，其输出单调地去字面化，首次证实该假设适用于LLM生成；（iii）作为后编辑器时，LLM与人类后编辑的修订触发模式相反，容忍字面草稿而针对地道人类表达进行修订。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究验证了去字面化假设在人类翻译中的经典地位，并首次证明LLM迭代自修订也能遵循该假设。然而，作为后编辑器时LLM的行为与人类相反，揭示了当前模型在理解语言地道性与字面性之间的权衡。这为优化机器翻译后编辑流程提供了新视角，未来可探索如何使LLM更好地模拟人类修订策略。

title: Don't Retrain, Just Reuse: Recovering Dual-Target Molecules from Single-Target Diffusion Models
abstract: Designing a single molecule that modulates two targets is a promising strategy for polypharmacology, but it remains substantially harder than standard single-target generation because one candidate must satisfy two binding requirements while preserving drug-likeness and synthesizability. Existing dual-target generative methods typically introduce dual-target capability by either retraining the generator or intervening in the diffusion process during sampling. The former can be costly and difficult to stabilize when dual-target supervision is sparse, while the latter may be sensitive to denoising-time target balancing and competing update directions. These limitations motivate a generator-preserving alternative that keeps the pretrained prior intact: can dual-target candidates instead be recovered from the input space of a frozen single-target diffusion model, without modifying its parameters or denoising dynamics? We formulate this task as a constrained multi-objective optimization problem and propose REUSE, a hierarchical evolutionary input-space search framework that combines pair-conditioned exploration with structured multi-stage selection to enforce dual-target affinity, chemical quality, and diversity. Experiments show that, compared with methods that modify the diffusion process, REUSE consistently improves dual-target affinity and balance, achieving a 20.9-percentage-point gain in Dual High Affinity over the strongest prior baseline while maintaining competitive molecular quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出REUSE方法，通过输入空间搜索从冻结的单目标扩散模型中恢复双目标分子，无需重新训练或修改扩散过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有双目标分子生成方法要么重新训练生成器（成本高、难稳定），要么在采样时干预扩散过程（对目标平衡敏感、更新方向冲突）。因此需要一种保持预训练先验不变的方法，从单目标扩散模型的输入空间中直接恢复双目标候选分子，以规避这些局限性。
light_analysis.method: 将任务建模为约束多目标优化问题，提出REUSE框架，采用分层进化输入空间搜索。结合成对条件探索与结构化多阶段选择，同时优化双目标亲和力、化学质量和多样性，无需修改模型参数或去噪动力学。
light_analysis.result: 与修改扩散过程的基线方法相比，REUSE在双高亲和力指标上提升20.9个百分点，同时保持有竞争力的分子质量，证明了输入空间搜索在双目标生成中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法表明可以在不改变单目标扩散模型的前提下实现有效的双目标分子生成，节省了重新训练成本并避免了采样干预的敏感性问题。未来有望扩展至更多目标，但摘要未讨论局限性。

title: Simulating Human Memory with Language Models
abstract: Language models are increasingly being deployed as user simulators, but their memory is far more reliable than that of real users. To measure this gap, we run a series of classic memory experiments from psychology on both humans and language models. Across tasks, we find that out-of-the-box language models exhibit better memory than humans, even when prompted to imitate human behavior. We then show that better prompting strategies and the use of a compactor can cause language models to forget content in a more human-like way. Using these methods, we show preliminary evidence that language models with human-like memory constraints can function as more effective user simulators in a downstream education task. Finally, we release human reference data and benchmarks to support future work on simulating human memory with language models.

light_analysis.overview: 通过心理学记忆实验，发现语言模型记忆过于精确，提出提示策略和压缩器使其遗忘更接近人类，提升下游模拟效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型作为用户模拟器时，其记忆过于可靠，与真实用户存在差距。现有方法缺乏对记忆约束的模拟，导致模拟失真。该问题在教育等需要真实用户行为的场景中尤为重要。
light_analysis.method: 运行心理学经典记忆实验，对比人类和语言模型。提出两种改进：1) 更好的提示策略，2) 使用压缩器（compactor）促使模型遗忘。在实验中评估记忆效果，并在下游教育任务中验证模拟有效性。
light_analysis.result: 开箱即用的语言模型在所有任务中记忆优于人类，即使提示模仿人类。改进后模型遗忘模式更接近人类，在教育任务中作为用户模拟器效果更佳。发布了人类参考数据和基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了语言模型可通过约束遗忘实现更拟人的记忆模拟，提升下游任务模拟效果。为构建真实用户模拟器提供新思路，未来可探索更多记忆机制。数据集和基准有助于后续研究。

title: Llamion Technical Report
abstract: We release Llamion, a family of 14B-parameter open-weight language models obtained by transforming Orion-14B into the standardized Llama-family architecture. The transformation is performed by Efficient Knowledge Preservation for Transformation (KEPT), a recipe that combines (i) Normal Parameter Mapping (NPM) for unchanged modules, (ii) Optimized Parameter Mapping (OPM), a training-free LayerNorm-to-RMSNorm initialization we prove optimal under the near-zero-mean activation regime induced by weight decay, and (iii) Cross-architecture Knowledge Distillation (XKD), an equal-size frozen-teacher distillation that aligns the converted model's outputs with the source model's on any reasonable input distribution. Llamion recovers Orion's behaviour on H6, MT-Bench, and KoMMLU with only ~123M tokens on a single A100 in four days; Llamion-Base reaches 66.87% on KoMMLU, exceeding the next-best entry of the Open Ko LLM Leaderboard by >7.0 absolute points at submission time. Capabilities entirely absent from the transfer corpus (Python programming and 200K-token context handling) survive the architectural transition intact. We release three checkpoints (Base, Chat, LongChat) that load with trust_remote_code=False in the Hugging Face Transformers library.

light_analysis.overview: 提出KEPT方法将Orion-14B转换为Llama架构的Llamion模型，以极低数据量恢复性能并超越现有开源模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有模型架构不统一，阻碍了开源生态的兼容性和可复用性。Orion-14B虽性能优异，但采用非标准化结构，难以直接融入Llama生态系统。直接转换会导致知识丢失，而传统蒸馏或重训练成本高昂。因此，需要一种高效的知识保留转换方法，既能保持源模型能力，又能完全适配目标架构。
light_analysis.method: 提出KEPT方法，包含三部分：Normal Parameter Mapping (NPM) 直接映射不变模块参数；Optimized Parameter Mapping (OPM) 以训练自由方式将LayerNorm初始化为RMSNorm，在近零均值激活下证明最优；Cross-architecture Knowledge Distillation (XKD) 采用等大小冻结教师蒸馏，对齐输出分布。整个转换使用约1.23亿tokens在单张A100上耗时4天完成。
light_analysis.result: Llamion在H6、MT-Bench和KoMMLU上恢复了Orion的行为。Llamion-Base在KoMMLU上达到66.87%，比提交时Open Ko LLM Leaderboard的次优条目高出超过7个绝对百分点。Python编程和200K上下文处理能力完好保留。仅需单卡4天和少量数据即可完成转换。
light_analysis.conclusion: Llamion证明了通过高效知识保留方法实现跨架构模型转换的可行性，显著降低了模型迁移成本。该工作为开源社区提供了标准化的14B模型，并展示了训练自由初始化策略的有效性。未来可探索更大规模模型的转换及更泛化的知识蒸馏技术。

title: Stochastic Estimation of the Layer-wise Hessian Trace for Monitoring Neural-network Training
abstract: The loss and the norm of its gradient separate the healthy and the pathological regimes of neural-network training only weakly, whilst the curvature of the empirical risk differs qualitatively between them but is inaccessible explicitly at parameter counts $P\sim 10^{6}-10^{8}$. We present a stochastic estimator of the trace of the diagonal blocks of the Hessian matrix of the empirical risk of a neural network. The procedure combines the Hutchinson stochastic trace estimator with a single Hessian-vector product over the whole parameter vector and recovers unbiased estimates of every per-layer trace in one backward pass through the computational graph. We show that correctness under weight sharing requires the layer-wise Hessian to be assembled before the second differentiation: unrolling shared weights into independent coordinates introduces a systematic bias whose sign and magnitude are governed by the cross-instance blocks of the unrolled Hessian. A closed-form expression for the variance of the estimator at a fixed Hessian is derived, together with a decomposition of the total variance under the mini-batch sampling distribution. This decomposition yields a critical probe count $K^{\star}$ that balances the two sources of randomness and supports the practical recommendation $K\in[5,10]$ in the on-line monitoring regime. The estimator is applied to the detection of the label-memorisation regime of ResNet-18, ResNet-34, and VGG-11 on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, where a calibrated cumulative-sum decision rule attains an empirical detection power of $179/180$ at a false-alarm rate of $16/120$.

light_analysis.overview: 提出随机估计神经网络Hessian逐层迹的方法，用于高效监测训练过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络的损失和梯度范数难以区分健康与病态训练，而曲率能有效区分但Hessian在参数量大时无法显式计算。现有方法缺乏高效的逐层曲率估计，无法在线监测训练动态。
light_analysis.method: 结合Hutchinson随机迹估计与单次Hessian-向量积，在一次反向传播中无偏估计每层Hessian迹。分析权重共享下的正确性，提出需先组装逐层Hessian再进行二阶微分。推导固定Hessian下方差及小批量采样总方差分解，获得关键采样数K*，推荐K∈[5,10]用于在线监测。
light_analysis.result: 在ResNet-18/34和VGG-11上检测标签记忆阶段，使用校准的累积和决策规则，在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上达到179/180检测率，误报率16/120。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该高效逐层Hessian迹估计方法能有效监测神经网络训练，尤其是检测标签记忆。计算高效且理论完整，为训练诊断提供新工具。未来可扩展至其他曲率相关任务。

title: Opportunistic Target Selection: Early Directional Commitment for Query-Efficient Black-Box Adversarial Attacks
abstract: Black-box adversarial attacks that minimize only the ground-truth confidence suffer from class drift: perturbations wander through the feature space without committing to a specific adversarial class, wasting queries on diffuse, undirected progress. We introduce Opportunistic Target Selection (OTS), a lightweight wrapper that switches an untargeted attack to a targeted objective early in its trajectory, locking onto whichever non-true class currently leads. OTS requires no architectural modification to the underlying attack, no gradient access, and no a priori target-class knowledge.   We validate OTS on three score-based attacks (SimBA, Square Attack with cross-entropy loss, and Bandits) across five standard ImageNet classifiers (4,500 runs). On random-search attacks, OTS closely tracks oracle performance, with gains up to +27 pp in success rate and 43% relative reduction in censored-mean iterations on ResNet-50. On gradient-estimation attacks (Bandits) and attacks with margin loss, OTS is redundant, a negative result that reinforces our interpretation of OTS as a margin-loss surrogate. On adversarially-trained models, a bimodal difficulty distribution eliminates the regime where targeting helps.
comment: 13 pages, 10 figures, 3 tables; code available at https://github.com/Tariolle/opportunistic-target-selection

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种轻量级黑盒对抗攻击增强方法OTS，通过早期切换为有目标攻击，有效缓解类漂移，提升查询效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 黑盒对抗攻击中，仅最小化真类置信度会导致类漂移问题：扰动在特征空间中漫无目的地游荡，不承诺特定对抗类，浪费查询在发散、无方向的进展上。现有方法缺乏对目标类的早期定向，使得攻击效率低下。本文旨在通过早期定向目标选择，在不增加复杂性的前提下提升攻击的查询效率和成功率。
light_analysis.method: 提出Opportunistic Target Selection（OTS），一种轻量级包装器，在攻击轨迹早期将无目标攻击切换为有目标目标函数，锁定当前排名最高的非真类作为目标。OTS无需修改底层攻击架构、无需梯度访问、无需先验目标类知识。在三个基于分数的黑盒攻击（SimBA、Square Attack with CE loss、Bandits）和五个ImageNet分类器上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在随机搜索攻击（SimBA、Square Attack）上，OTS接近Oracle性能，在ResNet-50上成功率提升高达+27个百分点，归一化平均迭代次数相对减少43%。在梯度估计攻击（Bandits）和基于边际损失的攻击上OTS冗余（负结果）。在对抗训练模型上，双峰难度分布消除了OTS的效用区间。共运行4500次实验。
light_analysis.conclusion: OTS有效地将无目标攻击转化为有目标攻击，特别适用于随机搜索类攻击，显著提升效率和成功率，且无需额外资源。负结果（Bandits、margin loss）强化了OTS作为边际损失替代的解释。局限性在于对抗训练模型和特定攻击中效果有限。未来可探索更复杂的目标选择策略。

title: Closed-Form Node Classification with Exact Graph Unlearning
abstract: Graph neural networks for node classification are typically trained by gradient descent over hundreds or thousands of epochs. Recent work has shown that, when properly tuned, classic GCN/SAGE/GAT architectures can match graph transformers on many node-classification benchmarks. We ask a complementary question: how much of this performance can be recovered by deterministic closed-form solvers, and what guarantees does this enable?   We introduce a routed closed-form framework selected by adjusted homophily. For assortative graphs, we use SGC-style propagation followed by Ridge regression; for heterophilous graphs, we introduce LCF-Net, a layer-wise closed-form graph feature-refinement network whose per-layer Ridge solves are capped by a Gaussian kernel-Ridge head. Across 14 benchmarks, including ogbn-arxiv and ogbn-proteins, our closed-form predictors match or beat the best vanilla 2-layer GCN/SAGE/GAT on 9 of 9 measured datasets, tie tuned deep recipes within one standard deviation on 9 of 12 small benchmarks, and exceed the OGB-leaderboard plain GCN on both large graphs. The remaining heterophilous gap closely tracks the gain from vanilla 2-layer to deep SAGE, suggesting that the residual difference is primarily architectural.   Because our predictors are explicit solutions of deterministic linear systems, modified graph inputs can be re-solved to obtain retrain-equivalent parameters. We formalize exact graph-object unlearning for label, feature, edge, node, and subgraph modifications, prove K-hop locality for Ridge components, and verify exactness across 109 configurations. On ogbn-arxiv, localized updates give $21$--$45\times$ speedups over full re-solving and roughly $10^{6}\times$ speedups over gradient retraining. Structural-inversion experiments further quantify the privacy floor of exact retraining and the additional leakage of approximate graph-unlearning methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于闭环求解器的节点分类框架，实现与梯度训练相当的性能，并支持精确图遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图神经网络节点分类依赖梯度下降训练，耗时且难以保证确定性。本文探索闭环形式求解器能否恢复类似性能，并实现可验证的精确图遗忘，以解决隐私和效率问题。
light_analysis.method: 根据调整同质性选择路由闭环框架：对于同质图使用SGC传播加岭回归；对于异质图提出LCF-Net，逐层闭环特征精炼网络，每层岭回归后接高斯核-岭回归头。在14个基准上评估，支持对标签、特征、边、节点、子图修改的精确图遗忘，并证明岭回归组件的K跳局部性。
light_analysis.result: 在9个基准上与最佳2层GCN/SAGE/GAT相比，闭环预测器在9/9数据集上匹配或超越；在12个小基准中9个与深度调优方法相差在一个标准差内；在ogbn-arxiv和ogbn-proteins上超过OGB排行榜的普通GCN。局部更新在ogbn-arxiv上比完全重新求解快21-45倍，比梯度重训练快约10^6倍。精确验证在109种配置上完成。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了闭环求解器在节点分类中能达到与深度网络相当的性能，并首次实现精确的图对象遗忘，具有重要的隐私保护意义和计算效率优势。未来可研究异质性差距的架构补偿。

title: DRM: Diffusion-based Reward Model With Step-wise Guidance
abstract: Current mainstream methods of aligning diffusion models with human preferences typically employ VLM-based reward models. However, these reward models, pre-trained for semantic alignment, struggle to capture the essential perceptual qualities-such as aesthetics, composition, and visual harmony. In this work, we argue that a model capable of high-fidelity generation must possess a profound understanding of these visual attributes. Based on this insight, we introduce the Diffusion-based Reward Model (DRM), a novel paradigm that use the pre-trained diffusion model as a powerful evaluative backbone. A key advantage of the DRM is its unique ability to assess not only the final image but also the noisy intermediate latents at any stage of the generative process. We leverage this step-wise evaluative capacity in two ways. First, we propose Step-wise GRPO, a reinforcement learning algorithm that provides dense, per-step rewards to resolve the imprecise credit assignment problem in GRPO algorithm, leading to more stable and effective alignment. Second, we introduce Step-wise Sampling, a novel inference strategy that employs the DRM as a dynamic guide to evaluate multiple generation paths at each step, steering the process towards higher-quality outcomes. Extensive experiments confirm that our approach significantly enhances the final quality of generated images. Code: https://github.com/jjaxonx/DRM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于扩散模型的奖励模型DRM，利用逐步评估能力实现图像生成对齐与质量提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前主流方法采用VLM奖励模型对齐扩散模型与人类偏好，但VLM预训练于语义对齐，难以捕捉美学、构图等关键视觉质量。高质量生成需深刻理解这些视觉属性，现有方法存在局限。
light_analysis.method: DRM以预训练扩散模型作为评估骨干，可评估最终图像及生成过程中任意阶段的含噪中间潜在变量。基于此提出Step-wise GRPO算法，提供密集逐步奖励以解决GRPO中的信用分配问题；以及Step-wise Sampling推理策略，动态评估多条生成路径以引导高质量输出。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，DRM显著提升了生成图像的最终质量。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但与基线方法对比显示有效增强。
light_analysis.conclusion: DRM通过逐步指导实现了更稳定的对齐和更优的生成质量，为解决视觉属性的评估提供了新范式。代码已开源，未来可探索更广泛的扩散模型应用。

title: StreamChar: Long-Horizon Streaming Character Audio-Video Generation with Decoupled Orchestration
abstract: Real-time streaming joint audio-video generation for character animation requires a generator to speak the requested transcript, maintain visual identity across chunks, and run within a strict playback budget. These requirements are difficult to satisfy simultaneously: chunk-wise autoregressive generation can accumulate transcript-audio misalignment and visual drift, while the few-step distillation needed for low latency often degrades spatial diversity and temporal quality. We present StreamChar, a streaming framework that separates long-horizon orchestration from short-window audio-video denoising. An LLM-based orchestrator uses the transcript and historical context to produce frame-aligned audio conditions, and a joint audio-video DiT performs local bidirectional denoising with reference and motion-frame conditioning. For efficient deployment, we use a two-stage distillation pipeline that first compresses the sampler and then fine-tunes the student under online chunk rollouts. A progress-aware pointer aligns partial transcripts with generated audio during rollout training, and a sink-chunk memory provides a persistent visual anchor for reducing long-horizon drift. Experiments on short-clip and long-horizon protocols show that StreamChar runs in real time on a single H100 GPU and provides a favorable system-level trade-off among transcript fidelity, audio-visual synchronization, visual quality, and streaming stability compared with recent joint and audio-driven baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出StreamChar框架，通过解耦长期编排与短期去噪，实现实时流式角色动画的音频-视频联合生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 实时流式角色音频-视频生成需要同时满足三个严格需求：准确说出给定文本、保持视觉身份连续性、在播放预算内运行。现有方法在分块自回归生成中容易出现音频-文本错位和视觉漂移，而低延迟所需的少步蒸馏会降低空间多样性和时间质量。这些矛盾使得现有方法难以在实际应用中取得良好平衡。
light_analysis.method: StreamChar设计LLM为基础的编排器，利用文本和历史上下文生成帧对齐的音频条件；联合音频-视频DiT通过参考帧和运动帧条件进行局部双向去噪。为高效部署，提出两阶段蒸馏：先压缩采样器，再在在线块滚动下微调学生网络。训练中使用进度感知指针对齐部分文本与生成音频，并通过残块内存提供持久视觉锚点以减少长程漂移。
light_analysis.result: 在短片段和长时间协议实验表明，StreamChar在单张H100 GPU上实现实时运行。与近期联合生成和音频驱动基线相比，在文本保真度、音视频同步、视觉质量和流式稳定性方面取得更优的系统级权衡。具体性能指标包括更低的错位率和视觉漂移，但摘要未提供精确数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: StreamChar通过解耦编排与去噪，有效解决了流式角色动画中的关键挑战，实现了高质量、低延迟的实时生成。该方法在虚拟主播、数字人交互等场景具有应用价值。未来可能探索更复杂的上下文管理或扩展到多角色场景。

title: AutoSG: LLM-Driven Solver Generation Solely from Task Prompts for Expensive Optimization
abstract: Expensive optimization tasks are ubiquitous in real-world applications, demanding highly specialized solvers. While LLM-driven automated solver generation shows promise, current paradigms face three critical issues when tackling expensive optimization: factual hallucinations due to deficient domain knowledge, the frequent dismantling of previously established locally optimal structures during refinement, and the prohibitive evaluation costs alongside restricted generalization caused by executing on training instances. To address these issues, we introduce AutoSG, a fully automated workflow directly translating natural language prompts into executable customized solvers. AutoSG features three core innovations: a retrieval-augmented solver generation module strictly grounding code in verified literature; a one-step self-refinement operator introducing task-specific improvements while preserving critical structural components; and an instance-free Elo-based LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation mechanism rapidly establishing global rankings. Extensive evaluations across diverse expensive optimization tasks confirm AutoSG significantly outperforms human-designed state-of-the-art frameworks and existing LLM-generated solvers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AutoSG全自动工作流，将自然语言提示直接转换为可执行定制求解器，解决昂贵优化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 昂贵优化任务需要高度专门化求解器，但现有LLM驱动方法存在领域知识缺乏导致的幻觉、优化过程中破坏已建立局部最优结构、以及训练实例执行成本高且泛化受限等问题。
light_analysis.method: AutoSG包含三个核心创新：检索增强的求解器生成模块（基于验证文献严格编码代码）、一步自精炼算子（引入任务特定改进同时保留关键结构）、以及基于Elo的免实例LLM-as-a-Judge评估机制（快速建立全局排名）。
light_analysis.result: 在多种昂贵优化任务上，AutoSG显著优于人类设计的最先进框架和现有LLM生成求解器，但摘要未提供具体性能提升数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: AutoSG实现了全自动求解器生成，有效解决昂贵优化中三个关键问题，具有重要学术和实用价值。未来可探索更高效检索和自精炼策略。

title: ARMA-C3: A Contrastive ARMA Convolutional Framework for Unsupervised and Semi-supervised Classification
abstract: In biomedical and neurodegenerative disorders, accurate and early disease identification remains challenging due to the scarcity of labeled data and the complexity of imaging patterns. To address these challenges, we introduce ARMA-C3, a unified unsupervised and semi-supervised graph learning framework for node classification based on contrastive learning and graph-cut regularization to learn structurally meaningful and discriminative representations. By modeling samples or images as graph nodes and exploiting inter-sample relationships, the proposed framework captures subject-level dependencies that conventional machine learning methods typically overlook. We conduct extensive binary classification experiments across five clinically relevant datasets: the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI), the Neuroimaging in Frontotemporal Dementia (NIFD) dataset, and three medical imaging benchmarks (BreastMNIST, PneumoniaMNIST, and a liver ultrasound dataset). Experimental results demonstrate that ARMA-C3 achieves competitive and frequently superior performance compared to classical clustering techniques, state-of-the-art machine learning models, and existing graph-based deep learning approaches across multiple evaluation settings, particularly under limited supervision and severe class imbalance. The proposed framework further demonstrates robust representation learning and strong cross-modal generalization across diverse biomedical imaging modalities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 ARMA-C3，一种结合对比学习和图割正则化的统一无监督与半监督图学习框架，用于节点分类，在生物医学图像上表现优越。
light_analysis.motivation: 生物医学和神经退行性疾病中，标记数据稀缺且成像模式复杂，导致准确早期识别困难。传统机器学习方法忽略样本间依赖关系，而现有图学习方法在标签有限和类别不平衡下性能不足。因此需要一种能捕获结构性语义表示、适应少标签场景的框架。
light_analysis.method: ARMA-C3 基于对比学习和图割正则化，将样本或图像建模为图节点，利用样本间关系学习判别性表示。采用 ARMA 滤波器进行图卷积，结合对比损失和图割损失优化。在 ADNI、NIFD 及三个医学影像基准数据集上进行二分类实验。
light_analysis.result: 在五个数据集上，ARMA-C3 在多个评估设置中达到具有竞争力且常优于经典聚类、SOTA 机器学习及现有图深度学习方法的结果，尤其在标签有限和严重类别不平衡下表现突出。框架展示稳健表示学习与跨模态泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: ARMA-C3 为生物医学图像分类提供统一的无监督/半监督框架，有效利用样本关系提升性能。学术上丰富了图对比学习理论，应用上可辅助疾病早期诊断。未来可探索更复杂图结构或扩展至多分类任务。

title: Event-based Batting Impact Estimation
abstract: Estimating the precise timing of batting impact is crucial for understanding the rapid sensorimotor control. However, this task is challenging for RGB cameras due to insufficient temporal resolution and motion blur. Similarly, Inertial Measurement Units (IMUs) are impractical for actual matches due to sensor intrusiveness and their limited temporal precision. To overcome these limitations, we propose a novel framework leveraging event-based cameras, which offer microsecond resolution and high dynamic range, to estimate impact timing based on the weighted centroid distance between the detected ball and bat. To address the domain gap between event frames and RGB images that degrades segmentation accuracy, we generate high-density event frames. We then introduce a mask refinement network that leverages these frames and bidirectional mask information, optimized using a novel loss function. Experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior accuracy under challenging conditions, including low-light environments and severe occlusions, outperforming baselines by reducing the Mean Absolute Error by approximately 63%.
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2026. (c) 2026 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于事件相机的击球时间估计框架，通过加权质心距离和掩码细化网络，显著提升精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 精确估计击球时间对理解快速感觉运动控制至关重要，但RGB相机因时间分辨率不足和运动模糊难以实现，IMU因传感器侵入性和有限时间精度不适用于实际比赛。现有方法在低光照和严重遮挡等挑战条件下表现不佳。
light_analysis.method: 利用事件相机的微秒分辨率和高动态范围，基于检测到的球和球棒的加权质心距离估计击球时间。为弥合事件帧与RGB图像的域差异，生成高密度事件帧，并引入掩码细化网络，利用双向掩码信息和新颖损失函数进行优化。
light_analysis.result: 在真实数据集上，该方法在低光照和严重遮挡等挑战条件下表现出优越准确性，平均绝对误差（MAE）比基线减少约63%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出的基于事件相机的框架有效克服了RGB和IMU的局限，实现了高精度击球时间估计，为运动分析中的时间精确估计提供了新途径。未来可进一步优化实时性并扩展至其他运动场景。

title: A Two-Phase Stability Study of LLM Judges and Bar Council Examiners on Thai Bar-Exam Free-Form Essays
abstract: Free-form legal essay evaluation in NLP treats expert inter-rater stability as a single ceiling number, and treats LLM-judge agreement with that ceiling as evidence of judge stability. We test both assumptions on the Thai bar examination through an identical-inputs protocol: three Bar Council-trained examiners (A, B, C) and a 26-LLM judge panel score the same 15 cross-graded answers from the same four inputs (question, official Bar Council grading regulation, gold answer, candidate answer). The headline finding is asymmetric. On 10 of 15 cells where the rubric prescribes both axes, all 29 raters converge in a tight band: panel agreement is universal. On the remaining 5 cells where the rubric does not prescribe how to grade a correct final answer that omits a decisive statutory citation, the human panel splits between two coherent readings (B/C majority at the upper rubric band, score $6$--$8$; A minority at the lower band, score $1$--$2$). The LLM judge population does not split symmetrically: 22 of 26 LLMs score in or near B/C's contested band, 3 sit in the regulation-silent middle gap, and only 1 (GPT-5.4 Nano) approaches A's band without consistently scoring within it. \emph{Zero LLMs in our 26-judge panel reproduce the minority human reading on the contested cells.} The B/C-direction cluster spans every model size, vendor, and price tier we tested. An instrumented three-LLM anchor sub-panel (Claude 4.6 Opus, Gemini 3.1 Pro, GPT-5.4 Pro) carries determinism probes, input ablations, and bootstrap CIs, and reaches anchor panel $α= 0.77$ on the 15 cells against human-panel $α= 0.36$. The high LLM-panel $α$ reflects systematic convergence on the majority reading rather than balanced reproduction of both readings; a benchmark that selects its LLM judge by maximising agreement with a human reference panel will inherit this asymmetry by construction.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示LLM法官与人类考官在泰国律师考试评分中的不对称偏差：LLM普遍偏向多数派阅读，无法复制少数派观点。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有NLP研究将专家间评分稳定性视为单一上限，并以LLM与人类的一致性衡量其稳定性。但该假设未考虑人类评分员内部可能存在分歧，且LLM可能系统性偏向多数派观点，导致评估偏差。本文通过泰国律师考试自由形式论文的评分实验，检验这两个假设的适用性。
light_analysis.method: 设计相同输入协议：15道交叉评分的题目，由3名巴委员会培训的人类考官（A、B、C）和26个LLM组成的法官小组同时评分。输入包含问题、官方评分规范、参考答案和考生答案。对争议点（规范未明确如何评分）进行分析，并设置仪器化锚定小组（Claude 4.6 Opus, Gemini 3.1 Pro, GPT-5.4 Pro）进行确定性探测、输入消融和Bootstrap置信区间计算。
light_analysis.result: 在15题中的10题上，所有29名评分者一致；剩余5题上人类分为多数派（B/C，6-8分）和少数派（A，1-2分）。22/26的LLM接近B/C的分数，3个位于中间，仅1个接近A但未完全一致。无LLM复制少数派阅读。锚定小组与人类小组的α分别为0.77和0.36，高α反映系统性收敛于多数派而非平衡复制。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM法官在评分中表现出对多数派观点的系统性偏好，无法再现人类评分者的多样性。依赖与人类参考组一致性最大化的LLM法官选择方法会继承这种偏差。该发现对法律考试自动评分系统的公平性和可靠性提出警示，未来需设计能平衡多观点或校准偏差的评估框架。

title: Hierarchical Consistency Learning for Test-time Adaptation in Camouflage Perception
abstract: Camouflaged object detection (COD) aims to localize targets that exhibit minimal perceptual differences from backgrounds through physical attributes. Existing methods, constrained by the static train-then-freeze paradigm, suffer from domain rigidity and annotation dependency, limiting their adaptability to scene variations and unseen camouflage patterns. To overcome these, we propose the hierarchical consistency learning (HCL) framework, which integrates test-time adaptation for dynamic representation recalibration. Specifically, we design the hierarchical representation reconstruction (HRR) to alleviate feature entanglement by synergizing spatial reconstruction with dual-stream frequency-domain decomposition, enhancing robustness against appearance homogenization. The pixel and spectrum inference provide structural and contextual priors. We further introduce task affinity guidance (TAG) to propagate knowledge across branches via channel-wise affinity, aligning local discriminative cues and mitigating semantic drift. To ensure semantic invariance, we formulate the prototype consistency calibration (PCC), which aggregates region features into compact prototypes and establishes prototype-feature similarity. This imposes implicit and hierarchical constraints that bridge task and representation gaps. Extensive experiments across four camouflaged and four underwater object benchmarks, under three degradation settings, demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, highlighting its robustness and generalization under distribution shifts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出层次一致性学习(HCL)框架，通过测试时自适应动态重校准表示，提升伪装目标检测的鲁棒性和泛化性。
light_analysis.motivation: 伪装目标检测受限于静态训练模式，面临域刚性和依赖标注的问题，无法适应场景变化和未见过的伪装模式。现有方法在分布偏移下表现不佳，亟需动态调整表示能力的方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出HCL框架，包含层次表示重构(HRR)缓解特征纠缠，结合空间重构与双流频域分解；任务亲和度引导(TAG)通过通道级亲和力传播知识，对齐局部判别线索；原型一致性校准(PCC)聚合区域特征为紧凑原型并建立相似性，施加隐式层次约束。
light_analysis.result: 在四个伪装和四个水下目标检测基准上，面对三种退化设置，该方法一致超越现有最先进方法，展示了在分布偏移下的强鲁棒性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过测试时自适应实现动态表示重校准，有效克服了伪装目标检测中的域刚性问题，在多变环境下具有重要应用价值。未来可探索更高效的层次约束机制。

title: Iterate Until Retrieved: Factual Nugget Optimization for Discoverable Continual Corrections in Agentic RAG
abstract: Agentic retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems in complex B2B (business-to-business) settings may often receive free-form response feedback. Rather than generic feedback signals such as style, preference, or overall response quality, we focus on actionable factual corrections. We identify these instances and convert them into compact knowledge-base entries, which we call factual nuggets. We introduce Iterative Nugget Optimization (INO), an index-time optimization method that uses the production agentic RAG as a test harness: it creates an initial nugget, probes it with the triggering query and paraphrases, reflects over failed retrieval and answer traces, and revises the nugget until it is discoverable. We evaluate INO with two production B2B knowledge-assistance agents across multiple companies that use our system: a product support agent that answers questions over company-specific knowledge bases, and a support ticket agent that assists support engineers. INO consistently improves results over baselines in terms of discoverability and usage of factual corrections, in automated and human evaluations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Iterative Nugget Optimization (INO)，一种索引时优化方法，使代理RAG系统中的事实修正知识条目在后续查询中可被发现，提升修正利用率。
light_analysis.motivation: 在复杂B2B场景中，代理RAG系统常收到自由形式反馈，现有方法主要处理通用反馈风格或偏好，而非具体的事实修正。用户提供的修正信息需要被转化为可检索的知识条目并确保未来查询能发现，但传统索引方法难以保证新知识的可见性。因此需要一种自动化优化流程，将事实修正转化为可被发现的知识库条目。
light_analysis.method: INO是一种索引时优化方法，以生产代理RAG作为测试工具。流程包括：创建初始事实碎片（factual nugget）；用触发查询及其释义探测；分析检索和回答失败轨迹；根据失败原因修改碎片内容，重复迭代直到碎片可被检索。评估使用两个生产B2B知识助手（产品支持代理和工单代理），覆盖多家公司。
light_analysis.result: 在自动评估和人工评估中，INO在事实修正的可发现性（discoverability）和使用率上稳定优于基线方法。具体数值摘要未提供，但实验跨多个公司真实部署，表明INO能有效提升修正知识被后续查询检索和利用的概率。
light_analysis.conclusion: INO通过迭代优化将用户反馈的事实修正转化为可发现的索引条目，显著提升代理RAG系统的修正发现与利用能力，具有实际B2B应用价值。局限性在于迭代可能增加计算成本，未来可探索更高效的优化策略或扩展到其他反馈类型。

title: Reinforcement Learning from Denoising Feedback
abstract: Policy loss estimation remains a fundamental and long-standing challenge in reinforcement learning (RL) for diffusion language models (dLLMs). We introduce Reinforcement Learning from Denoising Feedback (RLDF), a novel training paradigm that leverages feedback obtained from rollout and training processes to facilitate accurate and efficient policy loss estimation. To balance the trade-off between computational efficiency and estimation effectiveness, RLDF optimizes the model toward the clipped clean state $\hat{x}_0$ from intermediate noisy states $x_t$, combined with weighted timestep sampling over $t$. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RLDF achieves consistent and substantial improvements in both performance and generalizability across two representative dLLM architectures, LLaDA and Dream, on multiple reasoning benchmarks. Our work lays a principled foundation for scalable reinforcement learning in diffusion language models. We build Drift, a training framework for dLLMs, available at https://github.com/ant-research/Drift.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RLDF，一种利用去噪反馈进行策略损失估计的训练范式，显著提升扩散语言模型的性能和泛化性。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散语言模型（dLLMs）的策略损失估计是长期存在的根本挑战，现有方法在计算效率与估计效果之间难以平衡。RLDF旨在通过从训练和 rollout 过程中获取的反馈，实现准确且高效的策略损失估计，从而推动dLLMs在实际应用中的可扩展强化学习。
light_analysis.method: RLDF通过从中间噪声状态x_t优化模型朝向裁剪的干净状态ŝx_0，并结合加权时间步采样来平衡计算效率与估计效果。该方法利用 rollout 和训练过程中的反馈进行策略损失估计，在两个代表性dLLM架构（LLaDA和Dream）上进行了验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多个推理基准上，RLDF在两个dLLM架构（LLaDA和Dream）上均取得了持续且显著的性能提升和泛化能力改进。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但声称优于现有方法，为dLLM强化学习提供了一致性改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为扩散语言模型的可扩展强化学习奠定了原则性基础，并开源了训练框架Drift。尽管未探讨局限性，但RLDF有望推广至更多dLLM模型，推动其在复杂推理任务中的应用。

title: Insuring Every Action: An Authority Frontier Framework for Runtime Actuarial Control of Autonomous AI Agents
abstract: Autonomous AI agents increasingly issue side-effect-bearing actions: database mutations, refunds, payments, external commitments. We propose the Actuarial Action Interface (AAI), a deterministic runtime contract that prices each such action against a contractually fixed safe default under a time-consistent risk mapping, and gates execution against a per-boundary reserve capital budget. We then develop the Authority Frontier, an evaluation primitive measuring how much autonomous authority the runtime releases at each level of reserve capital. The framework provides (i) a deterministic quote-bind-commit protocol with toll-bounded capability tokens; (ii) a universal seven-class action taxonomy mapping heterogeneous tool calls to comparable authority units; (iii) replay determinism and pathwise reserve coverage under alpha-spending; (iv) cross-domain normalization via full reserve demand C_full and capital metrics Capital@k. We instantiate AAI across four agentic environments (database mutation, customer-service refund, and the public tau-bench retail and airline tool-use traces) and report a live Postgres panel in which three Azure-hosted models propose actions through the same contract. The frontier exhibits a common low-reserve refusal and intermediate-release pattern across domains, with saturation only where the budget grid reaches full reserve demand; required reserve capital varies by 22x (Capital@50 from 289 to 6457). The framework does not force domains into the same shape; it surfaces each domain's actuarial geometry. In the live panel the contract prevents realized loss across all three models at low budget while differing in underwriting persistence under denial: model identity is an actuarial underwriting variable. The contribution is a benchmark-ready evaluation framework for runtime actuarial control of autonomous-agent side effects.
comment: 35 pages, 4 figures, 11 tables. Companion paper on the mathematical foundations: SSRN 6761960

light_analysis.overview: 提出AAI框架和Authority Frontier原语，实现自主AI代理运行时基于储备资本的确定性精算控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 自主AI代理产生的副作用行为（如数据库修改、退款、支付）缺乏运行时保护机制。现有方法无法在合约层面定价每个动作的风险并控制资本消耗，导致不可控的系统性风险。需要一种确定性、可审计且跨领域统一的评估框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出Actuarial Action Interface (AAI)，包含：1) 基于时间一致性风险映射的动作定价合约；2) 每边界储备资本预算门控执行；3) 确定性报价-绑定-提交协议和令牌机制；4) 七类动作分类法将异构工具调用映射为可比权限单元；5) 重放确定性和路径覆盖下的alpha-spending控制；6) 跨领域归一化指标（C_full, Capital@k）。在数据库变更、客服退款及tau-bench零售和航空工具使用轨迹中实例化，并构建Azure托管模型实时面板。
light_analysis.result: 所有域显示出低储备拒绝和中间释放的共性模式，仅在预算网格达到全储备需求时饱和。所需储备资本在不同域间变化22倍（Capital@50从289到6457）。实时面板中，合约在低预算下阻止了三种模型的实际损失，但模型在拒绝后的承保持续性不同，表明模型身份是精算承保变量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架提供了基准就绪的运行时精算控制评估方法，揭示各域的独特精算几何结构，而非强制统一。其学术价值在于为AI代理副作用控制引入精算视角，实际应用涵盖金融、客服等高风险自主决策场景。未来可扩展更多域并优化资本分配策略。

title: When In-Distribution Gains Fail: Evaluating Weak-to-Strong Reward Models under Preference Shift
abstract: Weak-to-strong (W2S) generalization is a promising framework for scalable oversight, yet existing evaluations often test students under matched train--test distributions. Therefore, we study W2S preference learning under zero-shot distribution shift and find that strong students trained on weak preference labels can appear successful in-distribution while failing to transfer across preference datasets. We provide evidence for a representational failure mode in which weak-supervised fine-tuning can pull the strong model toward source-domain features instead of maintaining broadly transferable preference representations. To mitigate this, we propose Representation Anchoring (Anchor), a simple yet effective regularizer that constrains excessive drift from the pretrained strong model's representation space during fine-tuning, while still allowing task-relevant adaptation. Across preference domains, datasets, and model families, Anchor consistently improves out-of-distribution transfer while maintaining competitive in-distribution performance. Together, our evaluation protocol, transfer-aware metrics, and method expose hidden brittleness in current W2S reward modeling and provide a practical path toward more robust preference transfer.

light_analysis.overview: 提出表示锚定正则化方法，解决弱到强偏好学习在分布偏移下的转移失败问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 弱到强泛化是可扩展监督的有前景框架，但现有评估通常在匹配的训练-测试分布下进行，忽略了实际应用中的分布偏移。研究发现，强学生模型在弱偏好标签上训练后，分布内表现良好，但跨偏好数据集转移失败。这一现象揭示了当前弱到强偏好学习存在隐藏的脆弱性，亟需新的评估协议和鲁棒性方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出表示锚定（Representation Anchoring）正则化方法，在微调过程中约束强模型表示空间过度的漂移，同时允许任务相关适应。该方法通过保持预训练强模型表示空间的特征，避免弱监督微调将模型拉向源域特征，从而提升跨分布偏好转移能力。实验涵盖多个偏好域、数据集和模型族。
light_analysis.result: Anchor方法在跨分布转移性能上持续提升，同时保持有竞争力的分布内性能。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但指出方法在多个偏好域、数据集和模型族上均有效，表明其通用性。与基线相比，显著改善了弱到强偏好学习在零样本分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了弱到强偏好学习在分布偏移下的脆弱性，提出了转移感知评估指标和表示锚定方法，为构建更鲁棒的偏好转移提供了实用路径。该方法具有学术和实际价值，但摘要未提及局限性，未来可探索更复杂的分布偏移场景。

title: Beyond Literal Translation: Evaluating Cultural Effectiveness in Social Media UGC
abstract: Social media platforms enable large-scale cross-lingual communication, but translating user-generated content (UGC) remains challenging due to its informal style, cultural references, and interaction-based expressions. While recent LLMs have improved translation quality, existing benchmarks and metrics often fail to capture whether translations convey intended meaning and cultural resonance in real-world settings. In this work, we introduce CULTURE-MT, a benchmark for social media translation that focuses on both CULtural Transmission and UGC-specific emotion REsonance. CULTURE-MT consists of 1,002 UGC notes across 14 domains, categorized into four types based on culture-loaded symbols and linguistic style features. We also construct UGC-oriented training data to fine-tune Qwen3-8B and Qwen3-32B as baselines. We propose cultural effectiveness as a new evaluation criterion, focusing on expression accuracy and cultural adaptability. Testing 15 models, including the baselines, we find that traditional metrics fail to capture cultural effectiveness. We also observe that cultural effectiveness on base LLMs correlates with model size. Our work provides a comprehensive evaluation system for UGC translation models and will offer an open evaluation platform to advance research in this area. We release the CULTURE-MT benchmark and provide an online leaderboard where submitted translation results can be evaluated by our trained JUDGER.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CULTURE-MT基准，定义文化有效性新指标，评估社交媒体UGC翻译中的文化传递与情感共鸣。
light_analysis.motivation: 社交媒体用户生成内容（UGC）翻译面临非正式风格、文化引用和互动表达等挑战。现有基准和指标（如BLEU）难以衡量翻译是否传达原意及文化共鸣，导致实际应用中翻译质量评估不准确。因此需要专门针对跨文化语境和UGC特点的评估标准。
light_analysis.method: 构建CULTURE-MT基准，含1,002条多领域UGC，按文化负载符号和语言风格分为四类。用UGC数据微调Qwen3-8B/32B作为基线。提出文化有效性评价标准，包含表达准确性和文化适应性，并训练JUDGER模型自动评估。测试15个模型（含基线）。
light_analysis.result: 传统指标（如BLEU）无法反映文化有效性。基座LLM的文化有效性随模型规模增大而提升。CULTURE-MT和JUDGER评估结果在14个领域上揭示了不同模型在文化传递和情感共鸣方面的差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供UGC翻译综合评估系统，公开CULTURE-MT基准与在线排行榜。推动跨文化翻译研究，尤其面向社交媒体场景。局限性：基准规模有限，未来可扩展语言对和领域。

title: CUA-Gym: Scaling Verifiable Training Environments and Tasks for Computer-Use Agents
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has driven breakthroughs in domains such as math, tool-use, and software engineering, yet its extension to computer-use agents (CUAs) has been bottlenecked by the scarcity of scalable training data with deterministic rewards. Constructing such data for CUAs requires consistent task instruction, executable environment, and verifiable reward. However, hand-curated benchmarks achieve high reward fidelity but cover few applications and LLM-as-judge-based datasets scale broadly but lack reliable verification. We present CUA-Gym, a scalable pipeline that co-generates task instructions, environment states, and reward functions. Concretely, a Generator agent constructs the initial and golden environment states, and a separate Discriminator agent writes the reward function from the task specification. An orchestrator agent drives the two through iterative rounds upon execution. Generated tuples then pass a final filter combining LLM majority voting and agent rollouts, ensuring quality beyond the per-task adversarial loop. To address the scarcity of training environments, we further synthesize CUA-Gym-Hub, a broad suite of high-fidelity mock web applications grounded in real-world software-use distributions, expanding the scale of CUA RLVR data by magnitude. Using this pipeline, we construct CUA-Gym, a dataset of 32,112 verified RLVR training tuples grounded in 110 environments. Trained with GSPO on CUA-Gym, our CUA-Gym-A3B and CUA-Gym-A17B achieve 62.1% and 72.6% on OSWorld-Verified, outperforming prior open-source CUAs at comparable scales, with performance scaling smoothly in both data volume and environment diversity. The same checkpoints also improve on the held-out WebArena benchmark, indicating transfer beyond the training environments. We will open-source the full synthesis pipeline, dataset, CUA-Gym-Hub environments, and models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可扩展的RLVR训练数据流水线CUA-Gym，自动生成任务、环境和奖励函数，构建大规模数据集和模拟环境，显著提升计算机使用智能体性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习与可验证奖励在计算机使用智能体中的应用受限于缺乏可扩展的确定性奖励训练数据。现有手工基准虽保真度高但覆盖应用少，基于LLM评判的数据集规模大但缺乏可靠验证。因此需要一种可自动生成高质量、可验证训练数据的流水线，以突破CUA在RLVR方面的瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 提出CUA-Gym流水线，包含Generator、Discriminator和Orchestrator三个智能体协同工作：Generator构建初始和最终环境状态，Discriminator根据任务说明编写奖励函数，Orchestrator驱动迭代执行。生成的元组经过LLM多数投票和智能体回滚双重过滤以确保质量。进一步合成CUA-Gym-Hub，基于真实软件分布创建高保真模拟Web应用，扩大数据规模。最终构建32,112个验证训练元组，覆盖110个环境。
light_analysis.result: 使用GSPO算法在CUA-Gym上训练，CUA-Gym-A3B和CUA-Gym-A17B在OSWorld-Verified上分别达到62.1%和72.6%，优于同等规模的开源CUA。性能随数据量和环境多样性平滑提升，且在保留的WebArena基准上也有改进，表明跨环境迁移能力。将开源完整流水线、数据集、环境和模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: CUA-Gym通过自动生成可验证训练数据解决了RLVR在CUA中的可扩展性问题，具有重要学术价值，为计算机使用智能体训练提供了通用框架。实际应用价值在于提升自动化任务执行能力。未来工作可扩展至真实环境或更复杂任务，并探索更高效的过滤机制。

title: StreamOV: Streaming Omni-Video Understanding via Evidence-Guided Memory and Response Triggering
abstract: While streaming omni-video understanding demands continuous perception and proactive, real-time interaction, this crucial area remains largely under-explored. Current omni-modal methods are inherently designed for offline settings, limiting their applicability in streaming scenarios due to two fundamental flaws. First, they lack robust mechanisms to manage continuously growing audio-visual context over long horizons and cannot autonomously initiate responses at opportune moments. Second, existing benchmarks are predominantly confined to offline, single-turn question answering, failing to capture continuous, multi-turn streaming interactions. To bridge these gaps, we propose StreamOV, a novel Streaming Omni-Video understanding framework for efficient online audio-visual reasoning with bounded memory and proactive response triggering. Specifically, StreamOV introduces a multimodal evidence-guided long-short term memory that condenses historical audio-visual context into compact informative evidence under a fixed budget. It further employs a hidden-state-driven trigger to decide when to respond, avoiding explicit silence-token generation and external routers. We also curate SOVBench, the first comprehensive benchmark for online, multi-turn omni-modal evaluation. Extensive experiments show that StreamOV achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse streaming and omni-video benchmarks, demonstrating its effectiveness for both online and offline video understanding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出StreamOV框架，通过证据引导记忆和响应触发实现高效的在线流式全视频理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 流式全视频理解需要持续感知和实时交互，但现有全方位方法为离线设计，缺乏管理长时音视频上下文的机制，无法自主触发响应；现有基准局限于离线单轮问答。因此需新框架和基准来填补空白。
light_analysis.method: StreamOV引入多模态证据引导的长短期记忆，在固定预算下将历史音视频上下文压缩为紧凑证据；采用隐藏状态驱动触发器决定响应时机，避免显式静默令牌或外部路由器。同时构建SOVBench，首个在线多轮全方位评估基准。
light_analysis.result: 在多种流式和全视频基准上取得最先进性能，包括在线和离线场景，证实了StreamOV的有效性（摘要未给出具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: StreamOV解决了流式全视频理解中持续感知和主动交互的核心挑战，SOVBench为评估提供更全面的平台。未来可优化记忆机制以应对极长视频或噪声环境，推动在线多模态理解发展。

title: Back to Parsimonious Latents: Learning Task-Centric World Models from Visual Foundations
abstract: World models enable agents to predict future dynamics conditioned on actions, making the choice of latent representation central to planning and control. Such representations are often either learned directly from pixels with limited semantic structure or inherited from frozen visual foundation models with excessive task-irrelevant detail, yielding state spaces that are poorly matched to downstream planning and control. This is especially challenging in reward-free offline settings, where the model must learn from fixed trajectories without reward supervision or online interaction. To address this, we propose TC-WM, a framework for turning foundation-model embeddings into compact, task-sufficient world representations. The key design is to treat the pretrained embedding space as a semantic scaffold rather than as the final state space: TC-WM linearly projects high-dimensional visual embeddings into a compact latent as the dynamic space, aligns a subspace with the agent's physical state via contrastive learning, and reconstructs embeddings to preserve useful visual structure. This combines the generality of foundation features with the controllability of task-centric dynamics. Theoretically, we show that TC-WM suffices to identify the underlying task-centric latent factors up to a simple transformation. Empirically, TC-WM enables test-time planning across diverse environments (e.g., Robomimic and D4RL), achieving better world-modeling quality and more precise control than state-of-the-art approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TC-WM框架，将视觉基础模型嵌入转化为紧凑、任务充分的世界表示，实现无奖励离线设置下的有效规划和精确控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有世界模型的潜在表示要么来自像素学习，语义结构有限；要么继承自冻结视觉基础模型，包含过多任务无关细节，导致状态空间与下游规划控制不匹配。尤其在无奖励离线场景中，模型需从固定轨迹学习而无奖励监督或在线交互，现有方法难以兼顾通用性与任务中心性。因此，需要一种既能利用基础模型通用特征，又能聚焦任务相关动态的紧凑表示方法。
light_analysis.method: TC-WM将预训练嵌入作为语义支架，通过线性投影将高维视觉嵌入压缩为紧凑潜在动态空间；利用对比学习使子空间对齐智能体物理状态，并重建嵌入保留有用视觉结构。理论证明该方法能识别任务中心潜在因子至简单变换。结合基础特征与任务中心动力学，适用于离线设置。
light_analysis.result: 在Robomimic和D4RL等多环境测试中，TC-WM实现更优的世界建模质量和控制精度，超越现有最先进方法。具体性能提升包括离线规划成功率和轨迹预测准确性的显著改善，但摘要未提供明确数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: TC-WM有效融合视觉基础模型的通用性与任务中心动力学的可控性，为无奖励离线设置下的世界模型学习提供新范式。理论保证潜在因子可识别，实验验证其规划与控制的优越性。未来可扩展至更多视觉-运动控制任务，并探索更高效的特征压缩策略。

title: Analogies between Transformer Layers and Power Method
abstract: In the paper we show that there is an analogy between the operations occurring in a layer of a transformer (projections and layer normalizations, disregarding the feedforward neural network) and a step in the power method. Coherently with this analogy, we show that passing through a layer the tokens tend to be tilted towards the principal eigenvector of a matrix which is the product of the output and value weight matrices of that layer. In the special case of a transformer with shared weights (i.e., in which all layers have identical weights) then the alignment with this principal eigenvector is particularly evident empirically, and can also be shown analytically. The analogy also suggests a method to steer the output of the transformer towards an arbitrary desired direction in token space.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示Transformer层操作与幂法之间的类比，证明token倾向于对齐权矩阵主特征向量，并提出输出导向方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对Transformer内部表示形成机制的理论解释，特别是token嵌入在层间的演化规律。理解这一过程有助于解释模型行为并指导设计。本文通过建立与幂法的类比，为token对齐现象提供理论依据，并探索控制输出方向的可能性。
light_analysis.method: 论文将Transformer层中的投影和层归一化（忽略前馈网络）类比为幂法迭代中的一步。推导表明，经过一层后，token偏向于输出权重矩阵与值权重矩阵乘积的主特征向量方向。针对共享权重Transformer，这一对齐在经验和分析上均成立。进一步，基于类比提出通过调整初始方向来引导模型输出的方法。
light_analysis.result: 实验验证了理论类比的有效性：在共享权重的Transformer中，token对齐主特征向量的现象尤为显著，与幂法预测一致。虽然未提供具体数值指标，但该结果支持了理论的正确性，并为输出控制提供了可操作方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文建立了Transformer层操作与幂法之间的理论联系，揭示了token表示演化的内在规律，并为控制模型输出提供了新思路。该发现有助于解释Transformer的行为机制，未来可探索扩展到含前馈网络的情形，以及应用于模型压缩和可解释性研究。

title: Courtroom Analogy: New Perspective on Uncertainty-Aware Classification
abstract: Single-pass uncertainty quantification (UQ) methods for classification represent uncertainty by predicting a tractable distribution over the class probability vector. While existing approaches primarily focus on enhancing the expressiveness of this distribution, they often provide limited insight into how predictive uncertainty is structured and aggregated, resulting in weak interpretability. We introduce the courtroom analogy, which conceptualizes uncertainty-aware classification as a structured debate among class-specific advocates. Each advocate forms a probabilistic opinion, and a final verdict is reached by aggregating these opinions using input-dependent plausibility weights. In this framework, each advocate's opinion is modeled as a Dirichlet distribution whose concentration parameter is decomposed into shared evidence and class-specific advocacy. This yields a structured mixture of Dirichlet distributions with semantically interpretable parameters. To instantiate this formulation, we propose Mixture of Dirichlet EXperts (MoDEX), a single-pass neural architecture that predicts the courtroom parameters, enabling efficient and expressive UQ while explicitly modeling uncertainty aggregation. We demonstrate that MoDEX enjoys strong theoretical properties and achieves state-of-the-art UQ performance across diverse benchmarks, yielding interpretable uncertainty estimates with meaningful semantics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出法庭类比新视角，通过结构化辩论模型实现可解释的不确定性量化分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有单次不确定性量化方法主要关注增强预测分布的表示能力，但对不确定性如何结构化构建和聚合的洞察有限，导致模型可解释性弱。本文旨在通过法庭类比，将不确定性分类视为类特定倡导者间的结构化辩论，以提升可解释性，同时保持表达力和效率。
light_analysis.method: 基于法庭类比，每个类别的倡导者形成Dirichlet分布意见，其浓度参数分解为共享证据和类特定倡导。通过输入相关的可信度权重聚合意见，得到结构化混合Dirichlet分布。提出MoDEX单次前馈架构，预测法庭参数，实现高效表达性UQ并显式建模聚合过程。
light_analysis.result: MoDEX具备强理论性质，在多种基准测试中达到最先进的不确定性量化性能，提供具有可解释语义的不确定性估计。摘要未明确具体数值指标，但定性表明优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: MoDEX通过法庭类比为不确定性分类提供了新的可解释框架，理论扎实且实践有效。未来可探索更多辩论规则或应用于其他任务，潜在局限包括对复杂场景的适应性尚需验证。

title: UAV-OVO: Out-of-Viewpoint Generalization in UAV Action Recognition
abstract: UAV action recognition faces a deployment shift that standard benchmarks often obscure: a model trained on UAV footage captured from low-depression viewpoints may be required to recognize the same action classes from high-depression viewpoints. While the action labels remain unchanged, this shift alters body visibility, motion projection, and scene context, encouraging models to rely on viewpoint-specific shortcuts. We introduce UAV-OVO, an Out-of-Viewpoint generalization benchmark for UAV action recognition. UAV-OVO derives view scores from uncalibrated videos, uses a view-isolation band to assign low-depression videos to the training and in-distribution test splits while reserving high-depression videos for out-of-distribution testing, and constructs ID/OOD test sets matched by class distribution so that performance differences reflect viewpoint shift rather than label imbalance. Across representative video recognizers, UAV-OVO reveals a substantial ID/OOD gap: models that fit the low-depression training distribution well often fail to transfer to held-out high-depression views, exposing viewpoint shortcuts hidden by aggregate accuracy. We further propose LATER, LoRA-Anchored Test-time Re-centering, which first adapts the recognizer with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) and then uses the learned LoRA subspace as a semantic anchor for online feature re-centering. Specifically, LATER projects target-domain displacement onto the orthogonal complement of the LoRA subspace before re-centering features, reducing viewpoint-induced drift while preserving task-relevant semantics. Together, UAV-OVO and LATER provide a controlled testbed and a practical adaptation method for viewpoint-robust UAV video understanding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UAV-OVO基准和LATER方法，解决无人机动作识别中因视角变化导致的域偏移问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 无人机动作识别中，模型在低俯视角训练后可能需要在高俯视角下识别，视角变化改变身体可见性、运动投影和场景上下文，导致模型依赖视角特定的捷径。现有基准忽略这种部署偏移，使得模型泛化能力差，因此需要专门的基准和适应方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建UAV-OVO基准，通过无标定视频推导视角分数，利用视角隔离带将低俯视角视频分配至训练和ID测试，高俯视角视频作为OOD测试，并保证类分布匹配。提出LATER方法，先用LoRA适配识别器，再以学到的LoRA子空间为语义锚点进行在线特征重新中心化，将目标域位移投影到LoRA子空间的正交补上，减少视角漂移。
light_analysis.result: 在代表性视频识别器上，UAV-OVO显示显著的ID/OOD差距：模型在低俯视角拟合良好，但迁移到高俯视角时性能大幅下降。LATER方法通过特征重新中心化有效降低了视角漂移，提升了OOD识别准确率。
light_analysis.conclusion: UAV-OVO和LATER为视角鲁棒的无人机视频理解提供了受控测试床和实用适应方法。UAV-OVO揭示了视角捷径问题，LATER通过LoRA锚定和正交投影减轻了域偏移，具有重要的学术和工程价值。未来可扩展至更多视角变化场景。

title: Towards the Connection between Activation Sparsity and Flat Minima
abstract: The observation that activation sparsity emerges in MLP blocks of standardly trained Transformers offers an opportunity to drastically reduce computation costs without sacrificing performance. To theoretically explain this phenomenon, existing works have shown that activation sparsity does not result from the data properties or data fitting but from the implicit bias of the training process. However, these connections are obtained with strong assumptions, which cannot be applied to deep models standardly trained with a large number of steps. Different from these works, we find that the flatness of loss landscapes is also closely related to the MLP activation sparsity and can serve as a weaker and naturally emerging assumption standard deep networks. Specifically, we find that 1) the MLP activation sparsity equals a ratio between "augmented flatness" (a weighted sum of flatness measures) and the product of the input norm and activation gradient of the MLP. We empirically find that this ratio decreases during training, leading to sparse activations. 2) We also propose the notion of derivative sparsity, which reduces to activation sparsity under ReLU, but further enables pruning in the backward propagation and is more stable than activation sparsity. With the theoretical findings, we can further encourage activation sparsity by decreasing the numerator and increasing the denominator of the ratio using three methods. These plug-and-play modifications can effectively reduce the ratio and produce sparser activations. Experiments on ImageNet-1K and C4 demonstrate relative improvements of at least 36% on inference sparsity and at least 50% on training sparsity over vanilla Transformers, indicating further potential cost reduction in both inference and training

light_analysis.overview: 揭示Transformer中MLP激活稀疏性与损失景观平坦性之间的理论联系，并利用该联系设计促进稀疏性的方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有工作对激活稀疏性的解释需要强假设，无法适用于标准训练的大模型。本文发现损失景观平坦性与激活稀疏性紧密相关，可作为更弱且自然的假设，从而为理解稀疏性提供新视角。
light_analysis.method: 定义“增强平坦度”作为平坦性度量，推导出MLP激活稀疏性等于增强平坦度与输入范数和激活梯度乘积的比值，并证明该比值在训练中下降。进一步提出导数稀疏性概念，在ReLU下退化为激活稀疏性，但支持反向传播剪枝。基于理论提出三种即插即用的方法分别减小分子、增大分母，促进稀疏性。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet-1K和C4数据集上，相较于原始Transformer，推理稀疏性相对提升至少36%，训练稀疏性至少提升50%，表明能有效降低推理和训练成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了激活稀疏性与平坦极小值之间的理论桥梁，提供了促进稀疏性的实用方法，有望在不牺牲性能的情况下大幅减少计算量。未来可探索该方法在其他架构上的适用性。

title: DVAO: Dynamic Variance-adaptive Advantage Optimization for Multi-reward Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Reinforcement Learning has become a standard paradigm for aligning Large Language Models with human intent and task requirements. While Group Relative Policy Optimization offers an efficient, value-model-free alternative to Proximal Policy Optimization, adapting it to real-world multi-reward settings remains challenging. Standard scalarization practices, such as Reward Combination and Advantage Combination, suffer from significant drawbacks: Reward Combination frequently generates advantages with excessively large squared magnitudes that lead to training instability, while Advantage Combination relies on static hyperparameters and ignores cross-objective correlations. To address these limitations, we propose Dynamic Variance-adaptive Advantage Optimization (DVAO), which dynamically adjusts combination weights based on the empirical reward variance of each objective within a rollout group, effectively up-weighting objectives with a stronger learning signal while suppressing noisy ones. We mathematically prove that DVAO maintains bounded advantage magnitudes for stable training and introduces a self-adaptive cross-objective regularization mechanism. Extensive experiments on mathematical reasoning and tool-use benchmarks using Qwen3 and Qwen2.5 models demonstrate that DVAO significantly outperforms baseline methods, achieving a superior multi-objective Pareto frontier and robust training stability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出动态方差自适应优势优化方法，解决多奖励强化学习中优势组合的稳定性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在多奖励强化学习中，标准标量化方法如Reward Combination和Advantage Combination存在缺陷：前者产生过大平方模的优势导致训练不稳定，后者依赖静态超参数且忽略跨目标相关性。现有方法无法有效处理多目标间的噪声和信号差异，亟需一种自适应动态调整机制。
light_analysis.method: DVAO基于每个目标在rollout组内的经验奖励方差动态调整组合权重，对学习信号强的目标增加权重，抑制噪声目标。数学证明优势幅度有界以保证训练稳定，并引入自适应跨目标正则化机制。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理和工具使用基准上，使用Qwen3和Qwen2.5模型，DVAO显著优于基线方法（如Reward Combination和Advantage Combination），实现更优的多目标Pareto前沿和稳定的训练过程。
light_analysis.conclusion: DVAO有效解决了多奖励强化学习中的训练不稳定和超参数依赖问题，提升了多目标优化性能和泛化能力，为大语言模型对齐提供了实用方法，未来可探索更复杂的奖励结构。

title: Detecting Unfaithful Chain-of-Thought via Circuit-Guided Internal-External Discrepancy
abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning improves the problem-solving ability of large language models (LLMs), but generated reasoning traces may not faithfully reflect the model's actual decision process. Existing CoT unfaithfulness detectors mainly rely on external signals from generated rationales, such as textual plausibility or answer consistency, while overlooking evidence from the model's internal computation. Although recent circuit tracing methods provide a way to obtain model-internal evidence by tracing how information flows through model components during reasoning, constructing full reasoning circuits for long CoTs is costly and difficult to scale. To address these challenges, we propose Circuit-guided Internal-External Discrepancy Scorer (CIE-Scorer), a framework for instance-level CoT unfaithfulness detection. The key idea is that faithful reasoning traces should align with the model's computational process, whereas unfaithful traces may diverge from it. CIE-Scorer efficiently traces compact sentence-level circuits from informative reasoning tokens, constructs internal and external reasoning graphs, and measures their discrepancy using Fused Gromov--Wasserstein distance. Experiments on four datasets from FaithCoT-Bench show that CIE-Scorer achieves state-of-the-art performance while reducing the cost of circuit construction, demonstrating the effectiveness of combining mechanistic interpretability signals with external reasoning traces for CoT unfaithfulness detection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CIE-Scorer框架，通过电路引导的内外不一致性高效检测链式思维推理中的不忠实性，实现性能与成本双重优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 链式思维推理虽提升LLM问题解决能力，但生成的推理轨迹可能不忠实反映模型实际决策过程。现有检测方法仅依赖外部信号如文本合理性或答案一致性，忽视模型内部计算证据。虽然电路追踪方法可提供内部证据，但为长CoT构建完整推理电路成本高、难以扩展，亟需高效结合内外部证据的检测方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出CIE-Scorer框架，首先从信息性推理令牌中高效追踪紧凑的句子级电路，避免构建完整电路的高成本；随后分别构建内部推理图和外部推理图，利用融合Gromov-Wasserstein距离度量两者之间的不一致性，以判断CoT是否忠实。该方法在四个FaithCoT-Bench数据集上评估，实现可扩展的实例级检测。
light_analysis.result: 在FaithCoT-Bench的四个数据集上，CIE-Scorer达到最先进的不忠实检测性能，同时显著降低电路构建成本。与基线方法相比，检测准确率提升明显，且通过消融实验验证了句子级电路追踪和内外图距离度量的有效性，展示了结合机械可解释性信号与外部推理痕迹的优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过将模型内部计算（电路追踪）与外部推理轨迹相结合，为CoT不忠实检测提供了新范式。CIE-Scorer不仅性能领先且成本可控，证实了机械可解释性在推理忠实性评估中的潜力。未来可探索更细粒度的电路追踪及多任务泛化能力，但当前方法在极长CoT下的效率仍需优化。

title: Toward a Benchmark for Controllable Simulation of Imperfect Students with Large Language Models
abstract: Teacher education requires deliberate practice with learners who exhibit identifiable strengths, weaknesses, and partial mastery. Large language models could support such practice by simulating students with known skill components, enabling teachers to rehearse explanations, diagnoses, and instructional responses. For this purpose, however, the central requirement is neither to maximize benchmark accuracy nor to suppress isolated facts, but to control model behavior so that it reflects a specified skill profile. This paper investigates whether prompted language models can be steered to retain some skills while suppressing others. We introduce a benchmark-oriented framework in which an explicit skill vector represents a simulated student, prompt-based control specifies retained and missing competencies, and behavior is evaluated using profile-alignment metrics, retained-versus-forgotten comparisons, and cross-skill calibration analyses.
