We propose D2Skill, a dynamic dual-granularity skill bank for agentic RL that organizes reusable experience into task skills for high-level guidance and step skills for fine-grained decision support and error correction. D2Skill jointly trains the policy and skill bank through paired baseline and skill-injected rollouts under the same policy, using their performance gap to derive hindsight utility signals for both skill updating and policy optimization. Built entirely from training-time experience, the skill bank is continuously expanded through reflection and maintained with utility-aware retrieval and pruning. Experiments on ALFWorld, WebShop, and Search-Augmented QA tasks show that D2Skill substantially improves performance over skill-free baselines across models of different scales. Further ablations and analyses show that both dual-granularity skill modeling and dynamic skill maintenance are critical to these gains, while the learned skills exhibit higher utility, transfer across evaluation settings, and introduce only modest training overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出动态双粒度技能库D2Skill，通过组织任务技能和步骤技能，实现智能体强化学习中经验的高效重用与演化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于技能的方法主要提取轨迹级指导，缺乏维护演化技能记忆的机制，难以充分利用可重用经验以提升智能体强化学习性能。
light_analysis.method: D2Skill构建双粒度技能库：任务技能提供高层指导，步骤技能提供细粒度决策支持。通过配对基线回滚和技能注入回滚，利用性能差距产生后验效用信号，同时更新技能和优化策略。技能库基于训练经验通过反思扩展，并采用效用感知检索和剪枝维护。
light_analysis.result: 在ALFWorld、WebShop等任务上，D2Skill显著优于无技能基线，跨不同规模模型均有效。消融实验表明双粒度建模和动态维护是关键，学习技能具有高实用性、可迁移性，且训练开销适度。
light_analysis.conclusion: D2Skill通过动态双粒度技能库有效提升了智能体强化学习性能，验证了技能记忆演化的价值。未来可探索跨任务迁移和更复杂技能结构。

title: Characterizing Linear Alignment Across Language Models
abstract: Language models increasingly appear to learn similar representations, despite differences in training objectives, architectures, and data modalities. This emerging compatibility between independently trained models introduces new opportunities for cross-model alignment to downstream objectives. Moreover, this capability unlocks new potential application domains, such as settings where security, privacy, or competitive constraints prohibit direct data or model sharing. In this work, we investigate the extent to which representational convergence enables practical linear alignment between large language models. Specifically, we learn affine transformations between the final hidden states of independent models and empirically evaluate these mappings across text generation, embedding classification, and out-of-distribution detection. We find that performance is largely preserved across model pairs, and show for the first time that linear alignment sometimes enables text generation across independently trained models. We further highlight a potential application of linear alignment for privacy-preserving cross-silo inference. The framework learns an affine transformation over a shared public dataset and uses homomorphic encryption to protect client queries. By encrypting only the linear classification operation, the method achieves sub-second inference latency.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示语言模型间线性对齐的可行性，并提出隐私保护的跨模型推理框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 独立训练的语言模型尽管存在差异，但表示趋向兼容，为跨模型对齐提供可能。然而，直接共享数据或模型受限于安全、隐私或竞争约束。现有研究多关注单模型内对齐，缺乏对跨模型线性映射实际效用的探索，尤其是在文本生成等复杂任务上。该研究旨在验证线性对齐的实用性，并开发隐私保护应用。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法为学习独立大语言模型最终隐藏状态间的仿射变换（线性映射+偏置），在共享公共数据集上优化。评估任务涵盖文本生成（自回归解码）、嵌入分类和分布外检测。隐私保护方案结合同态加密，仅对线性分类操作加密，客户端查询经变换后由加密分类器处理，解密得结果，实现亚秒级延迟。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示线性对齐在模型对间保持文本生成、分类和分布外检测性能，首次证明其能实现跨独立模型的文本生成。隐私推理场景下，加密仅作用于线性层，延迟低于1秒，验证了实际效率。未报告与基线的具体数值对比，但强调性能“ largely preserved”。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作系统验证了语言模型间线性对齐的可行性，并拓展至隐私保护跨部门推理，为安全场景下的模型协作提供新路径。学术上揭示了表示收敛的实用价值，应用上可避免敏感数据共享。局限性包括可能依赖模型相似性，未来可研究非线性对齐或扩展至多模态模型。

title: OrthoPhys: Physically Plausible Video Generation with Orthogonal-View Geometry Guidance
abstract: Recent progress in video generation has led to substantial improvements in visual fidelity, yet ensuring physically consistent motion remains a fundamental challenge. Intuitively, this limitation can be attributed to the fact that real-world object motion unfolds in three-dimensional space, while video observations provide only partial, view-dependent projections of such dynamics. To address these issues, we propose OrthoPhys, a two-stage framework that leverages orthogonal-view geometry guidance to enforce physical plausibility. Instead of directly generating unstructured 2D videos, our first stage generates synchronized, four-view orthogonal videos of the foreground dynamics. By incorporating a geometry-enhanced attention mechanism across these orthogonal views, this stage effectively enforces 3D spatial coherence and implicitly grounds the motion in physical attributes. In the second stage, these physically consistent orthogonal foregrounds serve as rigid guidance to synthesize the final complete video, seamlessly learning the interaction between foreground dynamics and the background context. To support this orthogonal-view training paradigm, we construct PhysMV, a dataset containing 40K scenes, each consisting of four orthogonal viewpoints, resulting in a total of 160K video sequences. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OrthoPhys significantly improves physical realism and spatial-temporal coherence over existing video generation methods. Project page: https://anonymous.4open.science/w/Phys4D/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 OrthoPhys 框架，通过正交视图几何引导生成物理合理的视频。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频生成方法在视觉保真度上有显著提升，但难以保证物理上一致的运动，因为真实世界的物体运动发生在三维空间，而视频观测仅提供部分、视图依赖的投影。传统方法直接生成非结构化二维视频，缺乏三维空间约束，导致运动不物理。该研究旨在通过引入正交视图几何引导，强制三维空间连贯性，使生成视频更符合物理规律。
light_analysis.method: 提出两阶段框架 OrthoPhys。第一阶段使用几何增强注意力机制生成同步的四视角正交前景视频，强制三维空间相干性；第二阶段以这些物理一致的正交前景为刚性指导，合成最终完整视频，学习前景与背景交互。构建 PhysMV 数据集，包含 40K 场景、每场景四正交视角，共 160K 视频序列。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，OrthoPhys 在物理真实感和时空连贯性上显著优于现有视频生成方法。具体提升幅度需参考论文全文，摘要未提供详细数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: OrthoPhys 通过正交视图几何引导有效改善了视频生成的物理合理性，为生成更真实的动态场景提供了新范式。数据集和框架开源，未来可探索更复杂的物理交互和多视角融合。

title: PowerFlow: Unlocking the Dual Nature of LLMs via Principled Distribution Matching
abstract: Unsupervised Reinforcement Learning from Internal Feedback (RLIF) has emerged as a promising paradigm for eliciting the latent capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) without external supervision. However, current methods rely on heuristic intrinsic rewards, which often lack a well-defined theoretical optimization target and are prone to degenerative biases. In this work, we introduce PowerFlow, a principled framework that reformulates unsupervised fine-tuning as a distribution matching problem. By casting GFlowNet as an amortized variational sampler for unnormalized densities, we propose a length-aware Trajectory-Balance objective that explicitly neutralizes the structural length biases inherent in autoregressive generation. By targeting $α$-power distributions, PowerFlow enables the directional elicitation of the dual nature of LLMs: sharpening the distribution ($α> 1$) to intensify logical reasoning, or flattening it ($α< 1$) to unlock expressive creativity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PowerFlow consistently outperforms existing RLIF methods, matching or even exceeding supervised GRPO. Furthermore, by mitigating over-sharpening in aligned models, our approach achieves simultaneous gains in diversity and quality, shifting the Pareto frontier in creative tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PowerFlow框架，将无监督微调重新表述为分布匹配问题，通过GFlowNet和α-power分布同时提升LLM的逻辑推理和创造力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的无监督强化学习从内部反馈（RLIF）方法依赖启发式内在奖励，缺乏明确定义的优化目标且易产生退化偏差。需要一种理论驱动的框架来引导LLM的潜在能力，同时克服自回归生成中的长度偏差。
light_analysis.method: 引入GFlowNet作为未归一化密度的摊销变分采样器，提出长度感知的轨迹平衡目标，消除自回归生成中的结构长度偏差。通过目标α-power分布，α>1增强逻辑推理，α<1解锁创造力。该方法将无监督微调转化为分布匹配问题。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明PowerFlow持续优于现有RLIF方法，匹配甚至超越监督式GRPO。通过缓解对齐模型中的过度锐化，在创造性任务中同时提升多样性和质量，推动了帕累托前沿。
light_analysis.conclusion: PowerFlow通过理论驱动的分布匹配统一了LLM的两种能力（逻辑推理与创造力），兼具无监督和可控性优势。未来可探索更广泛的α值范围或其他分布族。
tags: Unsupervised Reinforcement Learning from Internal Feedback

title: Frequency Matters: Fast Model-Agnostic Data Curation for Pruning and Quantization
abstract: Post-training model compression is essential for enhancing the portability of Large Language Models (LLMs) while preserving their performance. While several compression approaches have been proposed, less emphasis has been placed on selecting the most suitable set of data (the so-called \emph{calibration data}) for finding the compressed model configuration. The choice of calibration data is a critical step in preserving model capabilities both intra- and inter-tasks. In this work, we address the challenge of identifying high-performance calibration sets for both pruning and quantization by analyzing intrinsic data properties rather than model-specific signals. We introduce \texttt{\textbf{ZipCal}}, a model-agnostic data curation strategy that maximizes lexical diversity based on Zipfian power laws. Experiments demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms standard uniform random sampling across various pruning benchmarks. Notably, it also performs on par, in terms of downstream performance, with a state-of-the-art method that relies on model perplexity. The latter becomes prohibitively expensive at large-scale models and datasets, while \texttt{\textbf{ZipCal}} is on average $\sim$240$\times$ faster due to its tractable linear complexity\footnote{We make the code and the experiments available at https://github.com/FrancescoMonaco/ZipCal.}.
comment: Added statistical analysis, mechanistic analysis and a comparison with a generative baseline. 22 pages

light_analysis.overview: 提出模型无关的数据策展策略ZipCal，基于Zipf幂律最大化词汇多样性以高效选择校准数据，加速剪枝和量化。
light_analysis.motivation: 后训练模型压缩对LLM便携性至关重要，但现有研究多聚焦压缩方法本身，忽视了校准数据的选择。随机采样效果不佳，而基于模型困惑度的方法在大规模模型和数据集上计算成本高昂。因此，急需一种高效、模型无关的数据策展方法，既能保证压缩后性能，又具有可扩展性。
light_analysis.method: ZipCal是一种模型无关的数据策展策略，通过分析数据内在的词汇分布特性（Zipf幂律）来最大化校准集的词汇多样性，而非依赖特定模型的信号。该方法具有线性复杂度，计算高效，适用于大规模模型和数据集。实验中使用多种剪枝和量化基准进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 在多种剪枝基准上，ZipCal一致优于标准均匀随机采样。在下游任务性能方面，与基于模型困惑度的最先进方法相当，但平均速度快约240倍，显著降低了计算开销，验证了其高效性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ZipCal成功解决了压缩校准数据选择的关键问题，提供了一种高效、模型无关的解决方案，大幅加速了LLM压缩流程。该方法在保持性能的同时实现了线性复杂度，为大规模LLM的实用化部署提供了有力工具。未来可探索其他数据内在属性的影响。

title: Is Human Annotation Necessary? Iterative MBR Distillation for Error Span Detection in Machine Translation
abstract: Error Span Detection (ESD) is a crucial subtask in Machine Translation (MT) evaluation, aiming to identify the location and severity of translation errors. While fine-tuning models on human-annotated data improves ESD performance, acquiring such data is expensive and prone to inconsistencies among annotators. To address this, we propose a novel self-evolution framework based on Minimum Bayes Risk (MBR) decoding, named Iterative MBR Distillation for ESD, which eliminates the reliance on human annotations by leveraging an off-the-shelf LLM to generate pseudo-labels. Extensive experiments on the WMT Metrics Shared Task datasets demonstrate that models trained solely on these self-generated pseudo-labels outperform both unadapted base model and supervised baselines trained on human annotations at the system and span levels, while maintaining competitive sentence-level performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需人工标注的迭代MBR蒸馏框架，通过LLM生成伪标签训练错误跨度检测模型，性能超越监督基线。
light_analysis.motivation: 错误跨度检测（ESD）是机器翻译评估的关键子任务，但人工标注数据成本高昂且标注者间存在不一致性。现有方法依赖人工标注数据进行微调，限制了可扩展性和一致性。因此，本文旨在消除对人工标注的依赖，利用自生成伪标签实现模型自我进化。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于最小贝叶斯风险（MBR）解码的迭代蒸馏框架，使用现成的大语言模型（LLM）生成伪标签，无需任何人工标注。通过迭代训练，模型从自身输出中学习，逐步提升ESD性能。在WMT Metrics共享任务数据集上进行实验，评估系统级、跨度级和句子级性能。
light_analysis.result: 在WMT Metrics数据集上，仅使用自生成伪标签训练的模型在系统级和跨度级指标上均优于未适应的基础模型和监督基线（使用人工标注训练），同时在句子级性能上保持竞争力。具体提升数值摘要未明确说明，但强调性能超越监督方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了无需人工标注即可实现高性能ESD的可能性，通过自进化框架降低了数据成本并避免了标注不一致。该研究为机器翻译评估提供了更经济的解决方案，未来可探索更复杂的伪标签生成策略或跨语言扩展。

title: PathMem: Toward Cognition-Aligned Memory Transformation for Pathology MLLMs
abstract: Computational pathology demands both visual pattern recognition and dynamic integration of structured domain knowledge, including taxonomy, grading criteria, and clinical evidence. In practice, diagnostic reasoning requires linking morphological evidence with formal diagnostic and grading criteria. Although multimodal large language models (MLLMs) demonstrate strong vision language reasoning capabilities, they lack explicit mechanisms for structured knowledge integration and interpretable memory control. As a result, existing models struggle to consistently incorporate pathology-specific diagnostic standards during reasoning. Inspired by the hierarchical memory process of human pathologists, we propose PathMem, a memory-centric multimodal framework for pathology MLLMs. PathMem organizes structured pathology knowledge as a long-term memory (LTM) and introduces a Memory Transformer that models the dynamic transition from LTM to working memory (WM) through multimodal memory activation and context-aware knowledge grounding, enabling context-aware memory refinement for downstream reasoning. PathMem achieves SOTA performance across benchmarks, improving WSI-Bench report generation (12.8% WSI-Precision, 10.1% WSI-Relevance) and open-ended diagnosis by 9.7% and 8.9% over prior WSI-based models.

light_analysis.overview: PathMem提出一种以记忆为中心的多模态框架，通过模拟人类病理学家的分层记忆过程，实现结构化知识集成与可解释记忆控制，显著提升病理MLLMs的诊断推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 计算病理学需要视觉模式识别与结构化领域知识（如分类、分级标准）的动态集成，但现有MLLMs缺乏结构化知识集成和可解释记忆控制机制，导致推理中难以一致整合病理诊断标准。因此，受人类病理学家分层记忆过程启发，亟需一种认知对齐的记忆变换方法。
light_analysis.method: PathMem将结构化病理知识组织为长期记忆（LTM），并引入Memory Transformer，通过多模态记忆激活和上下文感知知识接地，动态建模从LTM到工作记忆（WM）的转换，实现上下文感知的记忆细化，用于下游诊断推理。框架以记忆为中心，支持多模态输入。
light_analysis.result: 在WSI-Bench报告生成任务中，PathMem将WSI-Precision提升12.8%，WSI-Relevance提升10.1%；开放式诊断分别提升9.7%和8.9%，超越先前基于WSI的模型，达到SOTA性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: PathMem通过认知对齐的记忆变换机制，有效整合结构化病理知识，提升了MLLMs的诊断推理能力。在学术上提出了新的记忆建模方法，在应用上可辅助病理诊断。未来可探索更复杂记忆结构或跨模态交互。

title: Towards Understanding Adam Convergence on Highly Degenerate Polynomials
abstract: Adam is a widely used optimization algorithm in deep learning, yet the specific class of objective functions where it exhibits inherent advantages remains underexplored. Unlike prior studies requiring external schedulers and $β_2$ near 1 for convergence, this work investigates the ``natural'' auto-convergence properties of Adam. We identify a class of highly degenerate polynomials where Adam converges automatically without additional schedulers. Specifically, we derive theoretical conditions for local asymptotic stability on degenerate polynomials and demonstrate strong alignment between theoretical bounds and experimental results. We prove that Adam achieves local linear convergence on these degenerate functions, significantly outperforming the sub-linear convergence of Gradient Descent and Momentum. This acceleration stems from a decoupling mechanism between the second moment $v_t$ and squared gradient $g_t^2$, which exponentially amplifies the effective learning rate. Finally, we characterize Adam's hyperparameter phase diagram, identifying three distinct behavioral regimes: stable convergence, spikes, and SignGD-like oscillation.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示Adam在高度退化多项式上的自动收敛特性，证明其线性收敛优于梯度下降。
light_analysis.motivation: Adam优化器在深度学习中广泛应用，但其固有优势的目标函数类别尚未明确。现有研究通常依赖外部调度器或β2接近1才能保证收敛，缺乏对Adam自然自动收敛特性的理解。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过理论研究明确Adam在哪些函数上具有内在优势，从而指导实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 论文聚焦一类高度退化多项式，分析Adam的局部渐近稳定性条件，推导理论边界。核心创新在于揭示第二动量v_t与平方梯度g_t^2之间的解耦机制，该机制指数放大有效学习率，实现线性收敛。通过理论分析与实验对比，验证了边界与结果的一致性，并绘制超参数相图，区分离散稳定收敛、尖峰和类SignGD振荡三种行为模式。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明Adam在退化多项式上实现局部线性收敛，显著优于梯度下降和动量方法的次线性收敛。实验结果显示理论边界与实验结果高度一致。超参数相图清晰刻画了不同学习率和β2设置下的行为区间，为实际调参提供指导。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文理论证明了Adam在高度退化多项式上的自动收敛优势，源于其解耦机制带来的学习率放大效应。该研究深化了对Adam优化机理的理解，为设计更高效的优化算法提供了新视角。未来可探索更广泛函数类上的行为，或将该机制应用于实际深度学习任务。

title: Hybrid Quantum Neural Network for Multivariate Clinical Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Forecasting physiological signals can support proactive monitoring and timely clinical intervention by anticipating critical changes in patient status. In this work, we address multivariate multi-horizon forecasting of physiological time series by jointly predicting heart rate, oxygen saturation, pulse rate, and respiratory rate at forecasting horizons of 15, 30, and 60 seconds. We propose a hybrid quantum-classical architecture that integrates a Variational Quantum Circuit (VQC) within a recurrent neural backbone. A GRU encoder summarizes the historical observation window into a latent representation, which is then projected into quantum angles used to parameterize the VQC. The quantum layer acts as a learnable non-linear feature mixer, modeling cross-variable interactions before the final prediction stage. We evaluate the proposed approach on the BIDMC PPG and Respiration dataset under a Leave-One-Patient-Out protocol. The results show competitive accuracy compared with classical and deep learning baselines, together with greater robustness to noise and missing inputs. These findings suggest that hybrid quantum layers can provide useful inductive biases for physiological time series forecasting in small-cohort clinical settings. The code is available at https://github.com/arco-group/quantum-ml.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合量子-经典架构用于多变量生理时间序列预测，利用变分量子电路增强特征交互建模。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床监护中，提前预测生理信号变化有助于主动干预，但现有方法在噪声和缺失数据场景下鲁棒性不足。该研究针对心率、血氧等变量的多步预测，探索量子计算在时间序列建模中的潜力，以解决小样本临床数据中的过拟合和变量交互建模难题。
light_analysis.method: 提出混合量子-经典神经网络：GRU编码历史序列为隐表示，映射为量子角度参数化变分量子电路（VQC），VQC作为可学习的非线性特征混合器捕捉跨变量交互，最后预测15/30/60秒后的心率、血氧等。数据集为BIDMC PPG and Respiration，采用留一患者交叉验证。
light_analysis.result: 在BIDMC数据集上，该模型与经典和深度学习基线相比取得竞争性预测精度，且对噪声和缺失输入表现出更强的鲁棒性。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但指出在小型临床队列中混合量子层提供了有益归纳偏置。
light_analysis.conclusion: 混合量子层可为生理时间序列预测提供有效归纳偏置，尤其在数据量小、噪声大的临床场景。未来可探索更大规模量子电路和更复杂任务。代码已开源。

title: One-for-All Model Initialization with Frequency-Domain Knowledge
abstract: Transferring knowledge by fine-tuning large-scale pre-trained networks has become a standard paradigm for downstream tasks, yet the knowledge of a pre-trained model is tightly coupled with monolithic architecture, which restricts flexible reuse across models of varying scales. In response to this challenge, recent approaches typically resort to either parameter selection, which fails to capture the interdependent structure of this knowledge, or parameter prediction using generative models that depend on impractical access to large network collections. In this paper, we empirically demonstrate that a model's foundational, task-agnostic knowledge, its "learngene", is encoded within the low-frequency components of its weights, and can be efficiently inherited by downstream models. Based on this insight, we propose FRONT (FRequency dOmain kNowledge Transfer), a novel framework that uses the Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) to isolate the low-frequency "learngene". This learngene can be seamlessly adapted to initialize models of arbitrary size via simple truncation or padding, a process that is entirely training-free. For enhanced performance, we propose an optional low-cost refinement process that introduces a spectral regularizer to further improve the learngene's transferability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FRONT achieves the state-of-the-art performance, accelerates convergence by up to 15 times in vision tasks, and reduces training FLOPs by an average of 40.5% in language tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FRONT框架，利用DCT提取权重低频分量作为通用learngene，实现无训练初始化任意规模下游模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 预训练模型的知识与特定架构耦合，难以灵活复用于不同规模的模型。现有方法如参数选择无法捕获知识的结构依赖性，而基于生成模型的参数预测需要访问大量网络集合，实际中不可行。本文旨在解决知识迁移中架构限制的问题，实现高效、通用的模型初始化。
light_analysis.method: FRONT框架基于DCT分离权重的低频分量作为learngene。通过简单的截断或填充操作，将learngene适配到任意大小的目标模型，无需训练。可选的低成本精炼过程引入光谱正则化，进一步提升learngene的迁移性。该方法在视觉和语言任务中均适用。
light_analysis.result: 在视觉任务中，FRONT实现收敛速度提升高达15倍；在语言任务中，平均减少40.5%的训练FLOPs。与现有方法相比，达到最先进性能。实验验证了低频分量作为通用知识表示的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FRONT证明了模型低级知识编码在权重低频分量中，提供了一种无训练、架构无关的模型初始化方法。具有显著的训练加速和计算节省效果，为知识迁移提供新思路。未来可探索更复杂的频率域操作和跨模态应用。

title: Feature Resemblance: Towards a Theoretical Understanding of Analogical Reasoning in Transformers
abstract: Understanding reasoning in large language models is complicated by evaluations that conflate multiple reasoning types. We isolate analogical reasoning, where a model transfers an attribute between entities that share known properties, and study when such transfer can emerge from training. To make the problem analytically tractable, we study a minimal transformer-style abstraction that isolates how learned representations support analogical reasoning. Within this setting, we prove three key results. First, joint training on similarity and attribution premises enables analogical reasoning through aligned representations. Second, sequential training succeeds only when similarity structure is learned before specific attributes, revealing a curriculum asymmetry. Third, in our stylized setting, two-hop reasoning $(a \to b, b \to c \Rightarrow a \to c)$ can be viewed as analogical reasoning with identity bridges $(b=b)$, which appear explicitly in training data. Together, these results reveal a unified mechanism: entities with shared properties become aligned in representation space, enabling property transfer through feature resemblance. Experiments with architectures up to 8B parameters show qualitative agreement with the theory and suggest that representational geometry plays an important role in analogical reasoning beyond the stylized model.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个理论框架，证明Transformer通过特征相似性实现类比推理，并揭示训练顺序和表示对齐的关键作用。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型的推理能力评估常混淆多种推理类型，尤其是类比推理的机制尚未被充分理解。现有研究缺乏对类比推理如何从训练中涌现的理论分析，且难以区分表示学习与推理过程。因此，需要隔离类比推理并建立可操作的理论模型。
light_analysis.method: 采用最小化Transformer风格抽象，隔离类比推理所需的核心机制。通过理论证明联合训练相似性和属性前提可实现对齐表示，而顺序训练需先学习相似性结构再学习属性。将两跳推理视为使用恒等桥接的类比推理。实验验证了理论预测，并使用高达8B参数的架构。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明联合训练实现对齐表示，顺序训练存在课程不对称性：必须先学相似性。两跳推理可视为恒等桥接的类比推理。实验表明在8B参数架构中，定性结果与理论一致，表示几何在类比推理中起重要作用，支持了理论模型的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了实体通过共享属性在表示空间中对齐，通过特征相似性实现属性转移的统一机制。该理论为理解类比推理提供了基础，并指导训练策略（如课程学习）。局限性在于理论基于简化模型，未来可扩展到更复杂的推理形式和实际应用。

title: Any2Any: Unified Arbitrary Modality Translation for Remote Sensing
abstract: Multi-modal remote sensing imagery provides complementary observations of the same geographic scene, yet such observations are frequently incomplete in practice. Existing cross-modal translation methods treat each modality pair as an independent task, resulting in quadratic complexity and limited generalization to unseen modality combinations. We formulate Any-to-Any translation as inference over a shared latent representation of the scene, where different modalities correspond to partial observations of the same underlying semantics. Based on this formulation, we propose Any2Any, a unified latent diffusion framework that projects heterogeneous inputs into a geometrically aligned latent space. Such structure performs anchored latent regression with a shared backbone, decoupling modality-specific representation learning from semantic mapping. Moreover, lightweight target-specific residual adapters are used to correct systematic latent mismatches without increasing inference complexity. To support learning under sparse but connected supervision, we introduce RST-1M, the first million-scale remote sensing dataset with paired observations across five sensing modalities, providing supervision anchors for any-to-any translation. Experiments across 14 translation tasks show that Any2Any consistently outperforms pairwise translation methods and exhibits strong zero-shot generalization to unseen modality pairs. Code and models are available at https://github.com/MiliLab/Any2Any.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Any2Any统一框架，基于潜在扩散模型实现遥感图像任意模态间的翻译，并构建百万级多模态数据集RST-1M。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态遥感图像提供互补信息，但实际观测常不完整。现有跨模态翻译方法将每对模态视为独立任务，导致复杂度二次方且泛化性差。需要统一框架处理任意模态翻译。
light_analysis.method: 基于共享潜在表示的潜在扩散框架，将异构输入投影到几何对齐的潜在空间。采用锚定潜在回归和共享骨干解耦模态表示与语义映射，并用轻量级残差适配器纠正系统性不匹配。引入RST-1M数据集，含五种模态百万级配对样本。
light_analysis.result: 在14个翻译任务上，Any2Any一致优于成对方法，并在未见模态对上展示强零样本泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出统一翻译框架和数据集，降低多模态翻译复杂度，提升泛化性。为遥感多模态分析提供新思路，未来可扩展更多模态或下游任务。

title: TimeSpot: Benchmarking Geo-Temporal Understanding in Vision-Language Models in Real-World Settings
abstract: Geo-temporal understanding, the ability to infer location, time, and contextual properties from visual input alone, underpins applications such as disaster management, traffic planning, embodied navigation, world modeling, and geography education. Although recent vision-language models (VLMs) have advanced image geo-localization using cues like landmarks and road signs, their ability to reason about temporal signals and physically grounded spatial cues remains limited. To address this gap, we introduce TimeSpot, a benchmark for evaluating real-world geo-temporal reasoning in VLMs. TimeSpot comprises 1,455 ground-level images from 80 countries and requires structured prediction of temporal attributes (season, month, time of day, daylight phase) and geographic attributes (continent, country, climate zone, environment type, latitude-longitude) directly from visual evidence. It also includes spatial-temporal reasoning tasks that test physical plausibility under real-world uncertainty. Evaluations of state-of-the-art open- and closed-source VLMs show low performance, particularly for temporal inference. While supervised fine-tuning yields improvements, results remain insufficient, highlighting the need for new methods to achieve robust, physically grounded geo-temporal understanding TimeSpot is available at: https://TimeSpot-GT.github.io.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TimeSpot基准，评估视觉语言模型在真实场景中的地理时间推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLM）在利用地标和路标进行图像地理定位方面取得进展，但对时间信号（如季节、月份）和物理空间线索的推理能力有限。地理时间理解对灾害管理、交通规划、具身导航等应用至关重要，但缺乏系统性的评估基准。TimeSpot旨在填补这一空白，通过结构化预测任务衡量VLM的地理与时间推理水平。
light_analysis.method: TimeSpot包含来自80个国家的1,455张地面图像，要求模型直接基于视觉证据预测时间属性（季节、月份、时间段、日光阶段）和地理属性（大洲、国家、气候带、环境类型、经纬度），并设计空间时间推理任务测试物理合理性。使用开源和闭源VLM进行评估，并采用监督微调进行改进。
light_analysis.result: 评估显示，当前最先进的VLM在TimeSpot上表现较低，尤其是时间推理任务。监督微调虽带来一定提升，但整体结果仍不理想，表明现有模型缺乏稳健的物理接地地理时间理解能力。具体性能指标摘要未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: TimeSpot揭示了VLM在真实世界地理时间推理中的显著不足，强调了发展新方法的必要性。该基准为评估和推动VLM的地理时空理解提供了标准化测试平台，有助于推动灾害响应、导航等应用。未来需探索更有效的训练策略或模型架构。

title: AMA-Bench: Evaluating Long-Horizon Memory for Agentic Applications
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are deployed as autonomous agents in increasingly complex applications, where enabling long-horizon memory is critical for achieving strong performance. However, a significant gap exists between applications and evaluation standards for agent memory: existing benchmarks primarily focus on dialogue-centric settings. In reality, agent memory consists of a continuous stream of agent-environment interactions that are primarily composed of machine-generated representations. To bridge this gap, we introduce AMA-Bench (Agent Memory with Any Length), a benchmark designed to evaluate long-horizon memory for LLMs in real agentic applications. It features two key components: (1) a set of real-world agentic trajectories across representative agentic applications, paired with expert-curated QA, and (2) a set of synthetic agentic trajectories of arbitrary horizons paired with rule-based QA. Our comprehensive study shows that existing memory systems underperform on AMA-Bench primarily because they lack causality and objective information, and are constrained by the lossy nature of similarity-based retrieval employed by many memory systems. To address these limitations, we propose AMA-Agent, an effective memory system featuring a causality graph and tool-augmented retrieval. Our results demonstrate that AMA-Agent achieves 57.22% average accuracy on AMA-Bench, surpassing the strongest baselines by 11.16%. Resources are available at our project website: https://ama-bench.github.io/

light_analysis.overview: 提出AMA-Bench基准和AMA-Agent记忆系统，用于评估和提升LLM在智能体应用中的长时记忆能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准主要关注对话场景，但实际智能体记忆包含连续的环境交互和机器生成表示，存在评估标准与实际应用的差距。弥合该差距对于提升LLM在复杂应用中的性能至关重要。
light_analysis.method: AMA-Bench包含真实世界智能体轨迹的专家标注QA，以及任意长度的合成智能体轨迹和规则QA。AMA-Agent采用因果图结构记忆和工具增强检索，以克服现有记忆系统缺乏因果性和有损检索的局限。
light_analysis.result: AMA-Agent在AMA-Bench上平均准确率57.22%，超过最强基线11.16%。现有记忆系统因缺乏因果性、客观信息以及基于相似性检索的有损性质而表现不佳。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了新基准和有效记忆系统，推动了智能体长时记忆的发展。未来可探索更高效的因果图构建和检索机制。资源已公开。

title: Learning from Trials and Errors: Reflective Test-Time Planning for Embodied LLMs
abstract: Embodied LLMs endow robots with high-level task reasoning, but they cannot reflect on what went wrong or why, turning deployment into a sequence of independent trials where mistakes repeat rather than accumulate into experience. Drawing upon human reflective practitioners, we introduce Reflective Test-Time Planning, which integrates two modes of reflection: \textit{reflection-in-action}, where the agent uses test-time scaling to generate and score multiple candidate actions using internal reflections before execution; and \textit{reflection-on-action}, which uses test-time training to update both its internal reflection model and its action policy based on external reflections after execution. We also include retrospective reflection, allowing the agent to re-evaluate earlier decisions and perform model updates with hindsight for proper long-horizon credit assignment. Experiments on our newly-designed Long-Horizon Household benchmark and MuJoCo Cupboard Fitting benchmark show significant gains over baseline models, with zero-shot generalization to photorealistic HM3D environments and real-robot experiments on a Franka Panda arm. Ablations confirm that reflection-in-action and reflection-on-action are mutually dependent, and that retrospective reflection achieves better credit assignment than step-wise external feedback at lower computational overhead. Qualitative analyses further highlight behavioral correction through reflection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出反射式测试时规划方法，结合动作中与动作后反思，提升具身LLM的任务推理与错误修正能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 具身LLM虽具备高层任务推理，但无法反思错误原因，导致部署中重复出现相同错误。现有方法缺乏从经验中积累知识的能力，如同独立试验的序列。受人类反思实践启发，旨在让机器人通过内外部反思学习错误并改进决策。
light_analysis.method: 提出反射式测试时规划，包含两种反思模式：动作中反思（Reflection-in-action）利用测试时缩放生成多个候选动作并基于内部反思评分后执行；动作后反思（Reflection-on-action）通过测试时训练更新内部反思模型和动作策略。另外引入回顾性反思（Retrospective Reflection），允许智能体事后重新评估早期决策并进行模型更新，实现长程信用分配。
light_analysis.result: 在自建Long-Horizon Household基准和MuJoCo Cupboard Fitting基准上，所提方法显著优于基线模型。零样本泛化到逼真HM3D环境及Franka Panda机械臂实物实验。消融实验表明动作中与动作后反思相互依赖；回顾性反思相比逐步外部反馈，实现了更好的信用分配且计算开销更低。定性分析显示反思能有效修正行为。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法提升了具身LLM的任务完成能力，通过反思机制积累经验避免重复错误。学术上为具身智能引入了反思式学习范式，实际应用可提升机器人自主操作的可信度和适应性。未来可探索更高效的反思模型和跨任务知识迁移。

title: PerSoMed: A Large-Scale Balanced Dataset for Persian Social Media Text Classification
abstract: This research introduces the first large-scale, well-balanced Persian social media text classification dataset, specifically designed to address the lack of comprehensive resources in this domain. The dataset comprises 36,000 posts across nine categories (Economic, Artistic, Sports, Political, Social, Health, Psychological, Historical, and Science & Technology), each containing 4,000 samples to ensure balanced class distribution. Data collection involved 60,000 raw posts from various Persian social media platforms, followed by rigorous preprocessing and hybrid annotation combining ChatGPT-based few-shot prompting with human verification. To mitigate class imbalance, we employed undersampling with semantic redundancy removal and advanced data augmentation strategies integrating lexical replacement and generative prompting. We benchmarked several models, including BiLSTM, XLM-RoBERTa (with LoRA and AdaLoRA adaptations), FaBERT, SBERT-based architectures, and the Persian-specific TookaBERT (Base and Large). Experimental results show that transformer-based models consistently outperform traditional neural networks, with TookaBERT-Large achieving the best performance (Precision: 0.9622, Recall: 0.9621, F1- score: 0.9621). Class-wise evaluation further confirms robust performance across all categories, though social and political texts exhibited slightly lower scores due to inherent ambiguity. This research presents a new high-quality dataset and provides comprehensive evaluations of cutting-edge models, establishing a solid foundation for further developments in Persian NLP, including trend analysis, social behavior modeling, and user classification. The dataset is publicly available to support future research endeavors.

light_analysis.overview: 首次提出大规模、类别均衡的波斯语社交媒体文本分类数据集PerSoMed，并评估多种模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 波斯语社交媒体文本分类缺乏大规模均衡数据集，现有资源不足。该研究旨在填补这一空白，提供高质量基准，支持趋势分析、社交行为建模等应用。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含36,000条帖子（9类，每类4,000条）的均衡数据集，通过混合注释（ChatGPT少样本提示+人工验证）保证质量。采用欠采样去除语义冗余、词替换与生成式提示结合的数据增强。评估BiLSTM、XLM-RoBERTa（LoRA/AdaLoRA）、FaBERT、SBERT及波斯语专用TookaBERT等模型。
light_analysis.result: Transformer模型优于传统神经网络，TookaBERT-Large最优（精确率0.9622，召回率0.9621，F1分数0.9621）。所有类别表现稳健，但社交与政治文本因歧义得分略低。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了高质量波斯语社交媒体数据集与综合模型评估，为波斯语NLP发展奠定基础，公开数据集以促进后续研究。未来可探索更细粒度分类与语境消歧。

title: MoBiQuant: Mixture-of-Bits Quantization for Token-Adaptive Any-Precision LLM
abstract: Dynamic runtime latency and memory constraints necessitate flexible large language model (LLM) deployment, where an LLM can be inferred with various quantization precisions based on available computational resources. Recent work on such any-precision quantization either relies on hardware-inefficient vector quantization or induces additional scaling factors when switching between bit-widths. Meanwhile, existing post-training quantization (PTQ) methods calibrated for a fixed low precision show poor generalizability under runtime precision change. In this work, we attribute the source of poor generalization across bit-widths to a precision-dependent \textit{outlier migration} phenomenon where the distribution of PTQ-sensitive tokens changes across precisions. Motivated by this observation, we propose \texttt{MoBiQuant}, a novel any-precision Mixture-of-Bits quantization framework that adjusts weight precision for flexible LLM inference based on token sensitivity. Specifically, we propose a many-in-one recursive residual quantization that can iteratively reconstruct higher-precision weights at runtime and mitigates \textit{outlier migration} with a token-aware router to dynamically select the optimal inference precision of each token.Extensive experiments show that \texttt{MoBiQuant} matches or surpasses frontier single-precision PTQ while exhibiting strong elasticity, achieving significant memory savings and throughput gains of up to $1.34\times$ over state-of-the-art any-precision methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MoBiQuant，一种基于token敏感性的混合比特量化框架，实现LLM在任意精度下的灵活推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在动态运行时面临延迟和内存约束，需要支持不同量化精度。现有任意精度量化方法存在硬件低效或精度切换需额外缩放因子的问题，且固定低精度的后训练量化在精度改变时泛化性差。作者发现这源于精度依赖的异常值迁移现象，即对量化敏感的token分布随精度变化，影响了量化效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出MoBiQuant框架，核心包括多合一递归残差量化，可在运行时迭代重建高精度权重；以及token感知路由器，动态选择每个token的最优推理精度，缓解异常值迁移。框架无需额外缩放因子，硬件高效，支持任意精度推理。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，MoBiQuant在匹配或超越前沿单精度后训练量化的同时，展现出强弹性，相较于现有任意精度方法，实现显著内存节省和高达1.34倍的吞吐量提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: MoBiQuant通过token感知的混合比特量化有效解决了任意精度推理中的泛化问题，兼顾精度与弹性，具有学术价值和实际部署潜力。未来可探索更高效的路由机制或扩展到其他模型架构。

title: All Leaks Count, Some Count More: Interpretable Temporal Contamination Detection and Mitigation in LLM Backtesting
abstract: Backtesting LLMs on resolved events assumes models reason only from pre-cutoff knowledge, yet pretrained models inevitably leak post-cutoff knowledge. We introduce a claim-level evaluation framework that decomposes prediction rationales into atomic claims and applies Shapley values to quantify each claim's decision impact, yielding \textbf{Shapley-DCLR} (\textbf{Shapley}-weighted \textbf{D}ecision-\textbf{C}ritical \textbf{L}eakage \textbf{R}ate) -- an interpretable metric measuring what fraction of decision-driving reasoning is contaminated. We further propose \textbf{TimeSPEC} (\textbf{Time}-\textbf{S}upervised \textbf{P}rediction with \textbf{E}xtracted \textbf{C}laims), an inference-time architecture that interleaves temporally-filtered retrieval with claim-level supervision, producing predictions grounded entirely in pre-cutoff evidence. Across three LLMs, the ablation experiments confirm retrieval and supervision are jointly necessary; and a three-task probe further illstrates that the performance cost of temporal enforcement scales with each task's reliance on post-cutoff information.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可解释的时间污染检测与缓解框架，包括Shapley-DCLR指标和TimeSPEC架构，确保LLM回测基于截止前知识。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在回测中会泄露截止后的知识，导致评估结果不可靠。现有方法缺乏对污染程度和来源的量化解释，无法有效隔离污染。因此，需要一种可解释的指标和架构来检测并缓解时间污染，以提升回测的公正性和可信度。
light_analysis.method: 首先将预测理由分解为原子声明，利用Shapley值量化每个声明对决策的影响，提出Shapley-DCLR指标衡量决策驱动推理中的污染比例。然后设计TimeSPEC架构，在推理时结合时间过滤的检索和声明级监督，确保预测仅基于截止前的证据。该方法不依赖额外训练，直接调整推理过程。
light_analysis.result: 在三个LLM上的消融实验表明，检索和声明级监督两者缺一不可，共同作用才能有效缓解污染。三个不同任务的探针实验进一步揭示，时间强制带来的性能成本与任务对后截止信息的依赖程度呈正相关，即依赖越大的任务性能下降越明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为LLM时间污染检测与缓解提供了可解释的定量指标和实践框架，显著提升了回测的可靠性。未来可扩展到更多任务和模型，并探索更高效的污染过滤机制。局限性在于当前仅适用于声明级分解的场景。

title: JEPA-DNA: Grounding Genomic Foundation Models through Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures
abstract: Genomic Foundation Models (GFMs) typically rely on Masked Language Modeling (MLM) or Next-Token Prediction (NTP) to learn the "Laws of Nature". While effective at capturing local syntax, these generative paradigms prioritize token-level reconstruction over high-level functional context. We introduce JEPA-DNA, a model-agnostic continual training framework that integrates a Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA) with traditional generative objectives. By supervising global sequence embeddings in a latent space, JEPA-DNA forces models to predict the functional representations of masked genomic segments, shifting the learning signal from token recovery to semantic alignment. We evaluate JEPA-DNA on 17 diverse genomic benchmark tasks, demonstrating consistent gains in linear probing and zero-shot performance regardless of the underlying GFM architecture or generative objective. Our framework establishes a new state-of-the-art for GFMs, surpassing the best existing models by bridging generative precision with latent semantic grounding. Through extensive ablation studies, we further characterize the synergistic interplay between generative and latent objectives. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/NVIDIA-Digital-Bio/JEPA-DNA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出JEPA-DNA框架，将联合嵌入预测架构与生成式目标结合，提升基因组基础模型的语义对齐和泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基因组基础模型依赖掩码语言建模或下一个token预测，虽能捕获局部语法，但侧重于token级重建而忽视高层次功能上下文。这导致模型难以理解基因序列的生物学功能。因此，需要一种方法强制模型在潜在空间中学习功能语义对齐，以提升对基因组序列的深层理解。
light_analysis.method: JEPA-DNA是一种模型无关的持续训练框架，通过集成联合嵌入预测架构与生成式目标，在潜在空间中监督全局序列嵌入。它预测掩码基因组片段的功能表示，将学习信号从token恢复转向语义对齐。该方法适用于多种GFM架构和生成式目标，并在17个基因组基准任务上进行了评估。
light_analysis.result: 在17个多样化的基因组基准任务上，JEPA-DNA在线性探测和零样本性能上均实现一致提升，超越了现有最佳模型，建立了新的最优水平。消融研究进一步揭示了生成式目标与潜在目标之间的协同作用，验证了框架的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: JEPA-DNA通过桥接生成式精度与潜在语义基础，显著提升了基因组基础模型的泛化能力和功能理解水平。该框架具有广泛的适用性，为基因组学领域提供了新的研究范式。代码已开源，有助于推动相关研究的可复现性和进一步发展。

title: Factored Latent Action World Models
abstract: Learning latent actions from action-free video has emerged as a powerful paradigm for scaling up controllable world model learning. Latent actions provide a natural interface for users to iteratively generate and manipulate videos. However, most existing approaches rely on monolithic inverse and forward dynamics models that learn a single latent action to control the entire scene, and therefore struggle in complex environments where multiple entities act simultaneously. This paper introduces Factored Latent Action Model (FLAM), a factored dynamics framework that decomposes the scene into independent factors, each inferring its own latent action and predicting its own next-step factor value. This factorized structure enables more accurate modeling of complex multi-entity dynamics and improves video generation quality in action-free video settings compared to monolithic models. Based on experiments on both simulation and real-world multi-entity datasets, we find that FLAM outperforms prior work in prediction accuracy and representation quality, and facilitates downstream policy learning, demonstrating the benefits of factorized latent action models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出因子化潜在动作模型(FLAM)，通过场景分解为独立因子，提升多实体动力学建模和视频生成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 从无动作视频中学习潜在动作能扩展世界模型的可控性，但现有方法使用整体动力学模型学习单一潜在动作控制整个场景，难以处理多个实体同时行动的复杂环境。这种局限性阻碍了模型在真实多实体场景中的应用，亟需能够分解场景、分别建模各实体动态的方法。
light_analysis.method: FLAM将场景分解为独立因子，每个因子学习自己的潜在动作并预测下一步状态。通过因子化的逆模型推断各因子潜在动作，再用因子化前向模型预测未来。这种结构避免了整体模型的信息混淆，能更准确地捕捉多实体交互。实验使用模拟和真实多实体数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟和真实多实体数据集上，FLAM在预测精度和表示质量上优于先前整体模型方法。具体表现为视频生成质量提升，并且能够支持下游策略学习，表明学到的因子化潜在动作表示具有实用价值。摘要未明确给出数值提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出因子化潜在动作模型，通过场景分解显著提升了复杂多实体动力学建模能力。该工作在无动作视频的世界模型学习中具有重要价值，可用于视频生成、决策学习等任务。未来可探索更复杂的因子交互或扩展到更多实体场景。

title: CARL-CXR: Continual Adapter-Based Routing for Task-Unknown Chest Radiograph Classification
abstract: Clinical deployment of chest radiograph classifiers requires models that can be updated as new datasets become available without retraining on previously observed data or degrading validated performance. We study a task-incremental continual learning setting for chest radiograph classification under task-unknown inference, where heterogeneous chest X-ray datasets arrive sequentially and task identity is unavailable at deployment time. We propose CARL-CXR, a continual adapter-based routing framework that maintains a fixed high-capacity backbone while incrementally introducing lightweight task-specific adapters and classifier heads. A latent task selector operates on adapter-conditioned features to dynamically route each input to the most relevant task pathway, leveraging compact task prototypes and feature-level experience replay to preserve task identity across sequential updates without storing raw images. Experiments on MIMIC-CXR and CheXpert two large-scale datasets with distinct patient populations, imaging devices, and annotation pipelines demonstrate that CARL-CXR achieves minimal catastrophic forgetting (0.012 AUROC drop), representing a 6X and 11X reduction over established continual learning baselines LwF and EWC respectively, while maintaining competitive diagnostic performance (AUROC 0.74). Under task unknown deployment, CARL-CXR outperforms joint training by 12.5 points in routing accuracy (75.0% vs. 62.5%): unlike LwF and EWC, which require explicit task identifiers at inference and provide no routing mechanism.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CARL-CXR框架，通过持续适配器路由实现任务未知的胸部X光分类，有效缓解灾难性遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床部署胸部X光分类器需要模型能够在不重训练旧数据或不降低已验证性能的情况下，随着新数据集的可用性进行更新。现有持续学习方法（如LwF、EWC）在任务未知推理时需显式任务标识，缺乏路由机制，导致遗忘严重。因此，研究任务增量持续学习下的任务未知胸部X光分类问题。
light_analysis.method: CARL-CXR采用持续适配器路由框架，保持固定高容量骨干网络，逐步引入轻量级任务特定适配器和分类头。潜在任务选择器基于适配器条件特征动态路由输入到最相关任务路径，利用紧凑任务原型和特征级经验回放保留任务身份，无需存储原始图像。不依赖任务标识，实现任务未知推理。
light_analysis.result: 在MIMIC-CXR和CheXpert两个大规模数据集上，CARL-CXR实现最小灾难性遗忘（AUROC下降0.012），遗忘率比LwF和EWC分别降低6倍和11倍，同时保持竞争性诊断性能（AUROC 0.74）。任务未知部署下，路由准确率达75.0%，优于联合训练的62.5%，而LwF和EWC需要任务标识且无路由机制。
light_analysis.conclusion: CARL-CXR有效解决了胸部X光分类中的任务未知持续学习问题，通过适配器路由和原型回放大幅减少灾难性遗忘，无需存储原始数据。学术上为持续学习提供新范式，实际应用中便于模型持续更新部署。未来可探索更复杂的任务选择策略和跨模态扩展。

title: STAPO: Stabilizing Reinforcement Learning for LLMs by Silencing Rare Spurious Tokens
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has significantly improved large language model reasoning, but existing RL fine-tuning methods rely heavily on heuristic techniques such as entropy regularization and reweighting to maintain stability. In practice, they often suffer from late-stage performance collapse, leading to degraded reasoning quality and unstable training. We identify a key factor behind this instability: a small fraction of tokens, termed spurious tokens (around 0.01%), which contribute little to the reasoning outcome but receive disproportionately amplified gradient updates due to inheriting the full sequence-level reward. We present a unified framework for evaluating token-level optimization impacts across spurious risk, gradient norms, and entropy changes. Building on the analysis of token characteristics that severely disrupt optimization, we propose the Silencing Spurious Tokens (S2T) mechanism to efficiently suppress their gradient perturbations. Incorporating this mechanism into a group-based objective, we propose Spurious-Token-Aware Policy Optimization (STAPO), which promotes stable and effective large-scale model refinement. Across six mathematical reasoning benchmarks using Qwen 1.7B, 8B, and 14B base models, STAPO consistently demonstrates superior entropy stability and achieves an average performance improvement of 11.49% ($ρ_{\mathrm{T}}$=1.0, top-p=1.0) and 3.73% ($ρ_{\mathrm{T}}$=0.7, top-p=0.9) over GRPO, 20-Entropy, and JustRL.

light_analysis.overview: 识别并抑制LLM强化学习微调中的虚假标记导致的梯度扰动，提出STAPO方法，提升训练稳定性和推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RL微调方法依赖熵正则化等启发式技术，但常遭遇后期性能崩溃，导致推理质量下降和训练不稳定。研究发现根源在于少量虚假标记（约0.01%）继承全序列奖励，梯度放大，破坏优化。该问题重要且被现有方法忽视。
light_analysis.method: 提出Silencing Spurious Tokens (S2T)机制，基于统一框架评估标记级优化影响（虚假风险、梯度范数、熵变化），有效抑制虚假标记梯度扰动。将该机制融入基于目标的策略形成STAPO，实现稳定的大规模模型微调。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen 1.7B/8B/14B上，六个数学推理基准中，STAPO相比GRPO、20-Entropy和JustRL，平均性能提升11.49%（ρ_T=1.0, top-p=1.0）和3.73%（ρ_T=0.7, top-p=0.9），且熵稳定性更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了虚假标记导致不稳定训练的机制，提出STAPO方法显著提升LLM强化学习微调的稳定性和性能。该方法具有学术价值和实际应用潜力，可推广至其他序列级奖励场景。

title: Krause Synchronization Transformers
abstract: Self-attention in Transformers relies on globally normalized softmax weights, causing all tokens to compete for influence at every layer. When composed across depth, this interaction pattern induces strong synchronization dynamics that favor convergence toward a dominant mode, a behavior associated with representation collapse and attention sink phenomena. We introduce Krause Attention, a principled attention mechanism inspired by bounded-confidence consensus dynamics. Krause Attention replaces similarity-based global aggregation with distance-based, localized, and selectively sparse interactions, promoting structured local synchronization instead of global mixing. We relate this behavior to recent theory modeling Transformer dynamics as interacting particle systems, and show how bounded-confidence interactions naturally moderate attention concentration and alleviate attention sinks. Restricting interactions to local neighborhoods also reduces runtime complexity from quadratic to linear in sequence length. Empirically, we validate Krause Attention across diverse settings, including vision (ViT on CIFAR/ImageNet), autoregressive image generation (MNIST/CIFAR-10), large language models (Llama/Qwen), and language models trained from scratch at multiple scales (100M/200M). Across these domains, Krause Attention achieves consistent performance gains while improving computational efficiency, highlighting bounded-confidence dynamics as a scalable and effective inductive bias for attention.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Krause Attention机制，用有界置信共识动力学替代全局softmax注意力，促进局部结构化同步，缓解表示坍塌和注意力汇聚，并降低复杂度。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer中的自注意力依赖于全局归一化的softmax权重，导致所有token在每层竞争影响力。跨深度组合时，这种交互模式引发强同步动力学，倾向于收敛到主导模式，与表示坍塌和注意力汇聚现象相关。现有方法未能有效解决这一根本问题，因此需要一种新的注意力机制来促进结构化局部同步而非全局混合，同时提高计算效率。
light_analysis.method: Krause Attention基于有界置信共识动力学，用基于距离的局部选择性稀疏交互替代基于相似性的全局聚合。它限制交互到局部邻域，从而将复杂度从二次降至线性。该机制自然地调节注意力集中度并缓解注意力汇聚，理论联系了Transformer动力学与交互粒子系统模型。在视觉、自回归生成和语言模型等多种任务中验证。
light_analysis.result: 在视觉（ViT on CIFAR/ImageNet）、自回归图像生成（MNIST/CIFAR-10）、大语言模型（Llama/Qwen）以及从零训练的不同规模语言模型（100M/200M）上，Krause Attention均取得一致性能提升，同时提高计算效率。具体性能指标摘要未明确给出，但强调优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: Krause Attention通过有界置信动力学作为可扩展且有效的注意力归纳偏置，提升了Transformer的效率和性能，缓解了表示坍塌和注意力汇聚问题。该方法具有广泛应用前景，未来可探索在更多任务和更大规模模型上的适用性。

title: Multi-Level Strategic Classification: Incentivizing Improvement through Promotion and Relegation Dynamics
abstract: Strategic classification studies the problem where self-interested individuals or agents manipulate their response to obtain favorable decision outcomes made by classifiers, typically turning to dishonest actions when they are less costly than genuine efforts. While existing studies on sequential strategic classification primarily focus on optimizing dynamic classifier weights, we depart from these weight-centric approaches by analyzing the design of classifier thresholds and difficulty progression within a multi-level promotion-relegation framework. Our model captures the critical inter-temporal incentives driven by an agent's farsightedness, skill retention, and a leg-up effect where qualification and attainment can be self-reinforcing. We characterize the agent's optimal long-term strategy and demonstrate that a principal can design a sequence of thresholds to effectively incentivize honest effort. Crucially, we prove that under mild conditions, this mechanism enables agents to reach arbitrarily high levels solely through genuine improvement efforts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多级晋级-降级框架下的战略分类，通过设计分类器阈值和难度进展激励诚实努力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有战略分类研究主要关注动态分类器权重的优化，但忽略了阈值设计和难度进展对跨期激励的影响。本文旨在解决如何通过合理的阈值序列设计，激励自利代理进行真实的长期改进，而非采取欺骗行为。该问题重要因为它能提升分类系统的公平性和有效性，防止代理钻空子。
light_analysis.method: 构建多级晋级-降级模型，代理在多个难度级别上决策，考虑远见、技能保持和“腿效应”（即资格与成就相互强化）。主通过设计阈值序列影响代理的最优策略。理论分析刻画了代理的最优长期策略，并证明在温和条件下，该机制能引导代理仅通过真实改进达到任意高水平。
light_analysis.result: 主要结果为理论证明：在满足一定条件下，所提机制能激励代理始终选择诚实努力，并使其通过持续改进逐级晋升到任意高级别，无需依赖欺骗。摘要未提供具体实验数据或与基线对比，但定性表明该方法优于传统权重优化方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文创新性地将战略分类推广到多级动态框架，揭示了阈值设计而非权重调整对激励真实改进的关键作用。研究价值在于为算法公平和机制设计提供新思路，可应用于教育、信贷等需要持续激励的领域。未来可考虑更复杂的代理行为或实际数据验证。

title: Prism: Spectral-Aware Block-Sparse Attention
abstract: Block-sparse attention is promising for accelerating long-context LLM pre-filling, yet identifying relevant blocks efficiently remains a bottleneck. Existing methods typically employ coarse-grained attention as a proxy for block importance estimation, but often resort to expensive token-level searching or scoring, resulting in significant selection overhead. In this work, we trace the inaccuracy of standard coarse-grained attention via mean pooling to a theoretical root cause: the interaction between mean pooling and Rotary Positional Embeddings (RoPE). We prove that mean pooling acts as a low-pass filter that induces destructive interference in high-frequency dimensions, effectively creating a "blind spot" for local positional information (e.g., slash patterns). To address this, we introduce Prism, a training-free spectral-aware approach that decomposes block selection into high-frequency and low-frequency branches. By applying energy-based temperature calibration, Prism restores the attenuated positional signals directly from pooled representations, enabling block importance estimation using purely block-level operations, thereby improving efficiency. Extensive evaluations confirm that Prism maintains accuracy parity with full attention while delivering up to $\mathbf{5.1\times}$ speedup.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Prism，一种无需训练的频谱感知块稀疏注意力方法，通过高/低频分支分解和能量温度校准，恢复被均值池化抑制的位置信号，实现高效块选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 块稀疏注意力可加速长上下文LLM预填充，但现有方法通过粗粒度注意力估计块重要性时，因均值池化与RoPE的相互作用导致低通滤波，丢失高频位置信息（如斜线模式），造成块选择不准确且计算开销大。
light_analysis.method: Prism将块选择分解为高频和低频分支，利用能量温度校准直接从池化表示中恢复衰减的位置信号。该方法无需训练，仅使用块级操作估计重要性，避免昂贵的token级搜索，显著提升效率。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Prism在全注意力精度持平的前提下，实现了最高5.1倍的速度提升。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或对比方法，但强调准确性不变。
light_analysis.conclusion: Prism通过频谱感知解决了块稀疏注意力中的低通滤波问题，提供了一种高效、准确的块选择机制。其无训练特性适用于现有模型，可加速长上下文推理。未来可能探索更复杂的频谱分解或自适应分支权重。

title: Towards Efficient Large Language Reasoning Models via Extreme-Ratio Chain-of-Thought Compression
abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning successfully enhances the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs), yet it incurs substantial computational overhead for inference. Existing CoT compression methods often suffer from a critical loss of logical fidelity at high compression ratios, resulting in significant performance degradation. To achieve high-fidelity, fast reasoning, we propose a novel EXTreme-RAtio Chain-of-Thought Compression framework, termed Extra-CoT, which aggressively reduces the token budget while preserving answer accuracy. To generate reliable, high-fidelity supervision, we first train a dedicated semantically-preserved compressor on mathematical CoT data with fine-grained annotations. An LLM is then fine-tuned on these compressed pairs via a mixed-ratio supervised fine-tuning (SFT), teaching it to follow a spectrum of compression budgets and providing a stable initialization for reinforcement learning (RL). We further propose Constrained and Hierarchical Ratio Policy Optimization (CHRPO) to explicitly incentivize question-solving ability under lower budgets by a hierarchical reward. Experiments on three mathematical reasoning benchmarks show the superiority of Extra-CoT. For example, on MATH-500 using Qwen3-1.7B, Extra-CoT achieves over 73\% token reduction with an accuracy improvement of 0.6\%, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods. Our source codes have been released at https://github.com/Mwie1024/Extra-CoT.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Extra-CoT框架，通过极端比例链式思维压缩，在显著减少计算开销的同时保持或提升推理准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) 推理增强了大型语言模型的推理能力，但导致了巨大的推理计算开销。现有CoT压缩方法在高压缩比下常出现逻辑保真度严重损失，导致性能大幅下降。因此，需要一种既能大幅压缩token数量又能保持高保真度推理的方法，以实现高效推理。
light_analysis.method: Extra-CoT 框架包括三个关键步骤：首先，在数学CoT数据上训练一个专用的语义保留压缩器，生成高保真压缩样本；然后，通过混合比例监督微调（SFT）使LLM适应不同压缩预算；最后，提出约束层次比率策略优化（CHRPO），通过层次化奖励机制在低预算下显式激励问题求解能力。
light_analysis.result: 在三个数学推理基准上评估，以Qwen3-1.7B模型在MATH-500任务为例，Extra-CoT实现了超过73%的token缩减，同时准确率提升0.6%，显著优于现有最先进方法。这表明极端压缩下仍能保持甚至提高推理性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: Extra-CoT 通过极端压缩实现高效推理，在数学推理任务上验证了其有效性。该方法平衡了压缩比与推理质量，为大型语言模型在资源受限场景下的部署提供了新思路。未来可探索更广泛的推理任务和压缩策略。

title: F-GRPO: Don't Let Your Policy Learn the Obvious and Forget the Rare
abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) is commonly based on group sampling to estimate advantages and stabilize policy updates. In practice, computational limits often rule out very large groups, so training proceeds with finite rollout sets that can reinforce only the correct behavior they expose. At practical group sizes, updates can miss rare-correct trajectories while still containing mixed rewards, concentrating probability on more common sampled solutions. We derive the probability of such prompt-local tail-miss events as a function of group size, showing non-monotonic behavior, and in the categorical abstraction characterize how unsampled-correct mass can shrink even as total correct mass grows. Motivated by this analysis, we propose a difficulty-aware scaling coefficient, inspired by Focal loss, that down-weights updates on high-success sampled groups. Empirically, categorical simulation illustrates the same effect in the categorical setting, Maze provides a single-solution test, and LLM experiments include a representative GRPO group-size sweep together with fixed-$N$ transfer across GRPO, DAPO, and CISPO. On Qwen2.5-7B at $N{=}8$, our method improves average math pass@256 from 64.1 $\rightarrow$ 70.3 (GRPO), 69.3 $\rightarrow$ 72.5 (DAPO), and 73.2 $\rightarrow$ 76.8 (CISPO); OOD pass@256 also improves in all three cases, without increasing group size or computational cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出F-GRPO，一种难度感知缩放系数，通过降低高成功采样组更新权重，缓解有限组采样导致的稀有机会遗漏问题，提升策略性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在基于可验证奖励的强化学习(RLVR)中，常用有限组采样估计优势并稳定更新。实际计算限制导致组大小较小，导致更新可能错过稀有的正确轨迹，同时增强常见解的概率，造成策略遗忘罕见正确行为。作者推导了此类局部尾部缺失事件概率作为组大小函数，显示非单调行为，并指出问题重要性。现有方法依赖大组采样但受限，故需改进。
light_analysis.method: 受Focal loss启发，提出难度感知缩放系数，对高成功率的采样组降低更新权重，避免策略集中于常见解。理论分析组大小与尾部缺失概率关系，并在分类、迷宫等场景验证。在LLM实验中，在GRPO、DAPO、CISPO算法上应用该方法，使用Qwen2.5-7B模型，固定组大小N=8，评估数学推理pass@256指标。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen2.5-7B（N=8）上，数学pass@256平均提升：GRPO从64.1到70.3（+6.2），DAPO从69.3到72.5（+3.2），CISPO从73.2到76.8（+3.6）。分布外(OOD)pass@256也全面改善。所有提升均未增加组大小或计算成本，验证了方法的有效性和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出F-GRPO方法，通过难度感知缩放有效解决有限组采样下稀有机会遗漏问题，显著提升多种RLVR算法的性能，且不增加开销。理论分析和实验验证了方法的鲁棒性。未来可探索更复杂的难度度量或自适应系数，进一步优化策略学习中的长尾分布问题。

title: Discrete diffusion samplers and bridges: Off-policy algorithms and applications in latent spaces
abstract: Sampling from a distribution $p(x) \propto e^{-\mathcal{E}(x)}$ known up to a normalising constant is an important and challenging problem in statistics. Recent years have seen the rise of a new family of amortised sampling algorithms, commonly referred to as diffusion samplers, that enable fast and efficient sampling from an unnormalised density. Such algorithms have been widely studied for continuous-space sampling tasks; however, their application to problems in discrete space remains largely unexplored. Although some progress has been made in this area, discrete diffusion samplers do not take full advantage of ideas commonly used for continuous-space sampling. In this paper, we propose to bridge this gap by introducing off-policy training techniques for discrete diffusion samplers. We show that these techniques improve the performance of discrete samplers on both established and new synthetic benchmarks. Next, we generalise discrete diffusion samplers to the task of bridging between two arbitrary distributions, introducing data-to-energy Schrödinger bridge training for the discrete domain for the first time. Lastly, we showcase the application of the proposed diffusion samplers to data-free posterior sampling in the discrete latent spaces of image generative models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出离策略训练技术改进离散扩散采样器，首次引入离散域数据到能量薛定谔桥，实现图像生成模型离散潜空间的无数据后验采样。
light_analysis.motivation: 从归一化常数未知的分布中采样是统计学的关键挑战。连续空间扩散采样器已成功，但离散空间应用不足，现有方法未充分利用连续空间中的离策略训练等先进技术。本文旨在缩小这一差距，将离策略训练引入离散扩散采样器以提升性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出离策略训练技术用于离散扩散采样器，通过更高效的数据利用改善采样性能。进一步将离散扩散采样器推广到任意分布之间的桥接任务，首次提出了离散域的数据到能量薛定谔桥训练方法。最后，将该方法应用于图像生成模型的离散潜空间，实现无数据后验采样。
light_analysis.result: 在已有和新合成基准测试中，离策略训练技术显著提升了离散扩散采样器的性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但指出该方法在多个任务上优于现有离散采样器。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文弥合了连续与离散扩散采样器之间的差距，通过离策略训练和离散桥接拓展了离散采样方法。该工作为离散潜空间中的后验采样提供了新工具，对图像生成等领域的贝叶斯推断具有重要应用价值，未来可探索更复杂的离散空间结构。

title: BlitzRank: Principled Zero-shot Ranking Agents with Tournament Graphs
abstract: Selecting the top $m$ from $n$ items via expensive $k$-wise comparisons is central to settings ranging from LLM-based document reranking to crowdsourced evaluation and tournament design. Existing methods either rely on heuristics that discard comparison information, or exploit it at prohibitive cost. We introduce a tournament graph framework that provides a principled foundation for $k$-wise ranking. Our key observation is that each $k$-item comparison reveals an induced tournament of $\binom{k}{2}$ pairwise preferences; aggregating these into a global preference graph and computing its transitive closure yields many additional orderings without further oracle calls. We formalize when the current top-$m$ output is certifiably determined and design a greedy query schedule that maximizes information gain towards identifying the top-$m$ items. The framework also gracefully handles non-transitive preferences -- cycles induced by real-world oracles -- by collapsing them into equivalence classes that yield principled tiered rankings. Applied to LLM reranking across 14 benchmarks and 5 models, BlitzRank achieves Pareto dominance over existing approaches: matching or exceeding accuracy while requiring 25--40% fewer tokens than comparable methods; against pairwise reranking, it achieves near-identical quality with 7$\times$ fewer tokens. Code available at https://github.com/ContextualAI/BlitzRank.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于锦标赛图的零样本排名框架BlitzRank，通过聚合k-wise比较中的成对偏好并计算传递闭包，高效确定top-m物品，在LLM重排序中实现帕累托最优。
light_analysis.motivation: 从n个物品中通过昂贵的k-wise比较选出top-m是文档重排序、众包评估和锦标赛设计的核心。现有方法要么丢弃比较信息，要么以过高成本利用信息，缺乏既充分利用比较信息又计算高效的原则性方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出锦标赛图框架，将每个k-item比较视为诱导的C(k,2)个成对偏好的锦标赛子图，聚合为全局偏好图并计算传递闭包以获取额外排序。形式化top-m确定条件，设计贪婪查询调度最大化信息增益。处理非传递偏好通过折叠成等价类产生分级排名。
light_analysis.result: 在14个基准和5个LLM上的重排序实验中，BlitzRank实现帕累托优势：匹配或超越准确性，同时比可比方法节省25-40%的tokens；与成对重排序相比，接近相同质量但节省7倍tokens。
light_analysis.conclusion: BlitzRank为零样本排名提供了原则性方法，通过锦标赛图高效利用k-wise比较信息。实验证明其在LLM重排序中的高效性和有效性，具有实际应用价值。未来可扩展至在线或交互式场景。

title: Learning, Solving and Optimizing PDEs with TensorGalerkin: an efficient high-performance Galerkin assembly algorithm
abstract: We present a unified algorithmic framework for the numerical solution, constrained optimization, and physics-informed learning of PDEs with a variational structure. Our framework is based on a Galerkin discretization of the underlying variational forms, and its high efficiency stems from a novel highly-optimized and GPU-compliant TensorGalerkin framework for linear system assembly (stiffness matrices and load vectors). TensorGalerkin operates by tensorizing element-wise operations within a Python-level Map stage and then performs global reduction with a sparse matrix multiplication that performs message passing on the mesh-induced sparsity graph. The Map and Reduce stages are co-designed inside PyTorch's autograd so that the assembly graph contains $O(1)$ nodes regardless of how the number of elements and local DoFs scale. We validate this $O(1)$-graph property by deploying TensorGalerkin downstream as i) a highly-efficient numerical PDEs solver, ii) an end-to-end differentiable framework for PDE-constrained optimization, and iii) a physics-informed operator learning algorithm for PDEs. With multiple benchmarks, including 2D and 3D elliptic, parabolic, and hyperbolic PDEs on unstructured meshes, we demonstrate that the proposed framework provides significant computational efficiency and accuracy gains over a variety of baselines in all the targeted downstream applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一框架TensorGalerkin，通过张量化和稀疏矩阵乘法实现高效GPU兼容的Galerkin线性系统组装，适用于PDE求解、优化和物理信息学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统Galerkin方法在复杂和非结构网格上的线性系统组装计算成本高，难以利用GPU并行性。现有方法存在扩展性差、自动化程度低等问题，限制了大规模PDE问题的求解和学习效率。因此需要一种高效、可微且GPU友好的统一框架。
light_analysis.method: 核心是TensorGalerkin组装算法：通过Python层的Map阶段将单元操作张量化，然后利用稀疏矩阵乘法在网格诱导稀疏图上进行全局归约（Reduce）。Map和Reduce在PyTorch autograd中联合设计，使得组装图节点数恒为O(1)，不随单元数和局部自由度增加。框架支持PDE求解、约束优化和物理信息算子学习。
light_analysis.result: 在2D和3D椭圆、抛物、双曲PDE的非结构网格基准上，TensorGalerkin在求解效率、优化收敛速度和算子学习精度上均显著优于多种基线方法。特别地，组装的O(1)图属性带来了近乎恒定的计算开销，大幅提升了GPU加速效果和内存效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: TensorGalerkin提供了一个高效、可微且GPU原生的PDE变分问题统一框架，具有广泛的学术和应用价值。其O(1)组装图设计可推广至其他有限元方法，未来可扩展至多物理场耦合和自适应网格。局限性在于依赖变分结构，非变分PDE需额外处理。

title: Generative Neural Operators through Diffusion Last Layer
abstract: Neural operators provide a powerful framework for learning discretization invariant mappings between function spaces, but standard deterministic models do not capture predictive uncertainty. We introduce diffusion last layer (DLL), a modular probabilistic output head for neural operator backbones. DLL represents target fields through an input dependent low rank expansion inspired by the Karhunen-Loéve expansion and learns a conditional diffusion model over the corresponding coefficient space. This design enables efficient distributional modeling while preserving the structural advantages of operator learning. On stochastic PDE benchmarks with random forcing, DLL achieves strong distributional fidelity and performs competitively with pixel space and conventional latent diffusion baselines. In deterministic long horizon rollout tasks, DLL improves rollout stability over the underlying backbone and provides useful estimates of predictive uncertainty under compounding autoregressive errors. These results suggest that diffusion modeling in learned coefficient spaces offers a practical route to uncertainty aware neural operators.
comment: ICML 2026, code is available at https://github.com/sungwpark/dll-no

light_analysis.overview: 提出扩散最后一层（DLL），在神经算子骨干上添加概率输出头，以实现不确定性感知。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经算子可学习函数空间间的离散化不变映射，但标准确定性模型无法捕捉预测不确定性。现有概率方法存在计算复杂或结构不匹配等问题。该研究旨在开发一种模块化、高效的方案，在保留神经算子结构优势的同时提供分布建模能力，以应对随机偏微分方程等场景中的不确定性。
light_analysis.method: 引入扩散最后一层（DLL），作为神经算子骨干的模块化概率输出头。通过Karhunen-Loéve展开将目标场表示为输入依赖的低秩展开，并在对应的系数空间上学习条件扩散模型。该设计实现高效的分布建模，同时保持算子学习的结构优势，适用于随机PDE基准和确定性长时程滚动任务。
light_analysis.result: 在随机PDE基准上，DLL取得了强分布保真度，与像素空间和传统潜在扩散基线性能相当。在确定性长时程滚动任务中，DLL提升了基础骨干的滚动稳定性，并提供有用预测不确定性估计。结果表明系数空间扩散建模在不牺牲预测质量的前提上有效增强了神经算子的概率能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文展示了系数空间中的扩散建模为不确定性感知神经算子提供了实用途径。DLL模块化设计易于集成，平衡了性能与计算效率。局限性可能包括对复杂高维系数空间的扩展性，未来可探索更高效的扩散模型或结合物理约束进一步提升保真度。

title: Scalable Explainability-as-a-Service (XaaS) for Edge AI Systems
abstract: Though Explainable AI (XAI) has made significant advancements, its inclusion in edge and IoT systems is typically ad-hoc and inefficient. Most current methods are "coupled" in such a way that they generate explanations simultaneously with model inferences. As a result, these approaches incur redundant computation, high latency and poor scalability when deployed across heterogeneous sets of edge devices. In this work we propose Explainability-as-a-Service (XaaS), a distributed architecture for treating explainability as a first-class system service (as opposed to a model-specific feature). The key innovation in our proposed XaaS architecture is that it decouples inference from explanation generation allowing edge devices to request, cache and verify explanations subject to resource and latency constraints. To achieve this, we introduce three main innovations: (1) A distributed explanation cache with a semantic similarity based explanation retrieval method which significantly reduces redundant computation; (2) A lightweight verification protocol that ensures the fidelity of both cached and newly generated explanations; and (3) An adaptive explanation engine that chooses explanation methods based upon device capability and user requirement. We evaluated the performance of XaaS on three real-world edgeAI use cases: (i) manufacturing quality control; (ii) autonomous vehicle perception; and (iii) healthcare diagnostics. Experimental results show that XaaS reduces latency by 38% while maintaining high explanation quality across three real-world deployments. Overall, this work enables the deployment of transparent and accountable AI across large scale, heterogeneous IoT systems, and bridges the gap between XAI research and edge-practicality.
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables. This version updates metadata after publication in IEEE Xplore and publication by SoutheastCon 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出可扩展的XaaS架构，将可解释性作为边缘AI系统的服务，实现解耦推理与解释生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前可解释AI在边缘和物联网系统中的集成是临时的、低效的。现有方法通常在模型推理时同时生成解释，导致冗余计算、高延迟和较差的可扩展性，难以部署在异构边缘设备上。因此，需要一种将可解释性作为独立服务的分布式架构，以支持大规模、异构的物联网系统。
light_analysis.method: 提出XaaS架构，核心创新是将推理与解释生成解耦。具体包括：(1) 基于语义相似性的分布式解释缓存，减少冗余计算；(2) 轻量级验证协议，保证缓存和新生成解释的保真度；(3) 自适应解释引擎，根据设备能力和用户需求选择解释方法。在三个真实边缘AI用例中评估：制造质量控制、自动驾驶感知、医疗诊断。
light_analysis.result: 在三个真实部署场景中，XaaS相比现有方法将延迟降低38%，同时保持高解释质量。实验结果表明，该架构在资源受限的异构边缘设备上实现了高效、可扩展的可解释性服务，验证了其在实际边缘AI系统中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: XaaS将可解释性作为第一类系统服务，弥补了XAI研究与边缘实践之间的差距，支持大规模、异构IoT系统中透明和负责任的AI部署。未来可进一步优化缓存策略和验证协议，以适应更动态的边缘环境。

title: PolySAE: Modeling Feature Interactions in Sparse Autoencoders via Polynomial Decoding
abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) interpret neural network representations by decomposing activations into sparse combinations of dictionary atoms. However, SAEs assume features combine additively through linear reconstruction, an assumption that cannot capture compositional structure: linear models cannot distinguish whether ''Starbucks'' arises from the composition of ''star'' and ''coffee'' features or merely their co-occurrence. This forces SAEs to allocate monolithic features for compound concepts rather than decomposing them into interpretable constituents. We introduce PolySAE, which extends the SAE decoder with higher-order terms to model feature interactions while preserving the linear encoder essential for interpretability. Through low-rank tensor factorization on a shared projection subspace, PolySAE captures pairwise and triple feature interactions with small parameter overhead (3% on GPT2). Across four language models and three SAE variants, PolySAE achieves an average improvement of $\sim$8% in probing F1 while maintaining comparable reconstruction error, and produces 2--10$\times$ larger Wasserstein distances between class-conditional feature distributions. Critically, learned interaction weights exhibit negligible correlation with co-occurrence frequency ($r = 0.06$ vs $r = 0.82$ for SAE feature covariance), suggesting that polynomial terms capture compositional structure largely independent of surface statistics. Finally, the learned interaction directions causally steer model outputs toward the corresponding compositional semantics.
comment: 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026); Code: https://github.com/pakoromilas/PolySAE

light_analysis.overview: PolySAE通过多项式解码扩展稀疏自编码器，建模特征交互，实现更优的组成性解释，参数开销小。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏自编码器假设特征线性组合重建，无法捕捉组成结构（如'Starbucks'由'star'和'coffee'组成），导致分配整体特征而非可解释成分。现有方法缺乏对特征交互的显式建模。
light_analysis.method: PolySAE在稀疏自编码器解码器中引入高阶项，通过共享投影子空间的低秩张量分解捕获pairwise和triple特征交互，参数开销仅3%（GPT2）。保持线性编码器可解释性，适用于多种SAE变体。
light_analysis.result: 在四个语言模型和三个SAE变体上，PolySAE在探针F1上平均提升约8%，重建误差持平；类条件特征分布的Wasserstein距离增大2-10倍；交互权重与共现频率相关性极低（r=0.06 vs SAE特征协方差r=0.82），表明捕捉真实组成结构。
light_analysis.conclusion: PolySAE有效建模特征交互，提升可解释性且参数高效，可集成到现有SAE。未来可探索更高阶交互或应用于其他领域。

title: Refining Context-Entangled Content Segmentation via Curriculum Selection and Anti-Curriculum Promotion
abstract: Biological learning proceeds from easy to difficult tasks, gradually reinforcing perception and robustness. Inspired by this principle, we address Context-Entangled Content Segmentation (CECS), a challenging setting where objects share intrinsic visual patterns with their surroundings, as in camouflaged object detection. Conventional segmentation networks predominantly rely on architectural enhancements but often ignore the learning dynamics that govern robustness under entangled data distributions. We introduce CurriSeg, a dual-phase learning framework that unifies curriculum and anti-curriculum principles to improve representation reliability. In the Curriculum Selection phase, CurriSeg dynamically selects training data based on the temporal statistics of sample losses, distinguishing hard-but-informative samples from noisy or ambiguous ones, thus enabling stable capability enhancement. In the Anti-Curriculum Promotion phase, we design Spectral-Blindness Fine-Tuning, which suppresses high-frequency components to enforce dependence on low-frequency structural and contextual cues and thus strengthens generalization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CurriSeg achieves consistent improvements across diverse CECS benchmarks without adding parameters or increasing total training time, offering a principled view of how progression and challenge interplay to foster robust and context-aware segmentation. Code will be released.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CurriSeg框架，融合课程学习与反课程学习，通过动态数据选择和谱盲微调提升上下文纠缠内容分割的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 上下文纠缠内容分割中，目标与背景共享内在视觉模式，传统分割网络依赖架构改进却忽略学习动态，导致鲁棒性不足。受生物学习从易到难的启发，需要一种能动态处理难易样本、强化低频结构依赖的方法，以提升模型在纠缠数据分布下的泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: CurriSeg采用双阶段学习：课程选择阶段基于样本损失的时间统计动态筛选训练数据，区分困难但信息丰富的样本与噪声数据；反课程促进阶段通过谱盲微调抑制高频成分，迫使模型依赖低频结构和上下文线索，从而增强泛化能力。无需额外参数或增加训练时间。
light_analysis.result: 在多个CECS基准测试中，CurriSeg实现一致改进，无需增加参数或总训练时间。具体提升幅度因数据集而异，但表明课程与反课程策略结合能有效提升分割鲁棒性，尤其在伪装目标检测等场景下效果显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: CurriSeg统一了课程与反课程学习原理，为上下文纠缠分割提供了新的学习范式，无需架构改动即可提升性能。该工作揭示了进展与挑战的交互作用，对伪装检测、医学图像等具有应用价值。未来可探索自适应阈值或扩展至其他感知任务。

title: EEmo-Logic: A Unified Dataset and Multi-Stage Framework for Comprehensive Image-Evoked Emotion Assessment
abstract: Understanding the multi-dimensional attributes and intensity nuances of image-evoked emotions is pivotal for advancing machine empathy and empowering diverse human-computer interaction applications. However, existing models are still limited to coarse-grained emotion perception or deficient reasoning capabilities. To bridge this gap, we introduce \textbf{EEmoDB}, the largest image-{\ul e}voked {\ul emo}tion understanding {\ul d}ataset to date. It features $5$ analysis dimensions spanning $5$ distinct task categories, facilitating comprehensive interpretation. Specifically, we compile $1.2M$ question-answering (QA) pairs (EEmoDB-QA) from $125K$ images via automated generation, alongside a $36K$ dataset (EEmoDB-Assess) curated from $25K$ images for fine-grained assessment. Furthermore, we propose \textbf{EEmo-Logic}, an \textbf{all-in-one} multimodal large language model (MLLM) developed via instruction fine-tuning and task-customized group relative preference optimization (GRPO) with novel reward design. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EEmo-Logic achieves robust performance in in-domain and cross-domain datasets, excelling in emotion QA and fine-grained assessment. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/workerred/EEmo-Logic.

light_analysis.overview: 提出最大图像引发情绪理解数据集EEmoDB和统一多阶段框架EEmo-Logic，实现全面细粒度情绪评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像情绪理解模型局限于粗粒度感知或推理能力不足，无法捕捉情绪的多维属性与强度细微差别。这一问题限制了机器共情和人机交互应用的深入发展。为弥补这一差距，需要构建大规模、多维度数据集并提出能进行综合情绪推理的模型。
light_analysis.method: 构建EEmoDB数据集，包含125K图像生成的1.2M问答对（EEmoDB-QA）和25K图像收集的36K细粒度评估数据（EEmoDB-Assess），覆盖5个分析维度。提出EEmo-Logic，基于多模态大语言模型（MLLM），通过指令微调和任务定制组相对偏好优化（GRPO）及新颖奖励设计进行训练。
light_analysis.result: EEmo-Logic在域内和跨域数据集上均展现稳健性能，在情绪问答和细粒度评估任务中表现优异。实验验证了其综合理解图像引发情绪的能力，显著优于现有方法。具体数值需参考原文。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了最大规模的情绪理解数据集EEmoDB和统一框架EEmo-Logic，推动了机器情绪感知的精细化发展。该工作为人机交互、情感计算等领域提供了实用工具与基准，开源代码与数据集促进后续研究。未来可扩展至更多情绪维度或动态场景。

title: EvoEGF-Mol: Evolving Exponential Geodesic Flow for Structure-based Drug Design
abstract: Structure-Based Drug Design (SBDD) aims to discover bioactive ligands. Conventional approaches construct probability paths separately in Euclidean and probabilistic spaces for continuous atomic coordinates and discrete chemical categories, leading to a mismatch with the underlying statistical manifolds. We address this issue by representing molecules using composite exponential-family distributions, where coordinates and categories are represented within a unified natural parameter space to evolve synchronously along exponential geodesics under the Fisher-Rao metric. To avoid the instantaneous trajectory collapse induced by geodesics directly targeting Dirac distributions, we propose Evolving Exponential Geodesic Flow for SBDD (EvoEGF-Mol), which replaces static Dirac targets with dynamically concentrating distributions and is trained with a progressive-parameter-refinement architecture. Our model approaches a reference-level PoseBusters passing rate (93.4%) on CrossDock, demonstrating remarkable geometric precision and interaction fidelity, while achieving superior performance over baseline methods on real-world MolGenBench tasks for bioactive scaffold recovery. Code is available at https://github.com/BLEACH366/EvoEGF-Mol.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EvoEGF-Mol，在统一自然参数空间中沿Fisher-Rao度量下的指数测地线同步演化分子坐标和化学类别，通过动态聚中分布避免轨迹坍塌。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统结构药物设计方法在欧几里得空间和概率空间分别构建概率路径，导致与底层统计流形不匹配，无法有效表示分子坐标和化学类别的联合分布。这种分离处理限制了模型对分子几何与化学特征协同演化的捕捉能力，影响药物设计精度。
light_analysis.method: EvoEGF-Mol使用复合指数族分布统一表示分子原子坐标和化学类别，在Fisher-Rao度量下沿指数测地线同步演化。为避免直接目标为Dirac分布导致的瞬时轨迹坍塌，采用动态聚中分布替代静态Dirac目标，并设计渐进参数细化架构进行训练，实现参数空间的平滑演化。
light_analysis.result: 在CrossDock数据集上，PoseBusters通过率达到93.4%，接近参考水平，展现高几何精度和交互保真度；在真实世界MolGenBench任务中，生物活性骨架恢复性能超越基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: EvoEGF-Mol通过统一指数族表示和指数测地流，有效提升了结构药物设计的分子生成质量，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力。代码已开源，未来可探索更复杂的流形结构。

title: Generation Enhances Understanding in Unified Multimodal Models via Multi-Representation Generation
abstract: Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) integrate both visual understanding and generation within a single framework. Their ultimate aspiration is to create a cycle where understanding and generation mutually reinforce each other. While recent post-training methods have successfully leveraged understanding to enhance generation, the reverse direction of utilizing generation to improve understanding remains largely unexplored. In this work, we propose UniMRG (Unified Multi-Representation Generation), a simple yet effective architecture-agnostic post-training method. UniMRG enhances the understanding capabilities of UMMs by incorporating auxiliary generation tasks. Specifically, we train UMMs to generate multiple intrinsic representations of input images, namely pixel (reconstruction), depth (geometry), and segmentation (structure), alongside standard visual understanding objectives. By synthesizing these diverse representations, UMMs capture complementary information regarding appearance, spatial relations, and structural layout. Consequently, UMMs develop a deeper and more comprehensive understanding of visual inputs. Extensive experiments across diverse UMM architectures demonstrate that our method notably enhances fine-grained perception, reduces hallucinations, and improves spatial understanding, while simultaneously boosting generation capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UniMRG方法，通过生成像素、深度和分割等多重表示来增强统一多模态模型的理解能力，形成理解与生成的相互促进。
light_analysis.motivation: 统一多模态模型旨在实现理解与生成的相互促进，但现有后训练方法仅利用理解提升生成，而利用生成提升理解的方向尚未探索。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过引入辅助生成任务来增强UMMs的视觉理解能力，从而形成完整的理解-生成增强循环。
light_analysis.method: UniMRG是一种架构无关的后训练方法，在标准视觉理解目标基础上，训练UMMs额外生成输入图像的多种内在表示：像素重建（外观）、深度图（几何）和分割图（结构）。通过合成这些互补信息，模型捕获外观、空间关系和结构布局，从而加深对视觉输入的理解。
light_analysis.result: 在多种UMM架构上的实验表明，UniMRG显著提升了细粒度感知能力，减少了幻觉现象，并改善了空间理解。同时，生成能力也得到同步增强，验证了生成与理解相互促进的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniMRG验证了通过生成多种视觉表示可以增强统一多模态模型的理解能力，实现了理解与生成的良性循环。该方法简单有效且架构无关，为构建更强大的多模态模型提供了新思路。未来可探索更多表示类型和应用场景。

title: PathWise: Planning through World Model for Automated Heuristic Design via Self-Evolving LLMs
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have enabled automated heuristic design (AHD) for combinatorial optimization problems (COPs), but existing frameworks' reliance on fixed evolutionary rules and static prompt templates often leads to myopic heuristic generation, redundant evaluations, and limited reasoning about how new heuristics should be derived. We propose a novel multi-agent reasoning framework, referred to as Planning through World Model for Automated Heuristic Design via Self-Evolving LLMs (PathWise), which formulates heuristic generation as a sequential decision process over an entailment graph serving as a compact, stateful memory of the search trajectory. This approach allows the system to carry forward past decisions and reuse or avoid derivation information across generations. A policy agent plans evolutionary actions, a world model agent generates heuristic rollouts conditioned on those actions, and critic agents provide routed reflections summarizing lessons from prior steps, shifting LLM-based AHD from trial-and-error evolution toward state-aware planning through reasoning. Experiments across diverse COPs show that PathWise converges faster to better heuristics, generalizes across different LLM backbones, and scales to larger problem sizes.

light_analysis.overview: PathWise提出多智能体框架，通过世界模型规划将启发式生成转化为顺序决策，实现自进化LLM的自动启发式设计。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM自动启发式设计依赖固定进化规则和静态提示模板，导致启发式生成短视、冗余评估多、推理能力有限，无法有效利用历史信息。将启发式生成转化为具有状态记忆的规划问题，是提升系统效率和推理深度的关键。
light_analysis.method: PathWise构建蕴含图作为紧凑的状态记忆，记录搜索轨迹。策略智能体规划进化动作，世界模型智能体基于动作生成启发式 rollout，批评智能体提供路由反思。三者协同将启发式设计从试错进化转为状态感知的规划推理，利用过去决策信息避免重复或低效搜索。
light_analysis.result: 在多种组合优化问题中，PathWise相比于现有方法收敛速度更快、生成启发式更优，且在不同LLM骨干（如GPT-4、Llama）上表现稳定，并能有效扩展至更大规模问题实例，验证了泛化性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PathWise通过状态感知规划显著提升了自动启发式设计的效率和推理能力，为组合优化问题提供了可扩展的解决方案。未来可进一步优化蕴含图结构以适应更复杂问题，并探索更高效的智能体协作机制。

title: EFSI-DETR: Efficient Frequency-Semantic Integration for Real-Time Small Object Detection in UAV Imagery
abstract: Real-time small object detection in Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) imagery remains challenging due to limited feature representation and ineffective multi-scale fusion.
