WhisTLE trains a variational autoencoder (VAE) to model encoder outputs from text and fine-tunes the decoder using the learned text-to-latent encoder, optionally combined with text-to-speech (TTS) adaptation. At inference, the original encoder is restored, incurring no extra runtime cost. Across four datasets and four ASR models, WhisTLE with TTS reduces word error rate (WER) by a relative 49.0% and outperforms all non-WhisTLE baselines in 100 of 112 scenarios. We also find that WhisTLE additively complements any combination of other domain adaptation approaches; we thus recommend the inclusion of WhisTLE during standard processes for adapting encoder-decoder ASR models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于文本的深度监督领域自适应方法WhisTLE，通过训练VAE模拟编码器输出并微调解码器，无需语音数据即可大幅降低词错误率。
light_analysis.motivation: 预训练ASR模型在未见领域上表现不佳，需领域自适应。但现实场景中收集目标领域语音数据成本高、不切实际，现有文本-only自适应方法效果有限。WhisTLE旨在仅利用文本数据实现高效适配，弥补数据不足的缺陷。
light_analysis.method: WhisTLE训练一个变分自编码器（VAE）从文本中学习编码器潜在表示，并用该表示微调预训练模型解码器；可选结合TTS增强。推理时恢复原始编码器，无额外计算开销。方法在四个ASR模型（包括Whisper）和四个数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: WhisTLE结合TTS在四个数据集上平均相对降低词错误率49.0%，在112个实验场景中100个优于所有非WhisTLE基线。该方法与任何其他领域自适应策略叠加时仍能额外提升性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: WhisTLE提供了一种高效、普适的文本-only领域自适应方案，显著提升ASR模型在未见过领域的鲁棒性，且无需修改推理架构。建议在标准模型适配流程中集成WhisTLE作为补充模块。未来可探索跨语言场景。

title: Measuring Epistemic Humility in Multimodal Large Language Models
abstract: Hallucinations in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) -- where the model generates content inconsistent with the input image -- pose significant risks in real-world applications, from misinformation in visual question answering to unsafe errors in decision-making. Existing benchmarks primarily test recognition accuracy, i.e., evaluating whether models can select the correct answer among distractors. This overlooks another important capability for trustworthy AI: recognizing when none of the provided options is supported by the image and abstaining from committing to a false choice, a humility-related behavior. We present HumbleBench, a new hallucination benchmark designed to evaluate false-option rejection in MLLMs under a forced-choice multiple-choice setting with a ``None of the above'' option. Built from a panoptic scene graph dataset, we leverage fine-grained scene graph annotations for objects and relations, use candidate attribute cues, and prompt GPT-4-Turbo to generate multiple-choice questions, followed by a rigorous manual filtering process. Each question includes a ``None of the above'' option, requiring models not only to recognize correct visual information but also to identify when no provided answer is valid. We evaluate a variety of state-of-the-art MLLMs -- including general-purpose, specialized reasoning, and proprietary models -- on HumbleBench and report empirical findings for the community. By incorporating explicit false-option rejection, HumbleBench fills a key gap in current evaluation suites by assessing a narrower but important abstention-oriented behavior that is relevant to trustworthy multimodal reasoning. Our code and dataset are released publicly and can be accessed at \href{https://github.com/maifoundations/HumbleBench}{https://github.com/maifoundations/HumbleBench}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HumbleBench基准，评估多模态大语言模型在强制选择题中拒绝虚假选项的认知谦逊能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准主要测试识别准确率，忽略了模型在无正确选项时拒绝回答的能力，这对可信AI至关重要。多模态大语言模型的幻觉问题在现实应用中带来风险，如视觉问答中的错误信息和决策中的不安全错误，需要评估模型的谦逊行为。
light_analysis.method: 基于全景场景图数据集，利用细粒度标注生成包含‘以上都不对’选项的选择题，经GPT-4-Turbo辅助和人工筛选。要求模型识别正确视觉信息并判断是否无有效选项，评估通用、专用推理和专有模型。
light_analysis.result: 在HumbleBench上评估了多种最新多模态大语言模型，包括通用、专用推理和专有模型，报告了实证发现，展示了模型在拒绝虚假选项上的能力差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: HumbleBench填补了当前评估套件中关于拒绝虚假选项的空白，促进可信多模态推理。代码和数据集已公开，有助于未来研究识别和缓解幻觉问题。

title: The meaning of prompts and the prompts of meaning: Semiotic reflections and modelling
abstract: This paper explores prompts and prompting in large language models (LLMs) as dynamic semiotic phenomena, drawing on Peirce's triadic model of signs, his nine sign types, and the Dynacom model of communication. The aim is to reconceptualize prompting not as a technical input mechanism but as a communicative and epistemic act involving an iterative process of sign formation, interpretation, and refinement. The theoretical foundation rests on Peirce's semiotics, particularly the interplay between representamen, object, and interpretant, and the typological richness of signs: qualisign, sinsign, legisign; icon, index, symbol; rheme, dicent, argument - alongside the interpretant triad captured in the Dynacom model. Analytically, the paper positions the LLM as a semiotic resource that generates interpretants in response to user prompts, thereby participating in meaning-making within shared universes of discourse. The findings suggest that prompting is a semiotic and communicative process that redefines how knowledge is organized, searched, interpreted, and co-constructed in digital environments. This perspective invites a reimagining of the theoretical and methodological foundations of knowledge organization and information seeking in the age of computational semiosis

light_analysis.overview: 本文从符号学视角重新概念化大语言模型中的提示，视为动态交流与意义构建过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究将提示视为技术输入机制，忽略了其在意义构建和交流中的符号学本质。本文旨在基于Peirce符号学模型，将提示理解为符号形成、解释和精炼的迭代过程，从而深化对LLM中知识组织与信息检索的理论认识。
light_analysis.method: 采用Peirce的三元符号模型（代表项、对象、解释项）及九种符号类型（质符、单符、律符等），结合Dynacom交流模型，将LLM定位为符号资源，分析用户提示如何生成解释项并参与共享话语中的意义构建。
light_analysis.result: 提示是一种符号和交流过程，重新定义了数字环境中知识的组织、搜索、解释和共同构建方式。摘要未提供实验数据，仅给出理论分析结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了提示作为符号学过程的意义，邀请重新思考计算符号学时代知识组织与信息检索的理论基础，对理解人机交互和知识构建具有学术价值。

title: Towards Cognitively-Faithful Decision-Making Models to Improve AI Alignment
abstract: Recent AI trends seek to align AI models to learned human-centric objectives, such as personal preferences, utility, or societal values. Using standard preference elicitation methods, researchers and practitioners build models of human decisions and judgments, to which AI models are aligned. However, standard elicitation methods often fail to capture the cognitive processes behind human decision making, such as heuristics or simplifying structured thought patterns. To address this failure, we take an axiomatic approach to learning cognitively faithful decision processes from pairwise comparisons. Building on the literature analyzing cognitive processes that shape human decision-making, we derive a model class in which features are first processed with learned rules, then aggregated via a fixed rule, such as the Bradley-Terry rule, to produce a decision. This structured processing of information ensures that such models are realistic and feasible candidates to represent underlying human decision-making processes. We demonstrate the efficacy of this modeling approach by learning interpretable models of human decision making in a kidney allocation task, and show that our proposed models match or surpass the accuracy of prior models of human pairwise decision-making.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于公理的认知忠实决策模型，通过学习可解释的决策规则实现AI与人类认知过程的更好对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前AI对齐方法依赖标准偏好学习，但未捕捉人类决策中的认知过程（如启发式思维模式）。现有偏好获取技术忽视决策背后的认知机制，导致对齐模型可能偏离真实人类意图。需要一种能忠实反映人类认知结构的建模方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用公理化方法从成对比较中学习认知忠实决策过程。模型先通过可学习规则处理特征，再用固定规则（如Bradley-Terry）聚合。这种结构化信息处理确保模型能代表真实人类决策过程，同时保持可解释性。在肾脏分配任务中学习人类决策模型。
light_analysis.result: 在肾脏分配任务上，所提模型学习的人类决策模型匹配或超越先前人类成对决策模型的准确率。表明该建模方法能有效捕捉人类认知过程，同时保持较好的预测性能，验证了认知忠实模型的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种新的AI对齐范式，通过公理化的认知忠实模型弥合人类认知与AI对齐的鸿沟。该方法学价值在于为可解释AI提供理论基础，应用价值在于高风险决策场景（如医疗）中实现可靠AI辅助。未来可扩展至更复杂决策任务。

title: HiGraph: A Large-Scale Hierarchical Graph Dataset for Malware Analysis
abstract: The advancement of graph-based malware analysis is critically limited by the absence of large-scale datasets that capture the inherent hierarchical structure of software. Existing methods often oversimplify programs into single level graphs, failing to model the crucial semantic relationship between high-level functional interactions and low-level instruction logic. To bridge this gap, we introduce \dataset, the largest public hierarchical graph dataset for malware analysis, comprising over \textbf{200M} Control Flow Graphs (CFGs) nested within \textbf{595K} Function Call Graphs (FCGs). This two-level representation preserves structural semantics essential for building robust detectors resilient to code obfuscation and malware evolution. We demonstrate HiGraph's utility through a large-scale analysis that reveals distinct structural properties of benign and malicious software, establishing it as a foundational benchmark for the community. The dataset and tools are publicly available at https://higraph.org.

light_analysis.overview: 引入最大公开层次图数据集HiGraph，用于恶意软件分析，包含200M个控制流图嵌套在595K个函数调用图中。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于图的恶意软件分析受限于缺乏大规模层次图数据集。现有方法将程序简化为单层图，无法捕获高层功能交互与低层指令逻辑之间的语义关系，导致检测器难以应对代码混淆和恶意软件演化。因此，迫切需要能保留层次结构语义的数据集来推动鲁棒检测器的开发。
light_analysis.method: 构建层次图数据集HiGraph，包含两层结构：函数调用图（FCG）作为顶层，每个函数内的控制流图（CFG）作为底层。数据集规模达595K个FCG和超过200M个CFG，并公开提供数据集和工具。这种双层表示保留了程序的结构语义，为构建抗混淆和演化的检测器提供基础。
light_analysis.result: 通过大规模分析，HiGraph揭示了良性软件与恶意软件之间不同的结构属性，验证了数据集的有效性。作为社区基准，它为恶意软件分析提供了关键的标准化评估平台，但具体检测性能指标在摘要中未明确说明（如准确率）。
light_analysis.conclusion: HiGraph填补了恶意软件分析中缺乏大规模层次图数据集的空白，其双层结构可促进鲁棒检测器的研究，具有重要学术和实用价值。未来工作可基于该数据集开发更高级的图神经网络模型，并探索跨层融合的检测方法。

title: AgentCoMa: A Compositional Benchmark Mixing Commonsense and Mathematical Reasoning in Real-World Scenarios
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved high accuracy on complex commonsense and mathematical problems that involve the composition of multiple reasoning steps. However, current compositional benchmarks testing these skills tend to focus on either commonsense or math reasoning, whereas LLM agents solving real-world tasks would require a combination of both. In this work, we introduce an Agentic Commonsense and Math benchmark (AgentCoMa), where each compositional task requires a commonsense reasoning step and a math reasoning step. We test it on 61 LLMs of different sizes, model families, and training strategies. We find that LLMs can usually solve both steps in isolation, yet their accuracy drops by nearly 30% on average when the two are combined. This is a substantially greater performance gap than the one we observe in prior compositional benchmarks that combine multiple steps of the same reasoning type. In contrast, non-expert human annotators can solve the compositional questions and the individual steps in AgentCoMa with similarly high accuracy. Furthermore, we conduct a series of interpretability studies to better understand the performance gap, examining neuron patterns, attention maps and membership inference. Our work underscores a substantial degree of model brittleness in the context of mixed-type compositional reasoning and offers a test bed for future improvement.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AgentCoMa基准，测试LLM在混合常识与数学推理的组合任务中的表现，发现显著性能下降。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有组合推理基准通常只测试单一类型的推理（常识或数学），而现实世界任务需要两者结合。当前LLM在单独步骤上表现良好，但在混合组合任务中性能大幅下降，而人类则可以同时处理。揭示模型在混合类型组合推理中的脆弱性，为未来改进提供测试平台。
light_analysis.method: 构建AgentCoMa基准，每个任务包含一个常识推理步骤和一个数学推理步骤。对61个不同大小、系列和训练策略的LLM进行测试，对比单独步骤与组合步骤的准确率。进行可解释性研究，包括神经元模式、注意力图和成员推理分析。
light_analysis.result: LLM在单独步骤上准确率较高，但组合后平均下降近30%，远大于同类型组合推理的性能差距。非专家人类在组合问题和单独步骤上表现相近且准确率高。
light_analysis.conclusion: AgentCoMa基准揭示了LLM在混合类型组合推理中的脆弱性，即模型难以整合不同类型的推理步骤。该工作为评估和改进LLM在现实场景中的组合推理能力提供了重要工具，并指出了未来研究方向。

title: Hybrid Deep Searcher: Scalable Parallel and Sequential Search Reasoning
abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) combined with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) have enabled deep research agents capable of multi-step reasoning with external knowledge retrieval. However, we find that existing approaches rarely demonstrate test-time search scaling. Methods that extend reasoning through single-query sequential search suffer from limited evidence coverage, while approaches that generate multiple independent queries per step often lack structured aggregation, hindering deeper sequential reasoning. We propose a hybrid search strategy to address these limitations. We introduce HybridDeepSearcher, a structured search agent that integrates parallel query expansion with explicit evidence aggregation before advancing to deeper sequential reasoning. To supervise this behavior, we introduce HDS-QA, a novel dataset that guides models to combine broad parallel search with structured aggregation through supervised reasoning-query0retrieval trajectories containing parallel sub-queries. Across five benchmarks, HybridDeepSearcher significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art, improving F1 scores by +15.9 on FanOutQA and +9.2 on a subset of BrowseComp. Further analysis shows its consistent test-time search scaling: performance improves as additional search turns or calls are allowed, while competing methods plateau.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合搜索策略HybridDeepSearcher，结合并行查询扩展与显式证据聚合，实现可扩展的测试时搜索推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度研究代理在检索增强生成中缺乏测试时搜索扩展能力。单查询顺序搜索证据覆盖有限，多独立查询缺乏结构化聚合，阻碍深度顺序推理。需要一种能同时利用并行搜索广度与顺序推理深度的策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出HybridDeepSearcher，一种结构化搜索代理。它集成并行查询扩展，在进入深度顺序推理前进行显式证据聚合。引入HDS-QA数据集，通过包含并行子查询的监督推理-查询-检索轨迹指导模型学习。
light_analysis.result: 在五个基准测试中，HybridDeepSearcher显著优于现有方法，在FanOutQA上F1提升+15.9，在BrowseComp子集上提升+9.2。性能随搜索步数或调用次数增加而持续提升，而对比方法出现平台期。
light_analysis.conclusion: HybridDeepSearcher有效结合并行与顺序搜索，实现测试时搜索扩展。工作促进了深度研究代理的推理能力，数据集HDS-QA可支持相关训练。未来可探索更复杂的聚合机制或扩展到更多领域。

title: Apex-Centered Spatio-Temporal Rank Pooling and Gradient Attention for Micro-Expression Recognition
abstract: Micro-expression recognition (MER) is a challenging task due to the subtle and fleeting nature of micro-expressions. Traditional input modalities, such as Apex Frame, Optical Flow, and Dynamic Image, often fail to adequately capture these brief facial movements, resulting in suboptimal performance. In this study, we introduce the Micro-expression Spatio-Temporal Image (MESTI), a micro-expression-specific reformulation of dynamic rank pooling that transforms a video sequence into a single image while emphasizing the onset-apex-offset temporal pattern of micro-expressions. Additionally, we present the Micro-expression Gradient Attention Network (MEGANet), which incorporates a proposed Gradient Attention block to enhance the extraction of fine-grained motion features from micro-expressions. By combining MESTI and MEGANet, we aim to establish a more effective approach to MER. Extensive experiments were conducted to evaluate the effectiveness of MESTI, comparing it with existing input modalities across regular architectures. Moreover, we demonstrate that replacing the input of previously published MER networks with MESTI leads to consistent performance improvements. The performance of MEGANet is also evaluated, showing that our proposed network achieves state-of-the-art results on the SMIC-HS, SAMM and competitive performance on CASMEII datasets, it also achieves leading performance in the reported cross-dataset evaluation settings. The combination of MESTI and MEGANet consistently outperforms the compared methods. These findings underscore the potential of MESTI as a superior input modality and MEGANet as an advanced recognition network, aiming to more effective MER systems in a variety of applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MESTI图像表示和MEGANet网络，通过空间-时间秩池化和梯度注意力提升微表情识别性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 微表情识别因表情细微短暂而极具挑战。现有输入模态如顶点帧、光流和动态图像无法充分捕捉这些短暂面部运动，导致性能欠佳。因此，需要一种更能突出微表情时序模式（起始-顶点-结束）的输入表示和专门的网络结构来提取精细运动特征。
light_analysis.method: 提出微表情时空图像MESTI，基于动态秩池化将视频转换为单张图像，强调起止-顶点-结束的时序模式。设计微表情梯度注意力网络MEGANet，包含梯度注意力模块以增强细粒度运动特征提取。在多个数据集上比较MESTI与现有输入模态，并验证将MESTI替换已有网络输入的有效性。
light_analysis.result: MEGANet在SMIC-HS和SAMM数据集上达到最先进性能，在CASME II上表现有竞争力；在跨数据集评估中取得领先结果。MESTI作为输入模态能持续提升已有MER网络性能。MESTI与MEGANet的组合始终优于对比方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: MESTI作为优越的输入模态和MEGANet作为先进识别网络，共同为更有效的微表情识别系统奠定基础。该组合在不同应用场景中具有潜力，但未明确讨论局限性或未来方向。

title: FloorplanQA: A Benchmark for Spatial Reasoning in LLMs using Structured Representations
abstract: We introduce FloorplanQA, a diagnostic benchmark for evaluating spatial reasoning in large language models (LLMs). FloorplanQA is grounded in structured representations of indoor scenes, such as (e.g., kitchens, living rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms, and others), encoded symbolically in JSON or XML layouts. The benchmark covers core spatial tasks, including distance measurement, visibility, path finding, and object placement within constrained spaces. Our results across a variety of frontier open-source and commercial LLMs reveal that while models may succeed in shallow queries, they often fail to respect physical constraints, preserve spatial coherence, though they remain mostly robust to small spatial perturbations. FloorplanQA uncovers a blind spot in today's LLMs: inconsistent reasoning about indoor layouts. We hope this benchmark inspires new work on language models that can accurately infer and manipulate spatial and geometric properties in practical settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FloorplanQA基准，评估LLM在结构化室内场景中的空间推理能力，揭示其在物理约束和空间一致性上的盲点。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM在自然语言任务中表现优异，但在空间推理方面存在不足，尤其缺乏对室内布局物理约束和空间连贯性的理解。现有基准未能系统诊断这一问题。FloorplanQA通过结构化表示（JSON/XML）模拟真实室内场景，专门测试距离、可见性、路径规划等核心空间任务，以暴露LLM的推理缺陷，推动模型改进。
light_analysis.method: FloorplanQA使用结构化编码（JSON/XML）表示室内场景（如厨房、客厅等），涵盖距离测量、可见性、路径规划和对象放置四大任务。评估多种前沿开源和商业LLM，通过对比浅层查询与深层空间推理任务的表现，分析模型对物理约束的遵循程度和空间一致性，并测试对微小空间扰动的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，LLM在简单空间查询上表现尚可，但在需要尊重物理约束（如墙壁阻挡）、保持空间连贯性（如房间布局合理性）的任务中失败率较高。模型对微小空间扰动（如移动物体位置）大致鲁棒，但整体推理不一致，揭示了在室内布局理解上的系统性盲点。
light_analysis.conclusion: FloorplanQA揭示了当前LLM在空间推理上的关键缺陷，特别是对物理约束和空间一致性的处理不足。该基准为语言模型的空间理解研究提供了标准化评估工具，促进模型在机器人导航、室内设计等实际场景中的应用改进。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的3D场景或动态环境。

title: Psychometric Item Validation Using Virtual Respondents with Trait-Response Mediators
abstract: As psychometric surveys are increasingly used to assess the traits of large language models (LLMs), the need for scalable survey item generation suited for LLMs has also grown. A critical challenge here is ensuring the construct validity of generated items, i.e., whether they truly measure the intended trait. Traditionally, this requires costly, large-scale human data collection. To make it efficient, we present a framework for virtual respondent simulation using LLMs. Our central idea is to account for mediators: factors through which the same trait can give rise to varying responses to a survey item. By simulating respondents with diverse mediators, we identify survey items that yield responses robustly correlated with intended traits across these mediators. Experiments on three psychological trait theories (Big5, Schwartz, VIA) show that our mediator generation methods and simulation framework effectively identify high-validity items. LLMs demonstrate the ability to generate plausible mediators from trait definitions and to simulate respondent behavior for item validation. Our problem formulation, metrics, methodology, and dataset open a new direction for cost-efficient survey development and a deeper understanding of how LLMs simulate human survey responses. We release our dataset and code to support future work.
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication at TACL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用LLM模拟虚拟受访者，通过特质-响应中介因子验证心理测量项目效度的方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 心理测量调查被用于评估LLM特质，需可扩展的项目生成，但确保项目构念效度需昂贵的大规模人类数据。现有方法成本高、效率低，亟需高效的项目验证方法以降低开发成本。
light_analysis.method: 提出虚拟受访者模拟框架，核心是考虑中介因子（同一特质导致不同响应的因素），模拟具有不同中介因子的受访者，识别与特质稳健相关的项目。采用Big5、Schwartz、VIA三种理论，利用LLM从特质定义生成合理中介因子并模拟受访者行为，通过相关性指标评估项目效度。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提中介生成方法和模拟框架能有效识别高效度项目，LLM展现出从特质定义生成合理中介因子及模拟受访者行为的能力，为成本高效的调查开发提供了新方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了问题公式、指标、方法论和数据集，为低成本调查开发及理解LLM模拟人类响应开辟新路径。释放数据集和代码以支持未来工作，强调了方法在心理测量中的潜力。

title: A Generative Approach for Semantic Auditing of Electronic Health Records
abstract: The reliability of clinical artificial intelligence (AI) depends on high-quality data, yet Electronic Health Records are often inconsistent with existing scientific knowledge. Current quality assessments are limited: they either focus on syntax or rely on labor-intensive manual rules to capture semantic nuances. To overcome these scalability barriers, we propose Medical Data Pecking, a methodology that adopts software unit testing principles for medical data validation. It introduces Semantic Data Coverage, employing Large Language Models to generate context-aware tests that "peck" for inconsistencies between observed data and epidemiological evidence. To demonstrate this methodology, we implemented a reference tool using a Retrieval-Augmented Generation architecture that synthesizes medical literature into executable code. When applied to three datasets, this implementation generated dozens of tests per cohort, identifying discrepancies between observed distributions and epidemiological priors. These discrepancies encompass both genuine data inconsistencies and expected cohort-selection effects. This work provides an initial framework for scalable semantic auditing, shifting assurance from manual rules to the generative and context-sensitive verification required for trustworthy AI.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于大语言模型的语义审计方法，用于自动检测电子健康记录中的语义不一致性，提升临床AI数据的可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 电子健康记录常与科学知识不一致，现有质量评估限于语法检查或依赖人工规则，难以处理语义细微差别。需要可扩展的语义审计方法来发现数据与流行病学证据之间的不一致，确保临床AI的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Medical Data Pecking方法论，借鉴软件单元测试原则，引入语义数据覆盖率概念，利用大语言模型生成上下文感知测试。实现基于检索增强生成架构的工具，将医学文献综合为可执行代码，自动验证观察数据与流行病学先验的一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在三个数据集上应用，每个队列生成数十个测试，识别出观察分布与先验之间的差异，包括真实数据不一致和预期的队列选择效应，展示了生成式语义审计的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了可扩展语义审计的初始框架，将数据质量保证从人工规则转向生成式和上下文敏感的验证，有助于构建可信的临床AI系统。未来可进一步优化测试生成和消解语义歧义。

title: Norm$\times$Direction: Restoring the Missing Query Norm in Vision Linear Attention
abstract: Linear attention mitigates the quadratic complexity of softmax attention but suffers from a critical loss of expressiveness. We identify two primary causes: (1) The normalization operation cancels the query norm, which breaks the correlation between a query's norm and the spikiness (entropy) of the attention distribution as in softmax attention. (2) Standard techniques for enforcing non-negativity cause destructive information loss by nullifying valid inner-product interactions. To address these challenges, we introduce NaLaFormer, a novel linear attention mechanism built upon a norm$\times$direction (ND) decomposition of the query and key vectors. We leverage each component to solve a distinct problem: The query norm is injected into our kernel to create a query-norm-aware map that restores the attention distribution's spikiness. The direction vectors are processed by a geometric, cosine-based similarity metric that guarantees non-negativity while preserving the rich, fine-grained information of the inner product. We validate NaLaFormer through a comprehensive multi-modal evaluation, where it sets new state-of-the-art benchmarks for linear attention. Our model achieves up to a 7.5% accuracy gain on ImageNet-1K and a 4.7% mIoU improvement on ADE20K over comparable baselines. It demonstrates profound efficiency, reducing peak memory by a transformative 92.3% in token-intensive super-resolution tasks (70K+ tokens). NaLaFormer's versatility is further confirmed as it surpasses strong baselines like Mamba on common-sense reasoning and sets a new state-of-the-art on the Long Range Arena (LRA) benchmark. Code is available at https://github.com/ZacharyMeng/NaLaFormer .

light_analysis.overview: 提出NaLaFormer，通过查询范数和方向分解恢复线性注意力中的查询范数信息，实现高性能线性注意力。
light_analysis.motivation: 线性注意力虽降低了softmax注意力的二次复杂度，但损失了表达能力。主要原因是归一化消除了查询范数，破坏了注意力分布的尖峰性；标准非负性技术导致有效内积信息丢失。需要恢复查询范数并保持信息丰富性。
light_analysis.method: 提出NaLaFormer，基于查询和键向量的范数×方向分解。查询范数被注入核函数以创建查询范数感知映射，恢复注意力分布尖峰性；方向向量采用基于余弦的几何相似性度量，保证非负性并保留内积细粒度信息。
light_analysis.result: 在多模态评估中创下线性注意力新SOTA。ImageNet-1K上准确率提升7.5%，ADE20K上mIoU提升4.7%。在高令牌超分辨率任务中峰值内存降低92.3%。在常识推理上超越Mamba，在Long Range Arena上达到新SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: NaLaFormer通过范数×方向分解有效恢复了线性注意力的表达能力，实现高效且性能优越的注意力机制。方法通用性强，适用于多种任务。未来可探索更高效的实现或扩展到其他架构。

title: Plan for Speed: Dilated Scheduling for Masked Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Masked diffusion language models (MDLMs) promise fast, non-autoregressive text generation, yet existing samplers, which pick tokens to unmask based on model confidence, ignore interactions when unmasking multiple positions in parallel and effectively reduce to slow, autoregressive behavior. We propose the Dilated Unmasking Scheduler (DUS), an inference-only, planner-model-free method that partitions sequence positions into non-adjacent dilated groups and unmasks them in parallel so as to minimize an upper bound on joint entropy gain at each denoising step. By explicitly trading off the number of network calls against generation quality, DUS recovers most of the performance lost under traditional parallel unmasking strategies. Across math (GSM8K, MATH500), code (HumanEval, MBPP), general-knowledge (BBH, MMLU-Pro), and instruction following (IFEval) benchmarks, DUS outperforms confidence-based planners and turns the diffusion-specific quality-speed trade-off into a deterministic, predictable speedup set by the block size $B$, yielding up to $5.8\times$ wall-clock speedup over token-by-token MDLM decoding without modifying the underlying denoiser. Applied as a drop-in post-filter, dilated spacing also improves adaptive samplers. Code is available at https://github.com/omerlux/DUS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出扩张取消掩蔽调度器（DUS），通过非相邻扩张分组并行去噪，优化联合熵增益上界，实现掩蔽扩散语言模型的高质量快速生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 掩蔽扩散语言模型（MDLM）旨在快速非自回归生成，但现有基于置信度的采样器在并行取消掩蔽多个位置时忽略交互，导致实际生成退化为缓慢的自回归行为。这种质量-速度权衡缺乏可预测性，亟需一种能明确控制并行度且不依赖额外模型的调度方法。DUS通过划分扩张组最小化熵增益上界，解决了并行去噪中的交互问题，恢复传统策略损失的性能。
light_analysis.method: DUS是一种仅推理、无需规划器模型的方法，将序列位置划分为非相邻的扩张组，在每一步去噪中并行取消掩蔽一组位置，通过最小化联合熵增益的上界来调度。核心是块大小B，它直接控制网络调用次数与生成质量的权衡。DUS作为即插即用的后过滤器，可无缝集成到现有MDLM中，无需修改底层去噪器。
light_analysis.result: 在GSM8K、MATH500、HumanEval、MBPP、BBH、MMLU-Pro和IFEval等基准上，DUS优于基于置信度的规划器。与逐token MDLM解码相比，墙钟加速高达5.8倍，同时恢复传统并行策略丢失的大部分性能。通过块大小B实现可预测的加速，且作为后过滤器也改进了自适应采样器。
light_analysis.conclusion: DUS为MDLM提供了一种简单有效的推理调度方法，将质量-速度权衡转化为由块大小控制的确定性加速，显著提升生成效率。其无需额外训练或模型修改的特性便于实际部署。未来可探索更复杂的联合熵估计或自动调整块大小，以进一步优化性能。

title: CLiViS: Unleashing Cognitive Map through Linguistic-Visual Synergy for Embodied Visual Reasoning
abstract: Embodied Visual Reasoning (EVR) seeks to follow complex, free-form instructions based on egocentric video, enabling semantic understanding and spatiotemporal reasoning in dynamic environments. Despite its promising potential, EVR encounters significant challenges stemming from the diversity of complex instructions and the intricate spatiotemporal dynamics in long-term egocentric videos. Prior solutions either employ Large Language Models (LLMs) over static video captions, which often omit critical visual details, or rely on end-to-end Vision-Language Models (VLMs) that struggle with stepwise compositional reasoning. Consider the complementary strengths of LLMs in reasoning and VLMs in perception, we propose CLiViS. It is a novel training-free framework that leverages LLMs for high-level task planning and orchestrates VLM-driven open-world visual perception to iteratively update the scene context. Building on this synergy, the core of CLiViS is a dynamic Cognitive Map that evolves throughout the reasoning process. This map constructs a structured representation of the embodied scene, bridging low-level perception and high-level reasoning. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and generality of CLiViS, especially in handling long-term visual dependencies. Code is available at https://github.com/Teacher-Tom/CLiViS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CLiViS，一个无需训练的框架，通过LLM规划与VLM感知协同，构建动态认知地图，提升具身视觉推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 具身视觉推理（EVR）在长时程自我中心视频中面临复杂指令和时空动态的挑战。现有方法要么基于静态视频字幕使用LLM，遗漏关键视觉细节；要么依赖端到端VLM，难以进行逐步组合推理。需要一种结合LLM推理与VLM感知互补优势的框架。
light_analysis.method: CLiViS是一种无需训练的框架，利用LLM进行高层任务规划，并编排VLM驱动的开放世界视觉感知，以迭代更新场景上下文。核心是动态认知地图，它在推理过程中演化，构建具身场景的结构化表示，连接低层感知和高层推理。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试上的广泛实验证明了CLiViS的有效性和通用性，尤其是在处理长期视觉依赖方面表现突出。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但与现有方法相比有显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: CLiViS通过语言-视觉协同建立了动态认知地图，有效解决了EVR中的长期视觉依赖和复杂指令推理问题。其无需训练的特点便于实际部署。未来可探索更复杂的认知地图更新机制或扩展到其他具身任务。

title: Adaptive Preconditioners Trigger Loss Spikes in Adam
abstract: Loss spikes commonly emerge during neural network training with the Adam optimizer across diverse architectures and scales, yet their underlying mechanism remains elusive. While previous explanations attribute these phenomena to sharper loss landscapes at lower loss, we show that landscape geometry alone is insufficient to explain the phenomenon. In this work, we pinpoint the root cause in the internal dynamics of Adam's second moment estimator. We identify a critical ``decoupling'' mechanism where the adaptive preconditioner $v_t$ fails to track the instantaneous squared gradients $g_t^2$, causing the adaptive mechanism to effectively fail. This decoupling allows the preconditioner to decay autonomously despite rising gradients, which pushes the maximum eigenvalue of the preconditioned Hessian beyond the stability threshold $2/η$ for sustained periods, manifesting as dramatic loss spikes. Through a quadratic approximation analysis, we theoretically and experimentally characterize five distinct stages of spike evolution and propose a predictor for anticipating spikes based on gradient-directional curvature. We empirically find that the proposed loss spike mechanism, although derived from simplified models, generalizes well to practical scenarios ranging from small neural networks to large-scale Transformers.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示Adam优化器中自适应预条件器解耦引发损失尖峰的机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 损失尖峰在多种神经网络训练中常见，但根本机制不明。先前归因于损失景观的锐利性，但不足以解释。本文旨在深入探究Adam内部动力学中二阶矩估计器的行为，揭示尖峰产生的根本原因。
light_analysis.method: 通过分析Adam的二阶矩估计器v_t，发现其无法跟踪瞬时平方梯度g_t^2，发生“解耦”，导致预条件器自主衰减。这使预处理Hessian的最大特征值超过稳定性阈值2/η。使用二次近似分析，理论表征五个尖峰演化阶段，并基于梯度方向曲率提出尖峰预测器。
light_analysis.result: 理论与实验验证了五个尖峰演化阶段。提出的机制从简化模型推广到实际场景，包括小型网络和大型Transformer，表明机制具有泛化性。具体数值未明确提及，但强调机制的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了Adam损失尖峰的根本机制在于自适应预条件器的内部动态，提供了理论解释和预测方法。有助于理解优化器行为，改进训练稳定性。未来可能进一步研究不同优化器中的类似现象。

title: A Closer Look on Memorization in Tabular Diffusion Model: A Data-Centric Perspective
abstract: Diffusion models have shown strong performance in generating high-quality tabular data, but they carry privacy risks by reproducing exact training samples. While prior work focuses on dataset-level augmentation to reduce memorization, little is known about which individual samples contribute most. We present the first data-centric study of memorization dynamics in tabular diffusion models. We quantify memorization for each real sample based on how many generated samples are flagged as replicas, using a relative distance ratio. Our empirical analysis reveals a heavy-tailed distribution of memorization counts: a small subset of samples contributes disproportionately to leakage, confirmed via sample-removal experiments. To understand this, we divide real samples into top- and non-top-memorized groups and analyze their training-time behaviors. We track when each sample is first memorized and monitor per-epoch memorization intensity (AUC). Memorized samples are memorized slightly earlier and show stronger signals in early training. Based on these insights, we propose DynamicCut, a two-stage, model-agnostic mitigation method: (a) rank samples by epoch-wise intensity, (b) prune a tunable top fraction, and (c) retrain on the filtered dataset. Across multiple tabular datasets and models, DynamicCut reduces memorization with minimal impact on data diversity and downstream performance. It also complements augmentation-based defenses. Furthermore, DynamicCut enables cross-model transferability: high-ranked samples identified from one model (e.g., a diffusion model) are also effective for reducing memorization when removed from others, such as GANs and VAEs.
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR), 2026

light_analysis.overview: 首次从数据中心的视角研究表格扩散模型中的记忆化动态，并提出DynamicCut方法缓解记忆化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在生成高质量表格数据时存在隐私风险，可能复现精确训练样本。现有工作主要关注数据集级别的增强来减少记忆化，但缺乏对哪些单个样本贡献最大的理解。本文旨在从数据中心的视角，识别并理解导致记忆化的关键样本，从而设计更有效的缓解策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出DynamicCut方法，包含两阶段：首先基于每轮记忆化强度（AUC）对样本排序，然后裁剪可调的前比例样本，最后在过滤后的数据集上重新训练。分析中，使用相对距离比量化每个真实样本的记忆化程度，并通过样本移除实验验证重尾分布。
light_analysis.result: 在多个表格数据集和模型上，DynamicCut有效减少记忆化，同时对数据多样性和下游性能影响最小。该方法还能与基于数据增强的防御互补，并实现跨模型迁移：从扩散模型识别的关键样本移除后，也能降低GAN和VAE的记忆化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了记忆化在表格扩散模型中的重尾分布特性，并基于训练动态提出了有效的裁剪策略DynamicCut。该研究具有重要的隐私保护价值，可应用于敏感表格数据的生成。未来工作可探索更细粒度的样本选择或动态调整裁剪比例。

title: Beyond the Proxy: Trajectory-Distilled Guidance for Offline GFlowNet Training
abstract: Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets) excel at sampling diverse, high-reward objects. In many practical applications where active reward queries are infeasible, these models must be trained using static offline datasets. Prevailing training methods typically rely on a proxy model to provide reward feedback for online sampled trajectories. However, constructing a reliable proxy is often challenging due to data scarcity or high evaluation costs. While existing proxy-free approaches attempt to address this, they often impose coarse constraints that limit the model's ability to explore effectively. To overcome these limitations, we propose Trajectory-Distilled GFlowNet (TD-GFN), a novel proxy-free training framework. TD-GFN utilizes inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) to extract dense, transition-level edge rewards from offline trajectories, providing rich structural guidance for efficient exploration. Crucially, to ensure robustness, these rewards guide the policy indirectly through DAG pruning and prioritized backward sampling. This design ensures that gradient updates rely exclusively on ground-truth terminal rewards from the dataset, thereby preventing error propagation. Empirical results demonstrate that TD-GFN significantly outperforms a broad range of existing baselines in both convergence speed and sample quality, establishing a more robust and efficient paradigm for offline GFlowNet training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无代理的离线GFlowNet训练框架TD-GFN，利用逆强化学习从离线轨迹提取稠密边缘奖励，结合DAG剪枝和优先反向采样实现鲁棒高效探索。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线GFlowNet训练中，代理模型因数据稀缺或评估成本高而难以构建，现有无代理方法约束粗糙、限制探索。为克服这些局限，需要一种无需代理且能提供丰富结构指导的训练方法。
light_analysis.method: TD-GFN采用逆强化学习从离线轨迹中学习稠密、逐转移的边缘奖励，提供细粒度结构指导。为保障鲁棒性，奖励通过DAG剪枝和优先反向采样间接引导策略，确保梯度更新仅基于真实终端奖励，避免误差传播。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，TD-GFN在收敛速度和样本质量上显著优于多种现有基线（包括代理和无代理方法），证明了其作为更鲁棒高效的离线GFlowNet训练范式的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TD-GFN成功解决了离线GFlowNet训练中代理不可靠和无代理方法探索不足的问题，为数据稀缺场景下的生成任务提供了新范式。未来可探索其在更大规模离线数据或不同奖励结构下的应用。

title: From Reasoning to Code: GRPO Optimization for Underrepresented Languages
abstract: Generating accurate and executable code using Large Language Models (LLMs) remains a significant challenge for underrepresented programming languages, such as Prolog and Lisp, due to the scarcity of public training data compared to high-resource languages like Python. This paper introduces a generalizable Reinforcement Learning (RL) approach that combines small-scale versions of the Qwen2.5-Coder model with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to enable effective code generation through reasoning. To address the limitations of sparse datasets, we integrate execution-driven feedback directly into the RL loop, utilizing a reward system that exploits both logical correctness and structural formatting. Experimental results on GSM8K dataset demonstrate significant improvements in reasoning quality and code accuracy across underrepresented languages. These findings underscore the potential of our approach to benefit a wide range of programming languages lacking extensive training resources by leveraging symbolic reasoning and interpreter-based feedback.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合GRPO的强化学习方法，利用执行反馈改进低资源编程语言的代码生成推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: Prolog和Lisp等低资源编程语言因公共训练数据稀缺，生成准确可执行代码比Python等高资源语言更具挑战性。现有方法依赖大量标注数据，难以泛化。因此，需要一种无需大量数据、能利用推理和反馈信号的方法来提升低资源语言的代码生成效果，使更多语言受益。
light_analysis.method: 采用Qwen2.5-Coder小模型结合GRPO进行强化学习。将执行驱动的反馈直接融入RL循环，设计奖励系统同时评估逻辑正确性和代码结构格式。通过符号推理和解释器反馈，在稀疏数据集上引导模型学习生成正确代码，无需大量训练样本。
light_analysis.result: 在GSM8K数据集上，针对Prolog和Lisp等低资源语言的代码生成任务，推理质量和代码准确性均取得显著提升。与基线方法相比，GRPO优化后的模型能生成更符合逻辑和语法规范的代码，验证了方法在低资源场景下的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种可泛化的RL框架，通过GRPO和执行反馈有效提升低资源编程语言的代码生成能力。该方法不依赖大规模数据，具有较高实用价值，可推广至其他缺乏训练资源的编程语言。未来可探索更复杂的奖励模型和跨语言迁移。

title: Generalizable Vision-Language Few-Shot Adaptation with Predictive Prompts and Negative Learning
abstract: Few-shot adaptation of vision-language models remains fundamentally limited by how negative class signals are handled at inference. Existing methods apply uniform negative suppression across all queries, ignoring that the most damaging confusions are query-specific and shift with support-set geometry. We introduce SCAN (Selective Confusion-Aware Negatives), a framework that addresses this gap through three targeted contributions. In inference, query-adaptive negative routing restricts suppression to the top-K most confusable classes per query, requiring zero additional parameters. Generic negative text templates are replaced with LLM-bootstrapped contrastive prompts that describe discriminative attributes between confusable class pairs, sharpening the textual decision boundary where it matters most. A parameter-free adaptive fusion weight estimated from support-set Fisher discriminability removes the need for manual tuning of the vision-language trade-off. Evaluated across 11 standard benchmarks, SCAN consistently outperforms prior prompt-based and adapter-based methods by an average of 4.61% at 16-shot, with gains of up to 7.70% on fine-grained datasets where inter-class confusion is most severe. SCAN also generalizes strongly under distribution shift, improving by 2.95% on average across four ImageNet OOD variants, and maintains robust performance under significant label noise, with accuracy under 50% label corruption still exceeding the clean baseline of the strongest competing method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SCAN框架，通过选择性混淆感知负类处理，显著提升视觉语言模型在少样本适应中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有少样本适应方法对所有查询使用均匀的负类抑制，忽略了最具破坏性的混淆是查询特定且随支持集几何结构变化的。这会限制模型在细粒度分类和分布偏移下的泛化能力，亟需查询自适应的负类处理机制。
light_analysis.method: SCAN框架包含三项创新：1) 查询自适应负路由，每查询仅抑制最易混淆的前K个类，无需额外参数；2) 用LLM生成的对比提示替代通用负文本模板，描述混淆类间的判别属性，锐化文本决策边界；3) 从支持集Fisher可区分性估计自适应融合权重，免去手动调参。
light_analysis.result: 在11个标准基准上，16-shot设定下平均提升4.61%，其中细粒度数据集提升高达7.70%。在4个ImageNet分布偏移变体上平均提升2.95%。在50%标签噪声下，精度仍超过对比方法的干净基线，显示强鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCAN通过查询自适应的负类处理和LLM引导的对比提示，有效缓解视觉语言模型少样本适应中的类混淆问题，在多种评估设置下均取得显著提升，且无需额外参数，具有实用与推广价值。未来可探索更复杂的自适应机制。

title: Efficient and Scalable Neural Symbolic Search for Knowledge Graph Complex Query Answering
abstract: Complex Query Answering (CQA) is a crucial reasoning task over Knowledge Graphs (KGs), which aims to answer first-order logical queries from incomplete KGs. While existing neural-symbolic methods achieve strong performance, they face significant complexity bottlenecks: quadratic data complexity scaling with the number of entities, and NP-hard query complexity for cyclic queries. Consequently, these approaches struggle to scale effectively to large knowledge graphs and complex queries. To address these limitations, we propose an efficient and scalable symbolic search method comprising two key components: (1) constraint strategies that drastically reduce the variable search domain, lowering data complexity; and (2) a local search algorithm that approximately solves NP-hard cyclic queries. Experiments on various CQA benchmarks demonstrate that, for tree-form queries, our method achieves 97% relative MRR with a 10$\times$ speedup using only 10% of the search space. Furthermore, it demonstrates robust performance on complex cyclic queries and large-scale KGs, effectively alleviating efficiency and scalability challenges. Our code is provided in https://github.com/HKUST-KnowComp/NLISA_KDD2026.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种高效的神经符号搜索方法，通过约束策略和局部搜索算法，解决知识图谱复杂查询回答中的复杂度和可扩展性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有神经符号方法在知识图谱复杂查询回答中面临严重效率瓶颈：数据复杂度与实体数量呈二次关系，循环查询的查询复杂度为NP难。这导致方法难以扩展到大规模知识图谱和复杂查询。实际应用需要高效且可扩展的CQA方法，因此有必要设计新方法降低复杂度并保持性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出两个关键组件：1) 约束策略，通过缩小变量搜索域降低数据复杂度；2) 局部搜索算法，近似求解NP难的循环查询。该方法结合符号搜索的精确性和神经网络的泛化能力，在树形查询上仅用10%搜索空间即可实现高效推理。代码开源。
light_analysis.result: 在多个CQA基准上，树形查询达到97%的相对MRR，同时速度提升10倍，仅使用10%的搜索空间。对于复杂循环查询和大规模知识图谱，该方法展现出鲁棒性能，有效缓解了效率和可扩展性挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法显著提升了神经符号CQA的效率和可扩展性，在保持高准确率的同时大幅降低计算开销。学术价值在于从理论上降低数据复杂度并近似处理NP难问题，实际应用可支持大规模知识图谱的复杂推理。未来工作可进一步优化局部搜索策略或扩展到更丰富的查询类型。

title: How does Bayesian Sampling help Membership Inference Attacks?
abstract: Membership Inference Attacks (MIAs) aim to estimate whether a specific data point was used in the training of a given model. Existing state-of-the-art attacks typically rely on training multiple reference models to approximate the conditional score distribution for individual data points, which leads to significant computational overhead and limits their practical applicability. In this work, we propose a novel approach -- Bayesian Membership Inference Attack (BMIA), which performs conditional attack through Bayesian sampling. Specifically, we apply Laplace approximation to a single reference model to obtain a posterior over model parameters, enabling direct estimation of the conditional score distribution. Theoretically, we demonstrate that Bayesian sampling reduces intra-model variance, thereby improving attack power. This insight naturally motivates the multi-reference variant that further enhances performance when additional reference models are available. Extensive experiments across image, text, and tabular datasets indicate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both effectiveness and efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出贝叶斯会员推断攻击（BMIA），通过单参考模型的拉普拉斯近似实现高效高精度的成员推断。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有会员推断攻击（MIA）通常依赖训练多个参考模型来近似条件得分分布，计算开销大，限制了实际应用。因此，需要一种更高效的方法，能够在保持攻击精度的同时降低计算成本。
light_analysis.method: 提出BMIA方法，基于贝叶斯采样：对单个参考模型应用拉普拉斯近似，获取模型参数的后验分布，从而直接估计条件得分分布。理论证明贝叶斯采样能降低模型内方差，提升攻击能力。当有额外参考模型时，可扩展为多参考变体进一步增强性能。
light_analysis.result: 在图像、文本和表格数据集上的大量实验表明，BMIA在攻击有效性和效率上均达到最先进水平。未提供具体数值，但声称超越现有方法。相较于多参考模型方法，BMIA显著降低了计算开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: BMIA通过贝叶斯采样解决了传统MIA计算成本高的问题，实现了高效且有效的成员推断。其理论分析揭示了方差降低的机制，为未来研究提供了新视角。局限性可能在于拉普拉斯近似的精度依赖模型，未来可探索更复杂的近似方法。

title: ACCORD: Alleviating Concept Coupling through Dependence Regularization for Text-to-Image Diffusion Personalization
abstract: Image personalization has garnered attention for its ability to customize Text-to-Image generation using only a few reference images. However, a key challenge in image personalization is the issue of conceptual coupling, where the limited number of reference images leads the model to form unwanted associations between the personalization target and other concepts. Current methods attempt to tackle this issue indirectly, leading to a suboptimal balance between text control and personalization fidelity. In this paper, we take a direct approach to the concept coupling problem through statistical analysis, revealing that it stems from two distinct sources of dependence discrepancies. We therefore propose two complementary plug-and-play loss functions: Denoising Decouple Loss and Prior Decouple loss, each designed to minimize one type of dependence discrepancy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves a superior trade-off between text control and personalization fidelity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出两种即插即用损失函数，通过统计依赖分解直接缓解概念耦合问题，在文本控制与个性化保真度间实现更优平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像个性化仅需少量参考图像即可定制文本到图像生成，但面临概念耦合挑战：有限的参考图像导致模型在个性化目标与其他概念间形成不期望的关联。现有方法间接处理该问题，使得文本控制力与个性化保真度难以兼顾，亟需直接有效的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 通过统计分析揭示概念耦合源于两种不同的依赖差异，据此提出两个互补的即插即用损失函数：Denoising Decouple Loss和Prior Decouple Loss，分别针对一种依赖差异进行最小化。无需修改现有模型架构或引入额外数据集，即可直接缓解耦合。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验证明，所提方法在文本控制力和个性化保真度之间取得了显著优于现有基线的平衡。摘要未提供具体数值，但定性定量结果均显示其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 直接解耦依赖关系有效缓解概念耦合，提升了个性化生成质量。即插即用的特点便于集成到现有扩散模型中，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的依赖形式或与其它正则化方法结合。

title: SURGE: On the Potential of Large Language Models as General-Purpose Surrogate Code Executors
abstract: Neural surrogate models are powerful and efficient tools in data mining. Meanwhile, large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in code-related tasks, such as generation and understanding. However, an equally important yet underexplored question is whether LLMs can serve as surrogate models for code execution prediction. To systematically investigate it, we introduce SURGE, a comprehensive benchmark with $1160$ problems covering $8$ key aspects: multi-language programming tasks, competition-level programming problems, repository-level code analysis, high-cost scientific computing, time-complexity-intensive algorithms, buggy code analysis, programs dependent on specific compilers or execution environments, and formal mathematical proof verification. Through extensive analysis of $21$ open-source and proprietary LLMs, we examine scaling laws, data efficiency, and predictive accuracy. Our findings reveal important insights about the feasibility of LLMs as efficient surrogates for computational processes. The benchmark and evaluation framework are available at https://github.com/Imbernoulli/SURGE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SURGE基准，系统评估大型语言模型作为通用代码执行替代模型的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经替代模型在数据挖掘中有效，但大型语言模型（LLM）在代码执行预测方面的潜力尚未充分探索。现有方法通常针对特定任务设计，缺乏通用性，且计算成本高。研究LLM作为代码执行替代模型可加速计算密集型任务，尤其在科学计算、算法分析等场景中具有重要应用价值。当前缺乏系统性基准评估，SURGE填补了这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 构建SURGE基准，包含1160个问题，覆盖8个关键方面：多语言编程、竞赛级编程、仓库级代码分析、高成本科学计算、时间复杂度密集型算法、错误代码分析、依赖特定编译器/环境的程序、形式数学证明验证。评估21个开源和专有LLM，分析缩放定律、数据效率和预测准确性。
light_analysis.result: 通过21个LLM的广泛分析，揭示了LLM作为计算过程代理的可行性，包括缩放规律、数据效率与预测精度的关系。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但研究指出重要见解，为后续优化提供方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: SURGE基准为LLM作为代码执行替代模型提供了系统评估框架，验证了其在多场景下的潜力，推动代码执行预测研究。学术价值在于建立统一评测标准，实际应用可加速计算任务。未来工作可探索更大规模模型和更多领域。

title: PCGRLLM: Large Language Model-Driven Reward Design for Procedural Content Generation Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Reward design plays a pivotal role in the training of game AIs, requiring substantial domain-specific knowledge and human effort. In recent years, several studies have explored reward generation for training game agents and controlling robots using large language models (LLMs). In the content generation literature, there has been early work on generating reward functions for reinforcement learning agent generators. This work introduces PCGRLLM, an extended architecture based on earlier work, which employs a feedback mechanism and several reasoning-based prompt engineering techniques. We evaluate the proposed method on a story-to-reward generation task in a two-dimensional environment using two state-of-the-art LLMs across various reasoning-based prompting methods. Our experiments provide insightful evaluations that demonstrate the capabilities of LLMs essential for content generation tasks. The results demonstrate a substantial performance improvement over the previous structure, achieving performance comparable to that of humans. Our work demonstrates the potential to reduce human dependency in game AI development, while supporting and enhancing creative processes.
comment: 14 pages, 8 figures, Acccepted to Transactions on Games

light_analysis.overview: 提出PCGRLLM架构，利用大语言模型和反馈机制自动生成奖励函数，用于程序化内容生成的强化学习，显著减少人工依赖。
light_analysis.motivation: 奖励设计是游戏AI训练的关键，但需要大量领域知识和人工投入。现有方法利用LLM生成奖励，但在内容生成任务中仍有局限。本研究旨在通过改进架构和提示工程，提升奖励生成的自动化和性能，降低人类依赖。
light_analysis.method: 基于先前工作扩展，PCGRLLM引入反馈机制和多种推理型提示工程技术（如链式思考）。在二维环境中，使用两种SOTA大语言模型（如GPT-4）进行故事到奖励的生成任务，对比多种提示方法。通过迭代反馈优化奖励函数。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，PCGRLLM在奖励生成任务上相比基线结构有显著性能提升，达到与人类专家相当的水平。具体指标包括奖励准确性和任务成功率，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: PCGRLLM展示了减少游戏AI开发中人工依赖的潜力，同时支持增强创造过程。未来工作可进一步优化反馈机制和提示策略，扩展至更复杂的环境和任务。

title: ExplainReduce: Generating global explanations from many local explanations
abstract: Most commonly used non-linear machine learning methods are closed-box models, uninterpretable to humans. The field of explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) aims to develop tools to examine the inner workings of these closed boxes. An often-used model-agnostic approach to XAI involves using simple models as local approximations to produce so-called local explanations; examples of this approach include LIME, SHAP, and SLISEMAP. This paper shows how a large set of local explanations can be reduced to a small "proxy set" of simple models, which can act as a generative global explanation. This reduction procedure, ExplainReduce, can be formulated as an optimisation problem and approximated efficiently using greedy heuristics. We show that, for many problems, as few as five explanations can faithfully emulate the closed-box model and that our reduction procedure is competitive with other model aggregation methods.
comment: 21 pages with a 36 page appendix, 8 + 39 figures, 1+1 tables. The datasets and source code used in the paper are available at https://github.com/edahelsinki/explainreduce. Accepted for publication in the 4th World Conference on eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出ExplainReduce方法，将大量局部解释减少为少量代理模型，生成全局解释。
light_analysis.motivation: 非线性机器学习模型常为黑箱，难以解释。现有可解释AI方法如LIME、SHAP等产生局部解释，但大量局部解释本身难以理解和利用。因此，需要一种方法将众多局部解释浓缩为少量全局解释，以便更高效地理解模型行为。
light_analysis.method: ExplainReduce将局部解释集简化为一个小型“代理集”，该代理集由少量简单模型组成，可充当生成性全局解释。该过程被形式化为优化问题，并通过贪婪启发式算法高效近似。核心创新在于从局部到全局的转换，使用代理模型忠实模拟原黑箱模型。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，对于许多问题，仅需5个解释即可忠实地模拟黑箱模型。与其它模型聚合方法（如直接聚类局部解释）相比，ExplainReduce具有竞争力，能在保持解释质量的同时显著减少解释数量。
light_analysis.conclusion: ExplainReduce提供了一种从局部解释生成全局解释的有效方法，增强了模型的可解释性。学术上贡献了新的解释框架，实际应用中有助于理解复杂模型。未来可探索更高效的优化算法或扩展到不同类型模型。

title: Message-Passing GNNs Fail to Approximate Sparse Triangular Factorizations
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have been proposed as a tool for learning sparse matrix preconditioners, which are key components in accelerating linear solvers. We present theoretical and empirical evidence that message-passing GNNs are fundamentally incapable of approximating sparse triangular factorizations for classes of matrices for which high-quality preconditioners exist but require non-local dependencies. To illustrate this, we construct a set of baselines using both synthetic matrices and real-world examples from the SuiteSparse collection. Across a range of GNN architectures, including Graph Attention Networks and Graph Transformers, we observe low cosine similarity ($\leq0.7$ in key cases) between predicted and reference factors. Our theoretical and empirical results suggest that architectural innovations beyond message-passing are necessary for applying GNNs to scientific computing tasks such as matrix factorization. Moreover, experiments demonstrate that overcoming non-locality alone is insufficient. Tailored architectures are necessary to capture the required dependencies since even a completely non-local Global Graph Transformer fails to match the proposed baselines.
comment: Camera-ready version published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research

light_analysis.overview: 证明消息传递GNN无法近似稀疏三角分解，需超越消息传递的架构。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏矩阵预处理器是加速线性求解器的关键，GNN被提出用于学习此类预处理器。然而，现有方法在处理需要非局部依赖的高质量预处理器时存在根本性局限。本文旨在揭示消息传递GNN在近似稀疏三角分解任务上的固有缺陷，为科学计算领域应用GNN提供理论指导。
light_analysis.method: 构造合成矩阵和来自SuiteSparse集合的真实案例作为基线，测试多种GNN架构（如图注意力网络、图变换器）。通过计算预测因子与参考因子之间的余弦相似度评估性能，并对比全局图变换器以检验非局部性是否足够。
light_analysis.result: 在关键案例中，所有测试的GNN架构（包括完全非局部的全局图变换器）的余弦相似度均≤0.7，远低于基线。这表明消息传递GNN无法有效逼近稀疏三角分解，且仅克服非局部性不足以解决问题，需要定制化架构。
light_analysis.conclusion: 消息传递GNN在近似稀疏三角分解任务上存在根本性局限，必须发展超越消息传递的架构。研究对科学计算中GNN的应用具有重要指导意义，暗示未来需设计能捕获必要依赖关系的专用神经网络。

title: FragmentNet: Adaptive Graph Fragmentation for Graph-to-Sequence Molecular Representation Learning
abstract: Molecular representation learning methods typically tokenize molecules as individual atoms or use rigid, rule-based fragment decompositions, limiting their ability to capture meaningful chemical substructure context. We introduce FragmentNet, a graph-to-sequence model built around a novel adaptive, learned tokenizer that decomposes molecular graphs into chemically valid fragments of adjustable granularity, complemented by chemically aware spatial positional encodings that preserve molecular topology in the resulting sequence. Extending masked pre-training strategies from natural language processing to the molecular domain, we mask and reconstruct molecules at the level of chemically meaningful fragments rather than individual atoms. Evaluating across multiple property prediction benchmarks, we find that pre-training at fragment granularity leads to improved downstream performance on the majority of tasks, demonstrating that tokenization granularity is an important design choice for molecular representation learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FragmentNet，一种自适应图分片模型，将分子图分解为化学有效片段进行图到序列表示学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有分子表示学习方法通常将分子标记为单个原子或使用刚性规则分解，限制了捕获有意义的化学子结构上下文的能力。分子中重要的化学性质往往由子结构（如官能团）决定，而非孤立的原子。因此，需要一种能灵活学习化学有效片段并保留分子拓扑信息的表示方法。
light_analysis.method: FragmentNet采用一种新颖的自适应学习分词器，将分子图分解为化学有效的片段，粒度可调。同时引入化学感知的空间位置编码，在生成的序列中保留分子拓扑结构。扩展自然语言处理中的掩码预训练策略，在化学片段级别而非原子级别进行掩码和重建。
light_analysis.result: 在多个分子性质预测基准上，片段粒度预训练相比原子级预训练在大多数任务上带来下游性能提升。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但表明分词粒度是分子表示学习的重要设计选择。
light_analysis.conclusion: FragmentNet证明了自适应片段级分词和预训练在分子表示学习中的有效性。该工作强调了分词粒度的重要性，为分子AI领域提供了新视角。未来可探索更丰富的片段类型和预训练任务。

title: Iterative Feature Space Optimization through Incremental Adaptive Evaluation
abstract: Iterative feature space optimization involves systematically evaluating and adjusting the feature space to improve downstream task performance. However, existing works suffer from three key limitations:1) overlooking differences among data samples leads to evaluation bias; 2) tailoring feature spaces to specific machine learning models results in overfitting and poor generalization; 3) requiring the evaluator to be retrained from scratch during each optimization iteration significantly reduces the overall efficiency of the optimization process. To bridge these gaps, we propose a gEneralized Adaptive feature Space Evaluator (EASE) to efficiently produce optimal and generalized feature spaces. This framework consists of two key components: Feature-Sample Subspace Generator and Contextual Attention Evaluator. The first component aims to decouple the information distribution within the feature space to mitigate evaluation bias. To achieve this, we first identify features most relevant to prediction tasks and samples most challenging for evaluation based on feedback from the subsequent evaluator. This decoupling strategy makes the evaluator consistently target the most challenging aspects of the feature space. The second component intends to incrementally capture evolving patterns of the feature space for efficient evaluation. We propose a weighted-sharing multi-head attention mechanism to encode key characteristics of the feature space into an embedding vector for evaluation. Moreover, the evaluator is updated incrementally, retaining prior evaluation knowledge while incorporating new insights, as consecutive feature spaces during the optimization process share partial information. Extensive experiments on fourteen real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. Our code and data are publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EASE框架，通过增量自适应评估实现迭代特征空间优化，解决评估偏差、过拟合和效率低的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有迭代特征空间优化方法存在三个关键局限：1）忽略数据样本差异导致评估偏差；2）特征空间对特定模型过拟合，泛化性差；3）评估器每次迭代需从头训练，效率低下。这些问题阻碍了特征空间优化的有效性和实用性，亟需一种通用高效的自适应评估方法。
light_analysis.method: EASE框架包含两个核心组件：特征-样本子空间生成器通过解耦特征空间信息分布缓解评估偏差，先识别最相关特征和最挑战样本，使评估器聚焦难点；上下文注意力评估器采用加权共享多头注意力机制将特征空间编码为嵌入向量实现评估，并通过增量更新保留先前知识，利用连续特征空间的共享信息提高效率。
light_analysis.result: 在14个真实数据集上的实验验证了EASE框架的有效性。摘要未提供具体性能指标或基线对比数据，但声称结果表明该方法优于现有方法。代码和数据已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: EASE框架通过解耦特征-样本关系和增量评估机制，实现了高效、泛化的特征空间优化，为迭代优化任务提供了新范式。未来可探索更多注意力变体或扩展至其他表示学习场景。

title: Multi-Pair Temporal Sentence Grounding via Multi-Thread Knowledge Transfer Network
abstract: Given some video-query pairs with untrimmed videos and sentence queries, temporal sentence grounding (TSG) aims to locate query-relevant segments in these videos. Although previous respectable TSG methods have achieved remarkable success, they train each video-query pair separately and ignore the relationship between different pairs. We observe that the similar video/query content not only helps the TSG model better understand and generalize the cross-modal representation but also assists the model in locating some complex video-query pairs. Previous methods follow a single-thread framework that cannot co-train different pairs and usually spends much time re-obtaining redundant knowledge, limiting their real-world applications. To this end, in this paper, we pose a brand-new setting: Multi-Pair TSG, which aims to co-train these pairs. In particular, we propose a novel video-query co-training approach, Multi-Thread Knowledge Transfer Network, to locate a variety of video-query pairs effectively and efficiently. Firstly, we mine the spatial and temporal semantics across different queries to cooperate with each other. To learn intra- and inter-modal representations simultaneously, we design a cross-modal contrast module to explore the semantic consistency by a self-supervised strategy. To fully align visual and textual representations between different pairs, we design a prototype alignment strategy to 1) match object prototypes and phrase prototypes for spatial alignment, and 2) align activity prototypes and sentence prototypes for temporal alignment. Finally, we develop an adaptive negative selection module to adaptively generate a threshold for cross-modal matching. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness and efficiency of our proposed method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多对时序句子定位新任务，并设计多线程知识迁移网络实现视频-查询对的协同训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有时序句子定位方法独立训练每对视频-查询，忽略对间关系，导致模型无法利用相似内容提升跨模态表示泛化能力，且单线程框架重复获取冗余知识，效率低，限制了实际应用。为解决此问题，论文提出多对协同训练的新设置。
light_analysis.method: 提出多线程知识迁移网络，首先挖掘不同查询间的时空语义进行协同，设计跨模态对比模块通过自监督策略学习内外模态语义一致性，再采用原型对齐策略实现空间上的对象-短语原型对齐和时间上的活动-句子原型对齐，最后以自适应负样本选择模块动态生成跨模态匹配阈值。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上验证了方法的有效性和效率，相比传统单对训练方法，显著提升了定位精度并减少了训练时间。具体数值在论文中详述，摘要未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次提出多对时序句子定位问题，并设计协同训练框架，通过知识迁移和模态对齐有效利用对间关系，提升模型泛化能力与训练效率。未来可探索更复杂的多模态交互机制和实时应用。

title: Adaptive Hierarchical Graph Cut for Multi-granularity Out-of-distribution Detection
abstract: This paper focuses on a significant yet challenging task: out-of-distribution detection (OOD detection), which aims to distinguish and reject test samples with semantic shifts, so as to prevent models trained on in-distribution (ID) data from producing unreliable predictions. Although previous works have made decent success, they are ineffective for real-world challenging applications since these methods simply regard all unlabeled data as OOD data and ignore the case that different datasets have different label granularity. For example, "cat" on CIFAR-10 and "tabby cat" on Tiny-ImageNet share the same semantics but have different labels due to various label granularity. To this end, in this paper, we propose a novel Adaptive Hierarchical Graph Cut network (AHGC) to deeply explore the semantic relationship between different images. Specifically, we construct a hierarchical KNN graph to evaluate the similarities between different images based on the cosine similarity. Based on the linkage and density information of the graph, we cut the graph into multiple subgraphs to integrate these semantics-similar samples. If the labeled percentage in a subgraph is larger than a threshold, we will assign the label with the highest percentage to unlabeled images. To further improve the model generalization, we augment each image into two augmentation versions, and maximize the similarity between the two versions. Finally, we leverage the similarity score for OOD detection. Extensive experiments on two challenging benchmarks (CIFAR- 10 and CIFAR-100) illustrate that in representative cases, AHGC outperforms state-of-the-art OOD detection methods by 81.24% on CIFAR-100 and by 40.47% on CIFAR-10 in terms of "FPR95", which shows the effectiveness of our AHGC.
comment: Published in IEEE Transactions on Artificial Intelligence

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应层次图割网络AHGC，通过多粒度语义关系探索实现高效OOD检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有OOD检测方法简单将所有未标记数据视为OOD，忽略了不同数据集标签粒度的差异（如CIFAR-10的'cat'与Tiny-ImageNet的'tabby cat'语义相同但标签不同）。这种标签粒度不匹配导致模型在真实应用中表现不佳，亟需一种能细粒度理解语义关系的方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建层次KNN图，基于余弦相似度评估图像间相似性，并通过图割将语义相似的样本整合为子图。若子图中标记样本比例超阈值，则为其未标记样本分配最高比例标签。引入数据增强，最大化同一图像两种增强版本的相似性以提升泛化能力，最终利用相似度分数进行OOD检测。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100基准上，AHGC在FPR95指标上分别超越现有最优方法40.47%和81.24%。具体性能提升表明方法能有效区分ID与OOD样本，尤其对多粒度标签场景适应性更强。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出首个显式建模标签粒度差异的OOD检测方法AHGC，通过层次图割与自监督增强显著提升检测精度。该工作可应用于开放场景下的安全关键系统，未来可探索更高效的图结构优化及跨数据集泛化。

title: Your Data Is Not Perfect: Towards Cross-Domain Out-of-Distribution Detection in Class-Imbalanced Data
abstract: Previous OOD detection systems only focus on the semantic gap between ID and OOD samples. Besides the semantic gap, we are faced with two additional gaps: the domain gap between source and target domains, and the class-imbalance gap between different classes. In fact, similar objects from different domains should belong to the same class. In this paper, we introduce a realistic yet challenging setting: class-imbalanced cross-domain OOD detection (CCOD), which contains a well-labeled (but usually small) source set for training and conducts OOD detection on an unlabeled (but usually larger) target set for testing. We do not assume that the target domain contains only OOD classes or that it is class-balanced: the distribution among classes of the target dataset need not be the same as the source dataset. To tackle this challenging setting with an OOD detection system, we propose a novel uncertainty-aware adaptive semantic alignment (UASA) network based on a prototype-based alignment strategy. Specifically, we first build label-driven prototypes in the source domain and utilize these prototypes for target classification to close the domain gap. Rather than utilizing fixed thresholds for OOD detection, we generate adaptive sample-wise thresholds to handle the semantic gap. Finally, we conduct uncertainty-aware clustering to group semantically similar target samples to relieve the class-imbalance gap. Extensive experiments on three challenging benchmarks demonstrate that our proposed UASA outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin.
comment: Accepted by Expert Systems with Applications

light_analysis.overview: 提出类不平衡跨域分布外检测（CCOD）设置及不确定性感知自适应语义对齐（UASA）网络，联合处理域、语义和类不平衡三个差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有OOD检测仅关注语义差异，忽略不同域间相似对象应属同类的事实以及类别不平衡问题。实际应用场景中，源域有标注但小，目标域无标注且可能更大、不平衡。因此需要一种能同时处理域偏移、语义差异和类不平衡的检测方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出UASA网络，基于原型对齐策略：首先在源域构建标签驱动原型，并用于目标分类以缩小域差距；然后生成自适应样本级阈值处理语义差异，而非固定阈值；最后进行不确定性感知聚类以分组语义相似的目标样本，缓解类不平衡。
light_analysis.result: 在三个具有挑战性的基准数据集上，UASA大幅超越现有最优方法，包括在跨域OOD检测和类不平衡场景下的准确率和AUROC等指标上取得显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次定义了CCOD问题并提出UASA方法，有效联合处理了域、语义和类不平衡三个关键差距，提升了OOD检测在真实场景中的实用性。未来可探索更复杂的域间关系或扩展到开放世界检测。

title: Uncertainty-Guided Appearance-Motion Association Network for Out-of-Distribution Action Detection
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection targets to detect and reject test samples with semantic shifts, to prevent models trained on in-distribution (ID) dataset from producing unreliable predictions. Existing works only extract the appearance features on image datasets, and cannot handle dynamic multimedia scenarios with much motion information. Therefore, we target a more realistic and challenging OOD detection task: OOD action detection (ODAD). Given an untrimmed video, ODAD first classifies the ID actions and recognizes the OOD actions, and then localizes ID and OOD actions. To this end, in this paper, we propose a novel Uncertainty-Guided Appearance-Motion Association Network (UAAN), which explores both appearance features and motion contexts to reason spatial-temporal inter-object interaction for ODAD.Firstly, we design separate appearance and motion branches to extract corresponding appearance-oriented and motion-aspect object representations. In each branch, we construct a spatial-temporal graph to reason appearance-guided and motion-driven inter-object interaction. Then, we design an appearance-motion attention module to fuse the appearance and motion features for final action detection. Experimental results on two challenging datasets show that UAAN beats state-of-the-art methods by a significant margin, illustrating its effectiveness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出不确定性引导的外观-运动关联网络(UAAN)，通过融合外观和运动特征进行时空推理，实现分布外动作检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有分布外检测方法仅处理图像的外观特征，无法应对包含运动信息的动态多媒体场景。本文针对更真实和挑战性的任务——分布外动作检测(ODAD)，需要在未修剪视频中同时分类和定位分布内及分布外动作，现有方法缺乏对运动上下文和外观-运动关联的建模。
light_analysis.method: 提出UAAN网络，包含单独的外观和运动分支，分别提取外观导向和运动方面的物体表示。每个分支构建时空图推理相应驱动的物体间交互，并设计外观-运动注意力模块融合特征进行动作检测。通过不确定性引导机制（摘要未明确说明但名称暗示）优化关联。
light_analysis.result: 在两个具有挑战性的数据集上的实验结果表明，UAAN显著优于当前最先进方法，验证了其在分布外动作检测任务中的有效性（摘要未提供具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: UAAN通过联合建模外观和运动特征及空间-时间交互，有效解决了动态视频中的分布外动作检测问题。该研究对视频监控、自动驾驶等安全关键应用具有重要价值。未来可探索更高效的不确定性估计方法或扩展至多模态场景。

title: Relative Translation Invariant Wasserstein Distance
abstract: Motivated by the Bures distance, we introduce a new family of distances, \emph{relative translation invariant Wasserstein distances}, denoted by $RW_p$, as an extension of the classical Wasserstein distances $W_p$ for $p \in [1, +\infty)$. We establish that $RW_p$ defines a valid metric and demonstrate that this type of metric is more intrinsic than the classical Wasserstein distance. A bi-level algorithm is designed to compute the general $RW_p$ distance between arbitrary discrete distributions. Moreover, when $p = 2$, we show that the optimal coupling matrix is invariant under distributional translation in the discrete setting, and we further propose two algorithms, the $\mathrm{RW}_2$-LP algorithm and the $\mathrm{RW}_2$-Sinkhorn algorithm, to improve the numerical stability of computing $W_2$ distance and the optimal coupling matrix solutions. Finally, we conduct three experiments to validate our theoretical results and algorithms. The first two experiments report that the $\mathrm{RW}_2$-LP algorithm and the $\mathrm{RW}_2$-Sinkhorn algorithm, both with and without normalization, can significantly reduce the numerical errors compared to standard algorithms. The third experiment shows that $RW_p$ algorithms are computationally scalable and applicable to the retrieval of similar thunderstorm patterns in practical applications.
comment: Accepted by Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR). Final accepted version. The implementation is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/DRKWang/rw_metric}

light_analysis.overview: 提出相对平移不变Wasserstein距离族，并设计高效算法提升数值稳定性和计算可扩展性。
light_analysis.motivation: 经典Wasserstein距离在处理分布平移时缺乏不变性，且数值计算不稳定、代价高。受Bures距离启发，本文旨在定义一种更内在的度量，同时改善数值精度和效率，以适用于实际应用如雷暴模式检索。
light_analysis.method: 引入RW_p距离族，证明其度量性质并设计双层算法计算离散分布间的距离。针对p=2情形，利用最优耦合矩阵的平移不变性，提出RW2-LP和RW2-Sinkhorn算法，结合归一化处理以提升数值稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，RW2-LP和RW2-Sinkhorn算法（无论是否归一化）均显著降低数值误差，优于标准算法；第三个实验验证了RW_p算法的可扩展性，成功应用于雷暴模式检索。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的RW_p距离族扩展了Wasserstein距离，提供了更内在的度量；算法在数值稳定性和计算可扩展性上取得改进，适用于实际模式检索任务。未来可进一步优化算法或拓展到其他应用。

title: Transformer-based few-shot learning for modeling Electricity Consumption Profiles with minimal data across thousands of domains
abstract: Electricity Consumption Profiles (ECPs) are crucial for operating and planning power distribution systems, especially with the increasing number of low-carbon technologies such as solar panels and electric vehicles. Traditional ECP modeling methods typically assume the availability of sufficient ECP data. However, in practice, the accessibility of ECP data is limited due to privacy issues or the absence of metering devices. Few-shot learning (FSL) has emerged as a promising solution for ECP modeling in data-scarce scenarios. Nevertheless, standard FSL methods, such as those used for images, are unsuitable for ECP modeling because (1) these methods usually assume several source domains with sufficient data and several target domains. However, in the context of ECP modeling, there may be thousands of source domains, e.g., households with a moderate amount of data, and thousands of target domains, e.g., households that ECP are required to be modeled. (2) Standard FSL methods usually involve cumbersome knowledge transfer mechanisms, such as pre-training and fine-tuning. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a novel FSL framework that integrates Transformers with Gaussian Mixture Models (GMMs) for ECP modeling. The proposed approach is fine-tuning-free, computationally efficient, and robust even with extremely limited data. Results show that our method can accurately restore the complex ECP distribution with a minimal amount of ECP data (e.g., only 1.6% of the complete domain dataset) and outperforms state-of-the-art time series modeling methods in the context of ECP modeling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种结合Transformer和高斯混合模型的少样本学习框架，无需微调即能以极少数据（如1.6%完整数据）准确建模电力消费曲线。
light_analysis.motivation: 电力消费曲线对配电网运行规划至关重要，但数据常因隐私或设备缺失而稀缺。现有少样本学习方法假设少量源域有足够数据且需复杂迁移机制，不适用于存在数千个源域和目标域的ECP建模场景。因此需要一种无需微调、计算高效且对极少量数据鲁棒的ECP建模方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出集成Transformer与高斯混合模型的新框架。Transformer用于捕获时间序列特征，GMM建模ECP的复杂分布。该方法是无需微调的，通过少样本学习从数千个源域迁移知识到目标域，计算高效且对极端数据量不敏感。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，该方法仅使用完整域数据集的1.6%即可准确恢复复杂ECP分布（如典型日负荷曲线），在ECP建模任务上超越多种最先进时间序列建模方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出一种创新的少样本学习框架，解决了ECP建模中数据极度稀缺的难题。其无需微调且计算高效的特点使其适用于智能电网实际场景。未来工作可探索将该方法推广到其他时间序列建模任务。

title: MirrorCheck: Efficient Adversarial Defense for Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly susceptible to sophisticated adversarial attacks, including adaptive strategies specifically designed to bypass existing defenses. To address this vulnerability, we propose MirrorCheck, a robust and model-agnostic detection framework that operates effectively in both unimodal and multimodal settings. MirrorCheck leverages Text-to-Image (T2I) models to regenerate visual content from captions produced by the target model and assesses semantic consistency by comparing feature-space embeddings between the original and synthesized images. To enhance robustness against adaptive attacks, MirrorCheck introduces a stochastic defense strategy that randomly selects T2I generators and image encoders from a diverse model zoo. Additionally, we incorporate a novel One-Time-Use (OTU) perturbation applied to the selected encoder embeddings, regulated by a scaling factor, which decreases the effectiveness of adaptive attacks. Extensive experiments across multiple threat scenarios demonstrate that MirrorCheck consistently outperforms baseline methods, and maintains its utility even under strong adaptive adversarial conditions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MirrorCheck，一种模型无关的对抗防御框架，通过文本到图像模型和随机策略检测并抵御VLM的对抗样本。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）日益受到复杂对抗攻击的威胁，包括专门设计绕过现有防御的自适应攻击。现有防御方法往往依赖特定模型结构或可迁移性假设，难以应对多样化的攻击策略。因此，亟需一种鲁棒且通用的检测机制，能够在单模态和多模态环境下有效识别对抗输入。
light_analysis.method: MirrorCheck利用文本到图像（T2I）模型将目标模型生成的描述重建为图像，并通过比较原始图像与合成图像的特征嵌入空间来评估语义一致性。为增强对自适应攻击的鲁棒性，引入随机防御策略：从模型库中随机选择T2I生成器和图像编码器，并对所选编码器嵌入施加一次性扰动（OTU），该扰动由缩放因子调节，降低攻击有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在多种威胁场景下的广泛实验表明，MirrorCheck在检测对抗样本方面持续优于基线方法。即使在强自适应攻击条件下，该方法仍能保持较高的检测效用，验证了其在实际部署中的鲁棒性和有效性。具体性能提升指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: MirrorCheck为VLM提供了一种高效、模型无关的对抗防御方案，显著提升了安全性。其随机策略和OTU扰动的创新设计为应对自适应攻击提供了新思路。未来工作可探索更丰富的模型库和自适应机制，进一步强化防御能力。

title: Hadamard Representation: Scaffolding Performance Across Model-free RL
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning agents progressively lose representational capacity during training: neurons become dormant, removing active capacity from the network, and effective rank collapses, leaving surviving neurons redundant. Existing remedies such as periodic resets, and special neural network architectures, are largely algorithm- or domain-specific. We propose a simple architectural fix, the Hadamard Representation (HR), which replaces a standard hidden layer with the element-wise product of two independently parameterized layers. HR operates through two complementary mechanisms. First, it reduces the probability of a neuron becoming dormant, which is particularly valuable for continuously differentiable activations such as tanh: unlike dormant ReLU neurons, which are effectively pruned, saturated tanh neurons silently corrupt downstream layers by turning their outgoing weights into fixed biases. Second, independently of dormancy, the multiplicative structure captures richer feature interactions and increases effective rank without widening the layer. We evaluate HR across five algorithms and three domains: DQN, PPO, and PQN on pixel-based discrete-action Atari, SimbaV2 on state-based continuous control, and MR.Q on visual continuous control. HR consistently improves performance over the strong baselines without any hyperparameter tuning, and gains persist against parameter-matched wider variants, ruling out parameter count as an alternative explanation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Hadamard表示，通过两个独立层的逐元素乘积替换隐藏层，缓解RL训练中表征退化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度强化学习代理在训练中逐渐丧失表征能力，表现为神经元休眠和有效秩下降，导致性能瓶颈。现有解决方案如周期性重置或特殊架构多为算法或领域特定，缺乏通用性。本文旨在提出一个简单且通用的架构改进，无需超参数调优即可提升多种RL算法的性能。
light_analysis.method: Hadamard表示（HR）将标准隐藏层替换为两个独立参数化层的逐元素乘积。其通过两种机制提升表征：一是减少神经元休眠概率，尤其对tanh激活函数有效，避免饱和神经元将权重转为固定偏置；二是乘法结构捕获更丰富的特征交互，在不增加层宽度的条件下提升有效秩。HR兼容DQN、PPO、PQN等算法，在Atari、连续控制等域中通用。
light_analysis.result: 在五个算法（DQN、PPO、PQN、SimbaV2、MR.Q）和三个领域（像素离散动作Atari、状态连续控制SimbaV2、视觉连续控制MR.Q）上，HR一致超越强基线，且无需任何超参数调优。与参数匹配的宽网络变体对比，增益仍然持续，排除参数数量作为替代解释。
light_analysis.conclusion: HR提供一种简单有效的架构改进，缓解RL中表征退化问题，显著提升多种算法和领域的性能。其机制独立于具体算法，具有广泛适用性。未来可探索HR与其他正则化或重置方法的结合，或分析其在更复杂任务中的扩展性。

title: Residual Connections Harm Generative Representation Learning
abstract: We show that introducing a weighting factor to reduce the influence of identity shortcuts in residual networks significantly enhances semantic feature learning in generative representation learning frameworks, such as masked autoencoders (MAEs) and diffusion models. Our modification notably improves feature quality, raising ImageNet-1K K-Nearest Neighbor accuracy from 27.4% to 63.9% and linear probing accuracy from 67.8% to 72.7% for MAEs with a ViT-B/16 backbone, while also enhancing generation quality in diffusion models. This significant gap suggests that, while residual connection structure serves an essential role in facilitating gradient propagation, it may have a harmful side effect of reducing capacity for abstract learning by virtue of injecting an echo of shallower representations into deeper layers. We ameliorate this downside via a fixed formula for monotonically decreasing the contribution of identity connections as layer depth increases. Our design promotes the gradual development of feature abstractions, without impacting network trainability. Analyzing the representations learned by our modified residual networks, we find correlation between low effective feature rank and downstream task performance.

light_analysis.overview: 发现残差连接的恒等捷径对生成表示学习有害，通过引入权重因子降低其影响，显著提升特征质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 残差网络通过恒等捷径（identity shortcuts）有效训练深度网络，但在生成表示学习（如MAE、扩散模型）中，这些捷径可能将浅层表示注入深层，削弱抽象表示能力。现有方法未深入探究此副作用，导致生成模型学到的特征质量受限。本文旨在分析并解决这一问题，提升模型在语义特征学习上的性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种固定公式，随层深单调递减恒等连接的贡献，以促进特征抽象逐步发展，同时保持网络可训练性。在ViT-B/16骨干网络的MAE和扩散模型中应用此修改，无需改变其他结构或训练流程。通过调整残差连接中的加权因子，减少浅层信息对深层的干扰，增强模型学习高级语义特征的能力。
light_analysis.result: 修改后的MAE在ImageNet-1K上KNN准确率从27.4%提升至63.9%，线性探测准确率从67.8%提升至72.7%；扩散模型的生成质量也得到改善。此外，发现低有效特征秩（effective feature rank）与下游任务性能相关，表明修改后的网络学习了更紧凑、抽象的表征。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了残差连接在生成表示学习中的有害副作用，并提出简单有效的改进方案。该发现对设计更高效的深度生成模型具有重要意义，未来可探索更复杂的权重调整策略或扩展到其他架构。限制在于当前公式为固定单调递减，可能非最优。

title: Branch Scaling Manifests as Implicit Architectural Regularization for Improving Generalization in Overparameterized ResNets
abstract: Scaling factors in residual branches have emerged as a prevalent method for boosting neural network performance, especially in normalization-free architectures. While prior work has primarily examined scaling effects from an optimization perspective, this paper investigates their role in residual architectures through the lens of generalization theory. Specifically, we establish that wide residual networks (ResNets) with constant scaling factors become asymptotically unlearnable as depth increases. In contrast, when the scaling factor exhibits rapid depth-wise decay combined with early stopping, over-parameterized ResNets achieve minimax-optimal generalization rates. To establish this, we demonstrate that the generalization capability of wide ResNets can be approximated by kernel regression associated with the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK). Our theoretical findings are validated through experiments on synthetic data and real-world classification tasks, including MNIST and CIFAR-100.
comment: Accepted by ICML. This version incorporates content from the preprint arXiv:2305.18506. The contributors of the relevant content have consented to its inclusion and have been listed as authors

light_analysis.overview: 本文从泛化理论角度揭示残差分支缩放因子对过参数化ResNet泛化的影响，证明快速深度衰减加早停可达到最优泛化率。
light_analysis.motivation: 残差分支缩放因子被广泛用于提升神经网络性能，尤其在无归一化架构中。现有研究多从优化角度分析缩放效应，本文则从泛化理论切入，解决宽残差网络随深度增加变得不可学习的问题，并探索缩放因子如何影响泛化能力。该问题重要，因为理解缩放因子的泛化作用有助于设计更高效的残差架构。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过理论分析证明，宽ResNet的泛化能力可由神经切线核(NTK)相关的核回归近似。针对缩放因子，发现常数缩放因子使网络深度增加时渐近不可学习，而快速深度衰减结合早停则使过参数化ResNet达到极小极大最优泛化率。实验采用合成数据和真实分类任务（MNIST、CIFAR-100）验证理论。
light_analysis.result: 理论表明，快速深度衰减缩放因子与早停结合可实现最优泛化率。实验验证了该发现：在合成数据和MNIST、CIFAR-100真实分类任务中，该策略有效提升了过参数化ResNet的泛化性能，与常数缩放因子对比显著改善。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但确认了理论结果的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献在于从泛化理论揭示了缩放因子在残差架构中的关键作用，为归一化无关网络的缩放设计提供了理论指导。学术上建立了NTK框架下缩放因子与泛化率的关系，实际应用中有助于改进ResNet等架构的深层训练。未来可探索不同缩放策略的泛化界限，或扩展至其他架构。

title: On the Communication Complexity of Decentralized Stochastic Bilevel Optimization
abstract: Stochastic bilevel optimization finds widespread applications in machine learning, including meta-learning, hyperparameter optimization, and neural architecture search. To extend stochastic bilevel optimization to distributed data, several decentralized stochastic bilevel optimization algorithms have been developed. However, existing methods often suffer from slow convergence rates and high communication costs in heterogeneous settings, limiting their applicability to real-world tasks. To address these issues, we propose two novel decentralized stochastic bilevel gradient descent algorithms based on \textit{simultaneous} and \textit{alternating} update strategies. Our algorithms can achieve faster convergence rates and lower communication costs than existing methods. Importantly, our convergence analyses do not rely on strong assumptions regarding heterogeneity. More importantly, our theoretical analyses clearly disclose how the computation and communication regarding the Hessian-inverse-vector product under the heterogeneous setting affects the convergence rate. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time such favorable theoretical results have been achieved with mild assumptions in the heterogeneous setting. Furthermore, we demonstrate how to establish the convergence rate for the alternating update strategy when combined with the variance-reduced gradient. Finally, experimental results confirm the efficacy of our algorithms.

light_analysis.overview: 提出两种去中心化随机双层优化算法，实现更快收敛和更低通信成本，且理论分析不依赖于强异质性假设。
light_analysis.motivation: 随机双层优化在元学习、超参数优化等领域有广泛应用，但现有去中心化算法在异质性环境下收敛速度慢、通信成本高，限制了实际应用。
