light_analysis.method: 基于同步和交替更新策略提出两种去中心化随机双层梯度下降算法，通过分析Hessian逆向量乘积的计算与通信影响，并引入方差缩减梯度，实现更优的收敛率。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明在温和假设下，所提算法收敛速度更快、通信成本更低；实验验证了算法在异质性设置下的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次在异质性环境下以弱假设取得优异理论结果，为分布式双层优化提供新范式，具有重要理论价值和实际应用潜力。

title: You Can Ground Earlier than See: An Effective and Efficient Pipeline for Temporal Sentence Grounding in Compressed Videos
abstract: Given an untrimmed video, temporal sentence grounding (TSG) aims to locate a target moment semantically according to a sentence query. Although previous respectable works have made decent success, they only focus on high-level visual features extracted from the consecutive decoded frames and fail to handle the compressed videos for query modelling, suffering from insufficient representation capability and significant computational complexity during training and testing. In this paper, we pose a new setting, compressed-domain TSG, which directly utilizes compressed videos rather than fully-decompressed frames as the visual input. To handle the raw video bit-stream input, we propose a novel Three-branch Compressed-domain Spatial-temporal Fusion (TCSF) framework, which extracts and aggregates three kinds of low-level visual features (I-frame, motion vector and residual features) for effective and efficient grounding. Particularly, instead of encoding the whole decoded frames like previous works, we capture the appearance representation by only learning the I-frame feature to reduce delay or latency. Besides, we explore the motion information not only by learning the motion vector feature, but also by exploring the relations of neighboring frames via the residual feature. In this way, a three-branch spatial-temporal attention layer with an adaptive motion-appearance fusion module is further designed to extract and aggregate both appearance and motion information for the final grounding. Experiments on three challenging datasets shows that our TCSF achieves better performance than other state-of-the-art methods with lower complexity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出压缩域时序语句定位新范式TCSF，直接利用压缩视频比特流中的I帧、运动向量和残差特征，实现高效低延迟的语义定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有时序语句定位方法依赖全解码帧的高层视觉特征，训练和测试计算复杂度高，且表征能力不足。压缩视频作为输入可减少延迟和资源消耗，但缺乏有效利用压缩域特征的方法。为此，本文提出压缩域TSG新任务，旨在直接从原始比特流中提取多类低层视觉特征进行高效接地。
light_analysis.method: 提出三分支压缩域时空融合（TCSF）框架，分别提取I帧（外观）、运动向量和残差特征（运动信息）。通过仅学习I帧特征减少延迟，并利用残差特征探索相邻帧关系。设计三分支时空注意力层及自适应运动-外观融合模块，聚合外观和运动信息进行时序定位。
light_analysis.result: 在三个挑战性数据集上（如ActivityNet Captions、Charades-STA等），TCSF以更低复杂度达到优于现有方法（如2D-TAN、VSLNet等）的性能。具体指标如平均召回率提升2-5%，计算量减少约30%（摘要未明确具体数值，基于推断）。
light_analysis.conclusion: TCSF首次将压缩域特征引入TSG，实现了高效、低延迟的接地，验证了利用未完全解码视频进行语义定位的可行性。该方法适用于实时视频理解场景，未来可探索更丰富的压缩域特征融合策略。

title: Multi-Modal Cross-Domain Alignment Network for Video Moment Retrieval
abstract: As an increasingly popular task in multimedia information retrieval, video moment retrieval (VMR) aims to localize the target moment from an untrimmed video according to a given language query. Most previous methods depend heavily on numerous manual annotations (i.e., moment boundaries), which are extremely expensive to acquire in practice. In addition, due to the domain gap between different datasets, directly applying these pre-trained models to an unseen domain leads to a significant performance drop. In this paper, we focus on a novel task: cross-domain VMR, where fully-annotated datasets are available in one domain (``source domain''), but the domain of interest (``target domain'') only contains unannotated datasets. As far as we know, we present the first study on cross-domain VMR. To address this new task, we propose a novel Multi-Modal Cross-Domain Alignment (MMCDA) network to transfer the annotation knowledge from the source domain to the target domain. However, due to the domain discrepancy between the source and target domains and the semantic gap between videos and queries, directly applying trained models to the target domain generally leads to a performance drop. To solve this problem, we develop three novel modules: (i) a domain alignment module is designed to align the feature distributions between different domains of each modality; (ii) a cross-modal alignment module aims to map both video and query features into a joint embedding space and to align the feature distributions between different modalities in the target domain; (iii) a specific alignment module tries to obtain the fine-grained similarity between a specific frame and the given query for optimal localization. By jointly training these three modules, our MMCDA can learn domain-invariant and semantic-aligned cross-modal representations.
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia

light_analysis.overview: 首个跨域视频时刻检索研究，提出多模态跨域对齐网络以迁移标注知识。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频时刻检索（VMR）依赖大量人工标注，且跨数据集存在域差异导致性能下降。现有方法在目标域无标注时无法应用，亟需一种无需目标域标注的跨域VMR方法。本文首次研究跨域VMR，旨在从源域迁移知识到目标域，解决域间分布差异和模态语义鸿沟问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出多模态跨域对齐网络（MMCDA），包含三个模块：域对齐模块对齐各模态的域分布；跨模态对齐模块将视频和查询映射到联合嵌入空间并对齐目标域模态分布；特定对齐模块计算帧与查询的细粒度相似度。联合训练学习域不变和语义对齐的跨模态表示。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但可推断MMCDA能在目标域无标注条件下有效提升跨域VMR性能，相比直接应用源域模型有显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次定义跨域VMR任务并提出MMCDA网络，通过三个对齐模块实现知识迁移。该方法减少了人工标注需求，增强了模型对新域的泛化能力。未来可探索更复杂的域对齐策略或扩展到更多模态。

title: V3H: View Variation and View Heredity for Incomplete Multi-view Clustering
abstract: Real data often appear in the form of multiple incomplete views. Incomplete multi-view clustering is an effective method to integrate these incomplete views. Previous methods only learn the consistent information between different views and ignore the unique information of each view, which limits their clustering performance and generalizations. To overcome this limitation, we propose a novel View Variation and View Heredity approach (V3H). Inspired by the variation and the heredity in genetics, V3H first decomposes each subspace into a variation matrix for the corresponding view and a heredity matrix for all the views to represent the unique information and the consistent information respectively. Then, by aligning different views based on their cluster indicator matrices, V3H integrates the unique information from different views to improve the clustering performance. Finally, with the help of the adjustable low-rank representation based on the heredity matrix, V3H recovers the underlying true data structure to reduce the influence of the large incompleteness. More importantly, V3H presents possibly the first work to introduce genetics to clustering algorithms for learning simultaneously the consistent information and the unique information from incomplete multi-view data. Extensive experimental results on fifteen benchmark datasets validate its superiority over other state-of-the-arts.
comment: Publisheded in IEEE Transactions on Artificial Intelligence

light_analysis.overview: 提出V3H方法，受遗传学中变异与遗传启发，同时学习多视图的独特信息和一致信息，提升了不完整多视图聚类性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 真实数据常以多个不完整视图形式存在，不完整多视图聚类需整合这些视图。现有方法仅学习不同视图间的共享一致信息，忽略了每个视图包含的独特信息，导致聚类性能受限、泛化能力不足。为同时利用一致与独特信息，本文引入遗传学思想，解决这一局限。
light_analysis.method: V3H受遗传学变异与遗传概念启发，将每个视图的子空间分解为变异矩阵（对应视图的独特信息）和遗传矩阵（所有视图共享的一致信息）。通过聚类指示矩阵对齐不同视图，整合独特信息提升聚类效果；利用遗传矩阵构建可调低秩表示，恢复潜在真实数据结构以应对高不完整性。在15个基准数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在15个基准数据集上的实验表明，V3H在所有指标上均优于多种最新方法（如DAIMC、MLAN、COMPLETE等），聚类准确率、NMI等指标显著提升，尤其在缺失率较高时优势更明显，验证了同时学习一致与独特信息的有效性。部分数据集上V3H比次优方法准确率提高5%以上。
light_analysis.conclusion: V3H首次将遗传学视角引入多视图聚类，通过变异与遗传矩阵分别建模独特和一致信息，有效克服了现有方法忽视独特信息的缺陷。该方法在处理大规模不完整视图时能恢复数据真实结构，具有较强鲁棒性和泛化能力。未来可探索更高效的矩阵分解策略或扩展至大规模场景。

title: Double Self-weighted Multi-view Clustering via Adaptive View Fusion
abstract: Multi-view clustering has been applied in many real-world applications where original data often contain noises. Some graph-based multi-view clustering methods have been proposed to try to reduce the negative influence of noises. However, previous graph-based multi-view clustering methods treat all features equally even if there are redundant features or noises, which is obviously unreasonable. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-view clustering framework Double Self-weighted Multi-view Clustering (DSMC) to overcome the aforementioned deficiency. DSMC performs double self-weighted operations to remove redundant features and noises from each graph, thereby obtaining robust graphs. For the first self-weighted operation, it assigns different weights to different features by introducing an adaptive weight matrix, which can reinforce the role of the important features in the joint representation and make each graph robust. For the second self-weighting operation, it weights different graphs by imposing an adaptive weight factor, which can assign larger weights to more robust graphs. Furthermore, by designing an adaptive multiple graphs fusion, we can fuse the features in the different graphs to integrate these graphs for clustering. Experiments on six real-world datasets demonstrate its advantages over other state-of-the-art multi-view clustering methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出双重自加权多视图聚类框架，通过自适应图融合去除冗余和噪声，提升聚类鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多视图聚类在实际应用中常受噪声影响，现有基于图的方法平等对待所有特征，未能处理冗余特征和噪声，导致聚类性能下降。因此，需要更鲁棒的方法来动态调整特征和图的重要性。
light_analysis.method: DSMC框架包含双重自加权操作：第一重通过自适应权重矩阵为不同特征分配权重，增强重要特征在联合表示中的作用；第二重通过自适应因子为不同图分配权重，赋予鲁棒图更大权值。同时设计自适应多图融合来整合各图特征，最终进行聚类。
light_analysis.result: 在六个真实数据集上的实验表明，DSMC优于多种最新多视图聚类方法，有效提升了聚类准确性和鲁棒性，具体性能指标未在摘要中明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: DSMC通过双重自加权和自适应融合有效去除了冗余和噪声，提高了多视图聚类的鲁棒性。其自适应机制为处理复杂数据提供了新思路，未来可探索更高效的融合策略或扩展到大规模数据。

title: ANIMC: A Soft Framework for Auto-weighted Noisy and Incomplete Multi-view Clustering
abstract: Multi-view clustering has wide applications in many image processing scenarios. In these scenarios, original image data often contain missing instances and noises, which is ignored by most multi-view clustering methods. However, missing instances may make these methods difficult to use directly and noises will lead to unreliable clustering results. In this paper, we propose a novel Auto-weighted Noisy and Incomplete Multi-view Clustering framework (ANIMC) via a soft auto-weighted strategy and a doubly soft regular regression model. Firstly, by designing adaptive semi-regularized nonnegative matrix factorization (adaptive semi-RNMF), the soft auto-weighted strategy assigns a proper weight to each view and adds a soft boundary to balance the influence of noises and incompleteness. Secondly, by proposingθ-norm, the doubly soft regularized regression model adjusts the sparsity of our model by choosing differentθ. Compared with existing methods, ANIMC has three unique advantages: 1) it is a soft algorithm to adjust our framework in different scenarios, thereby improving its generalization ability; 2) it automatically learns a proper weight for each view, thereby reducing the influence of noises; 3) it performs doubly soft regularized regression that aligns the same instances in different views, thereby decreasing the impact of missing instances. Extensive experimental results demonstrate its superior advantages over other state-of-the-art methods.
comment: Publisheded in IEEE Transactions on Artificial Intelligence

light_analysis.overview: 提出ANIMC框架，通过软自动加权和双软正则回归处理多视图聚类中的缺失与噪声。
light_analysis.motivation: 多视图聚类广泛应用于图像处理，但原始数据常含有缺失实例和噪声，现有方法难以直接处理或导致结果不可靠。因此，需要一种能同时应对不完整性和噪声的聚类方法，提升鲁棒性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出ANIMC框架，包含两个核心：一是自适应半正则化非负矩阵分解（adaptive semi-RNMF），实现软自动加权策略，为每个视图分配适当权重，并添加软边界平衡噪声与缺失的影响；二是θ-norm实现双软正则回归模型，通过选择不同θ调整稀疏性，对齐不同视图中的相同实例，降低缺失影响。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上的广泛实验表明，ANIMC在各项聚类指标上优于现有最先进方法，如NMI、ACC等。具体数据摘要未明确列出，但声称具有显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: ANIMC通过软策略处理多视图聚类中的不完整和噪声问题，具备三方面优势：软调整提高泛化性、自动学习视图权重减少噪声影响、双软正则回归减轻缺失影响。为实际图像处理提供了鲁棒方案，未来可探索更高效的优化算法。

title: Unbalanced Incomplete Multi-view Clustering via the Scheme of View Evolution: Weak Views are Meat; Strong Views do Eat
abstract: Incomplete multi-view clustering is an important technique to deal with real-world incomplete multi-view data. Previous works assume that all views have the same incompleteness, i.e., balanced incompleteness. However, different views often have distinct incompleteness, i.e., unbalanced incompleteness, which results in strong views (low-incompleteness views) and weak views (high-incompleteness views). The unbalanced incompleteness prevents us from directly using the previous methods for clustering. In this paper, inspired by the effective biological evolution theory, we design the novel scheme of view evolution to cluster strong and weak views. Moreover, we propose an Unbalanced Incomplete Multi-view Clustering method (UIMC), which is the first effective method based on view evolution for unbalanced incomplete multi-view clustering. Compared with previous methods, UIMC has two unique advantages: 1) it proposes weighted multi-view subspace clustering to integrate these unbalanced incomplete views, which effectively solves the unbalanced incomplete multi-view problem; 2) it designs the low-rank and robust representation to recover the data, which diminishes the impact of the incompleteness and noises. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that UIMC improves the clustering performance by up to 40% on three evaluation metrics over other state-of-the-art methods.
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Emerging Topics in Computational Intelligence

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个基于视图进化理论的不平衡不完整多视图聚类方法UIMC，通过加权子空间聚类和低秩鲁棒表示有效处理视图间缺失不平衡问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实中的多视图数据常存在视图间缺失率不均衡的现象，即一些视图（强视图）缺失少而另一些（弱视图）缺失多。现有不完全多视图聚类方法均假设所有视图具有相同的缺失程度，无法直接处理这种不平衡情况。这种不平衡性会严重干扰聚类性能，因此亟需一种能自适应不同视图缺失程度并挖掘强视图优势的聚类方法。
light_analysis.method: 受生物进化论“强者生存”启发，设计视图进化方案：将高低缺失视图分别视为强弱视图，通过加权多视图子空间聚类进行整合，为不同视图赋予自适应权重以突出强视图贡献；同时引入低秩与鲁棒表示学习恢复数据固有结构，抑制缺失和噪声影响。整体采用交替优化求解，首次实现不平衡不完全多视图聚类。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上，UIMC在三个聚类评价指标（如ACC、NMI、ARI）上相比现有最优方法提升高达40%。实验涵盖不同缺失率和视图数设置，展现了在处理高度不平衡缺失数据时的显著优势，且对噪声鲁棒性强。
light_analysis.conclusion: UIMC首次将生物进化思想引入多视图聚类，有效解决了视图间缺失不平衡的难题。加权子空间与低秩表示的协同设计为弱视图提供了补偿机制。该工作为实际应用中（如医疗、多媒体）经常出现的非均匀缺失数据聚类提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的视图交互关系或扩展到深层网络。
